1Chronicles4:18 Anih yuu Judean loh Gedor napa Jered, Sokoh napa Heber, Zanoah napa Jekuthiel a sak. Te rhoek tah Mered loh a loh Pharaoh canu Bithiah ca rhoek ni." 
Matthew1:1 He tah Abraham kah cadil, David kah cadil, Jesuh Khrih kah rhuirhong cabu ni." 
Matthew1:2 Abraham loh Isaak a sak tih, Isaak loh Jakob a sak, Jakob loh Judah boeinaphung a sak." 
Matthew1:3 Judah neh Tamar loh Perez neh Zerah a sak tih, Perez loh Herezon a sak, Hezron loh Aram a sak." 
Matthew1:4 Aram loh Amminadab a sak tih, Aminadab loh Nahshon a sak. Nahshon loh Salmon a sak." 
Matthew1:5 Salmon neh Rahab loh Boaz a sak rhoi, Boaz neh Ruth loh Obed a sak, Obed loh Jesse a sak." 
Matthew1:6 Jesse loh manghai David a sak tih, David neh Uriah kah yurho loh Solomon a sak." 
Matthew1:7 Solomon loh Rehoboam a sak tih, Rehoboam loh Abijah a sak, Abijah loh Asa a sak" 
Matthew1:8 Asa loh Jehoshaphat a sak tih, Jehoshaphat loh Joram a sak, Joram loh Uzziah a sak" 
Matthew1:9 Uzziah loh Jotham a sak tih, Jotham loh Ahaz a sak, Ahaz loh Hezekiah a sak," 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiah loh Manasseh a sak tih, Manasseh loh Amos a sak, Amos loh Josiah a sak." 
Matthew1:11 Josiah he Babylon la a puennah kungah Jekhoniah neh a manuca rhoek te a sak. 
Matthew1:12 Babylon la a puennah hnukah, Jekhoniah loh Shealtiel a sak, Shealtiel loh Zerubbabel a sak," 
Matthew1:13 Zerubbabel loh Abiud a sak tih, Abiud loh Eliakim a sak, Eliakim loh Azor a sak," 
Matthew1:14 Azor loh Zadok a sak tih, Zadok loh Achim a sak, Achim loh Eliud a sak," 
Matthew1:15 Eliud loh Eleazar a sak tih, Eleazar loh Matthan a sak, Matthan loh Jakob a sak," 
Matthew1:16 Jakob loh Mary kah a va Joseph a sak. Anih lamloh Khrih la a khue Jesuh a sak. 
Matthew1:17 Te dongah Abraham lamloh David duela a khong la khong hlaili tih, David lamloh Babylon la a puennah duela khong hlaili, Babylon la a puennah lamloh Khrih duela boeih ah khong hlaili lo." 
Matthew1:18 Jesuh Khrih kah rhuirhong khaw ana om tangloeng. A manu Mary he Joseph hamla a bae dae a om rhoi hlan ah Mueihla Cim loh bungvawn la a om sak te a ming. 
Matthew1:19 A va Joseph tah aka dueng la om tih anih te yan ham a ngaih pawt dongah toeng hamla duem cai. 
Matthew1:20 He a poek vaengah, boeipa kah puencawn loh anih taengla a mang ah pakcak a phoe pah tih, “David capa Joseph Mary te na yuu la loh ham rhih boeh, anih a vawn he Mueihla Cim rhangnen ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew1:21 Capa a cun vaengah a ming te Jesuh na sui ni. Anih long tah a pilnam te a tholh khui lamloh a khang ni. 
Matthew1:22 Boeipa kah a thui te soep sak hamla he he boeih thoeng coeng. 
Matthew1:23 Tonghma lamlong khaw, “Oila te bungvawn la om vetih capa a cun ni, a ming tah Emmanuel la a khue uh ni he. Te tah mamih taengah aka om Khohni ni a thuingaih,” a ti." 
Matthew1:24 Joseph tah a ih kung lamkah a thoh vaengah Boeipa kah puencawn loh anih a uen bangla a ngai tih a yuu te a loh. 
Matthew1:25 Tedae capa a cun hil Mary te ming pawh. A ming te khaw Jesuh a sui. 
Matthew2:1 Manghai Herod tue vaengah Jesuh tah Judah ram Bethlehem ah thang, te vaengah khothoeng ben lamkah kholo hlangcueih rhoek Jerusalem la ha pawk uh." 
Matthew2:2 “Judah manghai aka thaang te melam a om? Anih kah aisi te khothoeng ben ah ka hmuh uh tih, anih bawk hamla ka pawk uh coeng,” a ti uh." 
Matthew2:3 Manghai Herod loh a yaak vaengah amah khaw, Jerusalem khaw boeih a hinghuen." 
Matthew2:4 Khosoihham rhoek neh pilnam khuikah cadaek rhoek te boeih a coi tih me kah Khrih nim aka thaang,” a ti nah." 
Matthew2:5 “Judea Bethlehem ah,” tila tonghma rhoek loh a daek te a a thui pa uh." 
Matthew2:5 “Judea Bethlehem ah,” tila tonghma rhoek loh a daek te a a thui pa uh." 
Matthew2:6 “Judah ram kah Bethlehem nang ngawn tah Judah khoboei rhoek khuiah a yit la na om moenih. Nang lamloh hlang aka mawt ha thoeng ni. Anih loh ka pilnam Israel te a dawndah ni. 
Matthew2:7 Herod loh kholo hlangcueih rhoek te a huep la a khue tih aisi a phoe tue te amih taengah a cae. 
Matthew2:8 Te phoeiah Bethlehem la a tueih tih, “Cet uh lamtah camoe kawng te khaeh khaeh dawt uh, na hmuh uh vaengah kai taengla, ha puen uh, te daengah ni ka lo vetih anih te ka bawk eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew2:9 Manghai ol te a yaak uh nen tah vik cet uh. Te daengah khothoeng ah aisi te lawt a hmuh uh. Te dongah amih te camoe om nah a pha hil a lamhma pah tih a soah pai pah. 
Matthew2:10 Aisi te a hmuh uh vaengah omngaihnah neh a nah la bahoeng omngaih uh. 
Matthew2:11 Im la a pha uh vaengah camoe neh a manu Mary te a hmuh uh dongah bakop doe ah a bawk uh. Te phoeiah a khohrhang te a ong uh tih a kutdoe la sui, hmueihtui neh myrrh te a paek uh." 
Matthew2:12 Tedae Herod taengah bal pawt ham a mang ah a mangthui pa tih a kho la a tloe longpuei longah bal uh. 
Matthew2:13 Amih a caeh uh phoeiah Boeipa kah puencawn loh Joseph mang ah pakcak phoe tih, “Thoo, camoe neh a manu te lo, Egypt la rhaelrham laeh, nang taengah kan thui hlan duela pahoi om laeh. Herod loh camoe te poci sak hamla cai tih a toem coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew2:14 Te dongah thoo tih camoe neh a manu te khoyin ah a loh tih, Egypt la cet." 
Matthew2:15 Te dongah Herod kah a dueknah rhi hil pahoi om. Te nen ni BOEIPA kah tonghma lamloh a thui tih, “Ka capa te Egypt lamkah ka khue,” a ti te a soep." 
Matthew2:16 Te vaengah Herod loh kholo hlangcueih kah a tamdaeng te a ming tih bahoeng a thinhul. A tue te kholo hlangcueih taeng lamloh a cae vanbangla Bethlehem khui neh a vaang pum khuikah hlang a tueih tih camoe kum nit hmui te boeih a ngawn. 
Matthew2:17 Te vaengah tonghma Jeremiah lamloh a thui tih," 
Matthew2:18 Rhama ah ol a yaak. Rhahnah neh nguekcoinah loh yet. Rakhel loh a ca rhoek te a rhah. Tedae a om uh voel pawt dongah a hloep te ngaih pawh,” a ti te soep." 
Matthew2:19 Herod a duek phoeiah, Boeipa kah puencawn tah Egypt kah Joseph mang ah pakcak phoe tih," 
Matthew2:20 “Thoo, camoe neh a manu te lo lamtah Israel kho la cet laeh, camoe kah hinglu aka mae rhoek tah duek uh coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew2:21 Te dongah thoo tih camoe neh a manu te a khuen tih, Israel kho la a kun puei." 
Matthew2:22 Tedae Arkhelas loh a napa Herod yueng la Judea te a uk tila a yaak tih tela caeh ham a rhih. Te cakhaw mang ah a mangthui pah bangla Galilee pingpang la cet. 
Matthew2:22 Tedae Arkhelas loh a napa Herod yueng la Judea te a uk tila a yaak tih tela caeh ham a rhih. Te cakhaw mang ah a mangthui pah bangla Galilee pingpang la cet. 
Matthew2:23 Te phoeiah Nazareth la a khue khopuei la cet tih kho a sak. Te tlam ni tonghma rhoek lamloh, “Nazaren la a khue ni,” a ti te a soep eh." 
Matthew3:1 Te vaeng tue ah tuinuem Johan ha pawk tih," 
Matthew3:2 Vaan ram a yoei coeng dongah yut uh laeh, “tila a thui tih Judea khosoek ah a hoe." 
Matthew3:2 Vaan ram a yoei coeng dongah yut uh laeh, “tila a thui tih Judea khosoek ah a hoe." 
Matthew3:3 Anih tah, khosoek kah pang ol loh, “Boeipa kah longpuei saelh uh lamtah a caehlong boeih te a dueng la saii uh, “tila tonghma Isaiah loh a thui a phong te ni." 
Matthew3:4 Johan loh kalauk kah a mul himbai te a bai tih, a pumpu ah maehpho cihin a naak. Tangboeng neh kohong khoitui te a buh la om." 
Matthew3:5 Te vaengah Jerusalem, Judah ram boeih neh Jordan pingpang boeih tah anih taengah cet." 
Matthew3:6 Amih kah tholhnah te a phong uh dongah Johan loh Jordan tuiva ah a nuem uh. 
Matthew3:7 Pharisee rhoek neh Sadducee rhoek khaw anih kah baptisma dang ham muep ha pawk uh te a hmuh. Te vaengah amih te, “Rhulthae cadil rhoek aka tawn uh kosi te rhaelrham tak ham unim nangmih aka tueng." 
Matthew3:8 Te dongah yutnah neh a tiing la a thaih te saii uh. 
Matthew3:9 A pa Abraham om tila nangmih khui thui ham poek uh boeh. Pathen loh hekah lungto rhoek lamloh Abraham kah ca rhoek a thoh sak thai te nangmih taengah kan thui. 
Matthew3:10 Thing kah a yung ah hai te a khueh oepsoep coeng tih thaih then aka thaii mueh thingkung te boeih a vung vetih hmai khuila a voeih ni. 
Matthew3:11 Yutnah ham ni kai loh nangmih tui dongah kan nuem. Tedae Kai hnuk ah aka pawk te tah kai lakah tlung. A khokhom dul ham pataeng ka koih pawh. Anih loh nangmih te Mueihla Cim neh hmai neh n'nuem ni. 
Matthew3:12 Anih loh a kut dongkah cangcopcung neh a cangtilhmuen te a coeh vetih, a cang te khai khuila a khoem ni. Canghi te tah aka duek pawh hmai neh a tih ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew3:13 Te vaengah Jesuh tah Johan mah loh nuem sak ham te Galilee lamloh Jordan la ha pawk. 
Matthew3:14 Tedae Johan loh anih te a mah tih, “Nang loh nan nuem ham te ka ngoe, dae nang te kai taengah lat na pawk,” a ti nah." 
Matthew3:15 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Ng'rhoi laeh, duengnah cungkuem loh mamih taengah a soep la a om ham tueng tangloeng coeng,” a ti nah daengah anih te a rhoi pueng." 
Matthew3:16 A nuem nen tah Jesuh khaw tui lamloh pahoi cet. Te vaengah anih hamla vaan te tarha ong uh tih Pathen kah Mueihla tah vahu bangla anih soah a thoeng pah te a hmuh. 
Matthew3:17 Te phoeiah vaan lamkah ol loh, “Hetah ka capa thintlo ni, anih dongah ka lungtlun, “pahoi a ti." 
Matthew4:1 Jesuh te rhaithae kah a noemcai hamla mueihla loh khosoek la a mawt. 
Matthew4:2 Khothaih hnin sawmli, neh khoyin sawmli a yaeh bawt ah, a bungpong." 
Matthew4:3 Te vaengah noemcai kung loh anih te a paan tih, “Pathen capa la na om atah hekah lungto he voek lamtah buh la poeh saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:4 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Hlang he vaidam bueng nen pawt tih, Pathen ka lamkah aka thoeng ol boeih nen mah hing saeh tila a daek coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:5 Te phoeiah anih te rhaithae loh khopuei cim la a khuen tih, bawkim kah tlungsoi ah a pai sak." 
Matthew4:6 Te vaengah amah te, “Pathen capa la na om atah namah cungpung thuk lah, a daek coeng ta, a puencawn rhoek te nang ham a uen vetih, amih kut neh n'dom bitni, na kho khaw lungto neh na tongtah mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:7 Jesuh loh, “Boeipa na Pathen te noemcai boeh tila a daek van,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:8 Te phoeiah rhaithae loh tlang bahoeng a sang la a khuen tih, “Diklai ram boeih neh a thangpomnah te a tueng." 
Matthew4:9 Rhaithae loh, “Na bakop tih kai nan bawk atah he rhoek he nang boeih kam paek ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:10 Jesuh loh, “Satan cet, Boeipa na Pathen bueng mah bawk lamtah thothueng tila a daek coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:11 Te daengah rhaithae loh a hlah. Te phoeiah puencawn rhoek loh pahoi a paan uh tih Jesuh te a khut uh. 
Matthew4:12 Johan a voeih uh te a yaak vaengah Galilee la khoe uh. 
Matthew4:13 Nazareth te a hnoo tih, Zebulun neh Naphtali vaang khuikah Kapernaum tuikaeng la pawk tih kho a sak." 
Matthew4:14 Te daengah ni tonghma Isaiah loh a thui te a soep eh. 
Matthew4:15 “Zebulun peng neh Naphtali peng, tuipuei kah longpuei, Jordan rhalvangan, namtom rhoek kah Galilee," 
Matthew4:16 Yinnah khuikah ngol sut pilnam loh vangnah a len koek a hmuh tih, dueknah hlipkhup kho ah aka ngol rhoek soah vangnah ha thoeng coeng,” a ti." 
Matthew4:17 Te vaeng lamkah ni Jesuh loh, “Vaan ram te a yoei coeng dongah yut uh laeh, “tila hoe ham neh thui ham te a tong." 
Matthew4:18 Galilee tuipuei kaeng ah a pongpa vaengah, Simon la a khue Peter neh a manuca Andrew te boeina panit a hmuh. Tuihoi la om rhoi tih tuili ah lawk a voeih rhoi." 
Matthew4:19 Te vaengah amih rhoi te, “Nangmih rhoi he kai hnukah hlang aka tu tuihoi la kan saii ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew4:20 Te dongah lawk te pahoi hnoo tih anih te a vai rhoi. 
Matthew4:21 Te lamloh a caeh vaengah a tloe kah boeina rhoi panit, Zebedee kah capa James neh a mana Johan tah lawng dongkah a napa Zebedee neh lawk a bo uh te a hmuh tih amih rhoi te khaw a khue." 
Matthew4:21 Te lamloh a caeh vaengah a tloe kah boeina rhoi panit, Zebedee kah capa James neh a mana Johan tah lawng dongkah a napa Zebedee neh lawk a bo uh te a hmuh tih amih rhoi te khaw a khue." 
Matthew4:22 Te rhoi loh lawng neh a napa te pak a hlah rhoi tih bang rhoi. 
Matthew4:23 Jesuh loh Galilee kho tom ah cet tih, amih kah tunim ah a thuituen, ram kah olthangthen khaw a hoe, tlohtat boeih neh pilnam khuikah tlohnat boeih te a hoeih sak." 
Matthew4:24 Te vaengah a olthang te Syria tom la cet tih, tlohtat a soeprhaep neh tloh aka khueh boeih, nganboh aka yook, rhaithae aka kaem rhoek, rhaihum neh aka khawn rhoek te a taengla a khuen uh tih amih te a hoeih sak." 
Matthew4:25 Te dongah Galilee, Decaplois, Jerusalem, Judea neh Jordan rhalvangan lamkah hlangping yetnu loh a vai uh." 
Matthew4:25 Te dongah Galilee, Decaplois, Jerusalem, Judea neh Jordan rhalvangan lamkah hlangping yetnu loh a vai uh." 
Matthew5:1 A hmuh neh hlangping taengah tlang la luei tih a ngol vaengah anih te a hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh. 
Matthew5:2 Te vaengah a ka a ong tih amih a thuituen. 
Matthew5:3 Mueihla khodaeng rhoek tah a yoethen uh, vaan ram te amih kah la om." 
Matthew5:4 Aka nguek rhoek tah a yoethen uh, amih te a hloep uh ni." 
Matthew5:5 Muelhtuet rhoek tah a yoethen uh, amih long ni diklai a pang eh." 
Matthew5:6 Duengnah te aka hal tih aka pong rhoek tah a yoethen uh, amih tah hah uh ni." 
Matthew5:7 Hlang aka rhen rhoek tah a yoethen uh, amih te a rhen uh ni." 
Matthew5:8 thinko aka caih rhoek tah a yoethen uh, amih long ni Pathen te a hmuh eh." 
Matthew5:9 Rhoepnah la aka om rhoek tah a yoethen uh, amih ni Pathen kah ca rhoek la a khue uh eh." 
Matthew5:10 Duengnah kongah a hnaemtaek rhoek tah a yoethen uh, vaan ram te amih kah ni." 
Matthew5:11 Kai kongah nangmih te thuithet tih, hnaemtaek tih laithaethui rhoek loh nangmih soah a thae la boeih n'thui uh vaengah na yoethen uh." 
Matthew5:12 “Omngaih uh lamtah hlampan uh. Vaan ah nangmih kah thapang muep om. Nangmih hlankah tonghma rhoek khaw a hnaemtaek uh rhoe. 
Matthew5:13 Nangmih tah diklai lungkaeh la na om uh. Tedae lungkaeh he a dap atah, ba nen lae a al sak eh? Phawn a voeih tih hlang loh a taelh pawt atah coeng voel pawh." 
Matthew5:14 Nangmih tah diklai vangnah la na om uh. Tlang soah a thoong khopuei tah khuup thai tlaih pawh. 
Matthew5:15 Hmaiim te a tok uh tih voh hmuiah a khueh uh moenih. Hmaitung soah ni a khueh tih im khuikah rhoek te boeih a tue. 
Matthew5:16 Nangmih kah vangnah khaw hlang hmaiah sae tangloeng saeh. Te daengah ni nangmih kah khoboe then te a hmuh uh vetih, vaan kah na pa te a thangpom uh eh." 
Matthew5:17 Olkhueng neh tonghma rhoek ol he phae hamla ka lo tila poek uh boeh, phae ham pawt tih soep sak ham ni ka lo." 
Matthew5:18 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, diklai neh vaan a khum hlan khuiah, olkhueng te boeih a soep hlan khuiah, catham khat neh a dek khat pataeng hmata mahpawh." 
Matthew5:19 Te dongah he rhoek kah olpaek rhoek a diknoi khat ca khaw a phae tangkhuet tih hlang aka thuituen te tah vaan ram ah a dikhnawn la a khue ni. Tedae olpaek bangla a saii tih aka thuituen te tah vaan ram ah tanglue la a khue ni. 
Matthew5:20 Nangmih taengah kan thui, cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek kah a voel ah duengnah loh nangmih te m'pueh pawt atah, vaan ram ah na kun kolla na om uh mahpawt nim." 
Matthew5:21 Khosuen kah a thui te na yaak uh coeng. Hlang ngawn boeh, aka ngawn te tah laitloeknah om kuekluek saeh." 
Matthew5:22 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, a manuca taengah kosi aka hong boeih tah laitloeknah om kuekluek saeh, a manuca te hlangyoe aka ti nah te khaw khoboei taengla pha kuekluek saeh. Hlang ang la aka thui te khaw hell hmai la pha kuekluek saeh." 
Matthew5:23 Te dongah hmueihtuk la na kutdoe na khuen vaengah, na manuca loh nang soah khat khat ngaihlih a om te na poek atah," 
Matthew5:24 Na kutdoe te hmai hmueihtuk ah pak hlah. Na manuca taengah cet lamhma lamtah moeithen dae, te phoeiah cet lamtah na kutdoe te pae." 
Matthew5:25 Longpueng ah amah neh na om li vaengah a loe la na kocaelh te ko a hlawt ham saii laeh. Namah te kocaelh loh laitloekkung taengla n'thak ve. Te vaengah laitloekkung loh tueihyoeih taengla thak vetih thongim la hla ve. 
Matthew5:26 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, a hnukkhueng pekhat hil na thuung hlan atah te lamkah na loeih mahpawh." 
Matthew5:27 Samphaih boeh a ti te na yaak uh coeng. 
Matthew5:28 Tedae nangmih taengah ka thui. Huta a hue neh aka dan boeih tah, a thinko ah a samphaih puei oepsoeh coeng." 
Matthew5:29 Na bantang mik loh nang n'khah atah te te koeih lamtah namah lamloh voei. Na pumrho dongkah pakhat a poci akhaw na pum boeih hell la a voeih pawt te nang hamla rhoei bet. 
Matthew5:30 Na bantang kut loh nang n'khah atah te te tloek lamtah namah lamloh voei. Na pumrho dongkah pakhat a poci te nang hamla then ngai. Te daengah ni na pum boeih tah hell la a caeh pawt eh. 
Matthew5:31 “A yuu aka hla loh yuhlaknah te a yuu taengah pae saeh,” a ti." 
Matthew5:32 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui coeng. Cukhalhnah olka voel ah a yuu aka hla boeih loh a yuu te samphaih sak ham a saii. Te dongah a hlak tangtae aka yunah te khaw samphaih van. 
Matthew5:33 Khosuen kah a thui te koep na yaak coeng, basa boeh saw. Tedae na olhlo te boeipa taengah na thuung ni." 
Matthew5:34 Tedae nangmih taengah toemngam loengloeng boeh ka ti. Vaan nen khaw toemngam boeh. Te tah Khohni kah ngolkhoel ni. 
Matthew5:35 Diklai nen khaw toemngam boeh. Te tah amah kah kho kah khotloeng ni. Jerusalem nen khaw toemngam boeh, te tah manghai boei kah khopuei ni." 
Matthew5:36 Na lu nen khaw toemngam boeh. Sam pakhat pataeng a bok neh a muem la na saii thai moenih. 
Matthew5:37 Te dongah nangmih ol te ue atah ue, pawh atah pawh la om saeh. Tedae he rhoek kah a pueh tah a thae hno lamkah aka thoeng hno ni." 
Matthew5:38 “Mik ham te mik, no ham te no,” a ti te na yaak uh coeng." 
Matthew5:39 Nangmih taengah kan thui, a thae te kamkaih boeh, tedae bantang kah na kamrhuh aka bael te pakhat ben khaw a taengla hooi pah." 
Matthew5:40 Nang toe ham neh na angki loh aka ngaih te himbai khaw hlah pah thil. 
Matthew5:41 Nang meng khat aka tanolh te, amah te meng nit khaw caeh puei." 
Matthew5:42 Nang taengah aka bih te pae. Nang taengah puu hamla aka ngaih te khaw bal sak boeh. 
Matthew5:43 “Na imben te lungnah, na rhal te thiinah,” a ti te na yaak uh coeng." 
Matthew5:44 Tedae kai loh nangmih taengah kan thui, na rhal rhoek te lungnah lamtah, nangmih aka hnaemtaek rhoek ham thangthui pa uh." 
Matthew5:45 Te daengah ni vaan ah na Pa kah a ca rhoek la na om uh eh. Amah kah khomik te a thae neh then boeih soah a thoeng sak tih, aka dueng khaw, halang khaw rhotui neh a sul thil." 
Matthew5:46 Nangmih aka lungnah te na lungnah uh atah balae thapang na dang eh? Mangmucoi rhoek long pataeng te te a saii uh van moenih a? 
Matthew5:47 “Na manuca bueng na toidal uh koinih balae a pueh na saii uh tloe, namtom rhoek long khaw te te a saii uh moenih a?" 
Matthew5:48 Te dongah vaan kah na Pa loh lungcuei la a om bangla nangmih khaw lungcuei la om uh. 
Matthew6:1 Te dongah nangmih kah duengnah te ngaithuen uh. Te hmuh sak ham hlang hmai ah saii boeh. Te pawt koinih vaan ah na pa taengkah thapang na dang uh mahpawh. 
Matthew6:2 Te dongah doedannah na khueh vaengah, hlang loh a thangpom ham hlangthai palat rhoek tunim neh imhlai laklo ah a saii bangla na hmaiah ueng boeh. Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, a thapang vik a bawt uh coeng." 
Matthew6:3 Tedae doedannah na khueh khaw, na bantang kah a saii te na banvoei loh ming boel saeh." 
Matthew6:4 Te dongah na doedannah te a huep la om mai saeh. Te daengah ni a huep a hael kah aka hmu na Pa loh nangmih te n'thuung eh. 
Matthew6:5 Na thangthui uh vaengah hlangthai palat la om uh boeh. Hlang kah a hmuh ah thangthui ham tunim neh toltung kah a kil ah a pai te a lungnah uh. Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, a thapang te vik a bawt uh coeng." 
Matthew6:6 Na thangthui vaengah na imkhui la kun lamtah na thohka te na khaih phoeiah a huep kah aka om na Pa taengah thangthui. Te daengah ni a huep kah aka hmu na Pa loh nang n'thuung eh. 
Matthew6:7 Thangthui vaengah namtom rhoek bangla tlawk boeh. A caitawtnah te a hnatun ni tila a poek uh. 
Matthew6:8 Te dongah amih neh na vai uh moenih. Na pa loh na bih hlanah na ngoe te a ming coeng. 
Matthew6:9 Te dongah nangmih tah he tlamhe thangthui uh. Vaan kah kaimih napa namah ming tah ciim rhoe pai. 
Matthew6:10 Na ram tah ha pai saeh. Na kongaih tah vaan kah bangla diklai ah khaw soep saeh. 
Matthew6:11 Khohnin rhamhnin kah ham kaimih kah buh he tihnin ah kaimih m'pae lah. 
Matthew6:12 Kaimih sokah laikung rhoek te ka hlah uh bangla, kaimih kah laiba dongah kaimih n'hlah lah." 
Matthew6:13 Cuekhalhnah khuila kaimih ng'khuen boel lamtah, a thae khui lamkah loh kaimih n'hlawt lah." 
Matthew6:14 Hlang te a tholhdalhnah na hlah pah atah, vaan kah na Pa loh nang khaw n'hlah ni." 
Matthew6:15 Hlang te tholh na hlah pah pawt atah na pa loh nangmih kah tholhdalhnah te han hlah mahpawh. 
Matthew6:16 Na yaeh uh vaengah hlangthai palat, hmueprhutla rhoek bangla om uh boeh. A yaeh uh te hlang taengah phoe sak ham a maelhmai te a buenglueng uh. Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, a thapang te vik a bawt uh coeng." 
Matthew6:17 Tedae na yaeh vaengah na maelhmai te sil lamtah, na lu khaw hluk." 
Matthew6:18 N'yaeh he hlang taengah pawt tih a huep ah aka om na Pa taengah lat tueng sak. Te daengah ni a huep ah aka hmu na Pa loh nang n'thuung eh. 
Matthew6:19 Diklai hmanah namamih ham khohrhang khoem uh boeh. Te ah te keet neh thi-aek loh a caak, hlanghuen loh a muk tih a huen." 
Matthew6:20 Vaan ah na khohrhang te khoem uh. Te ah te keet om pawh thi-aek long khaw a caak moenih, hlanghuen long khaw muk pawt tih huen pawh." 
Matthew6:21 Na khohrhang a om nah ah ni na thinko khaw a om eh. 
Matthew6:22 Mik he pum kah hmaiim la om. Te dongah na mik loh cilrhik la a om atah na pum boeih cilping la om ni. 
Matthew6:23 Tedae na mik te a thae la om atah na pum tom ah a hmuep la om ni. Te dongah nang kah vangnah te yinnah la poeh atah te yinnah te nah coeng. 
Matthew6:24 Boei panit taengah sal a bi thai moenih. Te dongah Pakhat te a hmuhuet vetih a tloe te a lungnah ni. Pakhat te a talong vetih a tloe te a hnoel ni. Pathen neh laikhuehtawn taengah sal na bi rhenten thai moenih. 
Matthew6:25 Nangmih taengah kan thui, mebang khaw na caak vetih, mebang na ok ham akhaw, na pum te mebang na bai sak pawt akhaw na hinglu te mawn sak boeh. Hinglu tah buh lakah, pum he khaw himbai lakah olpuei la om pawt nim?" 
Matthew6:26 Vaan kah vaa rhoek ke so uh lah. Amih loh tuh uh pawt tih at uh pawh, khai ah khaw a sang uh moenih. Tedae vaan kah na pa loh amih te a khut. Amih lakah na tanglue uh moenih a?" 
Matthew6:27 Te dongah nangmih khuikah unim aka mawn tih a hinglung te dong khat ham a tom thai ? 
Matthew6:28 Balae tih himbai ham te na mawn uh? Lohma kah rhaipai ke metla a rhoeng khaw poek lah. Thakthae uh pawh, cunghmui khaw hnuk uh pawh." 
Matthew6:29 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, Solomon pataeng a thangpomnah boeih neh he kah rhaipai pakhat bangla a bai sak moenih." 
Matthew6:30 Tihnin ah om tih thangvuen ah hmailing dongla phum hamkoi lohma kah khopol pataeng khaw Pathen loh a phuekhlaak tangloeng atah uepvawt rhoek aw nangmih te muep n'thoeihcam ngai mahpawt nim? 
Matthew6:31 Te dongah, banim ka caak uh vetih banim ka ok uh ve? Banim ka bai uh ve? ti nen khaw mawn uh boeh." 
Matthew6:32 He rhoek boeih he namtom rhoek long ni a vawtthaih uh. Vaan kah na pa loh na kuek uh boeih te a ming. 
Matthew6:33 Tedae Pathen kah ram neh a duengnah te lamhma la toem uh lah. Te daengah ni he rhoek boeih he nangmih taengah han thap eh. 
Matthew6:34 Te dongah thangvuen ham mawn uh boeh. Thangvuen amah te mawn bitni. Hnin at kah a phayoenah he amah ah rhoeh coeng. 
Matthew7:1 Hlang te laitloek thil uh boeh, te daengah ni namamih lai n'tloek thil pawt eh." 
Matthew7:2 Laitloeknah neh lai na tloek bangla namamih soah lai han tloek ni. Cungnueh neh na nueh uh te namamih taengah khaw han nueh ni. 
Matthew7:3 Balae tih na manuca mik dongkah mikdaeng te na hmuh tih na mik kah thingboeng tah na hmat pawh ? 
Matthew7:4 Na manuca te balae tih, “Na mik kah mikdaeng ng'koeih sak, “na ti eh. Na mik ah thingboeng om ta te." 
Matthew7:5 Hlangthai palat aw na mik khuikah thingboeng te lamhma la koeih dae. Te daengah ni na manuca mik kah mikdaeng koeih ham te phaeng na hmuh eh. 
Matthew7:6 A cim te ui pae uh boeh, na laitha te ok hmaiah voei boeh. A kho neh a taelh uh phoeiah aka mael loh namamih vik a pawnsoem la ng'khueh ve." 
Matthew7:7 Bih uh lamtah nangmih te m'paek bitni. Toem uh lamtah na hmuh uh bitni. Khoek uh lamtah nangmih ham ong uh bitni. 
Matthew7:8 Aka bih rhoek boeih loh a dang tih aka toem rhoek loh a hmuh, aka khoek rhoek khaw a ong pah ni." 
Matthew7:9 Nangmih taengah mebang hlang nim aka om. A ca loh buh a hoe vaengah anih te lungto pae tang mahpawh. 
Matthew7:10 Nga a hoe vaengah anih te rhul pae mahpawh. 
Matthew7:11 Nangmih a thae la aka om long pataeng, na ca rhoek te kutdoe then paek ham na ming uh atah, vaan kah na pa loh a taengah aka bih rhoek te hno then muep a paek ngai ni ta." 
Matthew7:12 Te dongah hlang loh nangmih taengah saii sak ham na ngaih uh sarhui boeih te tah namamih long khaw amih ham saii pah van. Hetah olkhueng neh tonghma rhoek ol ni. 
Matthew7:13 Vongka caek longah kun uh. Pocinah la aka khuen vongka tah ka tih longpuei khaw tampahyal mai. Te dongah te longah aka kun rhoek khaw muep om uh. 
Matthew7:14 Hingnah la aka khuen vongka tah caek tih longpuei khaw thet. Te dongah te te aka hmu khaw a yool ni a om. 
Matthew7:15 Laithae tonghma rhoek te ngaithuen uh. Amih loh nangmih taengah tu pho neh ha pai uh. Tedae a khuiah kutveet aka khueh uithang la om uh. 
Matthew7:16 Amih te a thaih dongah kang na ming uh bitni. Hling lamloh misur, lota lamloh thaibu thaih a bit uh mai khaming." 
Matthew7:17 Te dongah thing then boeih loh a thaih a then la thaii, tedae thing thae tah a thaih a thae la thaii." 
Matthew7:18 Thing then dongah a thaih thae cuen thai pawt tih, thing thae dongah a thaih then cuen bal pawh." 
Matthew7:19 A thaih then aka thaii pawh thingkung boeih te a vung tih hmai khuila a voeih uh. 
Matthew7:20 Te dongah amih te a thaih ah na ming uh mako. 
Matthew7:21 “Kai taengah Boeipa, Boeipa, “aka ti boeih loh, vaan ram khuiah kun mahpawh. Tedae vaan kah a Pa kongaih aka saii rhoek ni a kun eh." 
Matthew7:22 Tekah khohnin atah kai taengah, 'Boeipa, Boeipa, na ming neh ka phong uh, na ming neh rhaithae ka haek uh moenih a? Na ming neh thaomnah khaw muep ka tak sak moenih a?,' a ti uh ni." 
Matthew7:23 Te vaengah amih te, “Nangmih kan ming pawh, olaeknah aka saii rhoek te kai taeng lamloh mael uh, “tila ka phong ni." 
Matthew7:24 Te dongah kai ol he a yaak tih aka saii boeih te tah hlang cueih la a thuidoek ni. Anih tah a im te lungpang soah a sak. 
Matthew7:25 Rhotui bo tih tuiva ha lo, khohli te hli tih tekah im te a palet. Tedae lungpang soah a sut dongah bung pawh." 
Matthew7:26 Ka ol a yaak dae aka saii pawt boeih tah hlang ang nen ni a vai uh eh. Amih long tah laivin soah ni a im a sak. 
Matthew7:27 Rhotui bo tih tuili ha lo, hlipuei ha hli vaengah tekah im a daeng tih bung. Tekah a bungnah te tah a tloh la om coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew7:28 Jesuh loh ol a khah vaengah a thuituennah soah hlangping tah let uh. 
Matthew7:29 Amih te amamih kah cadaek rhoek banglam pawt tih saithainah aka khueh kah bangla a thuituen. 
Matthew8:1 Tlang lamkah a suntlak vaengah anih te hlangping loh muep a vai uh. 
Matthew8:2 Te vaengah hmaibae aka khueh loh tarha ham paan. Te vaengah a bawk doela, “Boeipa na ngaih atah, kai nan cim sak thai,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:3 Te dongah kut a yueng tih a taek phoeiah, “Ka ngaih, cimcaih pai saeh,” a ti nah tih hmaibae te pahoi cing." 
Matthew8:4 Te vaengah Jesuh loh, “Na thui pawt ham ngaithuen, tedae namah te cet lamtah khosoih taengah tueng. Amih taengah laipainah ham tah Moses loh a uen kutdoe te nawn,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:5 Te phoeiah Kapernaum la a kun hatah, rhalboei loh a taengla a paan." 
Matthew8:6 Jesuh te a hloep tih, “Boeipa ka ca aka khawn he mat tlo tih im ah yalh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:7 Te vaengah anih te,” Kamah ka lo vetih anih te ka hoeih sak bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:8 Rhalboei loh a doo tih, “Boeipa ka imphu hmuiah na kun khaw koihvaih la ka om moenih, na ol neh dawk thui mai, ka ca te hoeih bitni." 
Matthew8:9 Kai khaw saithainah hmuikah hlang ni, kai hmuiah khaw rhalkap rhoek om van. Te dongah pakhat te, “Cet,” ka ti nah atah cet mai. A tloe te khaw, “Lo lah,” ka ti nah vaengah ha lo mai. Ka sal te khaw he he saii ka ti nah atah a saii ta,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:10 Jesuh loh a yaak vaengah a ngaihmang tih aka vai rhoek te, “Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui Israel khuiah ka hmuh vaengah tangnah heyet a om moenih." 
Matthew8:11 Te dongah ni, 'Khocuk neh khotlak lamkah loh muep a paan uh vetih, Abraham, Isaak, Jakob neh vaan ram ah ngolhlung uh ni, ' tila nangmih taengah kan thui." 
Matthew8:12 Tedae ram kah a ca tah poengben kah yinnah khuila a haek uh ni. Te ah te rhah neh no rhuengnah om ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:13 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh rhalboei te, “Cet, Na tangnah bangla nang soah om saeh.” a ti nah. Te vaeng tue ah a ca te khaw hoeih." 
Matthew8:14 Jesuh tah Peter im la pawk. Te vaengah Peter masae te tlo tih a yalh te a hmuh. 
Matthew8:15 Te vaengah a kut te a taek pah hatah anih te satloh loh a hlah. Te dongah thoo tih Jesuh te a doedan. 
Matthew8:16 Hlaem a pha vaengah, rhaithae aka kaem rhoek te Jesuh taengla muep a khuen uh. Te vaengah mueihla te ol neh a haek tih tloh aka khueh rhoek te boeih a hoeih sak." 
Matthew8:17 Tonghma Isaiah loh a thui tih, “Mamih kah vawtthoeknah he a loh tih tlohtat khaw a phueih coeng,” a ti te soep tangloeng." 
Matthew8:18 Jesuh loh a taengvai kah hlangping te a hmuh vaengah rhalvangan la caeh ham ol a paek. 
Matthew8:19 Te vaengah cadaek pakhat loh ham paan tih, “Saya, mela na caeh akhaw, kam vai ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:20 Tedae anih te Jesuh loh, “Metang rhoek tah a khui a khueh uh tih vaan kah vaa rhoek khaw a bu a khueh. Tedae hlang capa tah a lu a tloeng nah te khueh pawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:21 A tloe a hnukbang loh a taengah, “Boeipa kai tah lamhma la n'caeh sak lamtah a pa te ka vuei dae eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:22 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Kai m'vai laeh, amamih aka duek puei vuei ham tah aka duek puei taengah hlah pah nawn,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:23 Jesuh te lawng khuila a kun vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a vai uh. 
Matthew8:24 Te vaengah hlipuei loh tuili soah tarha hli tih, tuiphu loh lawng te dalhdalh a khup. Te vaengah Jesuh tah ip." 
Matthew8:25 Te dongah amah te a paan uh phoeiah a thoh uh tih, “Boeipa n'khang lah m'poci uh coeng he,” a ti nah uh." 
Matthew8:26 Tedae amih te, “Uepvawt rhoek Balae tih rhalyawp la na om uh?” a ti nah. Te phoeiah, thoo tih khohli neh tuipuei te a ho hatah suepduem la boeih om." 
Matthew8:27 Hlang rhoek khaw a ngaihmang uh tih, “Anih he metlam nim a om? Khohli neh tuipuei long pataeng a ol a ngai pah,” a ti uh." 
Matthew8:28 Jesuh te rhalvangan kah Gadarenes kho la pawk. Te vaengah rhaithae aka kaem rhoi tah anih doe hamla phuel khui lamkah loh ha moe rhoi. Rhai thakbat tih te kah longpuei ah pakhat khaw khumpael thai pawh. 
Matthew8:29 Te vaengah tah tarha pang rhoi tih, “Pathen Capa, kaimih rhoi taeng neh nang taengah balae aka om? A tuetang hlanah kaimih rhoi phaep ham nim hela na pawk dae? a ti rhoi." 
Matthew8:30 Amih taeng lamloh a lakhla la om tih ok hui muep luem. 
Matthew8:31 Te dongah rhaithae rhoek loh Jesuh te a hloep uh tih, “Kaimih he nan haek atah, ok hui kah a khuila kaimih n'tueih mai,” a ti nah." 
Matthew8:32 Te vaengah amih te, “Cet uh,” a ti nah. Te dongah te rhoek te, ok khuila kun uh. Te vaengah ok hui boeih tah laengpoeng lamloh tuili la voek cu tih tui khuiah duek uh." 
Matthew8:33 Ok vuelh rhoek te yong uh tih khopuei khuila kun uh. Rhaithae aka kaem rhoi kah a kawng te khaw a sikim la puen uh. 
Matthew8:34 Te dongah kho pum loh Jesuh doenah la pawk cet uh. Amah te a hmuh uh vaengah amih vaang lamloh thoeih ham a hloep uh. 
Matthew9:1 Te phoeiah lawng khuila kun tih, a hlaikan daengah amah kho la pawk." 
Matthew9:2 Te vaengah khawn tih thingkong dongah aka yalh te a taengla tarha a khuen pa uh. Amih kah tangnah te Jesuh loh a hmuh coeng dongah aka khawn te, “Ngaimong sak, ka ca, tholhnah loh nang n'hlah coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:3 Te vaengah cadaek rhoek khuikah hlangvang long tah amamih khui, “Anih loh a soehsal coeng,” tarha a ti uh." 
Matthew9:4 Jesuh loh amih kah poeknah te a hmuh tih, “Balae tih na thinko khui ah a thae na poek uh." 
Matthew9:5 “ Na tholh loh n'hlah coeng, ' ti ham neh, 'thoo lamtah cet,' ti ham he, melae yoeikoek la aka om?" 
Matthew9:6 Te daengah ni diklai hmankah tholh hlah ham he hlang capa loh saithainah a khueh te na ming uh eh,” a ti nah. Te phoeiah aka khawn te, “Thoo, na phak te khuen lamtah na im la cet,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:7 Te vaengah thoo tih a im la koe cet. 
Matthew9:8 Hlangping loh a hmuh vaengah a rhih uh tih, hlang taengah hebang saithainah aka pae Pathen te a thangpom uh." 
Matthew9:9 Jesuh te lamkah a khum vaengah, Matthai la a khue hlang pakhat tah mangmu doenah ah a ngol te a hmuh tih, “Kai m'vai lah,” a ti nah. Te dongah tho tih Jesuh taengah bang." 
Matthew9:10 Im khuiah a om vaengah caboei te a vael. Te vaengah, mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek muep tarha ha pawk uh tih Jesuh neh a hnukbang rhoek taengah a vael uh." 
Matthew9:11 Pharisee rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek taengah, “Balae tih nangmih kah saya tah mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek taengah a caak,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:12 Tedae a yaak vaengah, “Sading rhoek loh siboei a ngoe moenih, tedae tloh aka khueh rhoek long tah a ngoe." 
Matthew9:13 Cet uh lamtah metla a om khaw cang uh saw. Ka ngaih he tah rhennah ni hmueih te moenih. Aka dueng rhoek khue ham pawt tih aka tholh rhoek ham ni ka pawk,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:14 Te phoeiah Johan kah hnukbang loh a a paan uh tih, “Balae tih kaimih neh Pharisee rhoek long tah vawpvawp ka yaeh uh. Tedae na hnukbang rhoek loh a yaeh uh moenih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:15 Jesuh loh amih te, “Paca boeina loh yulueihmuen te a nguek thil thai moenih. Amih a om khuiah tah yulokung loh a om puei ta. Tedae yulokung te amih taeng lamkah loh a khue tue ha pawk vaengah a yaeh uh van bitni." 
Matthew9:16 Hni pen a cuemsok te himbai rhuem soah a bo moenih. A bawtnah ah te long te himbai ni a dueng tih a pawnnah te a thae la a om. 
Matthew9:17 Misurtui a noe te tuitang rhuem khuiah a than moenih. Te pawt koinih tuitang te paeng tih misurtui khaw a cae. Te vaengah tuitang khaw poci. Tedae misurtui noe te tuitang a thai dongah a than uh atah bok sueng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:18 He rhoek he amih a thui vaengah, boei pakhat te pakcak cet tih anih te a bawk. Te phoeiah, “Ka canu he paekca ah duek dae na lo tih na kut na tloeng thil koinih hing ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:19 Te dongah Jesuh tah thoo tih anih te a hnukbang rhoek neh a vai phai. 
Matthew9:20 Te vaengah kum hlainit khuiah aka thii nu loh a hnuk ah a paan tih a himbai dongkah salaw te a taek pah. 
Matthew9:21 Amah long tah, “Jesuh kah himbai mah ka taek koinih, ka hoeih ni,” a ti dongah ni." 
Matthew9:22 Jesuh te mael tih huta te a hmuh vaengah, “Ka canu na ngaimong sak, na tangnah loh nang n'khang coeng.” a ti nah. Te vaeng tue lamloh huta tah daem." 
Matthew9:23 Boei im la Jesuh a pawk vaengah phavi tum neh hlangping te a sarhingrhup la hmuh. 
Matthew9:24 Te dongah, “Khoe uh lah, hula he a duek moenih, aka ip ni,” a ti nah. Te vaengah Jesuh te a nueih thil uh." 
Matthew9:25 Tedae hlangping te a haek phoeiah kun tih a kut a tuuk pah vaengah hula te thoo. 
Matthew9:26 He olthang loh tekah kho boeih te a pha. 
Matthew9:27 Te lamloh Jesuh a khum vaengah mikdael panit loh a vai rhoi. Te vaengah pang rhoi tih, “David Capa kaimih rhoi n'rhen lah,” a ti rhoi." 
Matthew9:28 Im la a pawk vaengah Jesuh te mikdael rhoi loh a paan rhoi. Te vaengah Jesuh loh amih rhoi te, “He he ka saii thai tila na tangnah rhoi a?” a ti nah hatah, “Ue, Boeipa,” a ti rhoi." 
Matthew9:29 Te phoeiah amih rhoi kah mik te a taek pah tih, “Nangmih rhoi kah tangnah bangla nangmih taengah om saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:30 Te vaengah a mik a tueng pah. Tedae Jesuh tah thanueih tih amih rhoi te, “Ngaithuen, hlang loh ming boel saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew9:31 Tedae cet rhoi tih Jesuh kawng te kho tom ah a doek rhoi. 
Matthew9:32 Amih rhoi a caeh neh rhaithae aka kaem hlang pakhat hnapang te a taengla tarha a khuen uh. 
Matthew9:33 Rhaithae te haek pah olmueh te koep cal. Te dongah hlangping tah a ngaihmang uh tih, “Israel khuiah om noek tangloeng pawh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew9:34 Tedae Pharisee rhoek loh, “Rhaithae boei rhang nen ni rhaithae a haek,” a ti uh." 
Matthew9:35 Te phoeiah Jesuh tah khopuei boeih neh vangca tom la cet tih, amih kah tunim ah a thuituen. Ram kah olthangthen te khaw a hoe, tih tlohtat boeih neh tlohnat boeih te a hoeih sak." 
Matthew9:36 A hmuh vaengah amih hlangping ham te a thinphat. Tawnba a om uh lalah tudawn aka om pawh tu bangla a voeih uh. 
Matthew9:37 Te dongah a hnukbang rhoek te, “Cangah hamla yet ngawn dae bibikung rhoek tah yolca." 
Matthew9:38 Te dongah cangah boeipa taengah na thangthui uh daengah ni a cangat la bibikung han tueih eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew10:1 A hnukbang hlainit te a khue tih amih te, rhalawt mueihla, haek sak ham, tlohtat boeih neh tlohnat boeih te hoeih sak ham saithainah a paek." 
Matthew10:2 Te vaengah caeltueih hlainit kah a ming tah he rhoek he ni. Lamhma ah, Peter la a khue Simon neh a mana Andrew, Zebedee capa James neh a mana Johan," 
Matthew10:2 Te vaengah caeltueih hlainit kah a ming tah he rhoek he ni. Lamhma ah, Peter la a khue Simon neh a mana Andrew, Zebedee capa James neh a mana Johan," 
Matthew10:3 Philip neh Bartholomew, Thomas neh mangmucoi Matthai, Alphaeus capa James neh Taddaeus," 
Matthew10:3 Philip neh Bartholomew, Thomas neh mangmucoi Matthai, Alphaeus capa James neh Taddaeus," 
Matthew10:4 Kanaan Simon neh amah aka voei Judah Iskariot. 
Matthew10:5 Jesuh loh hlainit rhoek te a tueih ham a uen vaengah, “Namtom rhoek kah longpuei ah pongpa uh boeh, Samaria khopuei khuila kun uh boeh." 
Matthew10:6 Tedae Israel imkhui kah tu aka poci rhoek taengah mah cet uh. 
Matthew10:7 Aka cet rhoek loh, 'Vaan ram yoei coeng, ' tila thui lamtah hoe uh." 
Matthew10:8 Tattloel rhoek te hoeih sak uh, aka duek thoh uh, hmaibae cing sak uh, rhaithae te haek uh, a yoe la na dang uh te a yoe la pae uh." 
Matthew10:9 Na cihin khuiah sui, ngun, rhohum te kaelh uh boeh." 
Matthew10:10 Longpueng hamla sungsa, angki yungnit, khokhom conghol khuen uh boeh. Bibikung tah amah caak te a om pah tueng." 
Matthew10:11 Mebang khopuei neh vangca khuiah na kun uh vaengah, “Te khuikah a tueng la aka om te toem uh lamtah na voei hlan duela naeh uh dae." 
Matthew10:12 Im khuila na kun vaengah toidal uh. 
Matthew10:13 Aka koih imkhui ni a om van atah nangmih kah ngaimongnah loh thoeng thil saeh. Tedae a tueng la a om pawt atah nangmih kah ngaimongnah te nangmih taengah ha bal saeh. 
Matthew10:14 Nangmih te n'doe pawt tih nangmih kah ol a hnatun pawt te tah, te imkhui khaw, khopuei khaw voelh na caeh vaengah na kho kah tangdik te khoek pah uh." 
Matthew10:15 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, “Laitloeknah khohnin ah Sodom neh Gomorrah kho pataeng tekah khopuei lakah phoeng pueng ni." 
Matthew10:16 Uithang lakli ah tu bangla kai loh nangmih kan tueih ne. Te dongah rhul bangla cueih khueh lamtah vahu bangla caepakyik la om uh. 
Matthew10:17 Hlang rhoek te ngaithuen uh, nangmih te khoboei rhoek taengla n'thak uh ni. Te vaengah nangmih te, tunim ah m'boh uh ni." 
Matthew10:18 Kai kongah khoboei rhoek neh manghai rhoek hmailah n'khuen uh ni. Amih taeng neh namtom rhoek taengah laipai la na om uh ni. 
Matthew10:19 Tedae nangmih te n'thak uh vaengah balae, metlam lae na thui eh ti mawn uh boeh. Amah a tue vaengah na thui uh koi nangmih taengah m'paek bitni." 
Matthew10:20 Te rhoek aka voek la na om uh moenih. Tedae Na Pa kah Mueihla loh nangmih khuiah a thui bitni. 
Matthew10:21 Manuca loh manuca, a napa loh a ca te dueknah dongah a voeih ni. Ca rhoek long khaw a manu napa te a tingtoeh vetih a duek sak ni." 
Matthew10:22 Kai ming dongah hlang boeih kah a hmuhuet la na om uh ni. Tedae a bawtnah duela aka ueh tah daem ni. 
Matthew10:23 He kah kho ah ni nangmih te n'hnaemtaek uh atah a tloe la rhaelrham uh. Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, hlang capa ha pawk hlan atah Israel khopuei rhoek te na tluek uh mueh mahpawh." 
Matthew10:24 Hnukbang he saya soah a om moenih, sal khaw a boei soah a om moenih." 
Matthew10:25 Hnukbang te a saya bangla, sal loh a boei bangla a om mah rhoeh coeng. Imkung te Beelzeboul a phoei thil uh atah a imko ngawn tah bahoeng nah." 
Matthew10:26 Te dongah amih te rhih uh boeh. Muekdah la aka om te pumphoe mueh pawt tih a huephael te a ming mueh moenih. 
Matthew10:27 A hmuep ah kan thui te vangnah khuiah thui. Na hna ah na yaak te imphu soah hoe uh. 
Matthew10:28 Pum aka ngawn rhoek te rhih uh boeh. Tedae hinglu a ngawn thai moenih. Pum neh hinglu boktlap la hell ah aka poci sak thai te mah rhih uh. 
Matthew10:29 Vahnup phiknit te pe la a yoih moenih a? Tedae na Pa pawt koinih te rhoek khuikah pakhat pataeng lai ah tla mahpawh. 
Matthew10:30 Nangmih lu kah sam pataeng boeih a tae la om coeng. 
Matthew10:31 Te dongah rhih uh boeh. Nangmih tah vahnup lakah muep na tiing uh ta. 
Matthew10:32 Te dongah hlangping hmaiah kai aka ming hlang boeih tah vaan kah a Pa hmaiah anih te ka ming van ni. 
Matthew10:33 Tedae hlang hmaiah kai aka hnawt te tah vaan kah a pa hmaiah anih te ka hnawt van ni. 
Matthew10:34 Diklai ah ngaimongnah khuen hamla ka pawk tila poek uh boeh. Ngaimongnah ham pawt tih cunghang muk ham ni ka pawk coeng. 
Matthew10:35 Kai tah hlang pakhat neh a napa, a canu neh a manu, a langa neh a mani phihrha ham ni ka pawk." 
Matthew10:36 Hlang kah rhal tah a imkhui ah om ni. 
Matthew10:37 Kai lakah a manu neh a napa aka lungnah te tah kai neh aka tiing la om pawh. Kai lakah a capa neh a canu aka lungnah te khaw kai neh aka tiing la a om moenih. 
Matthew10:38 A thinglam a koh kolla ka hnukah aka bang te tah kai neh aka tiing la a om moenih. 
Matthew10:39 Amah kah hinglu aka hmu poci vetih, kai kongah a hinglu aka poci loh te te a hmuh ni." 
Matthew10:40 Nangmih aka doe tah kai ni n'doe. Kai aka doe long khaw kai aka tueih te a doe. 
Matthew10:41 Tonghma ming neh tonghma aka doe tah tonghma kah thapang te a dang ni. Hlang dueng ming neh hlang dueng aka doe tah hlang dueng kah thapang te a dang van ni. 
Matthew10:42 Hnukbang ming neh tuiding boengloeng khat ca he kah a yit khuiah pakhat aka tul te tah, nangmih taengah rhep kan thui coeng, a thapang te yoe loengloeng mahpawh,“ a ti nah." 
Matthew11:1 Jesuh loh a hnukbang rhoek hlainit a uen te a khah vaengah, amamih kah khopuei rhoek ah thuituen ham neh hoe ham te te lamloh thoeih." 
Matthew11:2 Te vaengah Khrih kah bibi boeih te Johan loh thongim khui ah a yaak tih a hnukbang rhoek te a tueih. 
Matthew11:3 Te vaengah, “Namah ah naka pawk, a tloe a ka lamso eh?,” patoeng a ti nah." 
Matthew11:4 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Cet uh lamtah na hmuh neh na yaak te Johan taengla puen pa uh." 
Matthew11:5 Mikdael loh a hmuh tih aka khaem loh cet coeng. Hmaibae loh cing coeng, hnapang hnalol loh a yaak coeng. Aka duek khaw thoo tih khodaeng taengah olthangthen a phong coeng." 
Matthew11:6 U khaw kai kongah a khah pawt atah yoethen la om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew11:7 Amih boeih a caeh uh phoeiah Jesuh loh hlangping taengah Johan kawng te a tong tih, “Ba sawt ham nim khosoek khuila na caeh uh? Yilh loh a hlinghloek capu a?" 
Matthew11:8 Tedae ba sawt ham nim na caeh uh? a hnal la aka phuekhlaak hlang te nim? Himbai hnal aka bai ke manghai im ah om uh ke. 
Matthew11:9 Ba sawt ham nim na caeh uh? Tonghma a? Thuem, nangmih taengah kan thui, anih tah tonghma lakah olpuei ngai ta." 
Matthew11:10 “Nangmih hmai ah kamah kah puencawn ka tueih ke. Anih loh nangmih hmaiah na longpuei a rhoekbah ni,” tila anih kawng ni ana daek." 
Matthew11:11 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui. Huta kah a cun khuiah tuinuem Johan lakah aka tanglue phoe pawh, tedae vaan ram kah a yit koek pataeng anih lakah a tanglue la om." 
Matthew11:12 Tuinuem Johan tue lamloh tahae duela vaan ram te a ael thil tih, aka aelkung rhoek loh a poelyoe uh." 
Matthew11:13 Johan duela tonghma rhoek neh olkhueng loh boeih a phong coeng. 
Matthew11:14 Tedae doe hamla na ngaih uh koinih, halo hamla aka cai Elijah tah Johan coeng ni." 
Matthew11:15 Hna aka khueh loh ya saeh. 
Matthew11:16 Tedae hekah cadil he ba nen lae ka thuidoek lah ve? Hnoyoih hmuen ah ngol uh tih hlang tloe aka khue, aka thui camoe rhoek phek la om." 
Matthew11:17 Nangmih hamla phavi ka tum uh akhaw na lam uh pawh. Hlo ka hlai akhaw na rhaengsae uh pawh. 
Matthew11:18 Johan ha pawk tih a caak a ok pawt hatah, “Rhaithae a kaem,” a ti uh." 
Matthew11:19 Hlang capa ha pawk tih a caak a ok hatah, 'Carhut neh yumi hlang la ke, mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek kah a puei a po,' a ti uh. Tedae cueihnah khaw a khoboe long ni a tang sak,” a ti nah." 
Matthew11:20 Te phoeiah a thaomnah a kumngai a tueng sak kho rhoek te a yut uh pawt dongah ol a tong tih," 
Matthew11:21 Anunae Khorazim nang te. Anunae Bethsaida nang te, Nangmih taeng ah ka thaomnah ka tueng sak he Tyre neh Sidon ah ka tueng sak koinih tlamhni, hmaiphu neh yut uh dingrhae pawn ni." 
Matthew11:22 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui. Laitloeknah khohnin ah Tyre neh Sidon tah nangmih lakah a phoeng la om ni. 
Matthew11:23 Kapernaum nang khaw, vaan duela na pomsang uh pawt nim? Saelkhui duela na suntla bitni. Nangmih taengah ka thaomnah ka tueng sak he Sodom ah tueng sak koinih, tihnin duela te om suidae." 
Matthew11:24 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui. Laitloeknah khohnin ah Sodom kho tah nang lakah a phoeng la om ni,” tila a toel." 
Matthew11:25 Tevaeng tue ah Jesuh loh a doo tih, “A pa, vaan neh diklai kah Boeipa nang kan uem tangkik, he rhoek he hlangcueih neh lungming taeng lamkah loh na thuh tih cahmang rhoek taengah na pumphoe coeng." 
Matthew11:26 Ue apa na hmaiah kolonah la a om tangloeng dongah ni. 
Matthew11:27 A pa loh kai he a cungkuem la m'paek coeng. Te dongah pa pawt koinih capa te a ming moenih. Capa pawt koinih pakhat long khaw pa te a ming moenih. Tedae u khaw a ngaih atah capa loh a pumphoe pah coeng. 
Matthew11:28 Hnorhih rhoek neh thakthae rhoek boeih te kai taengla halo lah, kai loh nangmih te kan duem sak ni." 
Matthew11:29 Ka hnamkun he na pum dongah phuei uh lamtah kamah taeng lamkah he cang uh. Muelhtuet neh thinko tlayae la ka om dongah na hinglu ham duemnah na hmuh uh ni. 
Matthew11:30 Kai kah hnamkun tah kodam coeng tih ka hnophueih loh a yanghoep la om,” a ti." 
Matthew12:1 Te vaeng tue kah Sabbath ah Jesuh tah lohma longah cet. A hnukbang rhoek tah a bungpong uh tih cangvuei a yun uh tih koe a kueh a uh. 
Matthew12:2 Tedae Pharisee rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah Jesuh te, “Sabbath ah saii ham a paek pawt te na hnukbang rhoek loh a saii uh ke,” a ti nah." 
Matthew12:3 Tedae Jesuh loh, “David neh a taengkah rhoek loh a bung a pong vaengah balae a saii, na tae uh moenih a?" 
Matthew12:4 Pathen im khuila kun tih a hmai kah buh a caak te ta. Te te anih kah a caak tueng la a om moenih, khosoih rhoek bueng pawt atah a taengkah rhoek ham khaw a om moenih." 
Matthew12:5 Sabbath ah bawkim kah khosoih rhoek loh Sabbath te a poeih dae ommongsitoe la a om uh te olkhueng khuiah na tae uh moenih a? 
Matthew12:6 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, bawkim lakah aka tanglue ngai tah he ah om ta." 
Matthew12:7 Tedae metla a om khaw na ming uh koinih, rhennah ni ka ngaih hmueih moenih,' a ti dongah ommongsitoe te na boe sak uh pawt sue." 
Matthew12:8 Hlang capa tah Sabbath boeipa la om,” a ti." 
Matthew12:9 Te lamloh thoeih tih amamih kah tunim la pawk. 
Matthew12:10 Te vaengah kut khaem hlang pakhat khoem om. Te dongah anih a paelnaeh ham te a dawt uh tih, “Sabbath ah hoeih sak ham tueng a?” a ti nah." 
Matthew12:11 Tedae amih te, “Nangmih khuikah tu pakhat mai khaw aka khueh hlang om a te? Te te Sabbath ah rhom khuila cungku koinih lo pawt vetih doek mahpawt a?" 
Matthew12:12 Hlang he tu lakah muep tanglue ta. Te dongah Sabbath ah a then saii he tueng ta,” a ti nah." 
Matthew12:13 Te phoeiah tekah hlang te, “Na kut te yueng lah,” a ti nah tih koe a yueng. Te vaengah khat ben kah bangla a then la a hoeih pah." 
Matthew12:14 Tedae Pharisee rhoek tah cet uh tih anih te poci sak hamla dawtletnah a khueh uh. 
Matthew12:15 Jesuh loh a ming vaengah te lamloh khoe uh. Te vaengah anih te hlangping loh muep a vai. Te dongah amih te boeih a hoeih sak. 
Matthew12:16 Tedae amah te mingpha la saii pawt ham amih te a uen. 
Matthew12:17 Te daengah ni tonghma Isaiah loh a thui tih," 
Matthew12:18 Ka sal he ne, anih ni ka coelh. Anih soah ka thintlo ka hinglu loh a lungtlun. A pum dongah ka mueihla ka khueh vetih, namtom taengah tiktamnah a thui ni." 
Matthew12:19 Anih long tah oelhtaih mahpawh, hohaem mahpawh. A ol te toltung ah pakhat long khaw ya mahpawh." 
Matthew12:20 Tiktamnah te voelphoengnah la a khuen hlan atah capu aka paep te khaem pawt vetih thut aka nap khaw thih mahpawh. 
Matthew12:21 A ming te khaw namtom rhoek loh a ngaiuep ni,” a ti te a soep eh." 
Matthew12:22 Te phoeiah rhaithae a kaem olmueh mikdael te a taengla a khuen uh tih anih te a hoeih sak. Te daengah olmueh te cal thai tih kho a hmuh thai. 
Matthew12:23 Te vaengah hlangping khaw boeih limlum uh tih, “Anih he David capa la om mai khaming,” a ti uh." 
Matthew12:24 Tedae Pharisee rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah anih tah rhaithae rhoek kah boei Belzebul nen pawt koinih rhaithae he haek mahpawh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew12:25 Amih kah poeknah te a hmuh vaengah, “Amamih aka paekboe ram tah boeih poci tih, amamih aka paekboe khopuei neh im boeih tah cak mahpawh." 
Matthew12:26 Satan loh Satan te haek koinih amah te neh amamih paekboe uh ni ta. Te vaengah a ram loh metlam a pai eh? 
Matthew12:27 Kai loh Beezebul rhangneh rhaithae ka haek koinih, na ca rhoek tah u rhangnen lae a haek uh. He dongah amih tah nangmih kah laitloekkung la om uh ni." 
Matthew12:28 Tedae Pathen Mueihla rhangneh kai loh rhaithae ka haek atah nangmih taengah Pathen kah ram ha pai coeng dongah ni. 
Matthew12:29 Aka tlung te lamhma la a pin pawt atah metlam lae aka tlung kah im khuila a kun vetih hnopai te a poelyoe pah thai eh? a pin phoei daengah ni im te a muk eh. 
Matthew12:30 Kai taengah aka om pawt tah kai neh hlihloeh la om tih, kai taengah aka cut pawt loh a thaek." 
Matthew12:31 He dongah nangmih taengah kan thui, tholhnah neh soehsalnah cungkuem dongah hlang he tholh a hlah pah ni, tedae, Mueihla ben kah soehsalnah tah tholh hlah mahpawh." 
Matthew12:32 Hlang capa te ol aka tha thil te khaw tholh a hlah pueng ni. Tedae Mueihla Cim te aka cal thil te tah tahae tue neh aka lo ham dongah khaw anih te tholh hlah pah mahpawh. 
Matthew12:33 Thing then loh a thaih a then sak tih thing thae loh a thaih a thae sak. Te dongah thing he a thaih loh a mingpha sak. 
Matthew12:34 Rhulthae rhoek kah casak rhoek, a thae la na om uh lalah metlamlae a then te na thui uh thai eh. thinko kah a baecoih te na ka loh a thui." 
Matthew12:35 Hlang then loh khohrhang then khuikah a then a sat tih, hlang thae loh khohrhang thae khuikah a thae a sat." 
Matthew12:36 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, palyal olka aka thui rhoek boeih te laitloeknah khohnin ah hlang loh te ham te olka a thuung uh ni." 
Matthew12:37 Na ol loh n'tang sak vetih na ol loh n'boe sak ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew12:38 Te phoeiah cadaek rhoek hlangvang neh Pharisee rhoek loh Jesuh te a doo uh tih, “Saya nang taengkah miknoek hmuh ham ka ngaih uh,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew12:39 Tedae amih te a doo tih, “Boethae neh samphaih cadil rhoek loh miknoek tlap cakhaw, tonghma Jonah kah miknoek pawt atah miknoek m'pae mahpawh." 
Matthew12:40 Jonah tah nga bung khuiah khothaih hnin thum neh khoyin hnin thum a om bangla hlang capa tah diklai ko khuiah khothaih hnin thum neh khoyin hnin thum om van ni. 
Matthew12:41 Laitloeknah hnin ah Nineveh hlang rhoek tah hekah cadil taengah pai uh vetih a boe sak ni. Jonah kah olhoe dongah amih yut uh. Tedae hekah aka om he Jonah lakah len dae ta he. 
Matthew12:42 Tuithim boeinu tah Solomon kah cueihnah hnatun hamla diklai bawt lamkah loh ha pawk dongah tahae kah cadil he laitloeknah ah a pai thil vetih a boe sak ni. Tedae heah he Solomon lakah aka len om dae ta he. 
Matthew12:43 Mueihla thae loh hlang lamkah a coe phoeiah tuihang hmuen boeih ah cet tih duemnah a toem dae hmu pawh. 
Matthew12:44 Te vaengah ka caeh tangtae te ka im la ka bal ni a ti. Te dongah, a pawk vaengah hoeng, nawt tangtae neh, khoem tangtae, la a hmuh." 
Matthew12:45 Te phoeiah cet tih amah lakah aka thae mueihla a tloe parhih te amah taengla a khuen. Te phoeiah te rhoek ah kun uh tih kho a sak. Te dongah te hlang te lamhma kah lakah a hnukkhueng kah a om te thae. Tahae kah cadil he khaw rhaithae lam ni a om tangkhuet eh,” a ti." 
Matthew12:46 Hlangping te a voek li vaengah a manu neh a mana rhoek loh anih te voek ham a toem uh tih poeng ah pakcak pai uh. 
Matthew12:47 Te dongah pakhat loh, “Na nu neh na mana rhoek loh nang voek ham n'toem tih poeng ah pai uh ke,” a ti nah." 
Matthew12:48 Te dongah amah aka voek te, “Unim kai manu? U rhoek nim kai mana rhoek? “ a ti nah." 
Matthew12:49 Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek taengla a kut a yueng tih, “Kai manu neh kai mana rhoek la he." 
Matthew12:50 Vaan kah a Pa kongaih aka saii te tah ka manuca neh ngannu nganca neh manu la om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:1 Te hnin ah Jesuh tah im lamloh cet tih tuili kaengah ngol. 
Matthew13:2 Te vaengah hlangping rhoek tah anih taengah muep tingtun uh. Te dongah amah tah lawng khuiah ngol hamla kun. Tedae hlangping tah tuikaeng ah boeih pai. 
Matthew13:3 Te phoeiah amih taengah nuettahnah neh muep a thui tih, “Cangti aka haeh tah cangti haeh la cet ne," 
Matthew13:4 Cangti a haeh vaengah a ngen te longpuei ah tla. Te dongah vaa loh a paan tih a kueh. 
Matthew13:5 Angen tah lungrhong dongah tla tih, laimen muep a om pawt dongah tlek poe. Tedae laimen a dung la om moenih." 
Matthew13:6 A yung a om pawt dongah khomik ha thoeng vaengah tah a kaeng tih koh. 
Matthew13:7 Angen tah hling khuiah tla tih hling te a rhoeng vaengah tah cang te a huep. 
Matthew13:8 Tedae a ngen tah lai then dongah tla tih a thaih, a ngen yakhat, a ngen sawmrhuk, a ngen tah sawmthum la thaii." 
Matthew13:9 Hna aka khueh loh ya saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:10 Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh tih, “Balae tih nuettahnah neh amih na voek?,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew13:11 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Vaan ram kah olhuep ming sak ham nangmih taengah m'paek coeng dae te rhoek taengah a paek moenih." 
Matthew13:12 Aka khueh te tah a paek thil vetih a coih pah ni. Tedae aka khueh pawt te a khueh duen pataeng te a taeng lamkah loh a lat pah ni. 
Matthew13:13 Te dongah ni amih taengah nuettahnah neh ka thui pah. A hmuh uh dae hmat uh pawh. A hnatun uh dae ya uh pawt tih hmuhming uh pawh. 
Matthew13:14 Te dongah Isaiah kah tonghma ol te amih taengah, 'Hnavue neh na yaak uh vetih na hmuhming uh loengloeng mahpawh. Na hmuh tah na hmuh uh vetih na hmat uh loengloeng mahpawh." 
Matthew13:15 Pilnam kah thinko he tah a talh pah coeng. Te dongah hna neh a hnatun uh tloel tih a mik khaw a him uh. A mik neh a hmuh uh tih, hna neh a yaak uh, a thinko neh hmuhming uh tih ha bal uh koinih amih te ka hoeih sak ni,” a ti te soep coeng." 
Matthew13:16 Tedae nangmih kah mik loh a hmuh tih na hna loh a yaak dongah a yoethen. 
Matthew13:17 Rhep kan thui, tonghma rhoek boeih neh hlang dueng rhoek loh na hmuh uh te hmuh a hue uh dae hmu uh pawh, na yaak uh te yaak ham akhaw a yaak uh moenih." 
Matthew13:18 Te dongah nangmih loh cangti aka tuh kah nuettahnah he hnatun uh. 
Matthew13:19 Ram kah olka te a yaak dae aka hmuhming pawt boeih tah, rhaithae loh ha pawk atah a thinko ah tuh tangtae a poel a yoe pah. Te tah longpuei kah a haeh coeng te ni." 
Matthew13:20 Lungrhong sokah a haeh te tah ol te a yaak vaengah omngaihnah neh tlek aka doe ni. 
Matthew13:21 Tedae a khuiah a yung a khueh pawt dongah kolkalh ni a om. Tedae olka kongah hnaemtaeknah neh phacip phabaem a om vaengah voeng a khah. 
Matthew13:22 Hling laklikah a tuh tah ol te aka ya la om dae dilai kah mawntangnah neh khuehtawn kah hmilhmaknah loh ol te a thing tih a tlongtlai la poeh. 
Matthew13:23 Tedae lai then sokah a tuh tah ol te a yaak tih aka hmuhming la om. Anih tah a ngen yakhat, a ngen sawmrhuk, a ngen thumkip la vuei tih thaihtak,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:24 A tloe nuettahnah te amih a paek tih, “Vaan ram tah amah lo ah cangti then aka tuh hlang neh vai uh." 
Matthew13:25 Tedae hlang a ih vaengah a rhal ha pawk tih, cang lak ah paitaang a haeh phoeiah vik cet." 
Matthew13:26 Khopol te muem tih a vuei a thaih vaengah tah paitaang te khaw phoe. 
Matthew13:27 Te vaengah a sal rhoek loh a kungmah te a paan uh tih, “Boeipa, na lo ah cangti then na haeh moenih a? Tedae paitaang aka om he me lamkah lae?” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:28 Te vaengah amih te, “He tah rhal hlang loh a saii,” a ti nah. Te dongah sal rhoek loh a taengah, “Ka cet uh vetih te te yoep sak ham na ngaih a?” a ti na uh." 
Matthew13:29 Tedae amah loh, 'Pawh, paitaang te na yoep uh vaenngah cang neh rhenten na phu uh ve ?" 
Matthew13:30 Cangah duela bok rhoeng sak mai. Cangah tue ah cangat rhoek te, 'Paitaang te lamhma la yoep uh lamtah hoeh hamla a pok la pok uh, tedae cang te tah kai kah khai khuila khoem uh, ' ka ti nah bitni,' a ti nah,” te a thui pah." 
Matthew13:31 A tloe nuettahnah amih a paek tih, “Vaan ram tah mukang mu phek la om, te te hlang loh a loh tih a lo ah a tue." 
Matthew13:32 Te te a mu aka om boeih lakah yiit. Tedae a rhoeng vaengah toian aka om boeih lakah tanglue tih thing la poeh. Te daengah ni vaan kah vaa loh ha pawk uh tih a hlaeng dongah bu a tuk,”a ti nah." 
Matthew13:33 A tloe nuettahnah neh amih te, “Vaan ram tah tolrhu phek la om. Te te huta loh a loh tih vaidam khoi thum khuiah a hlum vaengah boeih a rhoi sak,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:34 Jesuh loh he rhoek boeih he nuettahnah neh hlangping taengah a thui. Nuettahnah pawt atah amih taengah ol a thui moenih. 
Matthew13:35 Te daengah ni tonghma loh a phong, “Nuettahnah neh ka ka ka ong vetih diklai a tongnah lamloh a thuhphah te ka phoe ni,” a ti te a soep eh." 
Matthew13:36 Hlangping te a tueih phoeiah im khuila kun. Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a taengla a paan uh tih, “Lo kah paitaang nuettahnah te kaimih ham thuicaih lah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:37 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Cangti then aka tuh tah hlang capa ni." 
Matthew13:38 Lohma tah diklai ni. Te phoeiah cangti then tah ram kah a ca rhoek ni. Tedae paitaang tah rhaithae kah a ca rhoek ni. 
Matthew13:39 Te te aka haeh rhal te tah rhaithae ni. Cangah tue tah lunglai tue a bawtnah ni. Cangat rhoek tah puencawn rhoek ni. 
Matthew13:40 Te dongah paitaang a yoep uh tih hmai neh a hoeh bangla kumhal kah a bawtnah dongah om van ni. 
Matthew13:41 Hlang capa loh a puencawn rhoek te a tueih ni. Te vaengah thangkui neh olaeknah aka saii rhoek boeih te a ram lamloh a bit uh ni. 
Matthew13:42 Te phoeiah amih te hmai alh khuila a phum uh ni. Te rhoek ah rhah neh, no rhuengnah nen ni a om eh." 
Matthew13:43 Te vaengah aka dueng rhoek tah Pa kah ram ah khomik bangla sae uh ni. Hna aka khueh loh ya saeh. 
Matthew13:44 Vaan ram tah lohma ah a thuh sut khohrhang phek la om. Te te hlang loh a hmuh vaengah a thuh tih a omngaihnah neh cet. Te phoeiah a khueh boeih te a yoih tih te kah lohmuen te a lai. 
Matthew13:45 Te phoeiah vaan ram tah laitha then aka toem hnoyoi hlang phek la om. 
Matthew13:46 Laitha a phu aka tlo pakhat la a hmuh dongah, a caeh neh a khueh boeih te a yoih tih a lai." 
Matthew13:47 Vaan ram tah tuili khuila lawk aka voei bangla om bal tih namtu cungkuem lamkah khaw a coi. 
Matthew13:48 Te te a bae vaengah lihmoi la a kawt uh. Te phoeiah ngol uh tih a then te busui khuila a sang uh. Tedae a thae te a tah phawn a voeih uh. 
Matthew13:49 Kumhal kah a bawtnah dongah om van ni. Puencawn rhoek loh cet uh vetih aka dueng lakli kah boethae rhoek te a hoep ni. 
Matthew13:50 Te phoeiah amih te hmai alh khuila a voeih uh ni. Te hmuen ah rhah neh no rhuengnah ni aka om eh.,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:51 “He rhoek boeih he na hmuhming uh a?” a ti nah. Amah taengah, “Ue,” a ti uh." 
Matthew13:52 Te dongah amih taengah, “Vaan ram kah aka bang cadaek boeih tah a khohrhang khuikah a rhuem neh a thai aka pok hlang imkung phek la om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:53 Jesuh loh nuettahnah he bawt a khah tih te lamloh vik nong. 
Matthew13:54 Te phoeiah amah tolrhum la pawk tih amamih kah tunim ah amih te a thuituen hatah let uh tih, “Anih kah cueihnah neh a thaomnah he me lamkah nim?" 
Matthew13:55 “Anih he lettama capa la om moenih a? A manu tah Mary la a khue uh moenih a? A mana rhoek khaw James, Josephb, Simon, Judah ta." 
Matthew13:55 “Anih he lettama capa la om moenih a? A manu tah Mary la a khue uh moenih a? A mana rhoek khaw James, Josephb, Simon, Judah ta." 
Matthew13:56 A ngannu rhoek khaw mamih taengah boeih a om uh moenih a? Te dongah anih taengkah boeih he me lamkah nim? a ti uh. 
Matthew13:57 Tedae anih kongah amamih te a khah uh. Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te, “Tonghma he amah im neh amah kah tolrhum pawt atah sawtsit ti om pawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew13:58 Tedae amih kah hnalvalnah kongah a thaomnah muep tueng sak pawh. 
Matthew14:1 Tevaeng tue ah Jesuh kah olthang te khoboei Herod loh a yaak. 
Matthew14:2 Te dongah a taengom rhoek taengah, “Anih te tuinuem Johan coeng ni. Anih ni duek lamloh aka thoo coeng. Te dongah ni thaomnah loh anih pum dongah a tueng coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:3 Herod a loh a maya Philip kah yuu rho Herodias kongah Johan te a tuuk, a khih tih thongim ah a khueh." 
Matthew14:4 Johan loh anih te, “Herodias namah ham na khueh tueng pawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:5 Johan te ngawn a ngaih dae Johan te tonghma la a khueh uh dongah hlangping te a rhih. 
Matthew14:6 Tedae Herod kah cunnah a pha vaengah, Herodias canu tah amih lakli ah lam tih Herod te a kohoe." 
Matthew14:7 Te dongah huta kah a bih te tah paek ham olhlo neh a phong. 
Matthew14:8 Tedae a manu kah caemtuh dongah, “Tuinuem Johan kah a lu te baelpuei dongah kai m'pae,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:9 Manghai loh a kothae dae a olhlo neh, aka ngol rhoek kongah paek hamla ol a paek." 
Matthew14:10 Te dongah hlang a tueih tih Johan te thongim khuiah a rhaih. 
Matthew14:11 Te phoeiah a lu te baelpuei dongah han khuen tih hula te a paek. Te phoeiah a manu taengla a khuen. 
Matthew14:12 Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh tih rhok te a khuen uh. A up uh phoeiah tah Jesuh taengla pawk uh tih puen uh. 
Matthew14:13 Jesuh loh a yaak vaengah, te lamloh amah bueng khosoek hmuen la lawng neh cet. Tedae hlangping loh a yaak vaengah khopuei tom lamloh kho neh a vai uh." 
Matthew14:14 A caeh vaengah hlangping muep a hmuh hatah amih ham a thinphat tih, amih kah tloh te a hoeih sak." 
Matthew14:15 Hlaem a pha vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a taengla a paan uh tih, “He hmuen he khosoek la om tih a tue khaw khum coeng. Hlangping rhoek he ka tueih uh mai eh, te daengah ni kho khuila cet uh vetih amamih ham caak a lai uh eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:16 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Amih caeh ham a ngoe pawh. Namamih loh amih kah a caak ham te pae uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:17 Tedae te rhoek loh, “Vaidam panga neh nga lungnit pawt koinih a tloe ka khueh uh moenih he,” a ti uh." 
Matthew14:18 Tedae, “Te rhoek te kai taengla han khuen uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:19 Te phoeiah hlangping rhoek te khopol dongah ngolhlung ham ol a paek. Vaidam panga neh nga panit te a loh. Vaan la oeloe tih a uem phoeiah vaidam te a aeh tih hnukbang rhoek a paek. Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek loh hlangping te a paek. 
Matthew14:20 Hlang boeih loh a caak uh tih hah uh. Te phoeiah a coih, a nuei a pil te voh hlainit dongah a bae la a phueih uh." 
Matthew14:21 Huta rhoek neh camoe rhoek thui kolla aka ca rhoek he tongpa thawngnga tluk lo uh. 
Matthew14:22 Hlangping te phang a tueih hlanah hnukbang rhoek te lawng khuila kun ham tlek a tanolh tih rhalvangan la a lamhma sak. 
Matthew14:23 Tedae hlangping te a hlah a phoeiah amah bueng thangthui hamla tlang la luei. Hlaem a pha vaengah amah bueng pahoi om. 
Matthew14:24 Lawng tah lan lamloh phalong muep a pha coeng. Te vaengah hli oel om tih tuiphu loh a hinghuen. 
Matthew14:25 Jesuh tah khoyin bangli ah, tui soah cet tih amih taengla pawk." 
Matthew14:26 Amah tuili soah a caeh te a hnukbang rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah, thuen uh tih, “Mueihla ni,” a ti uh tih rhihnah neh pang uh." 
Matthew14:27 Jesuh loh amih te tlek a voek tih, “Na ngaimong sak uh, kai ni, rhih uh boeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:28 Peter loh a doo tih, “Boeipa nang na om atah, nang taengla tui so longah ka pawk na ham kai he ol m'pae lah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:29 Te dongah, “Ha lo,” a ti nah. Peter tah lawng khui lamloh rhum tih tui soah a caeh daengah Jesuh taengla a pha." 
Matthew14:30 Tedae khohli a tloh te a hmuh vaengah a rhih tih dalh buek. Te vaengah pang tih, “Boeipa kai n'khang lah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:31 Jesuh loh a kut tlek a yueng tih a tuuk phoeiah Peter te, “Uepvawt aw, balae tih na uepvawt?” a ti nah." 
Matthew14:32 Lawng dongah amih rhoi a yoeng rhoi vaengah khohli te dip. 
Matthew14:33 Te vaengah lawng dongkah rhoek loh Jesuh te a bawk uh tih, “Pathen Capa la na om tangtang,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew14:34 A hlaikan uh vaengah Gennesaret kho la pawk uh. 
Matthew14:35 Te hmuen kah hlang rhoek loh amah te a hmat uh dongah te rhoek pingpang tom ah a tueih uh. Te dongah, tloh aka kaem boeih te anih taengla a khuen uh." 
Matthew14:36 Te vaengah a himbai dongkah salaw taek dawk ham te anih a hloep uh. Te dongah aka taek rhoek tah boeih hoeih uh. 
Matthew15:1 Te phoeiah Pharisee rhoek neh cadaek rhoek tah Jerusalem lamloh Jesuh te a paan uh tih," 
Matthew15:2 “Balae tih na hnukbang rhoek loh a ham rhoek kah singyoe te a aek uh? Buh a caak uh vaengah a kut sil uh pawh,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew15:3 Tedae amih te a doo tih, “Namamih kah singyoe kongah Pathen kah olpaek te balae tih na aek uh van ?" 
Matthew15:4 Pathen loh, “Na nu neh na pa te hinyah lah. Tedae manu napa aka thet tah dueknah neh duek saeh,” a ti." 
Matthew15:5 Tedae nangmih loh, 'Hoeikhang vaengah tah, 'Manu napa khaw, te te kamah lamkah hmueih ni,' a ti coeng atah," 
Matthew15:6 A napa a hinyah pawt moenih,” na ti uh. Te dongah Pathen kah ol te namamih kah singyoe neh na hmil uh." 
Matthew15:7 Hlangthai palat rhoek, Isaiah loh nangmih kawng te phek a phong tih," 
Matthew15:8 Pilnam long he a hmui neh kan n'hinyah uh. Tedae a thinko tah kai lamloh voelh hla coeng. 
Matthew15:9 A poeyoek la kai m'bawk uh tih hlang kah olpaek lamkah thuituennah neh a thuituen uh,' a ti,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:10 Te phoeiah hlangping te a khue tih, “Hnatun lamtah hmuhming uh lah." 
Matthew15:11 Ka khuila aka kun loh hlang a poeih moenih. Tedae ka lamkah aka thoeng loh hlang a poeih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:12 Te vaengah hnukbang rhoek loh amah a paan uh tih, “Ol he a yaak vaengah Pharisee rhoek a khah te na ming nama?” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:13 Tedae amah loh a doo tih, “A pa loh a ling mueh thingling boeih te vaan loh a phuk ni." 
Matthew15:14 Amih te hlah uh, mikdael rhoek tah mikdael rhoek kah longtuengkung ni. Mikdael loh mikdael te longtueng koinih rhom ah bok cungku ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:15 Peter loh a doo tih, “Kekah nuettahnah he kaimih ham thuicaih lah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:16 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Nangmih khaw lungmong kotalh la na om uh pueng a?" 
Matthew15:17 “Ka khuila aka kun boeih te bungpuei la cet tih naat la a pha te na yakming uh pawt nim? 
Matthew15:18 Tedae ka lamkah aka thoeng tah thinko lamkah ha thoeng dongah hlang a poeih. 
Matthew15:19 Poeknah a thae, ngawnnah, samphaihnah, cukhalhnah, huencannah, a honghi neh soehsalnah he thinko lamkah ni ha thoeng." 
Matthew15:20 Hekah rhoek long ni hlang a poeih. Tedae kut muen a la aka ca loh hlang a poeih moenih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:21 Te lamloh a caeh phoeiah Jesuh tah Tyre neh Sidon pingpang la khoe uh. 
Matthew15:22 Te vaengah te rhoek vaang lamkah Kanaan nu pakcak ha thoeng tih a pang doela, “Kai he n'rhen lah, Boeipa, David capa, ka canu tah rhaithae a kaem khuengrhueng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:23 Tedae anih te ol lan pawh. Te dongah a hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh. Amah te a dawt uh tih, “Anih ke kaimih hnukah pang coeng tih tueih laeh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew15:24 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Israel imkhui kah tu aka poci ham pawt koinih n'tueih mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:25 Huta te ha pawk vaengah anih te a bawk tih, “Boeipa, kai m'bom dae,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:26 Tedae a doo vaengah tah, “Ca kah buh te rhawt tih ui ham a tloeng tah a then moenih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:27 Tedae te long khaw, “Ue ta, Boeipa, ui pataeng a boei rhoek kah caboei lamkah aka bo buhdik te a caak ta,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:28 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Aw huta, nang kah tangnah tah len pai, nang ham tah na ngaih bangla om pai saeh,” a ti nah. Tekah a tue lamloh a canu te hoeih." 
Matthew15:29 Te lamloh a thoeih vaengah Jesuh tah Galilee tuili la pawk. Te phoeiah tlang la luei tih pahoi ngol. 
Matthew15:30 Te vaengah hlangping loh amah te muep a paan uh tih, aka khaem rhoek, mikdael rhoek, aka khawn rhoek, olmueh rhoek neh a tloe boeih te amamih neh a khuen uh. Amih te Jesuh kho kungla pak a voeih uh dongah amih te a hoeih sak." 
Matthew15:31 Olmueh khaw cal, aka khawn khaw a sading, aka khaem khaw cet, mikdael loh a hmuh, te hlangping loh a hmuh vaengah a ngaihmang uh tih, Israel Pathen te a thangpom uh." 
Matthew15:32 Jesuh loh a hnukbang rhoek te a khue tih, “Hlangping hamla ka thinphat, kai taengah hnin thum rhaeh uh coeng tih, a caak ham ba khaw khueh uh pawh. Te dongah amih he buhmueh rhathih la tueih ka ngaih pawh. Longpueng ah tawnba uh ve,” a ti nah." 
Matthew15:33 Tedae amah taengah hnukbang rhoek loh, “Vaidam heyet he kohong ah me lamkah nim mamih ham a om eh? Heyet hlangping a hah ham akhaw,” a ti uh." 
Matthew15:34 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te, “Vaidam meyet na khueh uh,” a ti nah. Te vaengah,, “Vaidam parhih neh ngadik a yool ni,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew15:35 Te phoeiah hlangping te lai ah ngol hamla ol a uen tih," 
Matthew15:36 Vaidam hluem rhih neh nga te a loh tih, a uem, a aeh tih hnukbang rhoek te a paek tih hnukbang rhoek loh hlangping te a doe." 
Matthew15:37 Hlang boeih loh a caak uh tih hah uh. Te phoeiah a coih a nueipil te voh parhih a bae la a phueih uh. 
Matthew15:38 Aka ca rhoek tah huta neh camoe tae kolla tongpa thawngli lo uh. 
Matthew15:39 Hlangping te a tueih phoeiah lawng khuila kun tih Magadan vaang la pawk. 
Matthew16:1 Te vaengah Pharisee rhoek neh Sadducees rhoek loh a paan uh tih, “Vaan lamkah miknoek te amih tueng ham a dawt uh tih a loepdak uh." 
Matthew16:2 Tedae amih te a doo tih, “Hlaem a pha vaengah vaan ke khopang a ling dongah khothen na ti uh." 
Matthew16:3 Vaan ke Mincang ah hmuep tih a ling dongah, tihnin ah khonal ni na ti uh. Vaan kah a hmuethma ngawn tah boelhkhoeh ham na ming uh dae a tuetang kah miknoek tah na ming uh thai moenih." 
Matthew16:4 Boethae neh samphaih cadil loh miknoek a kuek, tedae Jonah kah miknoek pawt atah miknoek m'pae mahpawh,” a ti nah. Te phoeiah amih te a hnoo tih vik cet." 
Matthew16:5 Tedae rhalvangan la a caeh uh vaengah hnukbang rhoek loh buh khuen ham a hnilh uh. 
Matthew16:6 Te vaengah Jesuh loh amih te, “Pharisee rhoek neh Sadducee rhoek kah tolrhu ke hmat uh lamtah ngaithuen uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:7 Tedae amih tah amamih khuiah thui uh thae tih, “Buh n'khuen uh pawt tih,” a ti uh." 
Matthew16:8 Tedae Jesuh loh a ming vaengah, “Uepvawt rhoek aw, balae tih buh na khueh uh pawt te namamih khuiah na thuingong uh?" 
Matthew16:9 Na yakming uh hlan a? Vaidam panga te thawngnga cung tih voh dongah muep na phueih te na poek uh moenih a? 
Matthew16:10 Vaidam parhih te thawngli loh cung uh tih voh dongah muep na khuen uh moenih a? 
Matthew16:11 Balae tih na yakming uh pawh, Nangmih taengah buh kawng te ka thui moenih. Tedae Pharisee rhoek neh Sadducee rhoek kah tolrhu mah ngaithuen uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:12 Vaidam khuikah tolrhu ngaithuen ham a thui moenih, Pharisee rhoek neh Sadducee rhoek kah thuituennah ni tila a hmuhming uh." 
Matthew16:13 Jesuh tah Kaisarea Philipi pingpang la a pawk vaengah a hnukbang rhoek te a dawt tih, “Hlang rhoek loh Hlang Capa he ulae a ti uh?” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:14 Te vaengah amih loh, “A ngen loh tuinuem Johan, pakhat loh Elijah, a tloe rhoek loh Jeremiah neh tonghma khat khat a ti uh,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew16:15 Amih te khaw, “Tedae nangmih loh, kai he ulae na ti uh?” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:16 Simon Peter loh a doo tih, “Nang tah aka hing Pathen Capa Khrih ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:17 Te vaengah Jesuh loh anih te a doo tih, “Simon Barjonah tah, yoethen la na om coeng. Pumsa neh thii nen pawt tih vaan kah a Pa loh nang taengah a phoe coeng." 
Matthew16:18 Te dongah kai loh nang te, “Nang tah Peter ni. Te dongah hekah lungpang soah hlangboel te ka thoh vetih saelkhui vongka loh noeng mahpawh." 
Matthew16:19 Vaan ram kah cabi te nang taengah kan paek ni. Te dongah diklai ah na pin te tah vaan ah pin la om ni. Tedae diklai ah na hlam te tah vaan ah hlam la om ni,' ka ti,” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:20 Te phoeiah, 'Jesuh tah Khrih ni,' tila thui pawt ham hnukbang te ol a paek." 
Matthew16:21 Te vaeng lamloh Jesuh tah Jerusalem la cet tih a ham rhoek, khosoihham rhoek, cadaek rhoek kah nganboh muep yook ham neh, a ngawn phoeikah hnin thum ah a thoh ham a kuek te a hnukbang rhoek taengah koe a thuicaih." 
Matthew16:22 Te vaengah Peter loh a sim doela koe a mawt tih, “Boeipa nang te poekpoei rhola a ti mai mako, he tah nang taengah om loengloeng boel saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:23 Tedae Peter te a mael thil tih, “Satan, kai hnukla nong, kai ham thangkui la na om. Na poek te Khohni kah hno pawt tih hlang kah hno ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew16:24 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh a hnukbang rhoek te, “Khat khat long ni ka hnukah lo ham a ngaih atah, amah te huek uh saeh lamtah a thinglam a koh doeah kai m'vai saeh." 
Matthew16:25 A hinglu te khang ham aka ngaih tah poci ni. Tedae kai kongah a hinglu aka hlong tah te te a dang ni. 
Matthew16:26 Hlang loh diklai he boeih a pang dae a hinglu a hlong atah balae a hoeikhang eh? Hlang loh amah kah hinglu ham balae tlansum la a phai eh? 
Matthew16:27 Te dongah Hlang Capa loh a napa kah thangpomnah neh, amah kah puencawn rhoek ham pawk puei vaengah hlang te a khoboe bangla rhip a thuung van ni." 
Matthew16:28 Te phoeiah amih te, “Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui hekah aka pai khuiah hlangvang om. Amih loh thaomnah neh aka pai Pathen ram te a ming uh hlan atah dueknah he ten uh mueh mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:1 Khohnin hnin rhuk phoeiah Jesuh loh Peter, James neh a mana Johan te a khuen tih amih te tlang sang sola hloep a khuen." 
Matthew17:1 Khohnin hnin rhuk phoeiah Jesuh loh Peter, James neh a mana Johan te a khuen tih amih te tlang sang sola hloep a khuen." 
Matthew17:2 Te vaengah Jesuh tah amih kah hmaiah thohai uh tih, a maelhmai te khomik bangla sae. A himbai tah hmaivang bangla a bok la om." 
Matthew17:3 Te vaengah Moses neh Elijah te amih taengah pakcak ha thoeng tih Boeipa nehhmaih cal uh. 
Matthew17:4 Te dongah Peter loh Jesuh te a doo tih, “Boeipa heah he mamih om ham then tih, na ngaih atah dap pathum ah pahoi ka saii eh, nang ham pakhat, Moses ham pakhat, Elijah ham pakhat saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:5 Peter a cal li vaengah aka phaa khomai loh amih te a dah. Te vaengah khomai khui lamkah loh ol pakhat loh, “He tah ka capa thintlo ni, a soah ka lungtlun, a ol hnatun pa uh, “tarha a ti." 
Matthew17:6 Hnukbang rhoek loh a yaak vaengah a maelhmai a buenglueng uh tih bahoeng a rhih uh. 
Matthew17:7 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te a paan tih a taek phoeiah, “Thoo uh, rhih uh boeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:8 A mik a huel uh daengah Jesuh amah bueng pawt atah uh khaw hmu uh pawh. 
Matthew17:9 Tlang lamloh a suntlak uh vaengah amih te Jesuh loh a uen tih, “Mangthui he Hlang Capa duek lamloh a thoh hlan atah thui boeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:10 Te dongah hnukbang rhoek loh Jesuh te a dawt uh tih, “Balae tih cadaek rhoek loh, 'Elijah he ha pawk lamhma ham a kuek,' a ti uh?” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:11 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Elijah tah ha pawk ngawn coeng tih boeih a thoh pawn ni." 
Matthew17:12 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, Elijah tah ha pawk oepsoeh dae anih te hmat uh pawt tih a ngaih uh sarhui neh Johan te a saii uh. Tangkhuet la hlang capa loh amih kah nganboh a yok tom coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:13 Te daengah amih ham tuinuem Johan kawng ni a thui pah te hnukbang rhoek loh a hmuhming uh. 
Matthew17:14 Hlangping taengla a pawk uh vaengah anih te hlang pakhat loh a paan. 
Matthew17:15 A taengah cungkueng tih, “Boeipa ka ca he rhen mai, rhaihum dongah bahoeng patang coeng, tui khuila, hmai khuila cungku taitu coeng." 
Matthew17:16 Anih he na hnukbang rhoek taengla ka khuen dae a hoeih sak uh thai moenih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:17 Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Aka tangnahmueh kah cadil neh aka pamdah aw, nangmih taengah meyet nim ka om eh? Nangmih te meyet nim kan yaknaem ve, anih te kamah taengla pahoi hang khuen,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:18 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh rhaithae te a ho tih rhaithae loh camoe te a nong tak. Te dongah te vaeng tue lamloh camoe te hoeih. 
Matthew17:19 Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek loh Jesuh te hloep a paan uh tih, “Balae tih anih te ka haek uh thai pawh,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew17:20 Te dongah, “Nangmih kah hnalvalnah kongah ni. Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, mukang mu bang mah tangnah na khueh koinih, hekah tlang he kela thoeih na ti vaengah thoeih vetih na tloel tlaih mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:21 [ Tedae, thangthuinah neh yaehnah nen pawt koinih hebang he poengla coe thai mahpawh ]" 
Matthew17:22 Galilee ah a sisuk uh vaengah Jesuh loh amih te, “Hlang capa tah hlang kut ah a voeih tom coeng." 
Matthew17:23 Anih te a ngawn uh vetih a thum hnin ah thoo ni,” a ti nah tih mat a khothae uh." 
Matthew17:24 Kapernaum la a pawk uh vaengah cawn aka doe rhoek loh Peter te a paan uh tih, “Na saya loh cawn a paek moenih?” a ti nah." 
Matthew17:25 Peter loh, “Ue,” a ti nah. Im la a pawk uh vaengah Jesuh loh a khal tih, “Simon, nang balae na poek ? Diklai manghai rhoek loh u taengkah lamkhong neh mangmu lae a loh ? Amih ca rhoek lamkah a? hlanglang lamkah a? “ a ti nah." 
Matthew17:26 “Hlanglang taengkah,” a ti nah hatah Jesuh loh, “Te dongah a ca ni aka loeih." 
Matthew17:27 Te cakhaw amih te n'khah ham om pawh. Tuili la cet lamtah ngavaih te voei uh. Te vaengah nga aka loe lamhma te lo uh. Tedae a ka a ang vaengah tangka na hmuh ni. Te te lo lamtah nang neh kai ham amih te pae,”a ti nah." 
Matthew18:1 Te vaeng tue ah hnukbang rhoek loh Jesuh te a paan uh tih, “Vaan ram ah ulae tanglue la aka om,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew18:2 Te dongah camoe pakhat te a khue tih amih lakli ah a pai sak. 
Matthew18:3 Te phoeiah, “Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, camoe rhoek bangla na mael uh tih na om uh pawt atah vaan ram khuila na kun uh tlaih mahpawh." 
Matthew18:4 Te dongah hekah camoe bangla amah tlarhoel hlang te tah vaan ram ah tanglue la om. 
Matthew18:5 Te phoeiah kai kah ming neh hebang camoe pakhat aka doe te tah kai ni n'doe. 
Matthew18:6 U long khaw kai aka tangnah camoe rhoek he pakhat khaw a khah atah, a rhawn ah laak phaklung a hoei tih tuili dung ah a buek te anih ham rhoei ngai." 
Matthew18:7 Anunae thangkui kongah diklai aih he. Thangkui te a om ham a kueknah om. Tedae anunae anih lamloh thangkui aka tung hlang aih te. 
Matthew18:8 Te phoeiah na kut neh na kho loh nang n'khah atah te te tloek lamtah namah lamloh voei. Kut panit kho panit om tih dungyan hmai khuila m'voeih lakah a ngun a khaem la hingnah khuiah kun te nang ham hnothen la om. 
Matthew18:9 Te phoeiah na mik loh nang n'khah atah te te koeih lamtah namah lamloh voei. Mik vang neh hingnah khuila kun te nang ham hnothen la om. Mik panit om tih hell hmai khuila voeih lakah tah. 
Matthew18:10 He camoe rhoek khuikah pakhat khaw na hnaep uh pawt ham ngaithuen uh. Nangmih ham kan thui, vaan ah amih kah puencawn rhoek loh vaan kah a pa maelhmai te a hmuh uh taitu lah ko." 
Matthew18:11 Hlang capa tah aka hma rhoek khang ham ni a ha pawk. 
Matthew18:12 Nangmih tah metlam na poek ? Hlang pakhat te tu yakhat om coeng dae te khuikah pakhat loh poengdoe koinih sawmko pako te tlang ah a hlah vetih aka poeng te toem hamla cet mahpawt nim? 
Matthew18:13 Te vaengah a hmuh hamla om coeng koinih ta, nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, aka poeng mueh sawmko pako lakah aka hma soah omngaih ngai."
