Matthew18:14 Te dongah vaan kah na Pa hmaiah tah camoe rhoek pakhat khaw poci ham te a ngaih moenih. 
Matthew18:15 “Na manuca loh nang taengah a tholh atah cet lamtah namah neh anih laklo bueng ah mah anih te toeltham. Nang ol a yaak atah na manuca te na na coeng. 
Matthew18:16 Tedae a hnatun pawt atah pakhat khaw panit khaw namah taengah khuen. Te daengah ni laipai rhoek panit pathum kah a ka loh olka te boeih a pai puei eh. 
Matthew18:17 Tedae amih loh a altha atah hlangboel taengah thui. Te vaengah Hlangboel kah ol pataeng a altha atah nangmih taengah namtom neh mangmucoi bangla om sak. 
Matthew18:18 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, diklai hmanah na pin uh te tah vaan ah a pin ni. Tedae diklai ah na hlam uh te tah vaan ah a hlam ni." 
Matthew18:19 Te phoeiah nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, panit loh na kotluep tih diklai hmanah hno boeih te bih uh koinih, amih ham te vaan kah a pa loh a saii pah ni." 
Matthew18:20 Panit pathum aka om te khaw kai ming neh a hum uh atah amih lakli ah pahoi ka om coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew18:21 Te vaengah amah te Peter loh a paan tih, “Boeipa, ka manuca loh kai soah a tholh vaengah ka hlah vawptawp a ya?, voei rhih due a?” a ti nah." 
Matthew18:22 Jesuh loh, “Nang taengah voei rhih due pawt tih, sawmrhih parhih due ni ka ti." 
Matthew18:23 Te dongah vaan ram tah a sal rhoek taengah bitat soepsoei ham aka ngaih hlang manghai neh vai uh. 
Matthew18:24 Soepsoei ham a tong vaengah talen thawngrha dongkah laikung pakhat te a taengla a khuen. 
Matthew18:25 Tedae anih loh thuung ham khaw kawn khueh pawh. Te dongah anih te a boeipa loh a yuu neh a ca rhoek, a khueh boeih te a yoih tih thuung ham ol a paek." 
Matthew18:26 Te dongah sal te bakop tih manghai te a bawk. Te phoeiah, “Kai soah na thinsen sak mai lamtah nang te boeih kan thuung bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew18:27 Te dongah boei loh a thinphat tih tekah sal te a loeih sak. Te phoeiah a laiba khaw a hlah pah. 
Matthew18:28 Tedae tekah sal tah cet tih a sal puei pakhat a hmuh. Te long te anih taengah denarii yakhat a ba. Te vaengah anih te a tuuk tih a khak phoeiah, “Pakhat na ba akhaw n'thuung laeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew18:29 Te dongah a sal puei loh a yalh doela a hloep, “Kai soah na thinsen mai dae, nang te kan thuung bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew18:30 Tedae ngaih pawt tih laiba te a thuung duela thongim khuiah a hlak tih a caeh tak. 
Matthew18:31 Aka om hno te a sal puei rhoek loh a hmuh dongah mat a khothae uh. Te dongah a boei taengla a pawk uh vaengah aka om hno te boeih a thui uh. 
Matthew18:32 Te vaengah a boei loh anih te a khue tih, 'Sal thae aw, kai nan hloep dongah na docanah boeih te kan hlah," 
Matthew18:33 kai loh nang kang rhen bangla na sal puei te na rhen ham a kuek van moenih a?' a ti nah. 
Matthew18:34 A boeipa loh kosi a hong tih anih te laiba boeih a thuung hlan atah phaepkung rhoek taengah a thak. 
Matthew18:35 Te dongah khat rhip loh a manuca te na thinko neh na hlah uh pawt koinih vaan kah a pa loh namamih taengah te tlam ni a saii van eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:1 Jesuh loh he rhoek kah ol boeih he bawt a khah phoeiah Galilee lamloh nong tih Jordan rhalvangan Judea vaang la pawk. 
Matthew19:1 Jesuh loh he rhoek kah ol boeih he bawt a khah phoeiah Galilee lamloh nong tih Jordan rhalvangan Judea vaang la pawk. 
Matthew19:2 Te vaengah Jesuh te hlangping loh muep a vai uh tih amih rhoek te pahoi a hoeih sak. 
Matthew19:3 Te vaengah Pharisee rhoek loh Jesuh te a paan uh tih a noemcai uh. Te vaengah, “Paelnaehnah khat khat dongah a yuu hla koinih tongpa ham tueng aya? a ti na uh." 
Matthew19:4 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo tih, “A tongcuek lamkah aka suen loh amih rhoi tongpa neh huta bueng a saii te na tae uh moenih a?" 
Matthew19:5 Tedae he kongah ni, 'tongpa loh a manu neh a napa te a imphael tak ni. Te vaengah a yuu taengah kap vetih panit te pumsa pakhat la om ni,' a ti." 
Matthew19:6 Te dongah panit lo pawt tih pumsa khat coeng ni. Te dongah Pathen loh a yingyawn sak te hlang loh maa sak boel saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:7 Te phoeiah Jesuh te, “Balae tih yuuhlaknah cayol te paek tih tueih ham Moses loh a uen,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew19:8 Amih te, “Nangmih kah thinthahnah kongah ni na yuu te hlak ham te Moses loh nangmih m'paek. Tedae a tongcuek lamloh te te a om moenih." 
Matthew19:9 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, cukhalhnah kawng pawt ah a yuu a hlak tih a tloe aka lo te tah samphaih coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:10 A hnukbang rhoek loh amah taengah, “A yuu taengah a va kah paelnaehnah om tangloeng koinih vasak te rhoei mahpawh,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew19:11 Amih te, “Nangmih kah thinthahnah kongah ni na yuu te hlak ham te Moses loh nangmih m'paek. Tedae a tongcuek lamloh te te a om moenih." 
Matthew19:12 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, cukhalhnah kawng pawt ah a yuu a hlak tih a tloe aka lo te tah samphaih coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:13 Te phoeiah amih kut tloeng tih thangthui sak ham camoe rhoek te a taengla a khuen uh. Tedae amih te hnukbang rhoek loh a ho uh. 
Matthew19:14 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Camoe rhoek te hlah uh lamtah kai taengla ha pawk ham atah amih te kanghalh uh boeh, vaan ram tah amih ham ni a om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:15 Amih soah kut a tloeng tih te lamloh vik cet. 
Matthew19:16 Te phoeiah hlang pakhat loh Jesuh taengla pakcak a paan tih, “Saya, dungyan hingnah ka khueh ham mebang hno then nim ka saii eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:17 Tedae Jesuh loh anih te, “Balae tih kai he a then kawng nan dawt? A then pakhat ni a om. Tedae hingnah khuila kun na ngaih atah olpaek te tuem,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:18 Jesuh te, “Mebang nim,” a ti nah. Te dongah Jesuh loh, “Hlang ngawn boeh, samphaih boeh, huencan boeh, laithae boeh" 
Matthew19:19 Na nu neh na pa hinyah lamtah na imben te namah bangla lungnah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:20 Cadong loh, “He rhoek he boeih ka tuem coeng, balae ka phavawt bal pueng?” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:21 Jesuh loh anih te, “Lungcuei la om na ngaih atah cet lamtah na khuehtawn te yoi. Te phoeiah khodaeng te pae. Te daengah ni vaan ah khohrhang na khueh eh. Te phoeiah kai pahoi m'vai,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:22 Tedae cadong tah hnopai muep aka khueh la a om dongah ol te a yaak vaengah kothae doeah cet. 
Matthew19:23 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a hnukbang rhoek te, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, kuirhang tah vaan ram ah kun tloel ni." 
Matthew19:24 Te phoeiah nangmih taengah koep kan thui, kuirhang te Pathen ram khuiah a kun lakah kalauk te phamet khui longah a ael ke yoeikoek la om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:25 Hnukbang rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah let uh dahlawt tih, “Te koinih ulae khang la aka om eh?” a ti uh." 
Matthew19:26 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te a sawt tih, “He he hlang taengah a tloel la om, tedae Pathen taengah boeih coeng thai,” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:27 Te vaengah Peter loh a doo tih, “Kaimih tah rhoepsaep boeih ka toeng uh tih, namah kam vai uh coeng he. Te koinih kaimih ham balae aka om eh?” a ti nah." 
Matthew19:28 Te dongah Jesuh loh, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, nangmih loh kai nam vai uh coeng. Hlang capa tah koepcunnah dongah a thangpomnah ngolkhoel sola ngol ni. Nangmih khaw ngolkhoel hlainit soah na ngol uh vetih Israel koca hlainit te lai na tloek uh ni." 
Matthew19:29 Kai ming kongah a im a lo boeih, manuca rhoek, ngannu rhoek, a manu napa, a ca rhoek, aka toeng boeih te tah a pueh yakhat a dang vetih dungyan hingnah a pang ni." 
Matthew19:30 Tedae lamhma khaw hnukkhueng la, hnukkhueng khaw lamhma la muep om uh ni." 
Matthew20:1 Vaan ram tah imkung hlang pakhat phek la om. Anih tah a misurdum kah bibikung coep ham yue cet. 
Matthew20:2 Te vaengah bibikung rhoek neh hnin at ham denarii pakhat neh a kotluep tih amih te a misurdum la a tueih. 
Matthew20:3 Khonoek pathum tlukah a caeh hatah hnoyoih hmuen ah pai uh tih aka palyal rhoek te a hmuh. 
Matthew20:4 Te dongah te rhoek te, “Nangmih khaw misurdum la cet uh lamtah a dueng la aka om te tah nangmih te kam paek bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:5 Te dongah te rhoek khaw cet uh. Te phoeiah khonoek parhuk neh pako tluk ah khaw cet tih koep a tlap bal. 
Matthew20:6 Hlaikhat tluk kah a caeh vaengah a tloe rhoek sut aka pai rhoek te a hmuh. Te dongah amih te, “Balae tih sut na pai uh tih khohnin yung ah na palyal uh he ?” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:7 Te vaengah amah te, “Kaimih he n'coep uh moenih,” a ti nah uh. Te dongah amih te, “Nangmih khaw misurdum la cet uh saw,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:8 Hlaem ben a pha vaengah misurdum boei loh a dumtawt taengah, “Bibikung rhoek te khue lamtah lamhnuk rhoek lamkah tong lamtah lamhma duela amih te thapang thuung laeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:9 Khonoek hlaikhat tluk kah aka pawk rhoek khaw denarii pakhat rhip a dang uh. 
Matthew20:10 Lamhma la aka pawk rhoek loh muep a dang uh ni tila a poek uh. Tedae amih khaw denari pakhat ni rhip a dang uh. 
Matthew20:11 Te tla aka dang rhoek loh imkung taengah kohuet uh. 
Matthew20:12 Te dongah “He rhoek a lamhnuk rhoek tah khonoek pakhat ni a bi uh dae, hnin at puet kholing hnorhih aka ueh kaimih neh amih te vanat la na khueh,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew20:13 Tedae amih te pakhat la a doo tih, 'Pueivan aw nang kan thae nah moenih, kai neh denarii pakhat ham kotluep a om moenih a?" 
Matthew20:14 Namah kah te lo lamtah cet laeh. Nang bangla lamhnuk te khaw paek ka ngaih. 
Matthew20:15 Kamah koe nen te ka ngaih bangla ka sai tueng moenih a? Kai a then la ka om te nang kah mik loh a lolh la a om sak a?' a ti nah. 
Matthew20:16 Te dongah lamhnuk te lamhma vetih lamhma te lamhnuk la om ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:17 Jesuh loh hnukbang hlainit rhoek te hloep a khue tih Jerusalem la cet. 
Matthew20:18 A longpueng uh vaengah amih te, “Jerusalem la cet uh pawn sih. Hlang capa tah khosoihham rhoek neh cadaek rhoek, taengla a voeih uh vetih anih te dueknah neh a boe sak uh ni he." 
Matthew20:19 Te phoeiah tamdaeng ham neh boh tih tai hamla namtom rhoek taengah a voeih uh ni. Tedae a thum hnin ah koep thoo ni, “ a ti nah." 
Matthew20:20 Te vaengah Zebedee ca rhoek kah a manu loh a ca rhoek te Jesuh a paan puei tih a bawk. Tedae a taengkah hno pakhat a bih. 
Matthew20:21 Jesuh loh anih te, “Balae na ngaih,” a ti nah. Te vaengah, “Ka ca rhoi he na ram ah tah na bantang ah pakhat na banvoei ah pakhat ngol rhoi saeh ti mai laeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:22 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Mebang na bih uh khaw na ming uh moenih. Kai loh ka ok ham ka cai thil boengloeng te ok hamla na coeng uh thai aya? a ti nah. Te vaengah Jesuh te, “Coeng thai ngawn,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew20:23 Jesuh loh amih te, “Kai kah boengloeng he na ok uh ngawn ni. Tedae kai kah bantang neh banvoei ah ngol ham tah kai hut la om pawh. Tedae a pa loh a hmoel rhoek ni tekah te a paek eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:24 Parha rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah te rhoi boeina kawng te a yakdam uh. 
Matthew20:25 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te a khue tih, “Namtom rhoek kah boei rhoek tah amamih vueinan uh khulae tih a len rhoek loh amamih a huttet uh thae te na ming." 
Matthew20:26 Nangmih khuiah tetlam te om uh boeh. Tedae, Nangmih khuiah a len la om aka ngaih te tah nangmih kah tueihyoeih la om ni." 
Matthew20:27 Te phoeiah nangmih khuiah lamhma la om ham aka ngaih te tah nangmih kah sal la om ni. 
Matthew20:28 Hlang Capa tah hlang thohtat sak ham pawt tih thohtat pah ham neh a hinglu te ping kah tlansum la paek ham ni halo,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:29 Amih te Jerikho lamloh a khong uh vaengah Jesuh te hlangping loh muep a vai. 
Matthew20:30 Te vaengah mikdael panit long taengah ngol rhoi. Jesuh kah a khum te a yaak rhoi vaengah pang rhoi tih, “Boeipa, David Capa, kaimih rhoi he n'rhen lah,” a ti rhoi." 
Matthew20:31 Tedae hlangping loh amih rhoi te a ho tih a paa sak. Te vaengah te rhoi te taoe pang rhoi tih, “Boeipa, David Capa kaimih rhoi he n'rhen lah,” a ti rhoi." 
Matthew20:32 Te vaengah Jesuh tah pai tih amih rhoi te a khue. Te phoeiah, “Nangmih rhoi ham balae saii sak na ngaih rhoi,” a ti nah." 
Matthew20:33 Te dongah, “Boeipa, kaimih rhoi mik tah tueng lah saeh,” a ti rhoi." 
Matthew20:34 Jesuh tah a thinphat tih amih rhoi mik te a taek pah. Te vaengah tlek a hmuh rhoi tih Jesuh hnuk a vai rhoi. 
Matthew21:1 Jerusalem taengla a yoei uh vaengah Olives tlang kah Bethphage la pawk uh. Te vaengah Jesuh loh a hnukbang panit te a tueih tih," 
Matthew21:2 “ Na rhaldan kah kho la cet rhoi lamtah muli-marhang neh a taengah a ca a pael te kawl na hmuh rhoi ni. Hlam rhoi lamtah kai taengla hang khuen rhoi. 
Matthew21:3 Khat khat loh nangmih rhoi te khoem n'thui sak atah, 'Boeipa loh a ngoe,' ti nah. Te vaengah koe han hlah bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:4 He he a om daengah ni tonghma loh a thui te a soep eh. 
Matthew21:5 “Zion nu te thui pah, na manghai tah nang ha pawk coeng te, muli-marhang so neh laak tal ca soah khaw muelhtuet la ngol,” a ti." 
Matthew21:6 Hnukbang rhoi te cet rhoi tih Jesuh kah a thuinuet bangla a saii rhoi. 
Matthew21:7 Muli-marhang neh a ca te a khuen rhoi tih himbai a tloeng uh thil phoeiah a ngoldoelh thil. 
Matthew21:8 Te vaengah hlangping a kumngai loh longpuei ah a himbai te a phaih uh. A tloe rhoek loh thing kah a hlaeng te a hlaek uh tih longpuei ah a phaih uh. 
Matthew21:9 Te phoeiah a hmaila aka lamhma neh a hnuk kah aka vai hlangping loh pang uh tih, “David capa tah Hosanna, Boeipa ming neh aka pawk tah a yoethen pai, sangkoek ah Hosanna,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:10 Jerusalem la a kun vaengah khopuei boeih hinghuen tih, “Anih he unim,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:11 Te vaengah hlangping loh, “Anih he Galilee Nazareth lamkah tonghma Jesuh ni,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:12 Jesuh te bawkim khuila kun tih bawkim kah hno yoi rhoek neh hno lai rhoek te boeih a haek, tangkathung rhoek kah caboei neh vahu aka yoi rhoek kah ngoltlang te a palet pah." 
Matthew21:13 Te phoeiah amih te, “Ka im tah, ' Thangthuinah im la khue saeh,'tila a daek coeng. Tedae nangmih loh dingca rhoek kah a khuirhung la na khueh uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:14 Te vaengah amah te mikdael rhoek neh aka khaem rhoek loh Bawkim ah a paan uh tih amih te a hoeih sak. 
Matthew21:15 Tedae khobae rhambae la a saii neh camoe rhoek loh bawkim ah pang tih, “David Capa tah Hosanna,” a ti uh te khosoihham rhoek neh cadaek rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah a yakdam uh." 
Matthew21:16 Te dongah Jesuh te, “He rhoek loh a thui te na yaak a?” a ti nah. Te vaengah Jesuh loh amih te, “Ue, na tae uh mahnim? “'Cahmang neh cacun rhoek kah ka lamkah loh thangthennah na rhoekbah coeng,' a ti ta,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:17 Te phoeiah amih te a hnoo phoeiah khopuei lamkah loh Bethany la cet tih pahoi rhaeh. 
Matthew21:18 Khopuei la yueya a bal vaengah tah a bungpong. 
Matthew21:19 Long ah thaibu kung pakhat a hmuh tih a taengla a paan. Tedae a hnah bueng mueh atah a kung dongah bang khaw hmu pawh. Te dongah, “Dungyan duela nang kah a thaih om boel saeh,” a ti nah tih thaibu kung tah pahoi koh." 
Matthew21:20 Hnukbang rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah a ngaihmang uh tih, “Metlamlae thaibu kung tlek a koh ca,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:21 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, tangnah na khueh uh tih na boelhkhoeh pawt atah, thaibu kung bueng te na saii uh pawt vetih hekah tlang he phoek tih tuili khuila hlak ham pataeng na ti nah uh koinih coeng tangloeng ngawn ni." 
Matthew21:22 Te phoeiah thangthuinah neh vawpvawp na bih uh te tah tangnah neh na dang uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:23 Te phoeiah thangthuinah neh vawpvawp na bih uh te tah tangnah neh na dang uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:24 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Nangmih te ol pakhat kan dawt eh. Te te kai taengah nan thui uh atah he rhoek he mebang saithainah neh ka saii khaw nangmih taengah kan thui bitni." 
Matthew21:25 Baptisma Johan tah me lamkah lae ana om ? Vaan lamkah a? Hlang lamkah a?” a ti nah. Te vaengah te rhoek loh amamih khuiah a poek uh tih, “' Vaan lamkah, ' n'ti uh koinih mamih te, 'Balae tih anih te na tangnah uh pawh,' a ti veh." 
Matthew21:26 Tedae hlang lamkah n'ti uh koinih hlangping he koek n'rhih uh. Hlang boeih loh Johan te tonghma la a khueh uh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:27 Te dongah Jesuh te a doo uh tih, “Ka ming uh pawh,” a ti uh. Tedae Jesuh loh amih te, “Mebang saithainah neh lae ka saii he khaw nangmih taengah ka thui mahpawh." 
Matthew21:28 Nangmih ta metlam na poek ? Hlang pakhat loh a ca panit a khueh. A cuek te a paan tih, “Ka ca tihnin ah dum ah cet lamtah saii ne,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:29 Te vaengah te long te a doo tih, 'Ka ngaih pawh,' a ti nah. Tedae a hnukkhueng ah yut tih koep cet." 
Matthew21:30 Pakhat te a paan tih lamhma kah banngla a ti nah. Te long tah a doo tih, 'Ka cet ni boeipa,' a ti nah dae cet pawh." 
Matthew21:31 Te rhoi panit khuiah ulae a napa kah kongaih aka saii,” a ti nah. Te vaengah, “Lamhma loh,” a ti na uh. Jesuh loh loh amih te, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, mangmucoi neh hlanghalh rhoek tah Pathen ram khuila nangmih lakah lamhma uh ni." 
Matthew21:32 Johan loh duengnah longpuei neh nangmih taengla ha pawk dae anih te na tangnah uh moenih. Tedae mangmucoi rhoek neh hlanghalh rhoek loh anih te a tangnah. Nangmih loh na hmuh uh coeng dae anih te tangnah ham a tloihsoi ah khaw na yut uh moenih. 
Matthew21:33 A tloe nuettahnah he hnatun uh lah. Lokung hlang pakhat om tih anih loh dum a tue. Te te vongtung a tung tih a khuiah misurrhom a too, imsang khaw a sak. Te phoeiah lotawn rhoek a phaam sak tih vik yiin." 
Matthew21:34 A thaih tue a yoei vaengah a sal rhoek te a thaih doe sak ham lotawn rhoek taengla a tueih. 
Matthew21:35 Te vaengah lotawn rhoek loh lokung kah sal rhoek te a tuuk uh tih, pakhat te a boh uh, pakhat te a ngawn uh, pakhat te a dae uh." 
Matthew21:36 Te phoeiah sal tloe te lamhma kah lakah muep a tueih dae amih te khaw a saii uh tangkhuet. 
Matthew21:37 A hnukkhueng ah a capa te amih taengla a tueih tih, “Ka capa tah a yahnah uh bitni,” a ti." 
Matthew21:38 Tedae lotawn rhoek loh a capa te a hmuh uh vaengah amamih te, “Anih tah rhopangkung la om, Halo, anih he ngawn uh sih lamtah a rho he rhawt pa uh sih,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:39 Te dongah anih te a tuuk uh phoeiah misurdum lamkah loh voelh a haek uh tih a ngawn uh. 
Matthew21:40 Te dongah misurdum kah boeipa te a pawk vaengah lotawn rhoek te metlam a saii eh?” a ti nah. 
Matthew21:41 Te vaengah, “Amih boethae duet rhoek te a poci sak vetih misurdum te a tloe kah lotawn rhoek a phaam sak ni. Te rhoek long tah a thaih te amah tue vaengah a taengla a thuung ni,” a ti uh." 
Matthew21:42 Jesuh loh amih te, “Cacim khuiah na tae uh mahnim? Im sa rhoek loh a hnawt uh lungto te imkil lu la poeh. He tah Boeipa lamkah loh poeh tih mamih mikhmuh ah a khuet la om ta." 
Matthew21:43 Te dongah nangmih taengah kan thui, “Pathen kah ram tah nangmih taeng lamkah loh a khuen vetih a thaih aka saii namtom taengah a paek ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:44 Te dongah hekah lungto soah aka tla tah tlawt vetih, lungto loh a tlak thil te khaw amah ni aka tip eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew21:45 Tedae khosoihham rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah, anih kah nuettahnah te amih kawng ni a thui tila a ming uh." 
Matthew21:46 Te dongah anih te tuuk hamla a mae uh dae Jesuh te tonghma la a khueh uh dongah hlangping te a rhih uh. 
Matthew22:1 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih nuettahnah neh koep a thui pah. 
Matthew22:2 “Vaan ram tah a manghai pa neh vai uh. Te long a capa ham yulueinah a saii pah. 
Matthew22:3 Te vaengah yulueinah la a khue rhoek te khue hamla a sal rhoek te a tueih dae lo ham ngaih uh pawh. 
Matthew22:4 Sal a tloe rhoek te koep a tueih tih, 'A khue rhoek te thui pa uh, kai kah buhkoknah ka tawn coeng he, ka vaito neh a toitup khaw a ngawn coeng, a cungkuem he a sikim coeng dongah yulueinah ah halo uh saeh,' a ti nah." 
Matthew22:5 Tedae amih loh a sawtrhoel uh tih a ngen tah amah kah lo la, a tloe te a hnoyoihnah la cet uh." 
Matthew22:6 Te phoeiah a tloe rhoek loh manghai kah sal rhoek te a tuuk uh, a neet uh tih a ngawn uh." 
Matthew22:7 Te dongah manghai tah kosi a hong tih a rhalkap rhoek te a tueih. Te vaengah hlang aka ngawn rhoek te a poci sak tih a khopuei te a hlup pah. 
Matthew22:8 Te phoeiah a sal rhoek taengah, 'Yulueinah tah sikim la om coeng dae a khue rhoek te a koihhilh la a om uh moenih." 
Matthew22:9 Te dongah longpuei caehtung ah cet uh lamtah na hmuh uh sarhui te yulueinah ah khue uh,' a ti nah." 
Matthew22:10 Te phoeiah sal rhoek tah longpuei ah cet uh tih a hmuh uh sarhui te a thae neh a then khaw a coi uh. Te dongah yulueinah tah aka bul rhoek neh bae uh. 
Matthew22:11 Te vaengah manghai te kun tih aka bul rhoek te a sawt hatah, yulueinah himbai aka bai pawh hlang pakhat te kawl a hmuh." 
Matthew22:12 Te dongah anih te, “Pueivan aw, metlae yulueinah himbai om kolla hela na kun?” a ti nah. Tedae te long te hil a phah." 
Matthew22:13 Te dongah manghai loh a tueihyoeih rhoek taengah, “Anih he a kut neh a kho pin uh lamtah poengben kah a yinnah khuila haek uh. Rhah neh no rhuengnah la om saeh,' a ti nah." 
Matthew22:14 Te dongah, “A khue rhoek tah muep om dae a coelh rhoek tah yool,” a ti nah." 
Matthew22:15 Te phoeiah Pharisee rhoek tah koe uh Jesuh te a ol neh hlaeh ham dawtletnah a khueh uh. 
Matthew22:16 Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek te Herod kah hlang neh Jesuh taengla a tueih uh. Te vaengah, “Saya, a thuem la na om tih Pathen kah longpuei te oltak neh na thuituen te ka ming uh. U taengah khaw na tangyah pawt tih hlang maelhmai te na sawt moenih." 
Matthew22:17 Te dongah Kaisar taengah mangmu paek ham tueng neh a tueng pawt khaw nang loh me tlam lae na poek, kaimih taengah thui lah? a ti na uh." 
Matthew22:18 Tedae Jesuh loh amih kah halangnah te a ming tih, “Hlangthai palat rhoek balae tih kai nan noemcai uh?" 
Matthew22:19 Mangmu ham tangka te kai n'tueng uh lah,” a ti nah. Te dongah a taengla denarii pakhat a khuen uh." 
Matthew22:20 Te vaengah amih te, “U kah mueimae neh ming nim he?” a ti nah." 
Matthew22:21 Amah taengah, “Kaisar kah,” a ti uh. Te vaengah amih te, “Te dongah Kaisar kah tah Kaisar taengah, Pathen kah te Pathen taengah mael uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew22:22 A yaak uh vaengah let uh. Te dongah Jesuh te a toeng uh tih cet uh. 
Matthew22:23 Te khohnin ah thohkoepnah om mahpawh aka ti Sadducee rhoek loh Jesuh te a paan uh. 
Matthew22:24 Te phoeiah Jesuh te a dawt uh tih, “Saya, Moses loh, 'Khat khat tah ca a om kolla a duek atah anih yuu te a mana loh yunah saeh lamtah a maya ham a tiingan thoh pah saeh,' a ti." 
Matthew22:25 Tedae kaimih taengah boeinaphung parhih om uh. Lamhma loh yuu a loh hata vik duek tih ca om kolla a yuu te a mana ham a hlah pah. 
Matthew22:26 A pabae neh a pathum neh parhih duela khaw amahboeiloeih la om. 
Matthew22:27 A tloihsoi ah huta te khaw boeih duek uh. 
Matthew22:28 Anih te boeih a hutnah uh oeh coeng dongah thohkoepnah dongah tah parhih khuikah u yuu lamlae a om eh?” a ti na uh. 
Matthew22:29 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Cacim neh Pathen kah thaomnah aka ming pawt loh n'rhaithi uh coeng." 
Matthew22:30 Thohkoepnah dongah yuloh vasak neh rhaihlan ti a om moenih. Tedae vaan ah tah puencawn bangla om uh coeng. 
Matthew22:31 Tedae aka duek rhoek kah thohkoepnah te nangmih ham Pathen loh a thui te na tae uh moenih a? 
Matthew22:32 'Kai tah Abraham kah Pathen, Isaak kah Pathen, Jakob kah Pathen ni. Aka duek rhoek kah pawt tih aka hing rhoek kah Pathen ni,' a ti ta,” a ti nah." 
Matthew22:33 Te vaengkah aka ya hlangping tah Jesuh kah thuituennah soah let uh. 
Matthew22:34 Tedae Sadducee rhoek a paa sak te Pharisee rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah thikat la tingtun uh. 
Matthew22:35 Te phoeiah amih khuikah olming pakhat loh," 
Matthew22:36 “Saya, olkhueng khui mebang olpaek lae aka len?” tila a dawt tih a noemcai." 
Matthew22:37 Te dongah Jesuh loh, “Boeipa na Pathen te na thinko boeih neh na hinglu boeih neh, na kopoek boeih neh lungnah." 
Matthew22:38 He tah aka len neh aka lamhma olpaek ni. 
Matthew22:39 A pabae khaw lamhma kah phek la om tih, “Na imben te namah bangla lungnah." 
Matthew22:40 He kah olpaek panit dongah olkhueng neh tonghma rhoek tah boeih cui,” a ti nah." 
Matthew22:41 Pharisee rhoek te a tingtun uh vaengah Jesuh loh amih te a dawt tih," 
Matthew22:42 “Khrih kawng te metlam na poek uh? U ca lamlae a om? “ a ti nah. Te vaengah, “David kah capa,” a ti uh." 
Matthew22:43 Te dongah amih te, “Te koinih David loh Khrih te Mueihla ah Boeipa la a khue tih," 
Matthew22:44 Boeipa loh ka Boeipa te, 'Na rhal rhoek te ka kho hmuiah ka khueh hlan duela kai kah bantang ah ngol,' a ti nah te metlam a thui?" 
Matthew22:45 Te dongah David loh anih te boeipa la a khue atah metlamlae David kah capa la a om eh? “ a ti nah. 
Matthew22:46 Te vaengah a ol lan uh thai pawh. Te khohnin lamkah tah anih dawt ham te khat long khaw ngaingaih voel pawh. 
Matthew23:1 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh hlangping rhoek neh a hnukbang rhoek te a voek tih," 
Matthew23:2 Cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek tah Moses kah ngoltlang dongah ngol uh. 
Matthew23:3 Te dongah nangmih taengah a thui uh sarhui te boeih vai uh lamtah tuem uh. Tedae amih kah khoboe bangla saii uh boeh, a thui uh tih a vai uh hae moenih." 
Matthew23:4 Te phoeiah hno te a rhih la a boep uh tih phueihtloel la hlang kah laengpang dongah a tloeng uh dae amamih tah a kutdawn nen khaw tat sak ham ngaih uh pawh. 
Matthew23:5 A khoboe te khaw hlang kah a hmuh la boeih a saii uh. A cacimbu te a kaa uh tih salaw a te a oep uh. 
Matthew23:6 Buhkung ah hmuensang, tunim ah ngolhmuen then neh," 
Matthew23:7 Hnoyoih hmuen kah toidalnah uh neh hlang loh Rhabbi la a khue te a lungnah uh. 
Matthew23:8 Tedae nangmih tah Rhabbi la n'khue boel saeh. Nangmih kah saya tah pakhat ni aka om tih nangmih boeih te boeinaphung la na om uh. 
Matthew23:9 Te dongah diklai hmankah he pa la na khue uh mahpawh, vaan kah pa pakhat ni nangmih ham a om." 
Matthew23:10 Mawtkung la n'khue uh boel saeh, Khrih tah nangmih mawtkung la rhenten om coeng." 
Matthew23:11 Nangmih khuikah aka tanglue tah nangmih kah tueihyoeih la om ni. 
Matthew23:12 Tedae amah aka pomsang te tah tlarhoel vetih amah aka tlarhoel te tah a pomsang ni. 
Matthew23:13 Anunae nangmih cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee hlangthai palat rhoek, hlang kah hmaiah vaan ram te na khaih uh tih, namamih khaw na kun uh pawh, aka kun rhoek te khaw kun ham na hlah pa uh pawh." 
Matthew23:14 Nuhmai kah imlo te na yoop uh phoeiah a hmanhu ah puet na thangthui uh. Te dongah nangmih kah laitloekkung la om uh ni. 
Matthew23:15 Anunae nangmih cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee hlangthai palat rhoek, pakhat te poehlip sak ham tuili neh rhamrhae na hil uh. Tedae a om tanglai vaengah tah anih te namamih laklah rhaepnit la hell kah a ca la na poeh sak uh." 
Matthew23:16 Anunae nangmih mawtkung mikdael rhoek, 'Bawkim neh aka toemngam te tah a toemngam phu om pawh, tedae bawkim kah sui neh a toemngam te man a kuek nah mako,' aka ti rhoek" 
Matthew23:17 Mikdael neh hlang ang rhoek, melae tanglue la aka om ? Sui a? Sui aka ciim bawkim a?" 
Matthew23:18 Te phoeiah, 'Hmueihtuk neh aka toemngam te tah a phu om pawh, tedae hmueihtuk dongkah hmueih neh aka toemngam te a aitlaeng nah mako, ' rhoek" 
Matthew23:19 Mikdael rhoek aw melae a tanglue ? Kutdoe a? Kutdoe aka ciim hmueihtuk a? 
Matthew23:20 Te dongah hmueihtuk neh aka toemngam tah hmueihtuk neh a sokah boeih boeih neh a toemngam coeng. 
Matthew23:21 Te phoeiah Bawkim neh aka toemngam tah Bawkim neh a tolvael te a toemngam coeng. 
Matthew23:22 Te phoeiah vaan neh aka toemngam tah Pathen kah ngolkhoel neh te dongah aka ngol neh a toemngam coeng. 
Matthew23:23 Anunae nangmih cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee hlangthai palat rhoek aw, sungii, sungsing neh sungkueng te na paek uh. Tedae olkhueng khuikah olpuei aka om tiktamnah, rhennah, tangnah te na hlahpham uh. Tedae he rhoek he saii ham a kuek atah te rhoek khaw hlahpham boeh." 
Matthew23:24 Mawtkung mikdael rhoek, pildik pataeng na soih u dae kalauk na dolh uh." 
Matthew23:25 Anunae nangmih cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee hlangthai palat rhoek, boengloeng neh baelphaih te a hmanhu ah na silh uh dae a khuiah halhkanah dongah khoeihveetnah neh bae uh." 
Matthew23:26 Pharisee mikdael rhoek boengloeng kah a khui te lamhma la cilpoe dae. Te daengah ni poeng ben khaw a caih la a om eh. 
Matthew23:27 Anunae nangmih cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee hlangthai palat rhoek, hlan a bok neh na loo uh. Te te hmanhu ah sawtthen la tueng dae aka duek kah a rhuh neh rhongingnah boeih neh bae." 
Matthew23:28 Nangmih khaw a hmanhu ah tah hlang dueng la na phoe uh tangloeng ngawn, tedae a khuiah thailatnah neh olaeknah a bae la om." 
Matthew23:29 Anunae nangmih cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee hlangthai palat rhoek, tonghma rhoek kah hlan te na saii uh tih hlang dueng rhoek kah phuel te na thoeihcam uh." 
Matthew23:30 Te phoeiah, 'A pa rhoek kah a tue vaengah ng'om uh koinih tonghma rhoek kah a thii dongah amih kah pueipo la ng'om pawt sue,' na ti uh." 
Matthew23:31 Te dongah tonghma rhoek aka ngawn kah a ca rhoek la na om uh te na oep uh. 
Matthew23:32 Nangmih long khaw na pa rhoek kah a hmatoeng ni na koei uh. 
Matthew23:33 Rhul rhoek, rhulthae cadil rhoek, laitloeknah hell lamkah metlam na rhaelrham uh eh?" 
Matthew23:34 He dongah ni kai loh tonghma rhoek, hlangcueih rhoek neh cadaek rhoek te nangmih taengah kan tueih he. Amih te na ngawn uh vetih na tai uh bal veh. Amih te namamih kah tunim ah na boh uh vetih khopuei lamkah khopuei la na hnaemtaek uh veh." 
Matthew23:35 Te dongah hlang dueng Abel kah thii lamloh bawkim neh hmueihtuk lakloah na ngawn uh Berikhiah kah capa Zekhriah kah thii duela, diklai hmanah hlang dueng rhoek kah thii a hawk te nangmih soah boeih thoeng." 
Matthew23:36 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, he rhoek tah tahae kah cadil soah boeih thoeng ni." 
Matthew23:37 Jerusalem, Jerusalem, tonghma rhoek aka ngawn neh a taengla a tueih rhoek te aka dae, ainu loh aicahui ke a phae hmuiah a hluembael vaengkah a longim bangla na ca rhoek te hluembael ham ka ngaih taitu dae na ngaih uh pawh." 
Matthew23:38 Na im tah namamih taengah khosoek la a hlahpham coeng he. 
Matthew23:39 Te dongah nangmih taengah kan thui, 'Boeipa ming neh aka pawk tah a yoethen pai, ' tila na ti uh hlan atah tahae lamkah loh kai muei na hmuh uh loeng loeng mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew24:1 Jesuh tah bawkim lamloh a khoe uh tih Cet. Te vaengah bawkim kah hlinsainah te tueng ham a hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh. 
Matthew24:2 Tedae amih te a doo tih, “Boeih na hmuh uh moenih a he ? Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, phil ham pawt koi lungto sokah lungto pataeng hmaai loeng loeng mahpawh he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew24:3 Olives tlang ah Jesuh amah bueng a ngol vaengah hnukbang rhoek loh a paan uh tih, “Na lonah neh kumhal kah a bawtnah miknoek tah metlam lae? He rhoek he me vaengah lae a om eh? kaimih taengah thui lah?” a ti na uh." 
Matthew24:4 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Khat khat loh nangmih te n'rhaithi pawt ham dawn uh." 
Matthew24:5 Kai ming neh muep ha pawk uh ni. 'Kai tah Khrih ni,' a ti uh vetih muep a rhaithi uh ni." 
Matthew24:6 Tedae caem neh caem kah puenpa na yaak uh tom coeng. Na hmuh uh vaengah let uh boeh. Te khaw a om ham a kuek ngawn dae a bawtnah tah om hlan 
Matthew24:7 Namtom loh namtom, ram loh neh ram a tlai thil ni. Te phoeiah khokha om vetih hmuen tom ah lingluei hinghuen ni." 
Matthew24:8 Tedae he rhoek boeih he bungtloh a tongnah ni. 
Matthew24:9 Te phoeiah nangmih te phacip phabaem dongah m'voeih uh vetih nangmih te n'ngawn uh ni. Kai ming kongah namtom boeih kah a hmuhuet la na om uh ni. 
Matthew24:10 Te vaengah a cungkuem te a khah uh vetih pakhat te a voeih uh phoeiah pakhat te a thiinah uh ni. 
Matthew24:11 Te phoeiah laithae tonghma muep thoo vetih hlang muep a rhaithi uh ni. 
Matthew24:12 Olaeknah te ping vetih lungnah te muep daeh ni. 
Matthew24:13 Tedae a bawt duela aka ueh te tah daem ni. 
Matthew24:14 Te phoeiah ram kah olthangthen he namtom boeih taengah laipai la om sak ham lunglai pum boeih ah a hoe ni. Te daengah ni, a bawtnah te ha pawk pueng eh." 
Matthew24:15 Te dongah tonghma Daniel loh hmuen cim ah pai tih mitmoengnah neh tueilaehnah a thui te na hmuh uh, [aka tae tloh yakming saeh.]" 
Matthew24:16 Te vaengah Judah kah rhoek loh tlang la rhaelrham uh saeh. 
Matthew24:17 Imphu sokah loh a im kah te puen hamla suntla boel saeh. 
Matthew24:18 Lohma kah loh a himbai khuen ham a hnukla bal boel saeh. 
Matthew24:19 Tedae te khohnin ah bungvawn neh cacun la aka om rhoek tah lungma. 
Matthew24:20 Tedae Nangmih kah rhaelrhamnah tah sikca neh Sabbath ah a om pawt ham thangthui uh. 
Matthew24:21 Te vaengah phacipphabaem muep om ni. Te bang te diklai tongcuek lamkah loh tahae duela om noek pawt tih ka bal om eh a ti tlaih voel moenih. 
Matthew24:22 Te khohnin te boem pawt koinih pumsa boeih tah daem mai mahpawh. Tedae a coelh rhoek ham te khohnin a boem pah ni. 
Matthew24:23 Te vaengah pakhat loh nangmih taengah, 'Hela khrih he, ke la ke,” a ti atah tangnah boeh." 
Matthew24:24 Laithae khrih neh laithae tonghma rhoek tah thoo uh ni. Coengthai koinih a coelh rhoek pataeng rhaithi ham miknoek a len neh khobae rhambae te a khueh uh ni. 
Matthew24:25 Nangmih taengah kan thui coeng he ne. 
Matthew24:26 Te dongah nangmih te, 'Khosoek ah om ke,' a ti uh atah cet uh boeh. 'Imkhui ah la ke,' a ti uh akhaw tangnah uh boeh." 
Matthew24:27 Khophaa loh khothoeng lamkah cet tih khotlak due a phaa bangla hlang capa kah a lonah khaw om van ni. 
Matthew24:28 Rhok loh a om nah te langta loh hnap a boo ni. 
Matthew24:29 Tekah phacip phabaem khohnin phoeiah khomik loh tlek hmuep vetih hla loh a aa pae mahpawh. Aisi tah vaan lamkah loh cuhu vetih vaan kah thaomnah loh hinghoek uh ni. 
Matthew24:30 Te vaengah Hlang Capa kah miknoek tah vaan ah tueng ni. Diklai koca boeih loh a rhaengae uh vetih, hlang capa loh vaan kah khomai dongah thaomnah, a len la thangpomnah neh ha pawk te a hmuh uh ni." 
Matthew24:31 Amah kah puencawn rhoek te olueng ol aka cai neh a tueih vetih a coelh hlang rhoek te dilaikil pali lamkah, vaan ak a soi lamloh a soi duela tingtun uh ni." 
Matthew24:32 Thaibu lamkah nuettahnah te ming uh. A hlaeng loh suepluep la om tih a hnah a boe vaengah khohal tom coeng tila na ming uh. 
Matthew24:33 Nangmih khaw he rhoek he boeih na hmuh uh vaengah tah thohka ah ha pawk tom coeng tila ming uh. 
Matthew24:34 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, he rhoek boeih loh a thoeng hlan atah he cadil he khum loeng loeng mahpawh." 
Matthew24:35 Vaan neh diklai tah khum pael ni tedae ka ol he ta khum pael rhoerhoe mahpawh. 
Matthew24:36 Tekah a tue neh khohnin te a Pa bueng pawt atah Capa long khaw, vaan kah puencawn rhoek long khaw, ming pawh" 
Matthew24:37 Noah tue kah bangla Hlang Capa kah ha lonah khaw om tangloeng van ni. 
Matthew24:38 Tevaeng tue kah rhoek tah tuilii hlan lamkah loh Noah lawng khuila a kun khohnin duela a caak uh, a ok uh, yuuloh vasak, rhaihlan neh om uh." 
Matthew24:39 Tuilii lo tih boeih a khuen duela ming uh pawh. Hlang Capa kah a lonah khaw om van tangloeng ni. 
Matthew24:40 Te vaengah lohma ah hlang panit om ni. Pakhat te a khuen vetih pakhat a hlah ni. 
Matthew24:41 Phaklung neh aka kuelh rhoi te pakhat a khuen vetih pakhat a paih ni. 
Matthew24:42 Te dongah hak uh laeh, na Boeipa ha pawk tue te na ming uh moenih." 
Matthew24:43 Imkung loh hlanghuen ha pawk tue te ming koinih hak vetih a im te muk sak mahpawh tite na ming uh. 
Matthew24:44 Te dongah nangmih khaw sikim la om uh. Hlang capa tah na poek uh pawt tue vaengah ha pawk ni. 
Matthew24:45 Te koinih uepom neh sal cueih la unim aka om ? Anih te boeipa loh a imkhuikho ah a tuetang vaengah amih ham buh aka poep la a khueh. 
Matthew24:46 A boei loh ha pawk vaengah a saii te a hmuh tangloeng atah sal te khaw a yoethen. 
Matthew24:47 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, amah kah khuehtawn boeih soah anih te a om sak ni." 
Matthew24:48 Tedae sal thae long tah a thinko khuiah, 'Ka boeipa tah di coeng,' a ti." 
Matthew24:49 Te dongah a sal puei rhoek te koe a boh. Aka rhui rhoek taengah a caak tih a ok van. 
Matthew24:50 A lamso pawh khohnin neh a ming pawt tue vaengah ni boeipa loh sal te a paan eh. 
Matthew24:51 Te vaengah anih te a tloek vetih a paihmuen te hlangthai palat rhoek taengla a khueh pah ni. Te rhoek ah rhah neh no rhuengnah ni a om eh. 
Matthew25:1 Te phoeiah vaan ram tah oila parha neh vai uh. Te rhoek loh amamih kah hmaiim te a khuen tih yulokung doenah la cet uh. 
Matthew25:2 Amih khuikah panga tah hlang ang la om uh tih panga tah cueih. 
Matthew25:3 Aka ang rhoek loh amamih kah hmaiim te a khuen uh dae situi te amamih taengah khuen uh pawh. 
Matthew25:4 Aka cueih rhoek tah amamih kah hmaiim te palang a dongkah situi neh maih a khuen uh. 
Matthew25:5 Yulokung te a di dongah boeih ngam uh tih ip uh. 
Matthew25:6 Khoyin boengli atah, 'Yulokung ke, Amah doe hamla cet uh laeh,' tila tamlung a soeh." 
Matthew25:7 Te vaengah oila rhoek tah boeih thoo uh tih a hmaiim te a tok uh. 
Matthew25:8 Aka ang rhoek loh aka cueih rhoek taengah, 'Nangmih kah situi te kaimih m'pae uh laem, kaimih kah hmaiim tah thi pawn ni,' a ti uh." 
Matthew25:9 Tedae aka cueih loh a doo uh tih, 'Te koinih nangmih ham neh kaimih ham rhoeh voel mahpawh, aka yoi rhoek taengah lat cet uh lamtah namamih ham lai uh,' a ti nah." 
Matthew25:10 Lai hamla a caeh uh vaengah yulokung tah ha pawk. Te dongah aka sikim rhoek tah yulueinah khuiah amah neh kun uh tih thohka te a khaih 
Matthew25:11 A tloe oila rhoek tah hnukkhueng ha pawk uh van tih, “Boeipa, boeipa, kaimih ham khaw ong dae,” a ti uh." 
Matthew25:12 Tedae a doo tih, “Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui nangmih te kan ming moenih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew25:13 Te dongah hak uh laeh, a tue neh khohnin te na ming uh moenih." 
Matthew25:14 Aka yiin ham hlang loh a sal rhoek te a khue tih a khuehtawn te amih taengah a tloeng pah. 
Matthew25:15 Te phoeiah amamih kah a thaomnah tarhing la pakhat te talen panga, pakhat te panit, pakhat te pakhat rhip a paek tih yiin." 
Matthew25:16 Talen panga aka dang tah tlek cet tih te rhoek nen te a saii dongah a tloe panga a dang thil. 
Matthew25:17 Panit aka dang long khaw a tloe panit a dang thil tangloeng. 
Matthew25:18 Tedae pakhat aka dang tah cet tih diklai a too. Te phoeiah a boeipa kah tangka te a thuh. 
Matthew25:19 A tue a sen phoeiah boeipa loh sal rhoek te a paan tih amih taengah bitat te a soepsoei. 
Matthew25:20 Te vaengah talen panga aka dang loh talen panga han khuen thil tih a paan. Te phoeiah, “Boeipa, Kai he talen panga nan paek tih talen panga ka dang thil he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew25:21 A boeipa loh anih te, “Then, uepom neh sal then a yool soah uepom la na om dongah nang tah a yet soah khaw kang khueh pai eh. Na boeipa kah omngaihnah khuiah kun van,” a ti nah." 
Matthew25:22 Talen panit long khaw a paan tih, “Boeipa kai taengah talen panit nan paek tih talen panit ka dang thil he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew25:23 A boeipa loh anih te, “Then, uepom neh sal then a yool soah uepom la na om tih nang te a yet soah kang khueh ni. Na boeipa kah omngaihnah khuiah kun van,” a ti nah." 
Matthew25:24 Talen pakhat aka dang long khaw a paan tih, “Boeipa, nang he mangkhak hlang la na om, na tuh pawt nah ah te na ah tih na haeh pawt nah ah na yoep te ka ming." 
Matthew25:25 Ka rhih dongah ka ceah neh nang kah talen te lai ah ka thuh. Na khueh te om ta he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew25:26 Tedae a boeipa loh anih te a doo tih, 'Sal boethae neh yaikat aw, ka tuh pawt ah ka ah tih ka haeh pawt ah ka coi te na ming." 
Matthew25:27 Namah khaw a kuek ta, kai kah tangka te tangkapu taengah na khueh ham om. Te daengah man kai ka pawk vaengah a casai neh ka tangka te ka dang ve." 
Matthew25:28 Te dongah anih taengkah talen te lo uh lamtah talen parha aka khueh te pae uh. 
Matthew25:29 Aka khueh boeih te a paek thil vetih a coih pah ni. Tedae aka khueh pawt te a khueh duen pataeng te a taeng lamkah loh a loh pa ni. 
Matthew25:30 Te dongah sal hlangkhue hlangvaih te poengben kah yinnah khuila voei uh, te ah te rhah neh no rhuengnah neh om ni." 
Matthew25:31 Hlang Capa tah amah kah thangpomnah dongah a taengkah puencawn rhoek boeih neh ha pawk vetih a thangpomnah ngolkhoel dongah ngol ni. 
Matthew25:32 Te vaengah namtom boeih tah amah hmaiah a coi vetih tudawn loh maae taeng lamkah tu te a hoep bangla amih te rhip a hoep ni. 
Matthew25:33 Tu rhoek tah amah kah bantang ah, maae rhoek te banvoei ah a pai sak ni." 
Matthew25:34 Te vaengah manghai loh a bantang ben kah rhoek te, “Halo, a pa kah a uem rhoek, diklai a tongnah lamloh nangmih ham a rhoekbah ram te pang uh." 
Matthew25:35 Ka pong vaengah caak ham te kai nan paek uh, ka halh vaengah kai nan tul uh. Yinlai la ka om vaengah kai nan khue uh." 
Matthew25:36 Ka pumtling vaengah kai nan khuk uh. Ka tlohtat vaengah kai nan hip uh, thongim ah ka om vaengah kai taeng la na pawk uh,' a ti nah ni." 
Matthew25:37 Te vaengah aka dueng rhoek loh, “Boeipa me vaengah lae na bungpong te ka hmuh uh tih kang khut uh, na halh vaengah kan tul uh?" 
Matthew25:38 Me vaengah nim nang te yinlai la kam hmuh uh tih kang khue uh, na pumtling tih kang khuk uh?" 
Matthew25:39 Me vaengah lae na tlohtat te kan hmuh uh tih thongim ah khaw nang taengla ka pawh uh,' a ti uh ni." 
Matthew25:40 Te vaengah manghai loh amih te a doo vetih, 'Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, ka manuca rhoek khuiah a yit koek pakhat taengah na saii uh te tah kai taengah ni na saii uh,' a ti nah ni." 
Matthew25:41 Te phoeiah banvoei kah rhoek te khaw, 'Thaephoei thil rhoek, kai taeng lamkah loh, rhaithae neh a puencawn rhoek ham a hmoel pah dungyan hmai khuila cet uh." 
Matthew25:42 Ka pong vaengah caak ham khaw kai nan pae uh pawt tih, ka halh vaengah kai te nan tul uh moenih." 
Matthew25:43 Yinlai la ka om vaengah kai nang khue uh moenih. Ka pumtling vaengah kai nan khuk uh moenih. Ka tattloel neh thongim ah kai nan hip uh moenih,' a ti nah ni." 
Matthew25:44 Te vaengah amih rhoek loh a doo uh vetih, 'Boeipa me vaengah lae na pong, halh tih yinlai neh na pumtling te khaw ka hmuh uh? Me vaengah lae na tattloel neh thongim ah nang kan talong uh pawh ? a ti uh ni." 
Matthew25:45 Te vaengah amih te a doo vetih, 'Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, he rhoek khuiah a yit ca pakhat ham pataeng na saii uh pawt te tah kai ham na saii uh pawt la om,' a ti nah ni." 
Matthew25:46 Te vaengah amih te dungyan dantatnah khuila cet uh ni. Tedae aka dueng roek tah dungyan hingnah khuila kun uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:1 Jesuh loh hekah ol he boeih a khah tom vaengah a hnukbang rhoek te," 
Matthew26:2 “Hnin nit phoeiah yoom om ni tila na ming uh, hlang capa tah te vaengah tai hamla a tloeng coeng,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:3 Te vaengah khosoihham rhoek neh pilnam khuikah patong rhoek tah Kaiaphas la a khue khosoihham kah vongup ah tingtun uh. 
Matthew26:4 Jesuh te tuengkhuepnah neh tuuk phoeiah ngawn ham dawtlet uh thae. 
Matthew26:5 Tedae, “Khotue vaengah boel saeh, pilnam khuiah olpungnah la om pawt nim,” a ti uh." 
Matthew26:6 Jesuh te Bethany kah hmaibae Simon im ah om. 
Matthew26:7 Anih te a phu aka kuel, botui lungbok aka pom huta loh a a b paan tih aka vael Jesuh kah a lu te suep thil." 
Matthew26:8 A hmuh uh vaengah hnukbang rhoek loh a yakdam uh tih, “He vakrhanah la he." 
Matthew26:9 He tah a yet la a yoih vetih khodaeng a paek thai dae ta,” a ti uh." 
Matthew26:10 Tedae Jesuh loh a ming vaengah amih te, “Balae tih huta he thakthaenah neh na toeh uh, kai hamla bibi then ni a saii." 
Matthew26:11 Khodaeng rhoek tah nangmih taengah om taitu ta, tedae kai he ka om taitu moenih." 
Matthew26:12 Huta loh ka pum dongah botui a suep he kai kah rhokkhoem ham ni a saii coeng. 
Matthew26:13 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, diklai pum kah olthangthen a hoe nah takuem ah anih loh a saii he khaw a kutmuei la a thui ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:14 Hlainit khuikah pakhat Judah Iskariot la a khue tah vik cet. 
Matthew26:15 Khosoihham rhoek taengah, “Na ngaih yet te mah kai m'pae uh anih te nangmih taengah ah kan tloeng bitni,” a ti nah. Te dongah anih ham tangka sawmthum a cun uh." 
Matthew26:16 Te vaeng lamloh tah Jesuh te voeih ham a tuethen a dawn. 
Matthew26:17 Vaidamding kah a cuek khohnin ah hnukbang rhoek loh Jesuh te a paan uh tih, “Melam na ngaih dae, yoom na caak ham ka rhuengphong uh pawn eh?” a ti na uh." 
Matthew26:18 Te vaengah Jesuh loh, “Khopuei la cet uh lamtah pakhat taengah, 'Saya loh, 'Kai kah a tue tah om tom coeng, nang taengah ka hnukbang rhoek neh yoom ka saii ni' a ti, ' ti na uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:19 Jesuh loh amih a thuinuet bangla hnukbang rhoek loh a saii uh tih Yoom te a rhuengphong uh. 
Matthew26:20 Hlaem a pha vaengah hlainit taengah vael. 
Matthew26:21 A caak uh li vaengah, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, nangmih khuikah pakhat loh kai m'voeih ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:22 Te vaengah bahoeng a kothae uh tih amah te, “Boeipa, kai ka om mai khaming,” rhip pahoi a ti uh." 
Matthew26:23 Tedae amah loh a doo tih, “Kai taengah baeldung khuila kut aka puei loh kai m'voeih ni." 
Matthew26:24 Hlang Capa tah amah kawng a daek pah bangla cet ngawn ta. Tedae anih kongah Hlang Capa a voeih sak hlang tah anunae. Tekah hlang tah cun pawt koinih anih ham then ngai ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:25 Te vaengah anih aka voei Judah loh a doo tih, “Rhabbi, kai ka om mai khaming “ a ti nah hatah anih te, “Na thui coeng te,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:26 A caak uh vaengah Jesuh loh vaidam te a loh tih a uem tih a aeh. Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek te a paek tih, “Doe uh lamtah ca uh, he tah kamah pum ni,” a ti nah" 
Matthew26:27 Te phoeiah boengloeng te a loh tih a uem phoeiah amih te a doe tih, “Te te boeih o uh." 
Matthew26:28 He tah kamah kah paipi thii ni. A yet kah tholh khodawkngainah ham ni a long. 
Matthew26:29 Tedae nangmih taengah kan thui, tahae lamkah loh misur thaih he ka o loeng loeng mahpawh. Te khohnin a pha hlan atah a pa kah ram khui daengah ni nangmih taengah a thai la ka ok eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:30 Te phoeiah a hlai doeah Olives tlang la cet uh. 
Matthew26:31 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh amih te, “He khoyin ah tah kai kongah nangmih boeih n'khah uh ni,'Tudawn te ka tam vetihtuping dongkah tu tah taekyak uh ni' tila a daek coeng." 
Matthew26:32 Tedae kai ka thoh phoeiah Galilee la nangmih hmaiah ka lamhma ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:33 Peter loh amah te a doo tih, “A cungkuem he nang kongah a khah uh akhaw kai tah n'khap mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:34 Jesuh loh Peter taengah, “Nang taengah rhep kan thui, tu khoyin kah ai a khong hlanah kai he voei thum nan huek uh tak ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:35 Peter loh Jesuh taengah, “Nang taengah ka duek ham kuek cakhaw nang kan huek uh tak loeng loeng mahpawh,” a ti nah. Hnukbang rhoek loh boeih long khaw a ti uh van." 
Matthew26:36 Te phoeiah Jesuh tah hnukbang rhoek neh Gethsemene la a khue hmuen la pawk uh. Te vaengah hnukbang rhoek te, “He rhoek ana ngol uh dae ka cet tih ka thangthui phai narhuet ah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:37 Te vaengah Peter neh Zebedee kah ca rhoi te a khuen tih khothae neh khobing te a tong. 
Matthew26:38 Te vaengah amih te, “Ka hinglu loh dueknah te ngang a yaak coeng, heah ana naeh uh lamtah kai n'hak puei uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:39 Te phoeiah hawt lamhma phai tih a maelhmai neh bakop thuk. Te phoeiah thangthui tih, “A Pa a coeng thai atah hekah boengloeng he kai taeng lamkah loh khoe mai. Tedae kai ngaih banglam pawt tih namah ngaih bangla om saeh,” a ti." 
Matthew26:40 Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek te a paan tih, “Yulh ip uh lamtah mong uh, a tue yoei coeng tih hlang capa tah hlangtholh kut ah a voeih coeng he." 
Matthew26:41 Thoo uh, mawt uh thae sih. Kai aka voei tah ha yoei coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:42 Te phoeiah a pabae la cet tih thangthui. Te vaengah, “A pa he he poenghal ham neh ok pawt ham ni a coeng pawt oeh atah namah kongaih la om saeh,” a ti." 
Matthew26:43 Te phoeiah koep ha pawk hatah amih a ih te a hmuh. Amih aka om rhoek te a mik loh bakba a hap sak. 
Matthew26:44 Te dongah amih te sut a hlah tih a pathum na koep a caeh vaengah amah ol bangla koep a thui tih thangthui. 
Matthew26:45 Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek te a paan tih, “Yulh ip lamtah vawk mong uh, a tue yoei coeng tih hlang capa tah hlangtholh kut ah a voeih coeng he." 
Matthew26:46 Thoo uh, mawt uh thae sih. Kai aka voei tah ha yoei coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:47 A cal li ah hlainit khuikah pakhat Judah te pakcak ha pawk. Te vaengah anih te hlangping a yet loh cunghang neh, thingboeng neh, khosoihham rhoek neh, pilnam kah a ham rhoek neh ham puei uh." 
Matthew26:48 Amah aka voei loh hlangping te miknoek a paek tih, “Ka mok te tah anih ni, anih te tuu uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:49 Te dongah Jesuh te koe a paan tih, “Rhabbi, na sading saeh,” a ti na tih a mok." 
Matthew26:50 Tedae Jesuh loh anih taengah, “Pueivan aw balae aka om?” a ti nah. Te vaengah Jesuh te a paan uh, kut a hlah thil uh tih a tuuk uh." 
Matthew26:51 Te vaengah Jesuh taengkah pakhat loh kut a yueng tih a cunghang te a yueh. Te phoeiah khosoihham kah sal te a tloek tih a hna a pat pah. 
Matthew26:52 Jesuh loh anih te, “Na cunghang te amah hmuen ah koep khueh laeh, cunghang aka muk boeih tah cunghang dongah poci uh ni." 
Matthew26:53 A pa te khue ham coeng mahpawh tila na poek uh a? Puencawn caempuei caempa hlainit hlai pataeng kai ham pahoi a pai sak ni ta. 
Matthew26:54 Te koinih, cacim loh a om ham a kuek te metlam a soep pai eh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:55 Tekah a tue ah Jesuh loh hlangping te, “Kai tuuk ham thingboeng, cunghang neh dingca bangla nam paan uh, hnin takuem bawkim ah ka ngol tih ka thuituen vaengah kai nan tuuk uh pawt lae?" 
Matthew26:56 Tedae aka om boeih nen he ni tonghma rhoek kah cacim khaw a soep eh,” a ti nah. Te vaengah Jesuh te hnukbang rhoek loh boeih a toeng uh tih rhaelrham uh." 
Matthew26:57 Te vaengkah aka tuu rhoek loh Jesuh te khosoihham Kaiaphas taengah a khuen uh. Te rhoek ah cadaek rhoek neh a ham rhoek tah tingtun uh. 
Matthew26:58 Peter loh khosoihham kah vongup duela hawt a vai. Te phoeiah hnuktloih te ming hamla a khuila kun tih tueihyoeih rhoek taengah ngol. 
Matthew26:59 Khosoihham rhoek neh khoboei rhoek boeih loh Jesuh te ngawn hamla a hong a hi neh a paelnaeh thil uh. 
Matthew26:60 A paelnaeh uh tloel vaengah laithae laidang neh muep a paan uh. Tedae a tloihsoi ah panit loh a paan tih," 
Matthew26:61 “Anih loh, 'Pathen kah bawkim te phae tih hnin thum ah ka sak thai,' a ti,” a ti rhoi." 
Matthew26:62 Te vaengah khosoihham te pai tih, “Amih rhoi loh nang m'pael te na doo mapawt a?” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:63 Tedae Jesuh loh hil a phah. Khosoihham loh, “Nang he Pathen capa Khrih la na om tangtang atah kaimih taengah thui lah tila aka hing Pathen ming neh nang kan ti nah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:64 Jesuh loh anih te, “Namah loh na thui coeng. Tedae nangmih taengah ka thui, tahae lamloh Hlang Capa tethaomnah bantang ah ngol vetih vaan kah muei dongah ha pawk te na hmuh uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:65 Te vaengah khosoihham loh a himbai te a phen tih, “A soehsal coeng, mebang laipai lae koep n'ngoe eh, a soehsalnah khaw na yaak uh coeng he" 
Matthew26:66 Metlam na poek? a ti nah. Te vaengah a doo uh tih, “A dueknah om kueluek saeh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew26:67 Te phoeiah Jesuh te a maelhmai ah a timthoih uh tih a thoek uh. 
Matthew26:68 Te vaengkah aka bael rhoek loh, “Khrih nang, kaimih taengah phong lah, unim nang aka bael te,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew26:69 Tedae Peter tah vongup khuiah hoeih ngol. Te vaengah salnu pakhat loh anih te a paan tih, “Nang khaw Galilee kah Jesuh taengah na om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:70 Tedae hlang boeih hmaiah basa tih, “Na thui te ka ming moenih,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:71 Te phoeiah vongka la cet dae a tloe loh a hmuh tih tekah rhoek taengah, “Anih he Nazareth Jesuh taengah om,” a ti nah." 
Matthew26:72 Te vaengah, “Tekah hlang te ka ming moenih, “tila olhlo neh koep basa." 
Matthew26:73 Rhaih a om atah aka pai rhoek loh Peter te a paan uh tih, “Namah khaw amih kah hlang rhep ni, namah kah olcal long mah nang m'mingpha sak coeng,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew26:74 Tedae pahoi thae a phoei tih, “Tekah hlang te ka ming moenih, “tila a toemngam vaengah ai tlek khong." 
Matthew26:75 Te vaengah Peter loh Jesuh kah olka, “Ai a khong hlanah kai voei thum nan huek uh tak ni,” a ti nah te poek. Te dongah phawn cet tih hlawk hlawk rhap." 
Matthew27:1 Mincang a pha atah Jesuh te duek sak hamla khosoihham rhoek neh pilnam khuikah a ham rhoek tah dawtletnah boeih a khueh uh. 
Matthew27:2 Jesuh te a khih uh phoeiah a khuen uh tih khoboei Pilat taengah a thak uh. 
Matthew27:3 Jesuh a boe sak uh te anih aka voei Judah loh a hmuh vaengah yut tih khosoihham rhoek neh a ham rhoek taengah tangka sawmthum te a balkhong. 
Matthew27:4 “Ka tholh tih ommongsitoe thii ka voeih,” a ti nah. Tedae te rhoek loh, “Kaimih neh balae benbo benpang, namah loh ming saw,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew27:5 Te dongah tangka te bawkim khuiah a voeih tih vik khoe uh. Te phoeiah cet tih kuiok. 
Matthew27:6 Tedae khosoihham rhoek loh tangka te a loh uh tih, “Thii phu la a om dongah Korban khuila khueh ham tueng pawh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:7 Te dongah dawtletnah a khueh uh tih te nen te kholong rhoek kah phuel la ambop kah lo te a lai uh. 
Matthew27:8 Te dongah te kah lohmuen tah tihnin due, “Thii lohmuen, “tila a khue uh." 
Matthew27:9 Te dongah tonghma Jeremiah loh a thui tah soep coeng. Te vaengah, “Tangka sawmthum te a doe uh. A phu a tloek te Israel ca rhoek lamloh a tloek uh,” a ti." 
Matthew27:10 Te phoeiah ka boeipa loh a thuinuet bangla ambop kah lohmuen te tangka la a paek uh,” a ti." 
Matthew27:11 Jesuh te khoboei hmaiah a pai vaengah khoboei loh a dawt tih, “Nang Judah manghai la na om a?” a ti nah hatah Jesuh loh, “Namah long ni na thui,” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:12 Te vaengah khosoihham rhoek neh patong rhoek loh Jesuh te a paelnaeh dae a doo moenih. 
Matthew27:13 Te dongah Pilat loh Jesuh te, “Nang he muep m'pael uh te na yaak moenih a?” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:14 Tedae Jesuh loh olka kam khat nen pataeng a lan pawt dongah khoboei te bahoeng a ngaihmang. 
Matthew27:15 Khotue ah ana sainoek tah khoboei loh hlangping ham amamih ngaih thongtla pakhat te a hlah. 
Matthew27:16 Te vaengah Barabbas Jesuh la a khue thongtla mingthang te a khueh uh. 
Matthew27:17 Amih a tingtun uh vaengah Pilat loh amih te, “Jesuh Barabbas neh Khrih la a khue Jesuh khuiah nangmih ham ulae kan hlah ham na ngaih uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:18 Uethnetnah dongah anih he a voeih uh tila a ming. 
Matthew27:19 Pailat te laitloek ngolkhoel dongah a ngol vaengah a yuu loh anih te ol a tah tih, “Hlang dueng te nang hut moenih, anih kongah tihnin ka mang ah mat ka patang,” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:20 Tedae khosoihham rhoek neh a ham rhoek loh Barabbas te bih tih Jesuh te poci hamla hlangping te a yoek uh. 
Matthew27:21 Te phoeiah khoboei loh amih te a doo tih, “Panit khuiah ulae nangmih taengah hlah ham na ngaih uh,” a ti nah. Te vaengah te rhoek loh, “Barabbas,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:22 Pilat loh amih taengah, “Te koinih Khrih la a khue Jesuh te metlam ka saii eh?” a ti nah hatah, “Tai saeh, “boeih a ti uh." 
Matthew27:23 Tedae Pilat loh, “Balae thae a saii te,” a ti nah. Te vaengah amih pang uh khungdaeng tih, “Tai laeh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:24 Pilat loh a hoeikhang hae mahpawh olpungnah ni aka om tila a hmuh. Tui a loh tih hlangping hmaiah kut a yuh phoeiah, “Anih thii dongah ommongsitoe lamni ka om, namamih loh na ming bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:25 Te dongah pilnam boeih loh a doo tih, “Anih kah thii tah kaimih so neh ka ca rhoek soah tla saeh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:26 Te vaengah amih hamla Barabbas te a hlah pah. Tedae Jesuh te a tam tih tai ham a paek. 
Matthew27:27 Te phoeiah Jesuh te khoboei kah rhalkap rhoek loh khoboeiyung la a khuen uh tih caem pum loh a tingtun thil uh. 
Matthew27:28 A himbai te a pit pa uh tih rhalkap himbai a nukyum te anih a bai sak uh. 
Matthew27:29 Hling rhuisam khaw a vaeh uh tih a lu soah a khuem sak uh. Te phoeiah capu kong te a bantang kut ah a pom sak uh. Te vaengah a hmaiah cungkueng neh a tamdaeng uh tih, “Judah manghai na sading saeh,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:30 Te phoeiah Jesuh te a timthoih uh, capu te a loh uh tih a lu ah a boh uh" 
Matthew27:31 Jesuh a tamdaeng uh vaengah rhalkap himbai te a pit pa uh tih amah kah himbai te a bai sak uh. Te phoeiah tai hamla a khuen uh. 
Matthew27:32 A caeh uh vaengah Kurena hlang, a ming ah Simon te a hmuh uh tih anih te thinglam te a koh hamla a tanolh uh." 
Matthew27:33 Te phoeiah Golgotha a ti hmuen la pawk uh. Te tah lurhuh la a khue hmuen ni. 
Matthew27:34 Te vaengah ankhaa neh a thoek misurtui te ok hamla Jesuh te a paek uh dae a ten vaengah ok ham ngaih pawh. 
Matthew27:35 Anih a tai uh phoeiah tah a himbai te tael uh thae tih hmulung a naan uh. 
Matthew27:36 Te phoeiah ngol uh tih amah te pahoi a tawt uh. 
Matthew27:37 Te vaengah a paelnaehnah te a lu soah a khing pa uh tih, “Anih tah Judah manghai Jesuh ni,” tila a daek." 
Matthew27:38 Te vaengah dingca rhoi tah Jesuh taengkah banvoei ah pakhat neh bantang ah pakhat a tai uh. 
Matthew27:39 Aka van paitai loh a lu a hinghuen uh tih anih te a soehsal uh. 
Matthew27:40 Te vaengah, “Bawkim te aka phae tih hnin thum ah aka sa aw, namah te khang uh lamtah Pathen Capa la na om atah thinglam lamloh suntla lah saw,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew27:41 Khosoihham rhoek, cadaek rhoek neh a ham rhoek long khaw a tamdaeng uh van." 
Matthew27:42 “Hlang tloe te a khang tih amah te khang thai pawh, Israel manghai ni, thinglam lamloh suntla laeh saeh, te vaengah anih te ka tangnah uh bitni." 
Matthew27:43 Pathen dongah pangtung lah ko, a ngaih atah hlawt laeh saeh, 'Kai he Pathen Capa ni,' a ti lah ko,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:44 A taengkah a tai uh dingca rhoi long khaw amah la a thuithet rhoi. 
Matthew27:45 Khonoek parhuk lamloh khonoek pako duela diklai boeih te yinnah loh a khuk thil coeng. 
Matthew27:46 Khonoek pako tluk atah Jesuh tah ol a len pang tih, “Eli Eli lama sabakhthani,” a ti. Te tah, 'Ka Pathen, Ka Pathen oeh, balae tih kai nan phap, ' tila om." 
Matthew27:47 Aka pai rhoek khuikah hlangvang a yaak uh vaengah, “Anih loh Elijah a khue,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:48 Te vaengah amih khuikah pakhat tah tlek yong tih caethum te a loh. Yuthui neh a sul phoeiah capu kong dongah a yen tih Jesuh te a tul. 
Matthew27:49 Tedae a tloe rhoek loh, “Hlah dae, anih aka khang ham Elijah ha pawk venim so uh lah sih,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:50 Te phoeiah Jesuh te ol a len ngai la koep pang tih mueihla te pak a hlah. 
Matthew27:51 Te vaengah bawkim kah hniyan te a so lamloh a hmui due panit la pawn tih diklai khaw hinghuen, lungpang khaw paeng." 
Matthew27:52 Hlan khaw ong uh tih aka ip tangtae hlangcim rhoek kah a pum muep thoo uh. 
Matthew27:53 A thohkoepnah hnukah phuel lamkah aka cet rhoek tah khopuei cim la kun uh tih muep a yaak sak uh. 
Matthew27:54 Te vaengah rhalboei neh anih taengkah Jesuh aka tawt rhoek loh lingluei neh aka thoeng hno te a hmuh uh tih bahoeng a rhih uh. Te vaengah, “Anih tah Pathen Capa la om tangtang,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:55 Tekah aka om huta rhoek long khaw a hla lamloh muep a hmuh uh. Amih loh Jesuh te Galilee lamkah a vai uh tih a taengah thotat uh.

Matthew27:58 Anih loh Jesuh rhok bih hamla Pilat te a paan vaengah mael hamla Pilat loh ol a paek. 
Matthew27:59 Joseph loh rhok te a loh phoeiah hnipen aka caih neh a yen 
Matthew27:60 Te phoeiah lungpang khuiah a thai la a thuk hlan khuiah a khueh. Te vaengah hlan thohka te lungto len a paluet thil tih a caeh tak. 
Matthew27:61 Te vaengah Magadala Mary neh a tloe Mary tah pahoi om tih hlan kah hmai ah ngol rhoi. 
Matthew27:62 Rhuengphongnah a om phoeikah a vuen ah khosoihham rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek loh Pilat taengah tingtun uh.

Matthew27:64 Te dongah hlan te a thum hnin duela tawt ham olpae mai. A hnukbang rhoek ha pawk uh tih huen uh ve. Te vaengah pilnam taengah, 'Duek lamloh thoo coeng,' ti ve. Te dongah a hnukkhueng kah tholhhiknah tah lamhma lakah a thae la om ve,” a ti uh." 
Matthew27:65 Pilat loh amih taengah, “Rhaltawt na khueh uh te ta, Cet uh lamtah na ming uh bangla tawt uh,” a ti nah." 
Matthew27:66 Te phoeiah amih te cet uh tih phuel ah rhaltawt taengkah lungto te kutnoek a daeng thil tih a khoh uh. 
Matthew28:1 Sabbath poeng kah Sabbath aka paan cuek mincang vaengah Magadala Mary neh a tloe Mary te hlan hip hamla ha pawk uh. 
Matthew28:2 Te vaengah lingluei a tloh la hlawt hinghuen. Boeipa kah puencawn loh vaan lamkah ha rhum dongah lungto te a paan tih a paluet phoeiah a ngol thil. 
Matthew28:3 A mueisa tah khophaa bangla om tih a himbai te khaw vuelsong bangla bok. 
Matthew28:4 Te vaengah aka tawt rhoek loh a rhihnah neh thuen uh tih duek rhok bangla om uh. 
Matthew28:5 Te vaengah puencawn loh huta rhoi te a doo tih, “Nangmih rhoi loh rhih boeh, a tai uh tangtae Jesuh na toem rhoi te ka ming." 
Matthew28:6 He rhoek ah a om moenih, a thui bangla thoo coeng. Halo lamtah a yalh nah hmuen te so rhoi lah,” a ti nah." 
Matthew28:7 Te phoeiah koe cet lamtah a hnukbang rhoek te, 'Duek lamloh a thoh coeng te thui pah. Nangmih lakah Galilee la lamhma phai coeng ke, te rhoek ah amah na hmuh uh bitni. Nangmih taengah kan thui coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Matthew28:8 Te dongah hlan lamloh rhihnah neh tatloe la cet uh. Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek taengah puen hamla omngaihnah neh muep yong uh. 
Matthew28:9 Te vaengah Jesuh loh amih te pakcak a doe tih, “Omngaih uh lah,” a ti nah. Amih long khaw a paan uh tih a kho te a kop uh tih a bawk uh." 
Matthew28:10 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh amih te, “Rhih uh boeh, cet uh lamtah ka manuca rhoek taengah puen uh. Galilee la ana cet uh saeh lamtah kai m'hmuh uh bitni,” a ti nah." 
Matthew28:11 Amih rhoek te a mael uh vaengah rhaltawt a ngen te khopuei khuila pakcak pawk uh tih aka thoeng boeih te khosoihham rhoek taengah puen uh. 
Matthew28:12 Te vaengah a ham rhoek te tingtun uh tih dawtletnah a khueh uh. Tangka a khuen uh khungdaeng tih rhalkap rhoek te a paek uh. 
Matthew28:13 Te phoeiah, “Khoyin Ka ih vaengah a hnukbang ha pawk tih a huen uh, ' ti uh ne." 
Matthew28:14 Te te khoboei taengla a yaak atah, anih te kaimih loh ka hloih uh vetih nangmih te bidip la kan khueh uh bitni,” a ti na uh." 
Matthew28:15 Te dongah te rhoek loh tangka te a doe uh tih a thuituen bangla a saii uh. Te dongah tekah ol tah tihnin khohnin duela Judah rhoek taengah a thui. 
Matthew28:16 Te phoeiah hnukbang hlaikhat tah Jesuh loh amih a uen nah Galilee kah tlang la cet uh. 
Matthew28:17 Amah te a hmuh uh tih a bawk uh dae hlangvang loh a uepvawt uh. 
Matthew28:18 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a paan tih amih te a voek. Te vaengah, “Diklai hman neh vaan ah saithainah boeih tah kai taengah m'paek coeng." 
Matthew28:19 Te dongah cet uh lamtah namtom boeih te ham bang sak uh. Amih te Pa, Capa, Cim Mueihla kah ming neh nuem uh." 
Matthew28:20 Nangmih kang uen boeih te tuem sak ham amih te thuituen uh. Kai khaw nangmih taengah kumhal kah a bawtnah duela hnin takuem ka om coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:1 Pathen Capa Jesuh Khrih kah olthangthen a tongnah. 
Mark1:2 Isaiah dongah a daek tangtae bangla, “Nang hmai ah kamah kah puencawn kan tueih ne, anih loh na longpuei te a rhoekbah ni." 
Mark1:3 Khosoek ah pang ol loh, “Boeipa kah longpuei te rhoekbah uh' a caehlong te a dueng la saii uh,” a ti." 
Mark1:4 Johan tah khosoek ah aka nuem la om tih tholh khodawkngainah dongah yutnah baptisma a kawng thui. 
Mark1:5 Te dongah Judah kho boeih neh Jerusalem pum loh anih taengla khong uh. Te vaengah a tholhnah te a phong uh tih Jordan tuiva ah Johan loh a nuem. 
Mark1:6 Te vaengah aka om Johan loh kalauk mul a bai tih, a pumpu ah maehpho cihin a naak tih tangboeng neh kohong khoitui te a caak." 
Mark1:7 A hoe vaengah, “Kai lakah aka len tah kai hnukah ha pawk. A taengah ka buluk tih a khokhom rhui hlam ham pataeng ka koih pawh." 
Mark1:8 Kai loh nangmih te tui ah kan nuem, dae anih long tah nangmih te Mueihla Cim ah n'nuem ni,” a ti."

Mark1:10 Tui khui lamkah koe a thoh vaengah, vaan te ong uh tih Mueihla te vahu bangla a soah a rhum te a hmuh." 
Mark1:11 Te vaengah vaan lamkah ol ha thoeng tih, “Nang tah Capa ka thintlo la na om, nang taengah ka lungtlun,” a ti." 
Mark1:12 Te phoeiah anih te Mueihla loh khosoek la thaeng a khuen. 
Mark1:13 Khosoek ah khohnin sawmli a om vaengah Satan loh a satlung. Te vaengah satlung taengah khaw om dae anih te puencawn rhoek loh a khut uh. 
Mark1:14 Tedae Johan te a voeih uh phoeiah, Jesuh tah Galilee la pawk. Te vaengah Pathen kah olthangthen te a hoe." 
Mark1:15 Te vaengah, “A tue te soep coeng tih Pathen ram tah yoei coeng, yut uh lamtah olthangthen te tangnah uh laeh,” a ti." 
Mark1:16 Tedae Galilee tuili kaengah a caeh vaengah, Simon neh Simon mana Andrew tah tuihoi la om rhoi tih tuili ah lawk ana voeih rhoi te a hmuh." 
Mark1:17 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih rhoi te, “Kai hnukah bang rhoi lamtah nangmih rhoi te hlang aka tu tuihoi la om ham kang khueh eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:18 Te dongah lawk na te pak a hlah rhoi tih Jesuh te a vai rhoi. 
Mark1:19 Tedae hawt a caeh vaengah Zebedee capa James neh a mana Johan te a hmuh. Te vaengah amih rhoi te lawng khuiah lawk a bo rhoi. 
Mark1:19 Tedae hawt a caeh vaengah Zebedee capa James neh a mana Johan te a hmuh. Te vaengah amih rhoi te lawng khuiah lawk a bo rhoi. 
Mark1:20 Te dongah amih rhoi te pahoi a khue hatah a napa Zebedee neh lawng khuiah a kutloh rhoek te pak a hlah tih amah hnukah cet rhoi. 
Mark1:21 Kapernaum la a kun uh vaengkah Sabbath ah tah tunim la tlek kun tih a thuituen. 
Mark1:22 Te vaengah anih kah thuituennah soah let uh. Amih a thuituen te saithainah aka khueh la om tih cadaek rhoek bangla om pawh. 
Mark1:23 Amih kah tunim ah hlang pakhat tah mueihla thae neh lawt om. 
Mark1:24 Te vaengah pang tih, “Nazareth Jesuh kaimih neh nang te mebang tloe lae? Kaimih he poci sak ham nim na pawk? Nang unim ti khaw kam ming ta, Pathen kah hlangcim la,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:25 Tedae Jesuh loh anih te a ho tih, “Paa lamtah anih lamloh cet laeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:26 Te vaengah mueihla thae loh anih te suvaih sak. Te phoeiah ol a len la pang tih anih lamloh coe. 
Mark1:27 Te vaengah boeih a ngaihmang uh. Te dongah amamih te oelh uh thae tih, “Metlam nim he? Saithainah neh thuituennah a thai loh, mueihla thae rhoek pataeng a tueih vaengah a ol a ngai uh,” a ti uh." 
Mark1:28 Te dongah a kah olthang tah Galilee pingpang khotomrhali boeih ah cet khonghak. 
Mark1:29 Te phoeiah tunim lamloh tlek cet uh tih James neh Johan khaw, Simon neh Andrew im la pawk uh." 
Mark1:29 Te phoeiah tunim lamloh tlek cet uh tih James neh Johan khaw, Simon neh Andrew im la pawk uh." 
Mark1:30 Tedae Simon masae tah tlo tih yalh. Te dongah anih ham te Jesuh taengah tlek a thui uh. 
Mark1:31 Te dongah a paan tih a kut te a tuuk pah. Anih te a thoh vaengah anih te satloh loh a hlah tih amih te a kok. 
Mark1:32 Hlaem a pha tih khomik a tlak vaengah, tloh aka khueh rhoek neh rhaithae aka kaem boeih te Jesuh taengla a khuen uh." 
Mark1:33 Te vaengah kho pum ah aka om te thohka ah tingtun uh. 
Mark1:34 Te phoeiah tlohtat soeprhep aka khueh hlangtlo muep a hoeih sak. Rhaithae khaw muep a haek. Tedae amah te aming uh dongah rhaithae rhoek te cal sak pawh. 
Mark1:35 Tedae khohmuep aih ah yueya thoo tih aka nong te khosoek hmuen la cet tih thangthui. 
Mark1:36 Te vaengah Simon neh a taengkah rhoek loh Jesuh hnuk a dawn uh. 
Mark1:37 Tedae Jesuh te a hmuh uh vaengah a taengah, “Nang te boeih n'toem,” a ti na uh." 
Mark1:38 Te vaengah amih te, “Kho om nah takuem ah cet uh sih lamtah, te ah khaw ka hoe eh. Te ham ni ka lo rhoe,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:39 Te dongah Galilee pum ah cet tih amih kah tunim ah olthangthen a hoe phoeiah rhaithae te a vai. 
Mark1:40 Te vaengah, hmaibae pakhat tah anih taengah pawk tih a hloep phoeiah a cungkueng thil. Te phoeiah Jesuh te, “Boeipa na ngaih koinih kai he nan cim sak thai ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:41 Te vaengah a thinphat tih a kut te a yueng. Anih te a taek tih, “Ka ngaih ta, cim saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:42 Te vaengah hmaibae tah anih lamloh pahoi nong tih cim. 
Mark1:43 Te phoeiah thanueih ah anih te tlek a tueih. 
Mark1:44 Tedae anih te, “Na thui loeng loeng pawt ham ngaithuen. Namah cet lamtah khosoih na tueng phoeiah na cimcaihnah dongah Moses loh a uen te tah nawn pah. Te te amih taengah paipueinah la om saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark1:45 Tedae a caeh neh a tong tih pung a hoe dongah ol te yilhcet. Te dongah Jesuh tah kho khuiah loloh kun thai voel pawh. Te phoeiah tah khosoek hmuen ah vawl om dae anih te a taengvai lamloh a paan uh. 
Mark2:1 Khohnin a di phoeiah Kapernaum la koep kun tih im ah om tila a yaak. 
Mark2:2 Te dongah muep tingtun uh tih thohka pataeng te hoeng pawh. Te vaengah amih ham ol a thui pah. 
Mark2:3 Te vaengah aka khawn te pali loh Jesuh taengla khuen ham a koh uh tih ha pawk uh. 
Mark2:4 Tedae hlangping kongah a taengla a khuen thai pawt dongah a om nah tueng kah imphu te a hlih uh. Te phoeiah a ong uh tih aka khawn te phakdoeng dongah a yalh doela a hlak uh. 
Mark2:5 Jesuh loh amih kah tangnah te a hmuh vaengah aka khawn te, “Ka ca, tholhnah loh nang n'hlah coeng,” a ti nah." 
Mark2:6 Tedae cadaek khuikah hlangvang aka om rhoek tah pahoi ngol uh tih a thinko khuikah," 
Mark2:7 “Balae tih anih hetla a cal, a soehsal coeng he ta. Pathen pakhat long pawt atah tholhnah aka hlah thai te unim?” tila a poek uh." 
Mark2:8 A khuiah te tla a poek uh te Jesuh loh a mueihla neh tlek a ming. Te dongah amih te, “Balae tih na thinko ah he he na poek uh?”" 
Mark2:9 Aka khawn te, 'Tholhnah loh nang n'hlah coeng, ' ti nah ham neh, 'Thoo lamtah na phakdoeng te kawt lamtah cet, ' ti nah ham te melae yoeikoek la aka om?" 
Mark2:10 Te daengah ni, Hlang capa loh diklai hmanah tholhnah te hlah ham saithainah a khueh te na ming uh eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark2:11 Aka khawn te,” Namah taengah kan thui, thoo, na phakdoeng te kawt lamtah namah im la cet laeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark2:12 Te vaengah thoo tih hlang boeih hmaiah phakdoeng te pahoi a loh tih cet. Te dongah boeih limlum uh tih Pathen te thangpom ham, “He tlam he m'hmuh noek moenih,” a ti uh." 
Mark2:13 Tuili kaengah koep a caeh vaengah hlangping loh a taengla boeih ha pawh uh tih amih te a thuituen. 
Mark2:14 A khum phai vaengah, mangmu doenah ah aka ngol Alphaeus capa Levi te a hmuh tih, “Kai m'vai lah,” a ti nah. Te dongah thoo tih Jesuh hnuk a vai." 
Mark2:15 Levi im ah om tih buh a vael. Te vaengah mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek tah Jesuh neh a hnukbang rhoek taengah muep ngol uh. Te phoeiah anih aka vai rhoek khaw muep om uh. 
Mark2:16 Hlangtholh rhoek neh mangmucoi rhoek taengah a caak te Pharisee rhoek kah cadaek rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek taengah, “Mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek taengah khaw a caak mai ke,” a ti na uh." 
Mark2:17 Jesuh loh a yaak vaengah amih te, “Sading loh siboei ngoe pawt tih, tloh aka khueh long ni a ngoe. Aka dueng rhoek khue ham pawt tih hlangtholh rhoek ham ni ka pawk,” a ti nah." 
Mark2:18 Johan kah hnukbang rhoek neh caak aka yaeh Pharisee rhoek tah ha pawk uh. Te vaengah cet uh tih Jesuh taengah, “Balae tih Johan kah hnukbang rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek kah hnukbang rhoek tah a yaeh uh tih na hnukbang rhoek tah a yaeh uh pawh,” a ti uh." 
Mark2:19 Jesuh loh amih te, “Yulueihmuen kah paca boeina a om vaengah tah coeng mahpawh. Yulokung loh amih taengah a om vaengah a yaeh aya? Amih te yulokung neh a om uh tue khuiah yaeh uh thai mahpawh." 
Mark2:20 Tedae khohnin a pai vaengah yulokung tah amih taeng lamkah loh a khue vetih te vaeng khohnin ah a yaeh uh bitni. 
Mark2:21 Hni pen a cuemsok te himbai rhuem soah a hui moenih. Te pawt koinih a bonah rhuem te a thai loh a sol tih a pawnnah te a thae om. 
Mark2:22 Te phoeiah misurtui noe te tuitang rhuem khuiah a than uh moenih. Te pawt koinih misurtui loh tuitang te a va vetih, misurtui khaw, tuitang khaw khaw poci ni. Te dongah misurtui noe te tuitang a thai khuiah ni a khueh,” a ti nah." 
Mark2:23 Sabbath a pha vaengah Jesuh te canghli longah van. Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh longpuei ah cangvuei koe a yun uh. 
Mark2:24 Te vaengah Pharisee rhoek loh Jesuh taengah, “Sabbath ah saii tueng pawt te balae tih a saii ke,” a ti na uh." 
Mark2:25 Te dongah amih te, “David loh a saii te na tae uh mahnim ? Amah neh a taengkah rhoek loh a ngoe tih a bungpong uh vaengkah te." 
Mark2:26 Khosoihham Abiathar tue vaengah Pathen im la kun tih rhungkung buh a caak te ta. Te te khosoih pawt atah a caak tueng moenih. Tedae a taengah aka om rhoek pataeng a paek pueng,” a ti nah." 
Mark2:27 Te phoeiah amih te, “Sabbath tah hlang ham a ni a saii, tedae hlang tah Sabbath ham moenih." 
Mark2:28 Te dongah Hlang Capa tah Sabbath boeipa la om pataeng,” a ti nah." 
Mark3:1 Te phoeiah tunim la koep a kun hatah, kut a koh aka om hlang pakhat tapkhoeh om." 
Mark3:2 Te vaengah anih te Sabbath ah a hoeih sak atah paelnaeh hamla Jesuh te a dawn uh. 
Mark3:3 Te vaengah Jesuh loh kut a koh la aka om hlang te, “A laklung ah pai lah,” a ti nah." 
Mark3:4 Te phoeiah amih te, “Sabbath ah hno then saii ham pawt atah thae ham, hinglu hlawt ham pawt atah ngawn ham a a ngaih ?” a ti nah. Tedae amih loh a hil a phah uh." 
Mark3:5 Te dongah amih te thintoek neh a sawt. Amih thinko kah thinthahnah soah a kothae. Tekah hlang te, “Na kut te yueng lah,” a ti nah. A yueng tangloeng tih a kut khaw hoeih." 
Mark3:6 Tedae Pharisee rhoek tah Herod kah hlang rhoek taengla tlek cet uh tih Jesuh poci ham dawtletnah a khueh thil uh. 
Mark3:7 Jesuh tah a hnukbang rhoek neh tuili la a caeh uh hatah Galilee rhaengpuei loh muep a vai uh. 
Mark3:8 Te vaengah Judea lamkah, Jerusalem kah, Idumea kah, Jordan rhalvangan, Tyre taengvai neh Sidon lamkah rhaengpuei boeih neh a bisaii boeih te aka ya rhoek loh a taeng la ha pawk uh." 
Mark3:8 Te vaengah Judea lamkah, Jerusalem kah, Idumea kah, Jordan rhalvangan, Tyre taengvai neh Sidon lamkah rhaengpuei boeih neh a bisaii boeih te aka ya rhoek loh a taeng la ha pawk uh." 
Mark3:9 Tedae a hnukbang rhoek te, “Amah ham lawng mah khuituk, hlangping te a khuiah thet pawt nim,” a ti nah." 
Mark3:10 Te vaengah hlang muep a hoeih sak dongah tloh aka khueh boeih loh Jesuh te taek sak ham amah te a nan uh. 
Mark3:11 Rhalawt mueihla loh anih a hmuh uh vaengah a bakop thil uh tih a pang doela, “Nang tah Pathen Capa ni,” a ti uh." 
Mark3:12 Tedae amah te kawng te mingpha la ng'khue pawt ham amih te khak a uen. 
Mark3:13 Te phoeiah Jesuh tlang la luei hang tih a ngaih rhoek te a khue dongah a taengla cet uh.

Mark3:21 A taengkah rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah, “limlum coeng,” a ti uh tih amah te tuuk hamla cet uh."
