Mark4:1 Tuili kaengah khaw thuituen ham koep a tong tih hlangping loh a taengah a kumngai a tingtun pah. Te dongah amah te tuili kah lawng khuiah ngol hamla kun. Te vaengah hlangping tah tuili taengkah lan soah boeih om uh. 
Mark4:2 Te vaengah amih te nuettahnah neh muep a thuituen tih a thuituennah dongah amih te," 
Mark4:3 “ Hnatun uh lah, cangti aka tuh tah cangti tuh ham cet ne." 
Mark4:4 A tuh la a om vaengah a ngen tah long ah tla. Te dongah vaa loh a paan tih a kueh. 
Mark4:5 Te phoeiah a tloe tah laimen muep aka om pawh lungrhong soah tla tih laimen a dung la a om pawt dongah tlek poe. 
Mark4:6 Tedae khomik a thoeng vaengah a kaeng atah a yung a om pawt dongah koh 
Mark4:7 Te phoeiah a tloe tah hling khuiah tla. Hling te rhoeng vaengah cangti te a thing tih a thaih thaii pawh. 
Mark4:8 Te phoeiah, a tloe rhoek tah lai then dongah tla. Te dongah a poe vaengah rhoeng tih a thaih thaii tih a ngen thumkip, a ngen sawmrhuk, a ngen yakhat lo,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:9 Te dongah, “Yaak nah hna aka khueh loh ya saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:10 Te dongah amah bueng a om vaengah, a taengvai rhoek neh hlainit rhoek loh nuettahnah te a dawt uh." 
Mark4:11 Te dongah amih te, “Pathen ram kah olhuep te nangmih m'paek coeng. Tedae poengben kah rhoek ham tah soeprhep boeih te nuettahnah la a om pah." 
Mark4:12 Te daengah ni a hmuh tah a hmuh uh sui dae a hmat uh pawt eh, a yaak tah a yaak uh sui dae a hmuhming uh pawt eh. Ha mael uh vetih amih te vik hlah ve,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:13 Te phoeiah amih te, “Hekah nuettahnah he na ming uh pawt atah nuettahnah boeih te metlam na ming uh eh?" 
Mark4:14 Aka tuh loh olthangthen ni a tuh. 
Mark4:15 He tah longpuei kaep kah a soem ol te ni. A yaak vaengah Satan tlek cet tih amih khuiah a soem ol a loh pah. 
Mark4:16 Te phoeiah he rhoek tah lungrhong sokah a haeh rhoek ni. Te rhoek loh ol te a yaak uh vaengah omngaihnah neh tlek a doe. 
Mark4:17 Tedae a khuiah a yung a om uh pawt tih kolkalh bueng om uh. Te phoeiah olka kongah phacip phabaem neh hnaemtaeknah a om atah voeng a khah uh. 
Mark4:18 A tloe rhoek hling lakli ah a tuh khaw om. Te rhoek khaw ol aka ya rhoek ni. 
Mark4:19 Tedae diklai kah mawntangnah, khuehtawn kah hmilhmaknah neh a tloe boeih ham hoehhamnah ha pawk vaengah ol te a thing tih a tlongtlai la poeh." 
Mark4:20 Tedae lai then ah tuh la aka om rhoek tah ol te a yaak uh vaengah a doe uh tih a ngen tah thumkip, a ngen tah sawmrhuk, a ngen tah yakhat la thaihtak,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:21 Te phoeiah amih te, “Hmaiim te voh hmui neh thingkong hmuiah khueh ham a hang khuen ? Hmaitung soah a khueh ham moenih a?" 
Mark4:22 Te dongah a huephael akhaw a phoe mueh la a om moenih. A huep te a thoeng mueh moenih. Te van daengah ni mingpha la a om eh. 
Mark4:23 Yaak nah hna aka khueh long te tah ya saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:24 Te phoeiah amih te, “Na yaak uh te poek uh, na nueh nah cungnueh nen te nangmih n'nueh van vetih nangmih taengah han thap ni." 
Mark4:25 Aka khueh te tah a paek thil vetih aka khueh pawt te a khueh duen te anih taeng lamloh a lat pah ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:26 Te phoeiah, “Pathen ram tah diklai dongah cangtii aka haeh hlang bangla om tangloeng." 
Mark4:27 Tedae khoyin khothaih ip vaeng thoo vaeng cakhaw cangtii daih tih a rhoeng te a ming moenih. 
Mark4:28 Diklai amah loh a thaihtak sak tih lamhma la cangkung, te phoeiah cangvuei, cangvuei khuiah cangyen a bae sak." 
Mark4:29 Tedae cangvuei loh hmin tih cangah a pha atah vin tlek a pom,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:30 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh, “Pathen ram he metlam n'thuidoek vetih mebang nuettahnah nen n'nueh lah ve?" 
Mark4:31 Pathen ram tah mukang mu bangla om. Te te diklai dongah a haeh vaengah tah diklai hmankah a tii boeih lakah a yit koek la om. 
Mark4:32 A haeh phoeiah rhoeng tih toian boeih lakah a tanglue la coeng, a hlaeng khaw a len la cawn. Te dongah vaan kah vaa khaw a hlipkhup ah bu a tuk thai,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:33 A yaak thai la hebang nuettahnah neh amih taengah ol muep a thui pah. 
Mark4:34 Nuettahnah pawt atah amih taengah a thui moenih. Tedae a hnukbang rhoek ham bueng ni boeih a thuicaih pah. 
Mark4:35 Te khohnin hlaem a pha vaengah amih te, “Rhlavangan la lan uh sih,” a ti nah." 
Mark4:36 Te phoeiah hlangping te a hlah uh tih lawng khuiah aka om Jesuh te pahoi a khuen uh. Lawng tloe rhoek khaw Jesuh taengah om uh. 
Mark4:37 Te vaengah khohli aka tlo hlipuei te hli. Te dongah tuiphu loh lawng te a boh dongah lawng dalh buek. 
Mark4:38 Tedae Jesuh tah a maicaem ah om tih luhoe dongah ip. Te vaengah amah te a thoh uh tih, “Saya, m'poci coeng he, na ngaihuet moenih a?” a ti na uh." 
Mark4:39 A haeng vaengah khohli te a ho tih tuili te, “Paa lamtah duem laeh,” a ti nah. Te dongah khohli te paa tih suepduem la boeih om." 
Mark4:40 Te phoeiah amih te, “Balae tih rhalyawp la na om uh? Tangnah na khueh uh hlan a?” a ti nah." 
Mark4:41 Tedae a rhih uh tih a rhihnah uh khaw khosava. Te dongah khat neh khat, “Unim he, tuili neh khohli long pataeng boe a ngai pah he?” a ti uh." 
Mark5:1 Te phoeiah tuili rhalvangan Gerasenes kho la pawk uh. 
Mark5:2 Lawng lamkah loh a suntlak vaengah hlan lamkah rhalawt mueihla neh hlang pakhat loh Jesuh te tlek a doe. 
Mark5:3 Anih tah a khosaknah te phuel ah a khueh tih thirhui neh pin ham khaw anih aka noeng te a om loengloeng voel moenih. 
Mark5:4 Anih te hloong, thirhui neh a pin uh taitu dae thirhui te a thuek tih hloong te a tlawt sak dongah anih te sim uh thai pawh." 
Mark5:5 Khoyin khothaih phuel ah khaw, tlang ah khaw vawpvawp pang yoeyah tih amah te lungto neh huet uh." 
Mark5:6 Jesuh te a hla lamloh a hmuh vaengah yong tih a bawk. 
Mark5:7 Te phoeiah ol ue la pang tih, “Khohni Pathen Capa Jesuh, nang neh kai balae benbo benpang? Pathen rhangneh nang taengah ol ka hlo, kai he n'phaep mai boeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:8 Te dongah anih te, “Mueihla thae aw, hlang taeng lamkah loh coe laeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:9 Te phoeiah anih te, “Ulae na ming nah,” a ti nah hata, “Muep ka om uh dongah, kai ming tah caempuei caempa ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:10 Te vaengah amih te ram lamkah loh voelh tueih pawt ham Jesuh taengah khak a bih. 
Mark5:11 Tedae a yoei la tlang tapkhoeh om tih ok hui muep luem. 
Mark5:12 Te dongah Jesuh te a hloep uh tih, “Kaimih he ok rhoek khuila n'tueih mai lamtah te rhoek khuiah ka kun uh mai eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:13 Te dongah amih te a caeh sak. Tedae mueihla thae rhoek tah cet uh tih, ok khuiah kun uh. Te dongah ok hui tah laengpoeng ah tuili khuila cu uh tih thawnghnih tluk tah tuili ah buek uh." 
Mark5:14 Ok aka luempuei rhoek khaw rhaelrham tih khokhui khui neh lohma ah khaw puen uh. Te dongah aka thoeng hno te metla a om khaw hmuh hamla cet uh. 
Mark5:15 Jesuh taengla a pawk uh vaengah rhaithae aka kaem a ngol te a hmuh uh. Anih te yol uh tih muet uh. Anih te caempuei caempa a khueh dongah a rhih uh. 
Mark5:16 Te vaengah rhaithae aka kaem taengah aka thoeng hno neh ok kawng te aka hmu rhoek loh amih taengah a thui pa uh. 
Mark5:17 Te dongah amih vaang lamloh nong hamla Jesuh te a hloep uh. 
Mark5:18 Lawng khuiah a kun vaengah rhaithae aka kaem loh a taengah om ham a bih. 
Mark5:19 Te vaengah anih te a hlah pak moenih. Tedae amah te, “Namah im la cet lamtah na huiko rhoek taengah Boeipa loh nang ham a saii tih nang ng'rhen boeih te amih taengah puen pah,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:20 Te dongah cet tih, Jesuh loh anih ham a saii boeih te Decapolis ah a tong tih a hoe hatah hlang boeih loh a ngaihmang uh." 
Mark5:21 Jesuh te lawng neh rhalvangan la koep a hlaikan hatah a taengah hlangping hut a tingtun pa tih tuili kaengah vik om. 
Mark5:22 Te vaengah tamtaeng pakhat, a ming ah Jairus te ha pawk tih Jesuh te a hmuh neh a kho taengah bakop." 
Mark5:23 Jesuh te tlal a hloep tih, “Ka canu tah duekhlong coeng. Na lo vetih anih te kut na tloeng thil daengah ni daem vetih a hing eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:24 Te dongah anih taengla a caeh vaengah hlangping loh muep a vai tih Jesuh khaw a nen uh. 
Mark5:25 Te vaengah kum hlainit khuiah thii aka buk huta pakhat om. 
Mark5:26 Siboei tom taengah khaw muep patang coeng tih a taengkah khaw boeih vak coeng. Tedae hoeikhang pawt tih a thae la lat a om pah. 
Mark5:27 Jesuh kah a thang te a yaak vaengah hlangping lakli la cet tih a hnuk lamloh Jesuh kah himbai te a taek. 
Mark5:28 Amah long tah, “A himbai mah ka taek koinih ka hoeih ni,” a ti." 
Mark5:29 Te vaengah a thii tuisih bang te khaw pahoi a khaam pah tih a pum khaw nganboh lamloh hoeih coeng tila a ming. 
Mark5:30 Amah pum lamkah thaomnah a coe te Jesuh amah loh tlek a ming vaengah hlangping taengla mael tih,“Ulae kai himbai aka taek ?,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:31 Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a taengah, “Hlangping loh nang n'nen te na hmuh lalah, 'Ulae kai aka taek,' na ti,” a ti na uh." 
Mark5:32 Tedae te aka saii te hmuh ham a sawt. 
Mark5:33 Huta long khaw a taengah aka thoeng te a ming dongah a rhih neh birhih coeng. Te dongah a paan tih bakop doela Jesuh taengah oltak te boeih a thui pah. 
Mark5:34 Te dongah anih te, “Ka canu, na tangnah loh nang ng'khang coeng, ngaimong la cet lamtah na tlohtat lamkah loh sading la om laeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:35 A thui li vaengah, tamtaeng im lamkah aka pawk rhoek loh, “Na canu duek te coeng, baham nim saya te khing na toeh na oeih,” a ti na uh." 
Mark5:36 Tedae a thui ol soah Jesuh tah altha tih tamtaeng te, “Rhih boeh, dawk tangnah,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:37 Te vaengah Peter neh James, James mana Johan pawt atah ukhaw a hnuk bang sak pawh."

Mark5:39 Te dongah kun tih amih te, “Balae tih sarhingrhup la na rhah uh? Camoe he a duek moenih, aka ip ni he,” a ti nah." 
Mark5:40 Te vaengah Jesuh te a nueih thil uh. Tedae Jesuh loh amih te boeih a haek. Te phoeiah camoe kah a manu napa neh a taengkah rhoek te a khuen tih camoe a om nah la kun. 
Mark5:41 Camoe kah kut te a tuuk tih, “Talitha kumi [Te tah hula ni a thuingaih], nang 'Thoo ' ka ti,” a ti nah."

Mark5:43 Tedae te te hlang ming sak pawt hamla amih te rhep ol a paek phoeiah, “A caak koi pae lah,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:1 Te lamloh thoo tih amah tolrhum la a caeh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh a vai uh. 
Mark6:2 Sabbath a pha neh tunim ah thuituen ham te a tong. Te vaengah aka ya rhoek boeih loh a let uh tih, “Anih loh hebang he mekah lae a hmuh? Mekah cueihnah nim anih a paek tih a kut neh hebang thaomnah he a tueng sak?" 
Mark6:3 Anih he Mary capa, James, Joses, Judah neh Simon kah a manuca, lettama la a om moenih a? A ngannu rhoek khaw mamih taengah a om uh moenih a he ?” a ti uh. Te dongah anih kongah te amih te a khah uh." 
Mark6:3 Anih he Mary capa, James, Joses, Judah neh Simon kah a manuca, lettama la a om moenih a? A ngannu rhoek khaw mamih taengah a om uh moenih a he ?” a ti uh. Te dongah anih kongah te amih te a khah uh." 
Mark6:4 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te, “Tonghma he a tolrhum ah, a hui rhoek lakli neh a im khuikah pawt atah sawtsit ti om pawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:5 Tedae hlang tlo a yool kut a tloeng tih hoeih sak pawt koinih te ah te a thaomnah pakhat khaw tueng thai mahpawh. 
Mark6:6 Amih kah hnalvalnah kongah a ngaihmang. Tedae kho kah a taengvai te a hil tih a thuituen. 
Mark6:7 Hlainit te a khue phoeiah rhalawt mueihla soah saithainah te amih taengah a paek tih amih te panit panit ah a tueih. 
Mark6:8 Te phoeiah amih te longpueng ah conghol bueng pawt atah buhcun, sungsa, cihin khuiah rhohum khaw khuen pawt ham a uen." 
Mark6:9 Tedae khokhom a khom tih angki yung nit puei sak pawh. 
Mark6:10 Te phoeiah amih te, “Im na kun thil uh coeng te tah te lamkah loh na voei hlan khuiah pahoi naeh thil." 
Mark6:11 Nangmih aka doe pawt tih nangmih kah ol aka hnatun pawt hmuen te tah, te lamkah loh na nong uh vaengah na kho hmuikah tangdik te khoek uh lamtah amih taengah laipai la om saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:12 Te daengah cet uh tih tholh yut ham a hoe uh. 
Mark6:13 Rhaithae khaw‘WG muep a haek uh. Aka tlo khaw situi neh a hluk uh tih muep hoeih uh. 
Mark6:14 Jesuh ming tah mingpha coeng tih Herod manghai loh a yaak vaengah, “Tui aka nuem Johan tah duek lamkah thoo coeng. Te dongah a khuikah thaomnah loh a tueng pah,” a ti uh." 
Mark6:15 Tedae a tloe rhoek loh, “Elijah ni,” a ti uh. A tloe rhoek bal loh, “Tonghma rhoek khuikah tonghma pakhat van coini,” a ti uh." 
Mark6:16 Herod loh a yaak vaengah, “Kai loh ka rhaih Johan te ni aka thoo coeng,” a ti" 
Mark6:17 Herod amah rhoe loh a tah tih Johan te a tuuk. Te vaengah anih te a manuca Philip yuu, Herodias kawng neh thongim ah a khoh." 
Mark6:18 Anih te a yunah dongah Johan loh Herod te, “Na maya yuu te na loh tueng moenih,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:19 Te dongah Herodias loh Johan te a hmuhuet tih ngawn ham a ngaih dae ngawn thai pawh. 
Mark6:20 Herod loh Johan te aka dueng neh aka cim hlang ni tila a ming dongah a rhih tih a tuem. Johan ol a yaak vaengah muep ingang dae liplip a hnatun. 
Mark6:21 Herod loh cunnah khohnin tapkhoeh a pha vaengah a hlanglen rhoek, rhalboeipa rhoek, Galilee kah a congkhang rhoek ham te hlaembuh a saii pah." 
Mark6:22 Te vaengah Herodias canu te kun tih a lam hatah Herod neh aka ngol rhoek te a ko a hoe sak. Manghai loh hula te, “Na ngaih te tah kai taengah ham bih lamtah nang kan pae eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:23 Te phoeiah anih taengah rhep a toemngam tih, “Kai taengah na bih te tah ka ram rhakthuem hil khaw nang kan paek ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:24 Tedae cet tih a manu taengah, “Balae ka bih eh?” a ti nah hatah a manu loh, “Tuinuem Johan kah a lu te,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:25 Te dongah manghai taengah thahluenah neh thaeng kun tih, “Baelpuei dongah tuinuem Johan kah a lu te kai nan paek pahoi hamla ka ngaih,” a ti nah tih a bih." 
Mark6:26 Manghai loh ngang a yaak dae a olhlo neh aka ngol rhoek kongah te aal hamla ngaih pawh. 
Mark6:27 Tedae manghai loh rhalkap koe a tueih tih a lu te hang khuen ham ol a paek. Te dongah cet tih Johan te thongim khuiah a rhaih. 
Mark6:28 Te phoeiah Johan kah lu te baelpuei dongah han khuen tih hula te a paek. Hula long khaw a manu te a paek. 
Mark6:29 A yaak uh vaengah Johan kah hnukbang rhoek tah ha pawk uh tih a rhok te a khuen uh tih phuel ah a khueh uh. 
Mark6:30 Te vaengah caeltueih rhoek te Jesuh taengah tingtun uh tih a saii neh a thuituen uh boeih te a taengah puen uh. 
Mark6:31 Te vaengah amih te, “Nangmih tah namamih bueng mah khosoek hmuen la halo uh lamtah rhaih duem uh dae,” a ti nah. Aka voei rhoek neh aka bal rhoek te muep a om vaengah buh caak ham pataeng hoeng uh pawh." 
Mark6:32 Te dongah amamih bueng khosoek nah hmuen la lawng neh cet uh. 
Mark6:33 Amih a caeh uh te a hmuh uh tih muep a ming uh vaengah, kho tom lamloh kho neh capit uh tih ana lamhma uh coeng." 
Mark6:34 Tedae a caeh vaengah hlangping te muep a hmuh. Te vaengah tudawn aka om pawh tu rhoek bangla a om uh dongah amih soah a thinphat tih amih rhoek te muep pahoi a thuituen. 
Mark6:35 Kholaeh tue a pha coeng atah, a hnukbang rhoek loh amah te a paan tih, “Khosoek hmuen la om tih a tue khaw kholaeh coeng." 
Mark6:36 Amih he n'tueih daengah ni a taengvai kah lohma neh vangca la cet uh vetih amamih caak te khaw a lai uh eh,” a ti na uh." 
Mark6:37 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Amih te caak koi nangmih loh pae uh,” a ti nah. Te vaengah amah taengah, “Ka cet uh vetih denarii yahnih phu vaidam ka lai uh mako, te phoeiah amih caak te ka paek uh mako,” a ti uh." 
Mark6:38 Te vaengah Jesuh loh amih te, “Vaidam meyet na khueh uh? Cet uh lamtah so uh lah,” a ti nah. Te daengah a ming uh tih, “Vaidam hluem nga neh nga lung nit om,” a ti na uh" 
Mark6:39 Te phoeiah amih te, khopol hing soah a boel boel la boeih ngolhlung sak, ham a tueih." 
Mark6:40 Te dongah sawmnga ah yakhat ah hloep hloep ngol uh. 
Mark6:41 Te vaengah vaidam hluem nga neh nga lung nit te a doe. Vaan la oeloe tih a uem phoeiah vaidam te a aeh tih hlangping paek ham a hnukbang rhoek te a paek. Nga rhoi te khaw boeih a rhek. 
Mark6:42 Te vaengah boeih a caak uh tih hah uh. 
Mark6:43 Te phoeiah nga neh vaidam kah a nueipil te voh hlainit dongah a bae la a phueih uh. 
Mark6:44 Te vaengah vaidam aka ca rhoek te tongpa thawngnga lo uh. 
Mark6:45 Te Phoeiah hlangping te a tueih hlan ah a hnukbang rhoek te lawng khuiah a kun sak tih rhalvangan kah Bethsaida la lamhma phai ham tlek a tanolh. 
Mark6:46 Amih te a phih phoeiah thangthui ham tlang la cet. 
Mark6:47 Hlaem a pha vaengah lawng te tuili kah laklung ah om tih amah bueng lan ah om. 
Mark6:48 Hnukbang rhoek te khohli loh a kingkalh la a mang dongah lawng a kaih loh a ngawn a hmuh. Khoyin khonoek pali vaengah tuili soah cet tih amih taengla pawk. Tedae amih khum tak hamla a ngaih. 
Mark6:49 Tedae tuili soah a caeh te a hmuh uh vaengah mueihla ni tila a poek uh tih pang uh. 
Mark6:50 Amah te boeih a hmuh uh vaengah thuen uh. Tedae amih te tlek a voek tih, “Ngaimong sak uh, Kai ni, rhih uh boeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark6:51 Te phoeiah amih taengah lawng dongla luei tih khohli khaw paa. Te dongah amamih khuiah a nah la mat limlum uh. 
Mark6:52 Vaidam kawng pataeng hmuhming uh pawt dae a thin te a ning sak uh. 
Mark6:53 Lan la hlaikan uh tih Gennesaret a pha uh vaengah duem uh. 
Mark6:54 Lawng dong lamkah loh a suntlak uh vaengah Jesuh te kawl a hmat uh. 
Mark6:55 Kho tom a hil uh dongah tloh aka khueh rhoek te, Jesuh om tila a yaak nah la phakdoeng dongah koe a koh uh." 
Mark6:56 Amah a kun nah te tah vangca ah khaw, khopuei ah khaw, lohma ah khaw, hnoyoih hmuen ah khaw tattloel rhoek te a tloeng pa uh. Te vaengah a himbai dongkah salaw te taek ham pataeng anih te a hloep uh. Te dongah anih aka taek rhoek boeih tah daem uh." 
Mark7:1 Te phoeiah Pharisee rhoek neh cadaek rhoek hlangvang te Jerusalem lamkah ha pawk uh tih Jesuh taengah tingtun uh. 
Mark7:2 Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek hlangvang te a kut kutmuen neh tanghnong tangaih la buh a caak uh te a hmuh uh. 
Mark7:3 Patong rhoek kah singyoe aka pom Pharisee rhoek neh Judah rhoek boeih loh kut te hlaengtangnah pawt atah caak a caak moenih. 
Mark7:4 Hnoyoih hmuen lamkah a bal uh vaengah khaw tui a hluk uh pawt atah caak ca uh pawh. Te phoeiah a tloe boengloeng, tui-um, tuidueh neh thingkong te silh ham duela a loh uh tih aka pom te muep om uh." 
Mark7:5 Te dongah Pharisee rhoek neh cadaek rhoek loh, “Balae tih patong rhoek kah singyoe bangla na hnukbang rhoek a caeh uh pawt tih kut tanghnong neh buh a caak uh?” a ti na uh." 
Mark7:6 Te vaengah amih taengah, “Pilnam long he a hmui neh kai hinyah dae a thinko tah kai lamloh voelh nong,”tila a daek tangtae bangla nangmih hlangthai palat ham Isaiah loh a phong te thuem coeng,”." 
Mark7:7 Hlang olpaek dongkah thuituennah bangla a thuituen uh tih a poeyoek la kai m'bawk uh. 
Mark7:8 Pathen kah olpaek aka hlahpham rhoek loh hlang kah singyoe te na muk uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:9 Te phoeiah amih te, “Namamih kah singyoe te thoh ham dongah Pathen kah olpaek te na hnawt uh pai he." 
Mark7:10 Moses loh, 'Na nu neh na pa te hinyah. Tedae nu neh pa aka thet tah dueknah neh duek saeh,' a ti." 
Mark7:11 Tedae nangmih tah hlang loh a manu neh a napa te, 'Kai lamkah na hoeikhangnah koi te Korban [Te tah kutdoe la om] ni,' a ti atah," 
Mark7:12 Te dongah a manu a napa taengah a saii ham te pakhat khaw anih taengah na hlah pah uh moenih. 
Mark7:13 Nangmih kah singyoe na pang uh te Pathen kah olka tah a hmil tih amah boeiloeih te muep na saii uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:14 Hlangping te khaw koep a khue tih, “Hlang boeih loh kai taengah hnatun uh lamtah hmuhming uh." 
Mark7:15 Hlang kah a hmanhu ah om tih a khuila aka kun loh anih te a poeih thai moenih. Tedae hlang lamkah aka thoeng tah hlang aka poeih la om. 
Mark7:16 Yaak nah hamla hna aka khueh loh ya saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:17 Te phoeiah hlangping taeng lamloh im khuila a kun vaengah Jesuh te a hnukbang rhoek loh nuettahnah a dawt uh. 
Mark7:18 Te dongah amih te, “Nangmih khaw lungmong kotalh la na om tangloeng. A hmanhu kah boeih tah hlang khuila a kun akhaw anih te a poeih thai pawh tila na yakming uh pawt nim?" 
Mark7:19 Te te thinko khuiah pawt tih a bungpuei khui lam ni a kun tih naat khui ni a pha. Te dongah cakok he boeih cimcaih,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:20 Te phoeiah, “Hlang lamkah aka thoeng loh hlang a poeih." 
Mark7:21 Hlang thinko khui lamkah tah a thae poeknah, cukhalhnah, huencannah, ngawnnah," 
Mark7:22 samphaihnah, halhkanah, halangnah, tuengkhuepnah, omthenbawnnah, mikmuelh kholaeh, soehsalnah, kohangnah, anglatnah khaw thoeng coeng." 
Mark7:23 Hekah a thae boeih tah a khui lamkah ha thoeng dongah hlang a poeih,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:24 Te lamkah thoo tih Tyre vaang la cet. Te vaengah im pakhat ah a kun te ming sak ham ngaih pawt dae phah thai pawh. 
Mark7:25 Tedae a kawng huta pakhat loh tlek a yaak. Anih te a canu tah mueihla thae loh a kaem pah dongah cet tih Jesuh kho khugah bakop. 
Mark7:26 Tahae kah huta tah Syrophoenician kah Greek hoel la om dae a canu kah rhaithae te haek sak ham Jesuh a hloep. 
Mark7:27 Te vaengah anih te, “Camoe rhoek te lamhma la hah sak dae saeh. Ca kah buh rhawt pah tih ui taengah lun pah ham tah hnothen la a om moenih,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:28 Tedae huta loh a doo tih Jesuh te, “Boeipa, camoe kah buhdik te caboei hmuikah uica rhoek loh a caak uh van ta,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:29 Te vaengah anih te, “Hekah ol dongah cet laeh, rhaithae te na canu taeng lamkah cet coeng,” a ti nah." 
Mark7:30 Amah im la a caeh vaengah thingkong soah aka yalh camoe te a hmuh. Te vaengah rhaithae khaw ana suntla coeng. 
Mark7:31 Te phoeiah Tyre vaang lamkah koep nong tih Sidon longah Decapolis vaang khui kah Galilee tuili la pawk. 
Mark7:32 Te vaengah hnapang olmueh te a khuen uh tih anih te kut tloeng thil ham Jesuh a hloep uh. 
Mark7:33 Te dongah anih te hlangping taeng lamloh amah bueng a hoep tih a hna khuila kutdawn a puei. Te phoeiah a timthoih tih a lai te a taek pah. 
Mark7:34 Vaan la oeloe tih a huei phoeiah anih te, “Ephphatha [khui saeh tila om],” a ti nah." 
Mark7:35 Te vaengah a hnavue te tlek khui tih a lai aka khom te yaih tih balh cal. 
Mark7:36 Te phoeiah hlang taengah thui pawt ham amih te ol a paek. Amih te muep ol a paek dae amih loh a nah la muep a hoe uh. 
Mark7:37 Te dongah let uh khungdaeng tih, “Cungkuem la balh a saii dongah hnapang te a yaak ham a saii tih olmueh te a cal sak,” a ti uh." 
Mark8:1 Te khohnin ah hlangping te hut koep om tih caak koi ba khaw khueh uh pawh. 
Mark8:2 Hnukbang rhoek te a khue tih, “Kai taengah hnin thum rhaeh uh coeng tih caak bakhaw a khueh uh voel pawt dongah he hlangping ham ka thinphat." 
Mark8:3 Te dongah a im ah buhmueh rhathih la amih ka tueih koinih longpueng ah tawnba uh ni. Amih khuikah hlangvang tah khohla lamkah ha pawk uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:4 A hnukbang rhoek loh te khaw, “He rhoek he kohong ah me lamkah buh nim hlang loh a cah thai eh he?” a ti uh." 
Mark8:5 Te dongah amih te, “Vaidam meyet na khueh uh ?” a ti nah hatah, “Parhih,” a ti uh." 
Mark8:6 Te dongah hlangping te diklai ah ngol ham a uen. Te phoeiah vaidam parhih te a loh tih a uem tih a aeh. Te daengah hlangping taengah tael hamla a hnukbang rhoek te a paek tih a tael uh. 
Mark8:7 Te phoeiah ngadik a yool a khueh uh te khaw a uem tih amih te, “He khaw tael uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:8 A caak uh tih a hah uh phoeiah a nueipil aka coih te voh rhih la a phueih uh. 
Mark8:9 Te vaengah thawngli tluk om uh. 
Mark8:10 Amih a hlah phoeiah tah lawng khuila tlek kun tih a hnukbang rhoek neh Dalmanutha paengpang la pawk. 
Mark8:11 Te vaengah Pharisee rhoek te cet uh tih Jesuh te koe a oelh uh. Vaan lamkah miknoek te anih taengah a toem uh tih a noemcai uh. 
Mark8:12 Tedae a lungbuei ah huei tih, “Balae hekah cadil loh miknoek a toem. Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, Hekah cadil he miknoek tueng ham moenih,” a ti." 
Mark8:13 Te dongah amih te a toeng phoeiah koep kun tih rhalvangan la kat. 
Mark8:14 Te vaengah buh khuen ham a hmaai uh dongah lawng khuikah amih taengah vaidam pakhat bueng pawt atah atloe khueh uh pawh. 
Mark8:15 Te vaengah amih te ol a paek tih, “Ngaithuen uh, Pharisee rhoek kah tolrhu neh Herod kah tolrhu te hmat uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:16 Te vaengah vaidam a khueh uh pawt te amamih khuiah dawtlet uh thae. 
Mark8:17 Tedae a ming dongah amih te, “Balae tih vaidam na khueh uh pawt te na thui uh. Na yakming uh pawt tih na hmuhming uh thlan a? Na thinko te mangkhak la vawk khueh uh ne." 
Mark8:18 Mik aka khueh rhoek loh na hmuh uh voel pawt tih hna aka khueh rhoek loh na yaak uh pawt dongah na poek uh moenih. 
Mark8:19 Thawngnga ham vaidam panga ka aeh vaengah a nueipil na phueih uh te voh meyet a bae ?” a ti nah hatah Jesuh taengah, “Hlainit,” a ti na uh." 
Mark8:20 Thawngli ham parhih vaengah a nueipil na phueih uh te voh meyet a bae?” a ti nah hatah Jesuh taengah, “Parhih,” a ti na uh." 
Mark8:21 Te phoeiah amih te, “Na hmuhming uh hlan a?,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:22 Bethsaida la a caeh uh vaengah mikdael te Jesuh taengla a khuen uh tih anih te taek sak ham a bih uh. 
Mark8:23 Te dongah mikdael kah kut te a tuuk tih kho voella a khuen tih a mik ah a timthoih. A kut te a tloeng thil phoeiah, “Khat khat khaw na hmuh mai a ?” tila a dawt." 
Mark8:24 Te dongah oeloe tih, “Hlang rhoek te ka sawt dae thingkung aka cet bangla ka hmuh,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:25 Tedae a mik te a kut te koep a tloeng pah thil daengah a cil pah tih a hoeih pah tih phaeng boeih a hmuh. 
Mark8:26 Tedae anih a im la a tueih vaengah tah, “Vangca la kun boeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:27 Jesuh neh a hnukbang rhoek tah Kaisarea Philip kah kho la a caeh uh vaengah longpueng ah a hnukbang rhoek te a dawt tih, “Kai he hlang loh ulae a ti uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:28 Te dongah amah te, “Pakhat loh tuinuem Johan, pakhat loh Elijah, tedae pakhat loh tonghma rhoek khuikah pakhat khat a ti uh,” a ti na uh." 
Mark8:29 Jesuh loh amih te, “Nangmih ta kai he ulae na ti uh ?” tila a dawt. Peter loh a doo tih, “Nang tah Khrih ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:30 Te vaengah amah kawng te thui pawt ham amih te a uen. 
Mark8:31 Te phoeiah amih taengah hlang capa te muep a patang ham neh patong rhoek loh a hnawt ham khaw, khosoihham rhoek neh cadaek rhoek loh a ngawn phoeikah hnin thum ah a thoh ham khaw a kuek te koe a thuituen." 
Mark8:32 Te vaengah ol te sayalh la a thui dongah Peter loh Jesuh te a khue tih koe a toel. 
Mark8:33 Tedae Jesuh loh mael tih a hnukbang rhoek te a sawt doeah Peter te a tlung tih, “Satan, Pathen te na poek pawt tih hlang te na poek dongah ka hnuk la nong,” a ti nah." 
Mark8:34 Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek neh hlangping te a khue tih, “Khat khat loh kai hnukah vai ham a ngaih atah amah a huek uh phoeiah a thinglam te kawt saeh lamtah kai m'vai saeh." 
Mark8:35 Amah khaw a hinglu te khang ham aka ngaih tah a hlong ni. Tedae amah khaw kai neh olthangthen ham a hinglu aka hlong tah daem ni. 
Mark8:36 Hlang pakhat te diklai pum a dang dae a hinglu te a hlong atah balae a hoeikhang ? 
Mark8:37 Hlang loh a hinglu ham balae tlansum la a phai eh? 
Mark8:38 He suentae lakliah kamah neh ka ol aka yah puei te tah samphaih neh hlangtholh la om coeng. Hlang capa loh a napa kah thangpomnah dongah hlangcim rhoek kah puencawn rhoek neh ha pawk vaengah anih te a yah puei van ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:1 Te phoeiah amih te, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui hekah aka pai khuiah hlangvang loh thaomnah neh aka pai Pathen ram te a hmuh hlan atah dueknah ten mueh mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:2 Hnin rhuk phoeiah tah Jesuh loh Peter, James neh Johan te a khue tih amamih bueng tlang sang la hloep a caeh puei hatah amih hmaiah thohai uh." 
Mark9:2 Hnin rhuk phoeiah tah Jesuh loh Peter, James neh Johan te a khue tih amamih bueng tlang sang la hloep a caeh puei hatah amih hmaiah thohai uh." 
Mark9:3 A himbai te khaw bok kathik la om tih phaeng aa. Diklai hmankah mebang hnosuk long khaw te tlam te bok sak thai pawh. 
Mark9:4 Amih taengah Elijah neh Moses khaw phoe tih Jesuh neh cal uh. 
Mark9:5 Te dongah Peter loh Jesuh te a doo tih, “Rhabbi, heah he mamih om ham then tih, dap pathum saii uh tih lamtah, nang ham pakhat, Moses ham pakhat, Elijah ham pakhat saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:6 Tedae lakuengngaiha la a om uh dongah metla a doo khaw ming pawh. 
Mark9:7 Te vaengah khomai aka thoeng loh amih a dah tih khomai khui lamkah, “Anih tah ka ca thintlo ni, anih ol hnatun uh,” tila ol ha thoeng." 
Mark9:8 Tedae koe a sawt uh vaengah ukhaw om pawt tih amih taengah Jesuh bueng te a hmuh uh. 
Mark9:9 Tlang lamkah a suntlak uh phoeiah a hmuh uh te duek khui lamkah loh hlang capa a thoh hlan atah thui pawt ham amih te ol a paek. 
Mark9:10 Te dongah olka te a kuem uh tih, “Aka duek rhoek taeng lamkah loh a thoh ham te metlam a om eh?” tila amamih te oelh uh thae." 
Mark9:11 Te phoeiah amah te a dawt uh tih, “Balae tih cadaek rhoek loh, 'Elijah te ha pawk lamhma ham a kuek,' a ti uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:12 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te, “Elijah he lamhma la ha pawk coeng tih boeih a thoh coeng ngawn. Tedae hlang capa muep a patang phoeiah a voeih ham te metlam a daek ?" 
Mark9:13 Tedae nangmih taengah ka thui tah Elijah khaw ha pawk coeng tih anih ham a daek pah vanbangla anih te a ngaih bangla boeih a saii uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:14 Hnukbang rhoek taengla aka pawk rhoek loh amih taengkah hlangping neh cadaek rhoek neh muep a oelh uh te a hmuh uh. 
Mark9:15 Hlangping boeih loh Jesuh te lawt a hmuh uh hatah a ngaihmang uh. Te dongah anih te a cuk thil uh tih a doe uh. 
Mark9:16 Te dongah amih te, “Amih neh balae na oelh uh thae,” tila a dawt." 
Mark9:17 Te vaengah hlangping lamkah pakhat loh saya, “Mueihla olmueh aka kaem ka capa te nang taengla kang khuen." 
Mark9:18 Anih he a tuuk vaengah tah bung tih a hom phoeiah no a rhueng tih koh. Te te haek ham na hnukbang rhoek te khaw ka dawt dae noeng uh pawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:19 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Aw aka tangnahmueh kah cadil, nangmih taengah meyet nim ka om ve, nangmih taengah mevaeng hil nim kan yaknaem ve? Anih te ka taengla hang khuen uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:20 Te daengah camoe te Jesuh taengla a khuen uh. Tedae Mueihla loh camoe te koe a doek te a hmuh. Te vaengah diklai la bung tih a hom neh bol. 
Mark9:21 Te vaengah a napa te, “Anih taengah aka thoeng he kum meyet lamkah lae a om coeng?” tila a dawt." 
Mark9:22 Te dongah a napa loh, “A cahni lamkah coeng tih anih poci sak ham hmai khuiah khaw tui khuiah khaw a voeih taitu. Tedae pakhat khaw na saii thai khaming, kaimih soah thinphat la kaimih m'bom mai,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:23 Te dongah Jesuh loh anih te, “Na sai thai atah e te! Aka tangnah ham boeih coeng thai ta,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:24 Camoe kah a napa te tlek pang tih, “Ka tangnah, ka hnalvalnah te m'bom mai,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:25 Jesuh loh hlangping a khong tea hmuh vaengah, mueihla thae te a ho tih, “Olmueh neh hnapang mueihla Kai loh nang kan tueih. Anih taeng lamkah loh cet lamtah anih khuiah kun voel boeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:26 Te dongah pang tih muep a suvaih phoeiah cet. Tedae camoe te aka duek bangla a om dongah, “Duek coeng, “tila muep a thui uh." 
Mark9:27 Tedae Jesuh loh a kut te a tuuk tih a thoh hatah koe thoo hang. 
Mark9:28 Im khuila a kun phoeiah tah a hnukbang rhoek loh, “Kaimih loh balae tih tih anih te ka haek uh thai pawh,” tila amah bueng hloep a dawt uh." 
Mark9:29 Te dongah amih te, “He bang he thangthuinah nen pawt atah haek thai mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:30 Te lamkah loh thoo uh tih Galilee longah van uh dae pakhat khaw ming sak ham ngaih pawh. 
Mark9:31 A hnukbang rhoek a thuituen vaengah khaw, “Hlang Capa tah hlang kut ah a voeih vetih a ngawn uh ni. Tedae a ngawn uh phoeikah hnin thum ah thoo ni,” a ti nah coeng." 
Mark9:32 Amih loh olthui te a mangvawt uh dae amah dawt ham khaw a rhih uh. 
Mark9:33 Kapernaum te a pha uh tih im ah a om vaengah, “Longpueng ah balae na thui uh?,” tila amih te a dawt." 
Mark9:34 Tedae long ah khat neh khat te ulae tanglue tila a thuingong uh dongah a hil a phah uh. 
Mark9:35 Te vaengah Ngol tih hlainit te a khue. Amih te khaw, “Khat khat loh lamhma la om ham a ngaih atah hnukkhoem koek neh tueihyoeih koek la om ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:36 Te phoeiah camoe te a khue tih amih lakli ah a pai sak tih a poem. 
Mark9:37 Amih te khaw, “Kai ming neh hebang camoe pakhat khaw aka doe long tah kai ni n'doe. Tedae kai aka doe long tah kai bueng kolla ka tueih te khaw a doe,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:38 Johan loh Jesuh taengah, “Boeipa, na ming neh rhaithae aka haek hlang khat te ka hmuh uh. Tedae mamih hnuk ham vai pawt dongah anih te ka paa sak uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark9:39 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Anih te paa sak uh boeh. Ka ming neh thaomnah aka tueng sak te a om pawt vaengah koeloe la kai n'thet ve." 
Mark9:40 Te dongah mamih neh kingkalh la aka om pawt te tah mamih ham ni a om. 
Mark9:41 Khrih kah hut la na om uh dongah ka ming neh tui boengloeng khat nangmih aka tul te tah a thapang te poci loengloeng mahpawh tila nangmih taengah rhep ka thui. 
Mark9:42 U long khaw kai aka tangnah camoe rhoek he pakhat khaw a khah atah a rhawn ah laak phaklung a oi tih tuili ah voei koinih anih ham hnothen la lat om coeng. 
Mark9:43 Nang khaw na kut loh n'khah atah hlueng mai. Kut panit om tih hmai aka duek pawh hell la caeh lakah hingnah khuiah a ngun la kun te nang ham hnothen la om. 
Mark9:44 Na kho long khaw nang n'khah atah hlueng mai. 
Mark9:45 Kho rhoi om tih hell khuila m'voeih lakah a khaem neh hingnah khuila kun te nang hnothen la om. 
Mark9:46 Na mik long khaw nang n'khah atah koeih mai. 
Mark9:47 Mik panit om tih hell la m'voeih lakah mikvang neh Khohni ram khuiah kun te nang ham hnothen la om. 
Mark9:48 Te ah tah amih kah a rhiit khaw duek pawt tih hmai khaw thi pawh. 
Mark9:49 Rhoepsaep boeih te hmai dongah a baek ni. 
Mark9:50 Lungkaeh tah then, tedae lungkaeh te a duu la om koinih ba nen lae na hlihlim sak eh. Namamih khuiah lungkaeh khueh uh lamtah khat neh khat taengah rhoep uh thae,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:1 Te lamloh thoo tih Judea vaang neh Jordan rhalvangan la cet. Te vaengah a taengah hlangping rhoek koep ha puei uh tih a sainoek bangla amih te koep a thuituen. 
Mark10:1 Te lamloh thoo tih Judea vaang neh Jordan rhalvangan la cet. Te vaengah a taengah hlangping rhoek koep ha puei uh tih a sainoek bangla amih te koep a thuituen. 
Mark10:2 Tedae Pharisee rhoek loh a paan tih, “Te koinih tongpa te yuu a hlak sak a? tila a dawt uh tih Jesuh te a noemcai uh." 
Mark10:3 Tedae amih te a doo tih, “Moses loh nangmih balae n'uen,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:4 Te dongah amih loh, “Moses loh yuhlaknah cayol te a daek sak phoeiah a tueih sak,” a ti uh." 
Mark10:5 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te, “Nangmih kah thinthahnah kongah hekah olpaek he nangmih ham a daek." 
Mark10:6 Suentae cuek lamkah tongpa neh huta ni a saii. 
Mark10:7 Te dongah tongpa loh a manu neh a napa te a toeng vetih a yuu taengah kap ni. 
Mark10:8 Panit te pumsa khat la om ni. Te dongah panit voel pawt tih pumsa khat la om coeng. 
Mark10:9 Te dongah Pathen loh a samtom te hlang loh maa sak boel saeh,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:10 Im ah khaw hekah a kawng he hnukbang rhoek loh koep a dawt uh. 
Mark10:11 Te vaengah amih te, “A yuu te a hlak tih a tloe aka yunah te tah a yuu soah samphaih coeng." 
Mark10:12 Huta long khaw a va te a maa tih va tloe a sak atah samphaih coeng,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:13 Te phoeiah camoe rhoek te taek sak ham a taengla a khuen uh. Tedae hnukbang rhoek loh amih te a ho uh. 
Mark10:14 A hmuh vaengah Jesuh loh a yakdam tih amih te, “Hlah uh laeh camoe rhoek te kamah taengah ha lo uh saeh. Amih te kang uh boeh. Pathen kah ram tah amih kah coeng ni." 
Mark10:15 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, camoe bangla Pathen kah ram te aka doe pawt te atah ram khuiah kun loengloeng mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:16 Te phoeiah amih te a poem tih a uem dongah kut a tloeng thil. 
Mark10:17 Te phoeiah Jesuh te longpueng ah a caeh li vaengah hlang pakhat loh pak ha cu tih a cungkueng pah. Te phoeiah, “Saya then dungyan hingnah ka pang ham balae ka saii eh?, “tila a dawt." 
Mark10:18 Jesuh loh anih te, “Balae tih kai he a then na ti ? Pathen pakhat bueng pawt atah aka then he om pawh." 
Mark10:19 Olpaek te na ming coeng hlang ngawn boeh, samphaih boeh, huencan boeh, laithae boeh, hmuiyoi boeh, na nu na pa te hinyah,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:20 Te vaengah anih loh, “Saya, te rhoek te ka camoe lamkah boeih ka tuem coeng,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:21 Tedae Jesuh loh anih te a sawt vaengah a lungnah tih, “Nang pakhat na phavawt pueng, cet lamtah, na khueh boeih te yoi lamtah khodeng rhoek pae. Te daengah ni vaan ah khohrhang na dang eh. Te phoeiah halo lamtah kai m'vai,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:22 Tedae hnopai muep aka khueh la a om dongah tekah olka loh moelh a khaih tih kothae doela vik cet. 
Mark10:23 Te vaengah Jesuh loh taengvai a sawt tih a hnukbang rhoek te, “Tangka aka om tah Pathen ram ah kun ham bahoeng kuel mai,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:24 Te dongah Jesuh olka dongah hnukbang rhoek tah a ngaihmang uh. Tedae Jesuh loh amih te koep a doo tih, “Camoe rhoek aih khaw, Pathen kah ram la kun ham te kuel kahlak la om ta." 
Mark10:25 Kuirhang te Pathen kah ram ah a kun lakah kalauk te phamet khui ah a kun ham phoeng ngai,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:26 Tedae te rhoek tah let uh khungdaeng tih amamih te, “Unim aka daem thai ve,” a ti uh." 
Mark10:27 Jesuh loh amih te a sawt tih, “Hlang ham a tloelnah dae Pathen ham tah a tloelnah moenih Pathen taengah tah boeih yoeikoek mai,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:28 Peter loh a tong tih, “Kaimih loh boeih ka toeng uh tih nang kam vai uh coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:29 Jesuh loh, “Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, kai ham neh olthangthen ham im khaw, manuca rhoek khaw, ngannu khaw, manu khaw, napa khaw, ca khaw lohmuen khaw aka toeng te om pawh." 
Mark10:30 Tahae tue kah hnaemtaeknah khuiah pataeng im khaw, manuca khaw, ngannu khaw, manu khaw, ca khaw, lohmuen khaw a pueh yakhat la dang het pawt nim? Aka lo ham tue ah dungyan hingnah khaw om pueng." 
Mark10:31 Te dongah lamhma te lamhnuk la, lamhnuk te khaw lamhma la muep om ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:32 Jerusalem la a caeh uh kah longpueng ah a om uh vaengah Jesuh tah amih taengah a lamhma ana om pah. Te dongah a ngaihmang uh tih aka vai rhoek long khaw a rhih uh. Tedae hlainit te koep a khuen tih amah taengah aka thoeng ham te amih taengah thui ham a tong. 
Mark10:33 “ Jerusalem la n'caeh uh he hlang capa tah khosoihham neh cadaek rhoek taengah a paek vetih a duek ham a boe sak uh phoeiah namtom rhoek taengah a thak uh ni. 
Mark10:34 Anih te a tamdaeng uh phoeiah a timthoih uh ni, a boh uh vetih a ngawn uh ni. Tedae hnin thum phoeiah koep thoo ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:35 Te vaengah Zebedee capa rhoi James neh Johan loh a paan rhoi tih, “Saya namah taengah kan bih uh te tah kaimih ham nan saii koinih ka ngaih rhoi,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:35 Te vaengah Zebedee capa rhoi James neh Johan loh a paan rhoi tih, “Saya namah taengah kan bih uh te tah kaimih ham nan saii koinih ka ngaih rhoi,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:36 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih rhoi te, “Nangmih ham kai balae saii sak na ngaih rhoi,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:37 Te rhoi long khaw amah te, “Kaimih rhoi he namah kah bantang lamloh pakhat, banvoei lamloh pakhat te m'pae lamtah na thangpomnah dongah ka ngol rhoi eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:38 Jesuh loh amih rhoi taengah, “Na bih te na ming rhoi moenih. Ka ok boengloeng te ok ham neh kai ka aka nuem baptistma dongah nuem ham na noeng aya?” a ti nah." 
Mark10:39 Te vaengah te rhoi loh amah te, “Ka noeng ngawn,” a ti nah rhoi. Tedae Jesuh loh amih rhoi taengah, “Ka ok boengloeng te na ok rhoi vetih ka nuem baptistma te na nuem rhoi ni." 
Mark10:40 Tedae kai kah banvoei bantang ah ngol ham te kai loh paek ham om pawt tih a hmoel tangtae rhoek ham ni a om,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:41 Parha rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah James neh Johan taengah koe thatlai uh. 
Mark10:41 Parha rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah James neh Johan taengah koe thatlai uh. 
Mark10:42 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a khue tih, “Namtom rhoek aka mawt tah amamih aka vueinan tih amamih khuikah aka len loh amih aka huttet la a ngai uh te na ming uh." 
Mark10:43 Nangmih ah te tlam te om boel saeh. Tedae nangmih ah a len la om aka ngaih long tah nangmih kah tueihyoeih la om saeh. 
Mark10:44 Te phoeiah nangmih ah lamhma la om ham aka ngaih long tah hlang boeih kah sal la om saeh. 
Mark10:45 Hlang capa tah hlang thotat sak ham pawt tih thohtat pah ham neh a hinglu te ping kah tlansum la paek ham ni halo,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:46 Te phoeiah Jerikho la pawk uh tih Jerikho lamkah a hnukbang rhoek khaw, hlangping khaw huhut khong uh. Te vaengah Timaeus capa Bartimaeus buhbih mikdael te long taengah ngol." 
Mark10:47 Nazareth Jesuh om tila a yaak vaengah koe pang tih, “David capa Jesuh kai n'rhen lah,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:48 Te dongah anih te hilphah sak ham muep a sim uh. Tedae te long khaw anah la lat pang tih, “David capa, kai n'rhen lah,” a ti." 
Mark10:49 Te dongah Jesuh te pai tih, “Anih ke khue uh,” a ti nah. Te dongah mikdael te a khue uh tih, “Thoo, na ngaimong sak, nang n'khue coeng,” a ti na uh." 
Mark10:50 Te long khaw a himbai te a voeih tih a cungpet doela Jesuh taengah pawk. 
Mark10:51 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh anih te a doo tih, “Na ngaih te kan saii pawn eh,” a ti nah. Te dongah mikdael loh Jesuh taengah, “Rhabboni, ka hmuh van lah mako,” a ti nah." 
Mark10:52 Te vaengah Jesuh loh anih te, “Cet laeh, namah kah tangnah loh nang n'khang coeng,” a ti nah. Te vaengah tlek a hmuh tih longpueng ah Jeusuh pahoi a vai." 
Mark11:1 Jerusalem, Olive tlang kah Bethphage neh Bethany a pha tom uh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek khuiah panit te a tueih." 
Mark11:2 Te vaengah amih rhoi te, “Na rhaldan kah vangca la cet rhoi lamtah a khuiah tlek na kun neh laak ca a pael te na hmuh rhoi ni. Te soah ah te hlang a ngol noek moenih. Te te hlam lamtah han khuen rhoi." 
Mark11:3 Te vaengah khat khat loh nangmih rhoi taengah, “Balae na saii te,' a ti atah Boeipa loh a ngoe. Tedae he la tlek kan thak koep bitni, ' ti nah,” a ti nah." 
Mark11:4 Te dongah a caeh rhoi hatah thohka voel kah longrhak ah laak ca a pael te a hmuh rhoi tih a hlam rhoi. 
Mark11:5 Te vaengah tekah aka pai hlangvang loh, “laak ca na hlam rhoi te balae na saii rhoi,” a ti uh." 
Mark11:6 Te rhoi loh amih taengah Jesuh kah a thui bangla a thui rhoi daengah amih rhoi te a hlah uh. 
Mark11:7 Te phoeiah laak ca te Jesuh taengla a khuen rhoi tih amamih kah himbai neh a khuk thil uh phoeiah a soah Jesuh te ngol. 
Mark11:8 Te phoeiah hlang a yet loh a himbai te long ah a phaih uh. Tedae a tloe rhoek loh lohma kah thingbu te a hlaek pa uh. 
Mark11:9 Te phoeiah lamhma rhoek neh hnukvai rhoek loh, “Hosanna, Boeipa ming neh aka pawk tah a yoethen pai." 
Mark11:10 A pa David kah ram aka pai tah a yoethen pai, a sangkoek ah hosanna,” tila pang uh." 
Mark11:11 Te phoeiah Jerusalem bawkim la kun tih boeih a sawt. A tue te khaw hlaem la om coeng tih hlainit neh Bethany la cet uh. 
Mark11:12 A vuen ah Bethany lamloh a caeh uh vaengah a bungpong. 
Mark11:13 Te vaengah thaibu a hnah aka om te a hla lamloh a hmuh. Te dongah a kung ah pakhat khat khaw a hmuh mai atah tila a paan. Thaibu tue la a om pawt dongah a taeng a pha vaengah tah a hnah pawt atah a tloe hmu pawh. 
Mark11:14 Te dongah a voek tih, “Nang kah a thaih te kumhal duela ca uh boel saeh,” a ti nah te a hnukbang rhoek long khaw a yaak uh." 
Mark11:15 Te phoeiah Jerusalem la ha lo uh tih bawkim la a kun vaengah bawkim kah hnoyoi neh hnolai rhoek te koe a vai tih Tangkathung rhoek kah caboei neh vahu aka yoi rhoek kah ngoltlang te a palet pah. 
Mark11:16 Te phoeiah hnopai te bawkim longah pakhat khaw puen sak pawh. 
Mark11:17 Te phoeiah amih te a thuituen tih, “Kai im tah namtom boeih ham thangthuinah im la a khue ni tila a daek moenih a? Tedae nangmih loh dingca rhoek kah khuirhung la na saii uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark11:18 Khosoihham neh cadaek rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah Jesuh te poci sak ham a mae uh. Tedae anih kah thuituennah soah hlangping khaw boeih let uh tih loei a rhih uh. 
Mark11:19 Kholaeh a pha vaengah kho voella cet uh. 
Mark11:20 Te phoeikah yueya a van uh hatah thaibu tah a yung lamloh a koh te a hmuh uh. 
Mark11:21 Te vaengah Peter loh a thoelh tih Jesuh taengah, “Rhabbi thaibu thae na phoei thil te koh coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Mark11:22 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Pathen taengah tangnah te khueh uh lah." 
Mark11:23 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, hekah tlang he, 'Phil saeh lamtah tuili la voei saeh, ' aka ti nah long tah a thinko ah boelhkhoeh boel saeh lamtah a thui te thoeng coeng tila tangnah saeh a thoeng pah bitni." 
Mark11:24 Te dongah nangmih taengah ka thui, thangthui neh na bih uh boeih te ka dang coeng tila tangnah uh lamtah nangmih ham ha thoeng bitni." 
Mark11:25 Thangthui la na pai uh vaengah khaw khat khat taengah ngaihlih bet na khueh atah hlah pah. 
Mark11:26 Te daengah ni vaan kah na pa long khaw nangmih kah tholhdalhnah te a hlah eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark11:27 Te phoeiah Jerusalem la koep pawk uh tih Bawkim ah a pongpa vaengah khosoihham rhoek khaw, cadaek rhoek khaw, patong rhoek khaw, a taengla ha pawk uh." 
Mark11:28 Te phoeiah Jesuh te, “Mebang saithainah nen lae hekah he na saii? tih hekah he saii ham saithainah he ulong nang m'paek,” a ti na uh." 
Mark11:29 Tedae Jesuh loh amih taengah, “Olka pakhat nangmih kan dawt phoeiah kai n'doo uh. Te vaengah mebang saithainah neh ka saii khaw nangmih ham kan thui bitni." 
Mark11:30 Johan kah baptistma te vaan lamkah a? Hlang lamkah a aka om a? Kai n'doo uh lah,” a ti nah." 
Mark11:31 Te vaengah amamih te a dawtlet uh thae tih, “Vaan lamkah n'ti uh, “koinih, “Balae tih anih na tangnah uh pawh,” a ti veh." 
Mark11:32 Hlang lamkah n'ti uh cakhaw hlang boeih loh Johan te, “Tonghma rhep ni,” a ti uh dongah hlangping te a rhih uh." 
Mark11:33 Te dongah Jesuh te a doo uh tih, “Ka ming uh pawh,” a ti uh. Jesuh long khaw amih te, “Hekah he mebang saithainah neh ka saii khaw nangmih taengah ka thui mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark12:1 Te phoeiah amih taengah nuettahnah neh thui ham a tong tih, “Hlang pakhat loh misur a tue tih vongtung a tung, rhom a too, imsang a sak. Te phoeiah lotawn rhoek te a phaam sak tih vik yiin." 
Mark12:2 A tue vaengah lotawn taengkah misur thaih coi ham sal pakhat te lotawn rhoek taengla a tueih. 
Mark12:3 Tedae anih te a tuuk uh phoeiah a boh uh tih a tlongtlai la a tueih uh. 
Mark12:4 Te phoeiah sal a tloe te amih taengla koep a tueih hatah anih te khaw a vuek uh tih yah a bai uh. 
Mark12:5 Te phoeiah a tloe te a tueih dae te khaw a ngawn uh tih a tloe rhoek muep a tueih te, a ngen a boh uh tih a ngawn uh." 
Mark12:6 Capa thintlo pakhat a khueh pueng tih, “Ka capa te a yahnah uh ni,” a ti dongah a capa te amih taengla a hnukkhueng ah a tueih." 
Mark12:7 Tedae lotawn rhoek loh amamih te, “Anih tah rhopangkung ni. Halo anih he ngawn uh sih. Te daengah ni mamih kah rho la a om eh,” a ti uh." 
Mark12:8 Anih te a tuuk uh tih a ngawn uh phoeiah misurdum lamkah loh vawl a voeih uh. 
Mark12:9 Te koinih misurdum kungmah loh balae a saii eh? A paan vetih lotawn rhoek te a poci sak phoeiah misurdum te a tloe rhoek taengah a paek ni. 
Mark12:10 Cacim he na tae uh pawt nim? Im sa rhoek loh a hnawt lungto te imkil kah a lu la poeh. 
Mark12:11 Hekah he Boeipa lamkah ha thoeng tih mamih mik ah aka khuet la om ?” a ti nah. 
Mark12:12 Nuettahnah a thui te amih ni tila a ming uh dongah amah tuuk ham a mae uh. Tedae hlangping te a rhih uh dongah anih te a toeng uh tih cet uh. 
Mark12:13 Te phoeiah olka neh tuengkhuep ham Jesuh taengla Pharisee rhoek neh Herod hlang rhoek kah hlangvang rhoek te a tueih uh. 
Mark12:14 A pha uh vaengah Jesuh te, “Boeipa, a thuem la na om tih hlang maelhmai te na sawt pawt dongah u taengah khaw na birhih pawh. Pathen kah oltak longpuei te ni na thuituen tila ka ming uh. Te dongah Kaisar taengah mangmu paek ham a ngaih a?, a ngaih moenih a? Pae sih a? Pae boel sih a?” a ti uh." 
Mark12:15 Tedae amih kah thailatnah te a hmuh tih amih te, “Balae kai nan noemcai uh? Kai taengla denarii hang khuen lamtah ka so lah eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark12:16 Te dongah a khuen uh hatah amih taengah, “A muei neh a ming he u kah nim he? “ a ti nah vaengah, “Kaisar kah,” a ti uh." 
Mark12:17 Jesuh long khaw amih te, “Kaisar kah te Kaisar taengah, Pathen kah te Pathen taengah thuung uh,” a ti nah tih a taengah a ngaihmang uh." 
Mark12:18 Te phoeiah Sadducee rhoek loh a taengla a paan uh. Te rhoek loh, “Thohkoepnah om mahpawh,” a ti uh." 
Mark12:19 Te vaengah anih te a dawt uh tih, “Saya, Moses loh kaimih ham, “Khat khat kah a manuca tah duek tih a yuu te camoe khueh kolla a caehtak atah, a manuca patoeng loh a yuu te pang saeh lamtah a manuca kah a tiingan te thoh saeh tila a daek." 
Mark12:20 Boeinaphung parhih om uh tih lamhma te yuu a loh dae duek tih a tiingan khueh pawh. 
Mark12:21 A pabae long khaw anih a pang dae duek tih a tiingan caehtak bal pawh. A pathum long khaw amah boeiloeih la om. 
Mark12:22 A parhih long khaw a tiingan khueh pawh. A hnukkhueng ah huta te khaw duek. 
Mark12:23 Anih te parhih loh a yuu la a khueh uh dongah thohkoepnah khuiah a thoh uh vaengah amih khuiah u yuu lamlae a om eh?” a ti uh. 
Mark12:24 Jesuh loh amih taengah, “Cacim neh Pathen kah saithainah aka ming pawt loh n'rhaithi uh dongah moenih a he ?" 
Mark12:25 Duek lamkah a thoh uh vaengah yuloh vasak om mahpawh, rhaihlan khaw om mahpawh, vaan puencawn rhoek bangla om uh coeng." 
Mark12:26 Tedae aka duek rhoek a thoh uh te Moses cabu khuiah na tae uh pawt nim? Pathen loh tangpuem khuiah anih a voek vaengah, 'Kai tah Abraham kah Pathen, Isaak kah Pathen neh Jakob kah Pathen ni,' a ti nah." 
Mark12:27 Pathen tah aka duek rhoek kah pawt tih aka hing rhoek kah ni. Bahoeng n'rhaithi uh coeng la he,” a ti nah." 
Mark12:28 Te vaengah amih a oelh uh thae te cadaek pakhat loh a yaak dongah a paan. Tedae amih a voek te thuem tila a hmuh. Te dongah Jesuh te, “Olpaek boeih khuiah melae tanglue la aka om,” tila a dawt." 
Mark12:29 Jesuh loh, “Aw Israel hnatun lah, mamih kah Boeipa, Boeipa Pathen pakhat ni a om." 
Mark12:30 Te dongah na Boeipa Pathen te na thinko boeih, na hinglu boeih, na kopoek boeih, na thadueng boeih neh lungnah ' a ti te lamhma la om." 
Mark12:31 A pabae ah na imben te namah bangla lungnah. He rhoi lakah aka tanglue olpaek a tloe om pawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark12:32 Te dongah cadaek loh Jesuh te, “Thuem, saya, pakhat bueng om tih amah phoeiah a tloe om pawh tila oltak te na thui coeng." 
Mark12:33 Pathen te thinko boeih neh, yakmingnah boeih neh, thadueng boeih neh, lungnah tih imben te amah bangla lungnah ham te hmaihlutnah neh hmueih boeih lakah olpuei la om,” a ti nah." 
Mark12:34 Anih loh cat a doo te Jesuh loh a hmuh vaengah anih te, “Pathen kah ram lamloh lakhla la na om ngawn pawh,” a ti nah. Te phoeiah tah Jesuh te dawt ham ngaingaih uh voel pawh." 
Mark12:35 Jesuh loh bawkim ah a thuituen tih a doo vaengah, “Cadaek rhoek loh metlam, 'Khrih tah David capa ni,' tila a thui ?" 
Mark12:36 David amah loh Mueihla Cim rhangneh, 'Boeipa loh ka Boeipa te 'Na rhal rhoek te na kho hmuiah ka khueh hlan atah kai kah bantang ah ngol dae' a ti nah,' a ti." 
Mark12:37 Anih te David amah long pataeng Boeipa la a khue atah metlamlae a capa la a om eh?,” a ti nah. Te vaengah hlangping te yet loh liplip a hnatun." 
Mark12:38 Te phoeiah amah kah thuituennah khuiah, “Hnikul neh pongpa tih hnoyoih hmuen ah toidalnah ham," 
Mark12:39 tunim ah ngolhmuen then neh buhkung ah hmuensang aka ngaih cadaek rhoek te dawn uh. 
Mark12:40 Te rhoek loh nuhmai rhoek kah im a yoop uh tih mueituengnah ham khing thangthui uh. Amih tah laitloeknah a yook uh khungdaeng bitni,” a ti nah." 
Mark12:41 Te phoeiah tangkabu hmaiah ngol tih hlangping loh tangkabu khuiah rhohum a sang vaengah a kumngai kuirhang rhoek loh muep a sang uh te a hmuh. 
Mark12:42 Te vaengah nuhmai khodeng pakhat ha pawk tih mucih panit a sang. Te tah pekhat lo ni. 
Mark12:43 Te dongah a hnukbang rhoek te a khue tih, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, tangkabu khuila aka sang rhoek boeih lakah hekah nuhmai khodaeng loh a sang ngai." 
Mark12:44 Hlang boeih loh amamih taengkah a coih te a sang uh dae anih tah a vawtthoek khui lamkah a khuehtawn boeih a khosaknah boeih te bitbit a sang coeng,” a ti nah." 
Mark13:1 Bawkim lamkah a caeh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek khuikah pakhat loh a taengah, “Saya, mebang lungto neh mebang imsak nim he,” a ti nah." 
Mark13:2 Te dongah Jesuh loh anih te, “Hekah imsak a len te na hmuh nama? Lungto sokah lungto he hmaai loengloeng het mahpawt a? Te tah phil loengloeng het mahpawt a?,” a ti nah." 
Mark13:3 Te phoeiah Bawkim rhaldan kah Olive tlang ah amah te ngol tih, Peter, James, Johan neh Andrew loh," 
Mark13:3 Te phoeiah Bawkim rhaldan kah Olive tlang ah amah te ngol tih, Peter, James, Johan neh Andrew loh," 
Mark13:4 “Hekah he me vaengah lae a om khaw kaimih taengah thui lah. He he boeih a soep tom vaengkah miknoek tah mebang lae? tila Jesuh amah bueng te a dawt uh. 
Mark13:5 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te, “Ngaithuen uh khat khat loh nangmih n'rhaithi ve." 
Mark13:6 Kai ni, ' tila aka thui khaw kai ming neh muep ha pawk uh vetih muep rhaithi uh ni." 
Mark13:7 Te dongah caem neh caem kah olthang na yaak uh vaengah let uh boeh. A om ham khaw a kuek pai dae a bawtnah tah pha hlan. 
Mark13:8 Namtu loh namtu, ram loh ram a thoh thil ni. Hmuen takuem ah lingluei hinghuen vetih khokha kaw pai ni. Te tah bungtloh a tongnah coeng ni." 
Mark13:9 Te dongah nangmih tah namamih te hmat uh thae. Nangmih te khoboei rhoek taengla n'thak uh vetih tunim ah m'boh uh ni. Te phoeiah khoboei rhoek neh manghai rhoek hmaiah khaw, amih taengah khaw kai ham laipai la na pai uh ni." 
Mark13:10 Namtom boeih taengah khaw lamhma la olthangthen te hoe ham a kuek. 
Mark13:11 Te dongah nangmih n'khuen uh tih n'tloeng uh vaengah na thui uh ham te ngaisa uh boeh. Tedae amah tekah a tue vaengah nangmih m'paek te tah thui uh pai. Nangmih tah aka thui la na om pawt tih Mueihla Cim ni aka om. 
Mark13:12 Te phoeiah manuca loh manuca, a napa loh ca te duek sak ham a voeih ni. Camoe rhoek long khaw a manu napa te a tingtoeh vetih a duek sak ni." 
Mark13:13 Kai ming kongah hlang boeih loh m'hmuhuet uh ni. Tedae a bawt due aka ueh te tah daem ni. 
Mark13:14 Tedae na hmuh uh vaengah mitmoengnah tueilaehnah a pai te a kuek moenih. Aka tae loh yakming saeh. Te vaengah Judea kah rhoek te tlang la rhaelrham uh saeh. 
Mark13:14 Tedae na hmuh uh vaengah mitmoengnah tueilaehnah a pai te a kuek moenih. Aka tae loh yakming saeh. Te vaengah Judea kah rhoek te tlang la rhaelrham uh saeh. 
Mark13:15 Imphu kah aka om long khaw rhum boel saeh. A im kah khat khat loh ham khaw kun boel saeh. 
Mark13:16 Lohma kah long khaw a himbai loh ham a hnuk la bal boel saeh. 
Mark13:17 Anunae tekah khohnin ah bungvawn la aka om rhoek neh cacun rhoek aih. 
Mark13:18 Tedae sikca ah a om pawt ham thangthui uh. 
Mark13:19 Suentae kah a tongcuek lamloh aka om pawh tebang phacipphabaem khohnin te ha pai ni. Te tah Pathen loh a suen parhii te tahae due khaw om loeng loeng hlan. 
Mark13:20 Te dongah Boeipa loh khohnin te a biim pawt atah pumsa he boeih daem thai mahpawh. Tedae a tuek tih a coelh tangtae ham te khohnin te a biim pah ni. 
Mark13:21 Te vaengah pakhat loh nangmih taengah, 'Hela Khrih he, kela ke,' a ti atah tangnah uh boeh." 
Mark13:22 Laithae khrih rhoek neh laithae tonghma rhoek phoe vetih a coengthai atah coelh tangtae rhoek te phael sak ham miknoek neh khobae rhambae a tueng sak uh ni. 
Mark13:23 Te dongah nangmih taengah ka thui boeih te nangmih loh ana noek uh. 
Mark13:24 Tedae phacip phabaem phoeikah tekah khohnin ah khomik loh hmuep vetih hla loh a aa pae mahpawh. 
Mark13:25 Aisi rhoek khaw vaan lamloh tla ni. Vaan kah thaomnah khaw hinghuen uh ni. 
Mark13:26 Te phoeiah Hlang Capa te thaomnah tanglue, thangpomnah neh, khomai dongah ha pawk te a hmuh uh ni." 
Mark13:27 Te vaengah, puencawn rhoek te a tueih vetih diklai a soi lamloh vaan a soi duela khohli pali dongkah a coelh rhoek te a coi ni." 
Mark13:28 Te dongah thaibu lamkah nuettahnah te cang uh. A hlaeng te suepluep la om tih a hnah te a boe coeng atah khohal yoei coeng tila na ming uh. 
Mark13:29 Te dongah nangmih khaw hekah aka om he na hmuh uh vaengah thohka taengah rhet om coeng tila ming uh. 
Mark13:30 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, he rhoek loh boeih a thoeng hlan atah tahae kah cadil loh khum loengloeng mahpawh." 
Mark13:31 Vaan neh diklai tah khum ni, tedae kai kah ol tah khum loengloeng mahpawh." 
Mark13:32 Tedae tekah a tue khohnin kawng te a ming uh moenih, vaan kah puencawn rhoek long khaw ming pawh, pa long pawt atah capa long khaw a ming moenih." 
Mark13:33 Hlang pakhat loh a im te yiin la a hlah uh vaengah a sal rhoek te saithainah, neh a bibi rhip a paek phoeiah imtawt te hueltue la om ham a uen." 
Mark13:34 Me vaengah lae a tue te a om eh tite na ming uh pawt dongah hak uh lamtah ana noek uh. 
Mark13:35 Te dongah im kung te kholaeh ah khaw, ihdulh ah khaw, aikhong ah khaw, mincang ah khaw, me vaengah ha pawk ham khaw na ming uh pawt dongah ana hak uh." 
Mark13:36 Buengrhuet ha pawk vetih na ih uh te hmu ve. 
Mark13:37 Te dongah nangmih ham ka thui te hlang boeih ham khaw ka thui, hak uh lah,” pahoi a ti nah." 
Mark14:1 Tahae lamkah hnin nit phoeiah Yoom neh vaidamding om pawn ni. Te vaengah khosoihham rhoek neh cadaek rhoek loh Jesuh te mebang tuengkhuepnah nen khaw tuuk tih ngawn ham a mae uh. 
Mark14:2 “Tedae khotue vaengah boel saeh, pilnam kah olpung kacan la om ve,” a ti uh." 
Mark14:3 Te phoeiah Jesuh te Bethany ah aka om hmaibae Simon im ah yalh. Anih te vaengah huta pakhat loh a paan tih botui lungbok a khuen pah. Te bang nardo cilh tah te phutlo. Lungbok te a boh tih a lu te a suep pah. 
Mark14:4 Tedae amih khuiah te aka yakdam hlangvang om. Te dongah, “Baham nim botui he pocinah a khueh he?" 
Mark14:5 He botui he denarii yathum hlai la a yoih vetih khodaeng te a paek mako tila anih te a thanueih thil uh. 
Mark14:6 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Anih te hlah uh, balae tih anih te thakthaenah neh na toeh uh. Kai dongah bibi then a saii." 
Mark14:7 Khodaeng rhoek te nangmih taengah om uh taitu tih na ngaih uh vaengah amih ham a then na saii uh thai. Tedae kai ka om taitu moenih. 
Mark14:8 A khueh duen te a saii coeng. Rhokhlaknah dongah ka pumsa he hluk hamla a sawn. 
Mark14:9 Te dongah nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, diklai pum kah olthangthen a hoe nah takuem ah anih loh a saii te khaw a kutmuei la a thui ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:10 Te phoeiah hlainit khuikah pakhat Judah Iskariot loh Jesuh te amih khosoihham rhoek taengah yoih hamla cet. 
Mark14:11 Te rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah loh a uem uh tih anih te tangka paek ham a caeng uh. Te dongah anih voeih ham te voeih eh tila a hoenghoep te a dawn. 
Mark14:12 Vaidamding kah lamhmacuek hnin kah yoom a ngawn uh vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh amah taengah, “Melam na ngaih dae, ka cet uh saeh lamtah, yoom caak ham ka tarhoek uh eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:13 Te dongah a hnukbang panit te a tueih. Te vaengah amih rhoi te, “Khopuei khuila cet rhoi lamtah tuitang dongah tui aka phuei hlang loh nangmih rhoi n'doe ni." 
Mark14:14 Anih te vai rhoi lamtah a kun nah imkung te, 'Saya loh, 'Kai impahnah te melam a om, te rhoek ah ka hnukbang rhoek neh yoom ka ca uh mai eh,' a ti, “ti nah rhoi." 
Mark14:15 Te vaengah anih loh, “Imhman len a sikim la a rhoekbah te nangmih rhoi n'tueng bitni. Te vaengah mamih pahoi rhuengphong rhoi,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:16 Hnukbang rhoi te cet rhoi tih kho khuila a kun rhoi vaengah amih rhoi a uen bangla a hmuh rhoi tih yoom te a rhuengphong rhoi. 
Mark14:17 Hlaem a pha vaengah hnukbang hlainit neh ha pawk. 
Mark14:18 Te phoeiah a vael uh tih a caak uh vaengah Jesuh loh, “Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui Nangmih khuikah pakhat, kai taengah aka ca loh kai m'voeih ni te,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:19 Vik a kothae uh tih, pakhat phoeiah pakhat loh Jesuh te, “Kai mai khaming,” a ti na uh." 
Mark14:20 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te, “Hlainit khuikah pakhat, kai taengah baeldung khuila aka puei te." 
Mark14:21 Hlang capa tah a kawng a daek tangtae bangla a caeh te thuem. Tedae anih hlang pakhat loh hlang capa a voeih te anunae. Tekah hlang te thaang pawt koinih anih ham then ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:22 A caak uh vaengah, vaidam te a loh tih yoethen a paek. A aeh phoeiah amih te a doe tih, “He he kamah pum ni lo uh, “ a ti nah." 
Mark14:23 Boengloeng te khaw a loh tih a uem phoeiah amih te a paek tih rhip a ok uh. 
Mark14:24 Te phoeiah amih taengah, “He tah ka thii neh cungkuem ham ka long sak paipi ni." 
Mark14:25 Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, Pathen kah ram ah a thai la ka ok nah khohnin duela misur thaih ka o voel loengloeng mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:26 Te phoeiah a hlai doeah olives tlang la cet uh. 
Mark14:27 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh amih te, “Boeih n'khah uh ni. 'Tudawn te ka tam vetih tu rhoek te pam ni,' tila a daek coeng." 
Mark14:28 Tedae kai ka thoh phoeiah Galilee la nangmih hmaiah ka lamhma ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:29 Te dongah Peter loh Jesuh taengah, “Boeih a khah uh mai akhaw, kai van moenih,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:30 Te vaengah Jesuh loh anih te, “Namah taengah rhep kan thui, tihnin hlaem ah he ai hnavoei a khong hlanah nang loh kai he voeithum nan huek uh tak ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:31 Tedae, “Nang hamla kai ka duek te a kuek cakhaw nang kan huek uh tak loengloeng mahpawh,” khak a ti nah. Te vanbangla a tloe boeih long khaw a ti uh." 
Mark14:32 Te phoeiah Gethsemene aka ming nah hmuen la cet uh tih a hnukbang rhoek te, “Ka thangthui rhuetah tah heah he ana ngol uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:33 Te phoeiah Peter, James neh Johan te amah taengla a khuen. Te vaengah ngaihmang neh khobing te a tong coeng." 
Mark14:33 Te phoeiah Peter, James neh Johan te amah taengla a khuen. Te vaengah ngaihmang neh khobing te a tong coeng." 
Mark14:34 Te dongah amih te, “Ka hinglu loh kothae a ming tih vat duek. Heah he naeh uh lamtah ana hak uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:35 Tedae hawt lamhma tih lai ah bakop. Te vaengah coeng thai la a om atah a tue loh anih taeng a khum tak ham ni a thangthui coeng. 
Mark14:36 Te vaengah, “Abba, a pa, nang ham tah boeih yoeikoek mai, hekah boengloeng he kai lamkah loh khoe mai. Tedae kai ngaih boel saeh lamtah namah ngaih mai saeh,” a ti." 
Mark14:37 Ha pawk vaengah amih a ih te a hmuh tih, Peter taengah, “Simon, na ip nama? Khonoek pakhat pataeng na hak thai mahnim ?" 
Mark14:38 Hak uh lamtah thangthui uh. Te daengah ni cuekhalhnah khuiah na pha pawt eh. Mueihla loh a yakvawt ngawn dae pumsa loh tattloel,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:39 Te phoeiah koep cet tih amah a thui tangtae ol neh thangthui. 
Mark14:40 Koep ha pawk vaengah tah amih a ih a hmuh. Aka om rhoek te a mik loh a nan uh. Te dongah Jesuh a doo uh ham te ming uh pawh. 
Mark14:41 A pathum kah ha pawk vaengah amih te, “Yulh na ip uh tih caih laeh ? Tamah saeh. A tue ha pawk coeng. Hlang Capa tah hlangtholh rhoek kut ah a voeih coeng he." 
Mark14:42 Thoo uh, cet uh pawn sih, kai aka voei tah, ha yoei coeng ke,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:43 A thui li vaengah, hlainit khuikah pakhat Judah te pakcak ha pawk. Te vaengah anih te khosoihham neh, cadaek rhoek neh, patong rhoek kah a tueih hlangping loh cunghang neh thingboeng ne a puei uh." 
Mark14:44 Te vaengah anih aka voei loh amih mikhip a paek tih, “Ka mok te tah anih ni. Anih te tuu uh lamtah rhep khuen uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:45 Te dongah ha pawk neh Jesuh te koe a paan tih, “Rhabbi,” a ti nah phoeiah a mok." 
Mark14:46 Te rhoek loh kut a hlah thil uh tih Jesuh te a tuuk uh. 
Mark14:47 Tedae aka pai khuikah pakhat loh cunghang te a yueh tih khosoihham kah sal te a boeng hatah a hna a pat pah. 
Mark14:48 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Dingca bangla, cunghang neh thingboeng neh kai tuuk ham nan suntlak thil uh." 
Mark14:49 Khohnin takuem nangmih taengah ka om tih bawkim ah ka thuituen vaengah kai na tuu uh pawh. Tedae he nen ni cacim tah a soep eh,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:50 Te vaengah Jesuh te a hlah uh tih boeih rhaelrham uh. 
Mark14:51 Tedae amah taengah aka bang cadong pakhat loh Jesuh pumtling te himbai neh a khuk hatah anih te khaw a tuuk uh. 
Mark14:52 Te long khaw himbai te a hnoo tih pumtling la rhaelrham van. 
Mark14:53 Jesuh te khosoihham taengla a khuen uh hatah khosoihham rhoek, patong rhoek neh cadaek rhoek loh boeih a khoong thil uh." 
Mark14:54 Peter long tah a hla lamloh khosoihham kah vongup khui duela a vai. Te phoeiah tueihyoeih rhoek taengah ngol tih hmaivang te rhet a om. 
Mark14:55 Te vaengah khosoihham rhoek neh khoboei pum loh Jesuh te duek sak ham laipai a toem uh dae hmu uh pawh. 
Mark14:56 Jesuh te muep a pael uh dae laipai rhoek te cikngae la om uh pawh. 
Mark14:57 Angen loh pai tih anih a pael nah la," 
Mark14:58 “Hekah kutsai bawkim he kai loh ka phae vetih hnin thum phoeiah a tloe kutsai mueh te ka sak ni, ' a ti te ka yaak uh coeng,” a ti uh." 
Mark14:59 Amih kah olthui te khaw cikngae la om bal pawh. 
Mark14:60 Te dongah khosoihham tah a laklung ah pai tih Jesuh te a dawt tih, “Khat khaw na doo mahpawt a? Amih loh nang m'pael uh te,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:61 Tedae hil a phah tih pakhat khaw doo pawh. Khosoihham loh Jesuh te koep a dawt tih, “Nang he, uemom Capa Khrih a?” a ti nah." 
Mark14:62 Te dongah Jesuh loh, “Kai ni, hlang capa te thaomnah bantang ah ngol vetih vaan khomai neh ha pawk te na hmuh uh bitni,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:63 Te vaengah khosoihham loh a angki te a phen tih, “Laipai n'ngoe uh pueng a te?" 
Mark14:64 soehsalnah te na yaak uh coeng. Metlam na poek uh,” a ti nah. Amih loh anih te dueknah yook sak kuekluek hamla boeih a boe sak uh." 
Mark14:65 Te dongah hlangvang loh Jesuh te koe a timthoih uh phoeiah, a maelhmai te a thing pa uh tih a thoek uh. Te phoeiah Jesuh te, “Olphong lah!” a ti na uh. Tueihyoeih rhoek kah kutcaihnah te khaw a duen pah." 
Mark14:66 Peter te vongtung hmui ah a om vaengah khosoihham kah salnu pakhat te ha pawk. 
Mark14:67 Hmai aka om Peter te a hmuh vaengah amah te a sawt tih, “Nang khaw Nazareth Jesuh taengah na om van,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:68 Tedae a aal tih, “Ka ming moenih, na thui te hmat moenih,” a ti nah. Tedae thohkaeng la voelh a caeh vaengah ai khong." 
Mark14:69 Te phoeiah Peter te salnu loh koep a hmuh tih aka pai rhoek taengah, “Anih he amih kah hlang ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark14:70 Tedae koep a aal bal. Rhaih a om phoeiah aka pai rhoek loh Peter te, “Amih kah hlang rhep ni, Galilee hoel van ni,” a ti na uh." 
Mark14:71 Te dongah pahoi thae a phoei tih, “Hekah hlang na thui uh he ka ming moenih, “tila a toemngam." 
Mark14:72 Ai a pabae la pahoi khong tih Jesuh loh anih taengah, “Ai hnavoei a khong tom ah kai voeithum nan huek uh tak ni,” a ti nah ol te Peter loh a poek tih hlut rhap." 
Mark15:1 Khosoihham rhoek, patong rhoek, cadaek rhoek neh khoboei pum loh dawtletnah yueya tlek a saii uh. Jesuh te a khih uh phoeiah a khuen uh tih Pilat taengah a thak uh." 
Mark15:2 Te vaengah Pilat loh Jesuh te, “Judah rhoek kah manghai la na om a? tila a dawt. Tedae Jesuh loh anih te a doo tih, “Namah long ni na ti,” a ti nah." 
Mark15:3 Khosoihham rhoek long khaw Jesuh te tholh muep a paelnaeh uh. 
Mark15:4 Te dongah Pilat loh Jesuh te koep a dawt tih, “Nang muep m'paelnaeh uh ke khat khaw na doo mahpawt nim? a ti nah." 
Mark15:5 Tedae Jesuh loh a doo bakhaw voel pawt dongah Pilat te a ngaihmang. 
Mark15:6 Te vaengkah khotue takuem ah thongtla pakhat te a hoep tih ana hlah pah. 
Mark15:7 Te dongah rhalthoh rhoek neh a khoh Barabbas a ti te om. Anih loh olpungnah dongah ngawnnah a saii. 
Mark15:8 Hlangping te khaw cet uh tih a saii noek la amamih ham koe a bih uh. 
Mark15:9 Tedae Pilat loh amih te a doo tih, “Na ngaih uh nim, Judah manghai he nangmih ham kan hlah mako?” a ti nah." 
Mark15:10 Uethnetnah dongah khosoihham rhoek loh anih taengla a voeih uh te a ming. 
Mark15:11 Tedae khosoihham rhoek loh hlangping te a hueh tih Barabbas te amih ham lat a hlah sak. 
Mark15:12 Te dongah Pilat loh amih te a doo tih, “Te koinih Judah manghai la na khue uh te metla ka saii ham lae na ngaih uh?” koep a ti nah." 
Mark15:13 Te rhoek loh, “Anih te tai laeh, “tila koep pang uh." 
Mark15:14 Tedae Pilat loh amih taengah, “Mebang boethae nim a saii?” a ti nah. Amih long khaw, “Anih te tai laeh, “tila bung pang uh." 
Mark15:15 Pilat loh hlangping kolo la saii a ngaih dongah amih ham Barabbas te a hlah pah. Tedae Jesuh te a tam tih tai ham a paek. 
Mark15:16 Te phoeiah rhalkap rhoek loh Jesuh te khoboeiyung a om nah vongup khuila a khuen uh tih caem te a pum la a hueh uh. 
Mark15:17 Te phoeiah Jesuh te daidi neh a khuk uh tih hling rhuisam a vaeh uh te a khuem sak uh. 
Mark15:18 Te phoeiah, “Judah rhoek kah manghai na sading saeh, “tila Jesuh te kut koe a tuuk uh." 
Mark15:19 Te phoeiah a lu te capu neh a boh uh tih a timthoih uh. Khuklu te khaw cungkueng uh tih Jesuh te a bawk uh. 
Mark15:20 Jesuh te a tamdaeng uh phoeiah daidi te a pit pa uh. Te phoeiah a himbai te a bai sak uh tih tai hamla a khuen uh. 
Mark15:21 Te vaengah Kurena hlang Alexander neh Rufus kah a napa Simon lohma lamkah ha pawk tih pal khum rhoi dae Jesuh kah thinglam te koh sak ham khak a tanolh uh. 
Mark15:22 Te phoeiah Jesuh te Golgotha hmuen la a khuen uh. Tekah te lurhuh hmuen ni a thuingaih. 
Mark15:23 Te vaengah myrrh misurtui te Jesuh a paek uh dae doe pawh. 
Mark15:24 Jesuh te a tai uh phoeiah a himbai te a phen pa uh tih amamih khat khat loh a khuen ham te hmulung a naan uh. 
Mark15:25 Khonoek pathum a lo vaengah Jesuh te a tai uh. 
Mark15:26 Te phoeiah a paelnaehnah ming te a daek tih, “Judah Manghai,” la a khueh pah." 
Mark15:27 Anih neh dingca panit te khaw bantang ah pakhat banvoei ah pakhat a tai uh. 
Mark15:28 Aka van paitai loh anih te a soehsal uh tih a lu a hinghuen uh. 
Mark15:29 Te vaengah, “Aw bawkim te aka phae tih hnin thum ah aka sa," 
Mark15:30 Namah te khang uh lamtah thinglam lamkah rhum lah,” a ti na uh." 
Mark15:31 Khosoihham rhoek neh cadaek rhoek van long khaw a tamdaeng uh tih khat khat taengah, “A tloe rhoek te a khang dae amah aka khang uh thai pawh." 
Mark15:32 Israel manghai Khrih thinglam lamkah rhum laeh, te daengah ni kan hmuh uh vetih kan tangnah u eh,” a ti na uh. A taengkah a tai uh long khaw Jesuh te a thuithet." 
Mark15:33 Khonoek parhuk a pha neh diklai pum ah yinnah loh khonoek pako duela a thing. 
Mark15:34 Khovang khonoek pako vaengah Jesuh tah, “Eloi, Eloi lama sabakhthani ?” tila a ol a len la pang. Te tah, “Ka Pathen, Ka Pathen, balae tih kai nan phap,” te ni a thuingaih." 
Mark15:35 Te vaengah a taengkah aka pai khuikah a ngen loh a yaak uh tih, “Elijah a khue ke,” a ti uh." 
Mark15:36 Hlang pakhat aka yong loh caethum te yuthui neh a sul tih cungkui dongah a kaek. Te phoeiah Jesuh te a tul tih, “Hlah uh lamtah so uh lah sih, anih aka hla la Elijah ha pawk venim,” a ti." 
Mark15:37 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh ol a len la a huel tih pat. 
Mark15:38 Te vaengah bawkim kah hniyan te a soi lamloh a hmui due panit la pawn. 
Mark15:39 Anih hmai ah aka pai rhalboei long khaw a pat te a hmuh vaengah, “Hekah hlang tah Pathen Capa rhep ni,” a ti." 
Mark15:40 Te vaengah a hla lamkah aka dan huta rhoek khaw om uh. Amih khuiah Magadala Mary, a noe James neh Joses manu Mary neh Salome khaw om." 
Mark15:40 Te vaengah a hla lamkah aka dan huta rhoek khaw om uh. Amih khuiah Magadala Mary, a noe James neh Joses manu Mary neh Salome khaw om." 
Mark15:41 Amih tah Galilee ah a om vaeng lamkah loh Jesuh te a vai uh tih a khut uh. Te phoeiah a tloe, amah neh Jerusalem la aka luei rhoek khaw muep om om uh." 
Mark15:42 Te phoeiah hlaem a pha coeng tih rhuengphongnah om. Te dongah te tah huetnah la om. 
Mark15:43 Te vaengah Arimathea lamkah khoboei hlangcong Joseph te ha pawk. Anih tah amah long khaw Pathen kah ram te aka lamtawn la om. Pilat taengah ngaingaih la cet tih Jesuh kah rhok te a bih. 
Mark15:44 Jesuh a duek tarha te Pilat khaw a ngaihmang. Te dongah rhalboei te a khue tih, “Duek dingrhae pawn nim ca,” tila a dawt." 
Mark15:45 Rhalboei lamkah te a mingpha daengah rhok te Joseph a paek. 
Mark15:46 Te vaengah a himbai lai neh a hlak. Himbai te a yen tih phoeiah anih hlan ah a khueh. Te tah lungpang dongah a thuk tangtae la om. Te phoeiah tah hlan rhai te lungto a paluet thil. 
Mark15:47 Magadala Mary neh Joses manu Mary long khaw a khueh nah te a hmuh. 
Mark16:1 Sabbath poeng phoeiah Magadala Mary neh James manu Mary neh Salome loh bo-ul a lai tih boeipa te hluk ham la cet rhoi. 
Mark16:1 Sabbath poeng phoeiah Magadala Mary neh James manu Mary neh Salome loh bo-ul a lai tih boeipa te hluk ham la cet rhoi. 
Mark16:2 Sabbath phoeikah lamhmacuek vaengah yueya aih pueng dae phuel la a pawk vaengah tah khomik thoeng coeng. 
Mark16:3 Te vaengah amamih te, “Hlan rhai kah lungto te ulong nim mamih ham paluet ve?” a ti uh." 
Mark16:4 Tedae a sawt uh vaengah, lungto vik a paluet uh te a hmuh uh. Te te bahoeng a len dae la om dae ta." 
Mark16:5 Phuel khuila a kun uh vaengah hnikul a bok aka bai cadong pakhat tah bantang ben ah ana ngol te a hmuh uh tih a ngaihmang uh. 
Mark16:6 Tedae anih loh amih taengah, “Na ngaihmang uh boeh. A tai uh tangtae Nazareth Jesuh te na toem uh. Heah a om moenih thoo coeng. Anih a khueh nah hmuen so uh lah he." 
Mark16:7 Tedae, cet uh lamtah a hnukbang rhoek neh Peter taengah, 'Nangmih taengah a thui bangla Galilee la nangmih hmaiah lamhma coeng, teah te Jesuh na hmuh uh bitni, ' tila thui pa uh,” a ti nah." 
Mark16:8 Te vaengah amih te thuennah neh, ngaihmang bangla a om uh dongah phuel lamkah cet tih rhaelrham uh. A rhih uh dongah u taengah khaw thui uh pawh." 
Mark16:9 A thoh phoeikah Sabbath yarh lamhma cuek mincang ah tah Magadala Mary taengah lamhma la a phoe pah. Rhaithae parhih te anih lamkah ni a haek pah. 
Mark16:10 Anih te cet tih Jesuh taengah aka om tih a nguek neh aka rhap rhoek taengah puen. 
Mark16:11 Jesuh hing tih a hmuh te a yaak uh dae a hnalval tak uh. 
Mark16:12 Te phoeiah amih khuikah hlang panit te a kho la cet rhoi tih a pongpa rhoi vaengah mueimae a hloeh la a phoe pah. 
Mark16:13 Amih rhoi te cet tih a tloe rhoek taengah puen rhoi dae te rhoi te tangnah uh pawh. 
Mark16:14 Tedae hnuktloih la vael hlaikhat rhoek taengah a phoe pa tih amih kah hnalvalnah neh thinthahnah te a toel. Jesuh thoo coeng tih a hmuh uh lalah tangnah uh pawh. 
Mark16:15 Te phoeiah amih te, “Diklai pum ah cet uh lamtah suentae boeih taengah olthangthen te hoe uh." 
Mark16:16 Aka tangnah tih aka tuinuem tah daem vetih aka hnalval rhoek tah boe ni. 
Mark16:17 Te dongah miknoek tah aka tangnah rhoek thuep ni. Ka ming neh rhaithae a haek uh ni. Ol thai te a thui uh ni. 
Mark16:18 A kut neh rhul a tuuk uh ni. Sue khat khat a ok uh mai akhaw amih te tloh sak mahpawh. Aka tlo soah kut a tloeng uh vetih sading la om uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Mark16:19 Boeipa Jesuh loh amih a uen phoeiah, vaan la a loh tih Pathen kah bantang ah ngol." 
Mark16:20 Tekah rhoek te khaw khotomrhali la cet uh tih a hoe uh. Boeipa loh a bongyong dongah olka te miknoek neh a rhoih uh tih a cak sak uh. 
Luke1:1 Mamih taengah aka soep tangtae hno kah cilol te muep a thuep tih boelrhai vaengah," 
Luke1:2 oltak kah tueihyoeih la aka om rhoek neh a tongcuek lamloh loh aka hmu rhep rhoek loh mamih taengah m'paek uh vanbangla," 
Luke1:3 kai khaw khaeh khaeh boeih ka thuep koep tih hlangcong Theophilu nang taengah daek ham tluep ka poek. 
Luke1:4 Te daengah ni hiluepnah ol loh n'thuituen te khaw na ming eh. 
Luke1:5 Judea manghai Herod tue vaeng ah, Abijah rhoihui khosoih pakhat, a ming ah Zekhariah te om tih Elizabeth aka ming nah Aaron canu te a yuu nah." 
Luke1:5 Judea manghai Herod tue vaeng ah, Abijah rhoihui khosoih pakhat, a ming ah Zekhariah te om tih Elizabeth aka ming nah Aaron canu te a yuu nah." 
Luke1:6 Pathen hmaiah a dueng la bok om rhoi. Boeipa kah rhilam neh olpaek cungkuem dongah cuemthuek la pongpa rhoi. 
Luke1:7 Tedae Elizabeth tah cakol la om tih camoe a om kolla a kum khaw patong la bok om rhoi coeng. 
Luke1:8 Pathen hmaiah a khosoih vaengkah bangla anih rhoihui te aitlaeng loh a pha. 
Luke1:9 Khosoih kah khosing bangla, Boeipa kah bawkim khuiah kun tih hmueihphum ham a yo." 
Luke1:10 Bo-ul tue vaengah pilnam khuikah aka om rhaengpuei boeih khaw poeng ah thangthui uh. 
Luke1:11 Te vaengah Boeipa kah puencawn tah a taengah a phoe pah tih bo-ul hmueihtuk kah bantang ah pai. 
Luke1:12 Zekhariah loh a thuen doela a sawt dongah rhihnah loh anih a tlak thil. 
Luke1:13 Tedae anih te puencawn pakhat loh, “Zekhariah rhih boeh, nang kah rhenbihnah te a hnatun coeng dongah na yuu Elizabeth loh nang ham capa pakhat han cun vetih, a ming te Johan la na khue ni." 
Luke1:14 Nang ham omngaihnah neh kohoenah la om vetih anih kah rhuirhong dongah boeih omngaih uh ni. 
Luke1:15 Boeipa hmaiah a len la om vetih, misurtui neh yu te o loengloeng mahpawh. A manu bung khuiah a om vaengah Mueihla Cim neh baetawt ni." 
Luke1:16 Israel ca rhoek te a Boeipa Pathen taengla muep a mael puei ni. 
Luke1:17 Anih tah a hmaiah Elijah kah mueihla neh thaomnah dongah lamhma ni. Pa rhoek kah thinko te ca rhoek taengla, lokhak rhoek te aka dueng lungcueinah dongla mael ni. Rhoekbah tangtae pilnam tah Boeipa ham a hmoel ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:18 Te phoeiah Zekhariah loh puencawn taengah, “Hekah he Ba nen lae ka ming eh? Kai tah patong la ka om coeng tih ka yuu khaw a kum te ham coeng,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:19 Te dongah puencawn loh anih te a doo tih, “Kai tah Pathen hmaiah aka pai Gabriel ni, nang taengah he rhoek he phong ham neh thui ham n'tueih." 
Luke1:20 Tedae kai ol te na tangnah pawt dongah he he a soep nah khohnin duela olmueh la na om vetih na cal thai mahpawh ne. Amah tue ah ka ol te soep bit ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:21 Te vaengah Zekhariah te aka lamso pilnam a om dongah bawkim khuiah a di te a ngaihmang uh. 
Luke1:22 Ha thoeng vaengah tah amih te voek thai voel pawh. Te dongah bawkim khuiah a mangthui a hmuh coeng tila a ming uh. Te dongah Zekhriah loh amih taengah a lu a thuk tih olmueh la phat om. 
Luke1:23 Amah kah thothueng khohnin te a cup la a om phoeiah tah amah im la cet. 
Luke1:24 Te khohnin phoeiah a yuu Elizabeth te vawn tih amah khaw hla nga thuh uh. 
Luke1:25 “Boeipa kai ham hnin at neh a saii tangloeng coeng, te nen ni hlang lakli kai dogkah hnaelnah te khoe hamla n'hip,” a ti." 
Luke1:26 Hla rhuk dongah Pathen taeng lamkah puencawn Gabriel te Galilee khopuei, a ming ah Nazareth la a tueih." 
Luke1:27 David imkhui kah hlang pakhat, a ming ah Joseph ham te oila a bae pah. Oila ming tah Mary ni." 
Luke1:28 Te phoeiah huta taengla kun tih, “A lungvat tangtae aw, omngaih lah, Boeipa tah nang taengah om pai,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:29 Tedae Mary te tekah olka dongah konglong ngaihit la om tih te toidalnah loh metla a om eh tila a poek. 
Luke1:30 Puencawn loh anih te, “Mary rhih boeh, Pathen taengkah lungvatnah na dang coeng te." 
Luke1:31 Te dongah bungvawn neh na yom tih capa na cun vaengah a ming te Jesuh sui ne. 
Luke1:32 Anih tah tanglue la om vetih Khohni capa tila a khue ni. Boeipa Pathen loh anih te a napa David kah ngolkhoel te a paek ni. 
Luke1:33 Jakob im ah kumhal due manghai pawn ni. A ram te khaw bawt ti om mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:34 Te vaengah Mary loh puencawn taengah, “Hekah he metlam a om eh? tongpa khaw ka ming moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:35 Te dongah anih te puencawn loh a doo tih, “Mueihla Cim loh nang n'thoeng thil vetih, Khohni kah thaomnah te nang m'muek sak ni. Te dongah na cun te aka cim Pathen Capa tila a khue bal ni." 
Luke1:36 Te phoeiah namah huiko Elizabeth te a patong soiah, camoe a yom van coeng ke. Te dongah cakol la a khue te tahae ah hla rhuk lo coeng." 
Luke1:37 Pathen kah olka boeih long tah a tloel nah moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:38 Te dongah Mary loh, “Boeipa kah salnu he, na olka bangla kai taengah om saeh,” a ti nah. Te phoeiah puencawn tah anih taeng lamloh nong." 
Luke1:39 Mary tah tekah khohnin ah thoo tih tlang kah Judah kho ah thahluenah neh cet. 
Luke1:40 Zekhariah im te khuiah kun tih Elizabeth te a voek. 
Luke1:41 Mary kah toidalnah te Elizabeth loh a yaak vaengah a bung khuikah cahni te soipet tih Elizabeth khaw Mueihla Cim neh baetawt. 
Luke1:42 Te vaengah tamlung neh pang khungdaeng tih, “Nang tah huta rhoek lakliah na yoethen coeng tih, nang bung kah a thaih te a yoethen coeng." 
Luke1:43 Kai aih he metlam nim, ka boeipa kah a manu kai taengla ha pawk tarha he?" 
Luke1:44 Nang kah toidalnah ol te ka hna khuiah a kun vaengah tah, ka bung khuikah cahni loh kohoenah neh soipet he." 
Luke1:45 Te dongah Boeipa loh a thui te hmakhahnah om ni tila aka tangnah tah a yoethen,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:46 Mary long khaw, “Boeipa te ka hinglu loh a oep." 
Luke1:47 Ka mueihla tah ka khangkung Pathen dongah hlampan coeng. 
Luke1:48 A salnu mathoe he a paelki thil coeng dongah tahae lamkah tah cadil boeih loh kai ng'uem uh pawn ni. 
Luke1:49 Kai taengah thaom tloe la a saii dongah, a ming tah cim pai saeh." 
Luke1:50 A rhennah tah amah aka rhih rhoek kah cadil cahma ham ni.
