Luke1:51 A ban neh a thaomnah a saii, a thinko kopoek ah buhueng aka pom te a taekyak." 
Luke1:52 Mangpa rhoek a ngolkhoel lamloh a hlak tih, tlayae rhoek te a pomsang." 
Luke1:53 Bungpong rhoek te hno then neh a hah sak tih, khuehtawn rhoek a tlongtlai la a tueih." 
Luke1:54 Boeipa loh a rhennah te anih taengah a khueh tih, a oep te a huiko neh imben loh a yaak vaengah anih te a omngaih puei uh." 
Luke1:55 A pa rhoek taengah a thui bangla, Abraham neh a tiingan taengah kumhal duela a khueh,” a ti." 
Luke1:56 Mary te Elizabeth neh hla thum tluk hmaih a naeh phoeiah amah im la bal. 
Luke1:57 Elizabeth te a om tue a pha coeng tih capa a cun. 
Luke1:58 Boeipa loh a rhennah te anih taengah a khueh tih, a oep te a huiko neh imben loh a yaak vaengah anih te a omngaih puei uh." 
Luke1:59 Khohnin hnin rhet a lo vaengah camoe te yahvinrhet ham cet uh. Te vaengah anih te a napa ming Zekhariah la a khue uh. 
Luke1:60 Tedae a manu loh a doo tih, “Moenih, Johan la a khue ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke1:61 Te vaengah anih taengah, “Hekah ming la a khue te na cako khuiah a om pawt ah,” a ti na uh." 
Luke1:62 Camoe metla khue a ngaih poek tila a napa te a yavaih uh. 
Luke1:63 Te vaengah cabael a hoe tih a daek hatah, “A ming tah Johan ni,” a ti tih boeih a ngaihmang uh." 
Luke1:64 Te vaengah a hmui, a lai te khaw pahoi a khui pah dongah cal tih Pathen te a uem." 
Luke1:65 Te vaengah amih tolvael rhoek boeih te rhihnah loh a pai thil. Te dongah hekah olka loh Judah tlang tom te boeih a ngae uh. 
Luke1:66 Aka ya boeih loh a thinko khuiah a dueh uh tih, “Hekah camoe he metlam nim a om ve?” a ti uh. Tedae Boeipa kah kut loh anih te a om puei." 
Luke1:67 A napa Zekhariah tah Mueihla Cim neh a baetawt. 
Luke1:68 Te dongah a olphong neh, “A pilnam te a hip tih tlannah a saii dongah, Israel Pathen Boeipa tah uemom pai saeh." 
Luke1:69 A taengom David im khuiah mamih ham khangnah ki a thoh sak. 
Luke1:70 Khosuen lamloh a tonghma ciim rhoek kah ka dongah a thui vanbangla," 
Luke1:71 Mamih kah rhal rhoek neh mamih aka hmuhuet rhoek boeih kut lamkah khangnah," 
Luke1:72 a pa rhoek taengah rhennah tueng sak ham neh a paipi ciim te poek sak ham," 
Luke1:73 a pa Abraham taengah olhlo neh a toemngam te mamih paek ham," 
Luke1:74 amah taengah thothueng hamla rhal kut lamloh hoel n'hlawt coeng. 
Luke1:75 mamih kah khohnin rhoek boeih te amah hmaiah duengnah neh cimcaihnah ham ni. 
Luke1:76 Te phoeiah, camoe, nang tah Khohni tonghma la n'khue vetih a longpuei rhoekbah ham Boeipa hmaiah na lamhma ni." 
Luke1:77 Amih kah tholh khodawkngainah rhangneh a pilnam taengah khangnah mingnah a paek ni. 
Luke1:78 Mamih Pathen kah rhehnah om. Te nen te a sang lamkah khothoeng loh mamih n'hip. 
Luke1:79 Dueknah mueihlip neh yinnah khuiah aka ngol rhoek ham te a tue vetih, mamih kah kho te ngaimongnah longpuei la hoihaeng ham ni,” a ti." 
Luke1:80 Camoe tah rhoeng tih mueihla ah khaw rhaang. Te dongah Israel taengah a phoenah khohnin duela khosoek ah om. 
Luke2:1 A khohnin a pha vaengah Kaisar Augustus taengkah oltloek lunglai pum a pat. 
Luke2:2 Te hlangmi soepnah tah Syria Kurenius kah a taem vaengah lamhmacuek la om. 
Luke2:3 Te dongah hlang boeih loh minghlum ham amah kho la rhip cet uh. 
Luke2:4 Te vaengah Joseph khaw Galilee, Nazareth kho lamloh Judea kah Bethlehem la a khue David khopuei la cet. Anih te David imkhui kah nurhui pahrhui la om." 
Luke2:4 Te vaengah Joseph khaw Galilee, Nazareth kho lamloh Judea kah Bethlehem la a khue David khopuei la cet. Anih te David imkhui kah nurhui pahrhui la om." 
Luke2:5 Minghlum ham vaengah amah ham a bae Mary te pumrhih la om pueng. 
Luke2:6 A om rhoi kuelhuelh ah a caom tue loh a kae. 
Luke2:7 Tedae a capa camingomthang te a cun vaengah tah impahnah. 
Luke2:8 Te vaengah amah tekah pingpang ah tudawn rhoek om uh. A tuping te khoyin ah thongim la a khoem uh tih a rhaeh thil uh. 
Luke2:9 Te vaengah Boeipa kah puencawn tah amih taengah a phoe pah. Amih te Boeipa kah thangpomnah loh a tue dongah rhihnah neh bahoeng a rhih uh. 
Luke2:10 Tedae amih te puencawn loh, “Rhih uh boeh, pilnam boeih taengah aka om ham omngaihnah tanglue te nangmih taengah olthangthen kan thui he." 
Luke2:11 Tihnin ah nangmih ham khangkung om coeng. Anih tah David khopuei ah Khrih Boeipa la om coeng. 
Luke2:12 Nangmih ham miknoek pakhat om vetih, cahni te a yol phoeiah khongduk dongah a yalh te na hmuh uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke2:13 Te vaengah puencawn te vaan caempuei rhaengpuei loh tarha a om puei tih Pathen te a thangthen uh. 
Luke2:14 Te vaengah, “Pathen te a sangkoek ah thangpomnah om saeh, diklai ah rhoepnah neh hlang rhoek soah a kolonah om saeh,” a ti uh." 
Luke2:15 A om van bangla puencawn rhoek tah amih taeng lamloh vaan la cet uh. Tudawn rhoek loh khat neh khat taengah, “Bethlehem la cet pawn sih lamtah olthang aka thoeng he so uh sih. Te tah Boeipa long ni mamih ham a phoe sak,” a ti uh." 
Luke2:16 Te phoeiah, tatloe la cet uh tih Mary, Joseph neh khongduk dong ah aka yalh cahni te a hmuh uh." 
Luke2:17 A hmuh uh vaengah, te camoe kawng neh amih taengah a thui olka te a doek uh." 
Luke2:18 Amih taengah tudawn rhoek loh a thui te aka ya rhoek boeih tah a ngaihmang uh. 
Luke2:19 Tedae Mary loh tekah olka te boeih a kuem tih a thinko ah a khing a mong. 
Luke2:20 Tudawn rhoek tah amih taengah a thui pah bangla boeih a hmuh uh. A yaak uh dongah te Pathen a thangpom uh tih a thangthen uh phoeiah bal uh. 
Luke2:21 Hnin rhet cup coeng tih, camoe te yahvin a rhet vaengah tah a ming te Jesuh a sui. Te tah bung khuikah a yom hlanah puencawn kah a sui pah coeng ni." 
Luke2:22 Moses kah olkhueng bangla amih kah imcim khohnin te a pha vaengah Jesuh te Boeipa taengah nawn ham Jerusalem la a khuen rhoi. 
Luke2:23 Boeipa kah olkhueng dongah a daek bangla bung aka va tongpa a boeih tah Boeipa ham cimcaih la a khue ni. 
Luke2:24 Te dongah Boeipa kah olkhueng dongah, “Vahu phiknit mai khaw, vahui ca panit mai khaw,” a ti bangla hmueih te a paek rhoi." 
Luke2:25 Te vaengah hlang pakhat, a ming ah Simeon te Jerusalem ah khoem om. Tekah hlang tah dueng tih cuep. Te dongah Israel kah thaphohnah te a lamtawn tih Mueihla Cim loh anih a om thil." 
Luke2:26 Mueihla Cim loh anih taengah, “Boeipa kah Khrih te a hmuh hlan atah dueknah na hmu mahpawh, “tila a mangthui tangtae te om." 
Luke2:27 Simeon te mueihla loh bawkim khuila a pawk puei. Te vaengah camoe Jesuh amah te olkhueng kah khosing la saii ham a manu pana loh a khuen. 
Luke2:28 Te phoeiah Simeon loh a kut dongah a doe tih Pathen te a uem. 
Luke2:29 Te vaengah, “Boeikung na sal he na olthui bangla ngaimongnah neh nan hlah coeng." 
Luke2:30 Namah kah khangnah te ka mik loh a hmuh coeng. 
Luke2:31 Te ni pilnam tom kah mikhmuh ah na tawn pah. 
Luke2:32 Vangnah he namtom a pumphoenah la, thangpomnah te na pilnam Israel hamla om coeng,” a ti." 
Luke2:33 Camoe kawng a thui soah a napa neh a manu tah a ngaihmang rhoi. 
Luke2:34 Simeon loh amih te yoethen a paek tih a manu Mary taeng ah, “Anih he Israel khuiah a yet kah a bungnah neh thohkoepnah ham neh boekoek miknoek la a khueh coeng he." 
Luke2:35 Namah neh namah khaw na hinglu thunglang loh n'rhaih ni. Te daengah ni thinko kah poeknah te poeng a pumphoe eh,” a ti nah." 
Luke2:36 Te vaengah Asher koca kah Phanuel canu tonghmanu Anna om tih a kum khaw muep patong coeng. Anih he a hula lamloh a va neh kum rhih bueng hing rhoi. 
Luke2:37 Te phoeiah kum sawmrhet kum li hil nuhmai la om. Anih tah bawkim te hlah tlaih kolla khoyin khothaih yaehnah neh, rhenbihnah neh tho a thueng." 
Luke2:38 Pathen uem tue a pai kuelhuelh vaengah Jerusalem kah tlannah aka lamtawn rhoek boeih ham camoe kawng te a thui pah. 
Luke2:39 Boeipa kah olkhueng bangla boeih a soep vaengah te amah kho Galilee, Nazareth la bal rhoi." 
Luke2:40 Camoe tah a rhoeng vaengah rhaang tih cueihnah neh bae. Pathen kah lungvatnah long khaw a om thil. 
Luke2:41 Kum takuem yoom khotue ah a manu napa te Jerusalem la cet. 
Luke2:42 Kum hlainit a lo vaengah khotue kah khosing bangla amih te cet uh. 
Luke2:43 Khohnin te cup tih a a bal uh vaengah cadong Jesuh tah Jerusalem ah uelh tih a manu napa loh ming pawh. 
Luke2:44 Jesuh te lambong khuiah om tila a poek uh dae hnin at long caeh phoeiah tah a huiko neh a hmat taengah a tlap rhoi. 
Luke2:45 A hmuh rhoi pawt dongah anih tlap ham Jerusalem la mael rhoi. 
Luke2:46 A thum khohnin a pha phoeiah Jesuh te bawkim khuikah saya rhoek kah a laklung ah ana ngol, amih taengah a hnatun tih amih ana dawt te a hmuh rhoi." 
Luke2:47 Anih kah yakmingnah neh ollannah boeih te aka ya rhoek boeih tah limlum uh. 
Luke2:48 Jesuh te a hmuh rhoi vaengah let rhoi tih a manu loh, “Ka capa, balae tih kaimih rhoi tlam he nang khueh? Na pa neh kai loh nang kan toem rhoi tih n'yuek sut coeng he,” a ti nah." 
Luke2:49 Te vaengah amih rhoi te, “Balae kai nan toem rhoi? A pa im ah ka om ham a kuek te na ming rhoi mahnim?” a ti nah." 
Luke2:50 Tedae amih rhoi taengah a thui pah olka te amih rhoi loh a hmuhming rhoi moenih. 
Luke2:51 Te phoeiah amih rhoi taengah cet tih Nazareth la pawk uh. A taengah boengai la om tih olka te a manu loh a thinko ah boeih a khoem. 
Luke2:52 Jesuh tah cueihnah neh pumrho ah rhoeng tih Pathen neh hlang taengah lungvatnah a dang. 
Luke3:1 Tiberius Kaisar a manghai kum hlainga vaengah Judea te Pontius Pilat loh a taem tih, Herod te Galilee ah khoboei la om. A manuca Philip tah Ituraea neh Trakhoniti kho kah khoboei la om. Lusania tah Abilene kah khoboei la om." 
Luke3:1 Tiberius Kaisar a manghai kum hlainga vaengah Judea te Pontius Pilat loh a taem tih, Herod te Galilee ah khoboei la om. A manuca Philip tah Ituraea neh Trakhoniti kho kah khoboei la om. Lusania tah Abilene kah khoboei la om." 
Luke3:2 Annas neh Kaiaphas a khosoihham la a om vaengah Pathen kah ol tah khosoek kah Zekhariah capa Johan taengla thoeng. 
Luke3:3 Te phoeiah Jordan pingpang te boeih a pha tih tholh khodawkngainah ham yutnah baptistma kawng a hoe. 
Luke3:4 Tonghma Isaiah kah ol te cabu dongah ana daek sut bangla, khosoek kah pang ol loh, “Boeipa kah longpuei te rhoekbah uh lamtah, a caehlong te a dueng la saii uh." 
Luke3:5 Soklong te boeih a et vetih, tlang neh mol khaw boeih a tlarhoel sak ni. Aka kawn te a dueng la, long mueng khaw long tlaai la om ni." 
Luke3:6 Te vaengah pumsa boeih loh Pathen kah khangnah a hmuh ni. 
Luke3:7 Te dongah anih kah a nuem hamla aka thoeng hlangping, “Rhulthae rhoek kah cadil rhoek, kosi aka tawn uh te rhaelrham tak ham unim nangmih aka tueng?" 
Luke3:8 Te dongah yutnah neh a tiing la a thaih te saii uh. Na khuiah, ' Abraham te pa la ka khueh,' ti koeloe boeh. Khohni tah hekah lungto lamloh Abraham ca rhoek thoh thai te nangmih ham kan thui." 
Luke3:9 Tedae hai tah thing yung ah oepsoeh la a khueh van coeng. Thaih tak la aka thai pawh thing tah boeih a vung tih hmai ah a pup,” a ti nah." 
Luke3:10 Te dongah amah te hlangping loh a dawt tih, “Te koinih balae ka saii uh eh?” a ti nah." 
Luke3:11 Te dongah amih te a doo tih, “Angki yungnit aka khueh loh aka khueh pawt te doedan saeh. Te vanbangla caak aka khueh long khaw saii van saeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke3:12 Te vaengah mangmucoi rhoek khaw nuem hamla ha pawk uh tih anih taengah, “Saya, balae ka saii uh eh?” a ti uh." 
Luke3:13 Te dongah amih te, “Nangmih ng'uen phoeiah a yet la khoboe boeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke3:14 Anih te rhalkap rhoek long khaw a dawt uh tih, “Kaimih tah balae ka saii uh van eh?” a ti uh. Amih te khaw, “Hlang te hihham uh boeh, huttet uh boeh. Namamih kah buhcun neh rhaemhal uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke3:15 Pilnam kah a lamso vanbangla amamih kah thinko ah Johan te boeih a thui uh tih, “Anih he Khrih coini,” a ti uh." 
Luke3:16 Johan loh a doo tih, “Nangmih he kai loh tui dongah kan nuem dae kai lakah aka tlung te ha pawk coeng. Anih kah khokhom rhui hlam ham pataeng aka koih la ka om moenih. Anih loh nangmih te Mueihla Cim dongah hmai neh n'nuem ni." 
Luke3:17 A kut dongkah cangcopcung loh a cangtilhmuen a coeh vetih cang te a khai khuila a sang ni. Tedae canghi tah aka duek pawh hmai neh a boeih hoeh ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke3:18 Te dongah pilnam te a tloe neh muep a thaphoh tih olthangthen a phong pah. 
Luke3:19 Tedae Herod a khoboei vaengah a mana yuu Herodias kawng dongah Herod loh boethae a saii boeih te Johan loh a toeltham. 
Luke3:20 Te te boeih a tungsaep thil dongah Johan te thongim ah a uup. 
Luke3:21 Pilnam te boeih a nuem vaengah Jesuh khaw a nuem tih a thangthui hatah vaan te ong uh. 
Luke3:22 Te phoeiah Mueihla Cim te a pumrho neh vahu kah mueimae bangla suntlak thil. Te vaengah, “Nang tah ka capa thintlo la na om tih, nang taengah ka lungtlun, “tila vaan lamkah ol ha thoeng." 
Luke3:23 Jesuh loh amah bibi a tong vaengah a kum sawmthum tluk lo coeng. Poek vaengah Heli capa Joseph kah a ca bangla om. 
Luke3:24 Tedae Heli te Matthat capa, Matthat te Levi capa, Levi te Melkhi capa, Melkhi te Janna capa, Janna te Joseph capa," 
Luke3:25 Joseph te Mattathias capa, Mattathias te Amos capa, Amos te Nahum capa, Nahum te Esli capa, Esli te Naggai capa," 
Luke3:26 Naggai te Maath capa, Maath te Mattathias capa, Mattathias te Shimei capa, Shimei te Joseph capa, Joseph te Joda capa," 
Luke3:27 Joda te Joanan capa, Joanan te Rhesa capa, Rhesa te Jerubbabel capa, Zerubbabel te Shealtiel capa, Shealtiel te Neri capa," 
Luke3:28 Neri te Melkhi capa, Melkhi te Addi capa, Addi te Kosam capa, Kosam te Elmadam capa, Elmadam te Er capa," 
Luke3:29 Er te Jose capa, Jose te Eliezer capa, Eliezer te Jorim capa, Jorim te Matthat capa, Matthat te Levi capa," 
Luke3:30 Levi te Simeon capa, Simeon te Judah capa, Judah te Joseph capa, Joseph te Jonan te Eliakim capa," 
Luke3:31 Eliakim te Melea capa, Melea te Menna capa, Menna te Mattatha capa, Mattatha te Nathan capa, Nathan te David capa," 
Luke3:32 David te Jesse capa, Jesse te Obed capa, Obed te Boaz capa, Boaz te Sala capa, Sala te Nahshon capa," 
Luke3:33 Nahshon te Amminadab capa, Amminadab te Admin capa, Admin te Aram capa, Arni te Hezron capa, Hezron te Perez capa, Perez te Judah capa," 
Luke3:34 Judah te Jakob capa, Jakob te Isaak capa, Isaak te Abraham capa, Abraham te Terah capa, Terah te Nakhaw capa," 
Luke3:35 Nakhaw te Saruk capa, Saruk te Rhagau capa, Rhagau te Phalek capa, Phalek te Eber capa, Eber te Shelah capa," 
Luke3:36 Shelah te Kainan capa, Kainan te Arpakshad capa, Arpakshad te Shem capa, Shem te Noah capa, Noah te Lamekh capa," 
Luke3:37 Lamekh te Methuselah capa, Mehtuselah te Enok capa, Enok te Jared capa, Jared te Maleleel capa, Maleleel te Kainan capa," 
Luke3:38 Kainan te Enos capa, Enos te Seth capa, Seth te Adam capa, Adam te Pathen capa la om." 
Luke4:1 Jesuh tah Jordan lamloh Mueihla Cim a baetawt la mael tih Mueihla loh khosoek la a khuen. 
Luke4:2 Rhaithae loh khohnin sawmli a noemcai. Tekah khohnin vaengah caak pakhat khaw a caak kolla bungpong neh a thok sak. 
Luke4:3 Te vaengah anih te rhaithae loh, “Pathen capa la na om atah, lungto he voek lamtah buh la poeh saeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:4 Te dongah anih te Jesuh loh, “' Hlang long he buh bueng neh hing boel saeh, ' tila a daek coeng ta,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:5 Te phoeiah anih te a khuen tih a tue kolkalh rhuet ah lunglai kah ram rhoek te boeih a tueng. 
Luke4:6 Te vaengah anih te rhaithae loh, “Hekah saithainah boeih neh a thangpomnah he nang kam pae eh, kai taengah m'paek coeng dongah ka ngaih te tah ka paek mai." 
Luke4:7 Te dongah, nang khaw kai taengah na bakop atah nang hamla boeih om bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:8 Tedae Jesuh loh anih te a doo tih, “A daek tangtae coeng ni, BOEIPA na Pathen mah bawk lamtah amah bueng mah thothueng,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:9 Te phoeiah anih te Jerusalem la a khuen tih bawkim kah tlungsoi ah a pai sak. Te vaengah anih te, “Pathen capa la na om atah, he lamloh namah te cungpung thuk." 
Luke4:10 A daek tangtae vanbangla, amah kah puencawn rhoek te nang aka khoem ham namah yueng a uen bitni." 
Luke4:11 Na kho te lungto dongah na tongtah ve a ti dongah nang te a kut neh n'dom uh bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:12 Tedae anih Jesuh loh a doo tih, “A thui coeng te ta, BOEIPA na Pathen te noemcai boeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:13 Rhaithae loh a noemcainah te boeih a soep coeng dongah a tuetang a pha hlan duela anih taeng lamloh nong. 
Luke4:14 Jesuh tah Mueihla kah thaomnah neh Galilee la mael. Te vaengah anih kah olthang te te rhoek pingpang tom ah cet. 
Luke4:15 Amamih kah tunim ah khaw a thuituen tih hlang boeih loh a thangpom. 
Luke4:16 Te phoeiah aka khut a om nah Nazareth la pawk. Tedae a sainoek bangla Sabbath hnin ah tunim khuila kun tih ca tae hamla pai. 
Luke4:17 Te vaengah anih te tonghma Isaiah kah cabu te a doe uh. Cabu te a hlam vaengah tekah hmuen ah a daek tangtae aka om te a hmuh; 
Luke4:18 BOEIPA Mueihla loh kai n'om thil tih khodaeng te olthangthen phong pah ham kai ng'koelh coeng. Hlangsol taengah khodawkngainah, mikdael taengah khoval te hoe pah ham, a haemtaek rhoek te khodawkngainah khuila tueih ham," 
Luke4:19 BOEIPA kah kum uem om te hoe ham kai n'tueih coeng. 
Luke4:20 Cabu te a awn tih tueihyoeih taengla a mael phoeiah ngol. Te dongah tunim ah aka om rhoek kah a mik loh anih te boeih a hmaitang uh. 
Luke4:21 Te dongah amih te, “Tihnin ah olcim he nangmih hna khuiah soep coeng,” pahoi a ti nah." 
Luke4:22 Te vaengah anih te boeih a oep uh tih a ka lamkah aka thoeng lungvatnah olka dongah a ngaihmang uh. Te dongah, “Joseph capa moenih a he?,” a ti uh." 
Luke4:23 Te dongah amih te, “Siboei la, 'Namah mah hoeih vaikhai,' a ti, nuettahnah he kai taengah na thui uh tangkhuet. Kapernaum ah aka om te boeih ka yaak uh coeng, he khaw namah tolrhum ah saii, ' na ti uh." 
Luke4:24 Tedae nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, Amah tolrhum ah a uem uh tonghma a om moenih." 
Luke4:25 Nangmih te oltak ni kan thui. Elijah tue vaengah Israel khuiah nuhmai muep om. Te vaengah vaan ke kum thum hla rhuk a khaih tih, khokha loh diklai pum ah muep om." 
Luke4:26 Te vaengah Sidoni Zarephath kah nuhmai nu taeng pawt atah amih taengla Elijah a tueih moenih. 
Luke4:27 Tonghma Elisha tue vaengah Israel khuiah hmaibae muep om dae, Syria Naaman pawt atah amih a cing pah moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:28 Te rhoek te a yaak uh vaengah tunim khuikah rhoek tah a thinsanah neh boeih hah uh. 
Luke4:29 Te dongah thoo uh tih Jesuh te kho voel la a haek uh. Anih te tulh ham amamih kah a sak khopuei tlang kah pango la a khuen uh. 
Luke4:30 Tedae amih te a laklung ah a va tih cet. 
Luke4:31 Te phoeiah Galilee khopuei, Kapernaum la suntla thuk tih, Sabbath vaengah amih aka thuituen la pahoi om." 
Luke4:32 A ol tah saithainah neh a om dongah a thuituennah te a ngaihmang uh. 
Luke4:33 Te vaengah rhaithae kah rhalawt mueihla aka kaem hlang te tunim khuiah om tih ol ue la pang. 
Luke4:34 “Aya ! Nazareth Jesuh, nang taeng neh kaimih taengah balae aka om? Kaimih aka poci sak ham nim na pawk? Nang te kan ming ta, Pathen kah hlangcim la na om ta,” a ti." 
Luke4:35 Tedae anih te Jesuh loh a ho tih, “Paa lamtah anih lamloh cet,” a ti nah. Te dongah anih te rhaithae loh a laklung la a voeih tih a tloh kolla anih te a caeh tak." 
Luke4:36 Te vaengah ngaihmangnah loh boeih a thoeng thil uh. Te dongah khat neh khat te voek uh tih, “Mebang olka nim he, saithainah neh a thaomnah dongah rhalawt mueihla rhoek a tueih tih, a caeh uh mai he,” a ti uh." 
Luke4:37 Te dongah Jesuh kah olhum tah te rhoekg pingpang kah a hmuen boeih la pawk. 
Luke4:38 Tunim lamloh thoo tih Simon im la kun. Te vaengah Simon masae te satloh om tih a nan malcal. Te dongah anih kongah Jesuh te a dawt uh. 
Luke4:39 Anih te a pai thil tih tloh te a ho daengah anih te tloh loh a hlah. Te dongah pahoi thoo tih amih te a kok. 
Luke4:40 Khomik a tlak vaengah tlohtat cungkuem neh tattloel la aka om boeih te Jesuh taengla a khuen uh. Amih pakhat rhip te kut a tloeng thil tih amih te a hoeih sak. 
Luke4:41 A yet taeng lamkah rhaithae rhoek khaw nong uh. Te phoeiah pang uh tih, “Nang tah Pathen capa ni,” a ti nah. Anih te Khrih ni tila a ming uh dongah amih te a ho tih thui sak voel pawh." 
Luke4:42 Khothaih a pha vaengah khoe uh tih khosoek hmuen te a paan. Tedae hlangping loh anih te a toem uh tih anih te a paan uh. Te phoeiah amih taeng lamkah a nong pawt ham Jesuh te a tuuk uh. 
Luke4:43 Tedae amih te, “Pathen kah ram te kho tloe rhoek taengah khaw ka thui ham a kuek dongah ni n'tueih,” a ti nah." 
Luke4:44 Te dongah Judea ah om tih tunim ah olthangthen a hoe. 
Luke4:44 Te dongah Judea ah om tih tunim ah olthangthen a hoe. 
Luke5:1 A om rhuet vaengah anih te hlangping loh a et tih Pathen kah olka a hnatun uh. Te vaengah anih tah Gennesaret tuili taengah om tih pai. 
Luke5:2 Te vaengah tuili kah aka pai lawng panit te a hmuh. Tedae te lamkah tuihoi rhoek tah lawk suk la khoe uh coeng. Te phoeiah ngol tih lawng dong lamkah loh hlangping te a thuituen. 
Luke5:3 Te phoeiah lawng pakhat khuila kun. Te tah Simon kah la a om dongah, “Lan lamkah bet thoeih dae,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:4 A thui a bawt van neh Simon te, “A dung la thoeih lamtah nga tuknah ham na lawk te voei lah,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:5 Tedae Simon loh a doo tih, “Boeipa, khoyin khing ah ka thakthae uh tih ka dang uh moenih. Tedae namah ol dongah lawk te ka voei eh,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:6 A saii uh tangloeng vaengah nga hol te muep a kol uh tih a lawk khaw a va pah. 
Luke5:7 Te dongah lawng tloe dongkah a pueipo rhoek te a cavaih uh tih amih talong ham ha pawk uh. Tedae ha pawk uh vaengah lawng rhoi te bae coeng tih dalh buek uh. 
Luke5:8 Simon Peter loh a hmuh vaengah Jesuh te khuklu a bakop thil tih, “Kai taeng lamloh nong laeh, kai he hlang tholh ni BOEIPA,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:9 A tuuk uh bangla a nga tuknah soah amah neh a taengkah rhoek boeih te ngaihmangnah loh a tuuk. 
Luke5:10 Simon kah a pueipo la aka om Zebedee ca rhoi James neh Johan khaw a ngaihmang rhoi van. Te phoeiah Simon te Jesuh loh, “Rhih boeh tahae lamkah tah hlang aka tu la na om pawn ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:10 Simon kah a pueipo la aka om Zebedee ca rhoi James neh Johan khaw a ngaihmang rhoi van. Te phoeiah Simon te Jesuh loh, “Rhih boeh tahae lamkah tah hlang aka tu la na om pawn ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:11 Lawng rhoek te lan la a thak phoeiah boeih a toeng uh tih Jesuh te a vai uh. 
Luke5:12 Kho pakhat ah a om vaengah hlang pakhat tah hmaibae hoeng la tarha om. Jesuh te a hmuh vaengah a hmai long bakop. Te vaengah, “BOEIPA na ngaih atah kai nan cim sak thai,” a ti nah tih a bih." 
Luke5:13 Anih te kut a yueng doela a taek tih, “Ka ngaih ta, cim saeh,” a ti nah. Te dongah anih te hmaibae loh pahoi a nong tak." 
Luke5:14 Tedae anih te Jesuh loh, “Thui boeh ne, tedae cet lamtah namah te khosoih taengah moe pah, na cimcaihnah dongah Moses loh ng'uen bangla nawn lamtah amih taengah laipai la om saeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:15 Tedae anih kah olthang tah a nah la cet. Te dongah a ol hnatun ham neh amih vawtthoek rhoek te hoeih sak ham hlangping loh muep tingtun uh. 
Luke5:16 Tedae Jesuh amah tah khosoek la vi uh tih thangthui. 
Luke5:17 Hnin at om tih Jesuh loh a thuituen vaengah, Galilee vangca boeih neh Judea, Jerusalem lamkah aka pawk lo Pharisee rhoek neh saya rhoek khaw om uh tih ngol uh. Te vaengah a hoeih ham khaw BOEIPA kah a thaomnah loh om ngawn coeng." 
Luke5:17 Hnin at om tih Jesuh loh a thuituen vaengah, Galilee vangca boeih neh Judea, Jerusalem lamkah aka pawk lo Pharisee rhoek neh saya rhoek khaw om uh tih ngol uh. Te vaengah a hoeih ham khaw BOEIPA kah a thaomnah loh om ngawn coeng." 
Luke5:18 Khawn tih aka om sut hlang te hlang rhoek loh phak dongah tarha hang khuen uh. Te phoeiah a taengla a khuen tih tloeng pah ham Jesuh a toem uh. 
Luke5:19 Tedae hlangping laklo ah metla anih khuen ham khaw hmu uh thai pawh. Imphu la yoeng uh bangyai longah a laklung kah Jesuh hmaiah thingkongca neh a hlak uh. 
Luke5:20 Amih kah tangnah te a hmuh vaengah, “Hlang pa aw, na tholhnah loh nang n'hlah coeng,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:21 Tedae cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek long tah dawtlet ham a tong uh tih, “Soehsalnah aka thui te unim ca he? Pathen bueng pawt atah tholh hlah ham ulae aka coeng thai eh?” a ti uh." 
Luke5:22 Tedae amih kah poeknah te Jesuh loh a ming dongah amih te a doo tih, “Nangmih thinko khuiah balae na poek uh?" 
Luke5:23 'Na tholh loh nang n'hlah coeng, ' ti ham neh 'Thoo lamtah cet, ' ti ham te melae a phoeng la aka om?" 
Luke5:24 Te daengah ni hlang capa loh diklai dongah tholh hlah hamla saithainah a khueh te na ming uh eh,” a ti nah. Aka khawn te khaw, “Namah khaw kan thui eh, thoo, na thingkongca te khuen lamtah namah im la cet laeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:25 Te dongah amih hmaiah hlat thoo tih, a yalh nah te a khuen tih, Pathen a thangpom doela ah a im te a paan." 
Luke5:26 Te vaengah mueimang bangla boeih om uh tih Pathen te a thangpom uh. Rhihnah nen khaw baetawt uh tih, “Tihnin ah poektloel la m'hmuh,” a ti uh." 
Luke5:27 Te phoei lamkah loh a caeh vaengah a ming ah Levi, mangmu aka coi tah mangmu doenah ah a ngol te a hmuh tih, “Kai m'vai laeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:28 Te dongah a cungkuem te a hnoo phoeiah thoo tih Jesuh te a vai. 
Luke5:29 Te phoeiah Levi loh amah im ah Jesuh ham buhloei muep a tael pah. Te vaengah mangmucoi rhoek khaw hlangping la muep om tih amih taengkah aka om hlang tloe rhoek long khaw a vael uh. 
Luke5:30 Te dongah Pharisee rhoek neh cadaek rhoek loh Jesuh kah hnukbang rhoek te a kohuet thil uh tih, “Balae tih mangmucoi rhoek neh hlangtholh rhoek taengah na caak na ok uh?” a ti na uh." 
Luke5:31 Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Siboei he sading rhoek loh ngoe pawt cakhaw tloh aka khueh rhoek long tah a ngoe." 
Luke5:32 Aka dueng rhoek khue ham pawt tih aka tholh rhoek te yutnah dongla khue ham ni ka pawk,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:33 Te rhoek loh Jesuh te, “Johan kah hnukbang rhoek tah puet a yaeh uh tih rhenbihnah khaw a saii uh. Pharisee rhoek kah hnukbang rhoek long khaw a saii uh van. Nangmih tah na caak na ok uh,” a ti na uh." 
Luke5:34 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te, “Yulueihmuen kah pacaboeina la na om uh moenih a? Amih neh a om rhuet ah yulokung loh a yaeh ham na saii uh aya?" 
Luke5:35 Tedae a tue ha pawk bitni, yulokung te amih taeng lamkah loh a khue khohnin ah a yaeh uh bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke5:36 Te phoeiah amih te nuettahnah neh, “Himbai a thai te a himbai pen la a phen tih himbai rhuem a bo thil moenih. Te pawt koinih, a thai khaw pawn vetih himpai pen a thai te a rhuem neh rhoep mahpawh." 
Luke5:37 Misur noe te tuitang rhuem dongah a than moenih, te pawt koinih, misur noe loh tuitang te a va vetih, misur khaw cae ni, tuitang khaw poci ni." 
Luke5:38 Tedae misur noe te tuitang thai dongah ni a than. 
Luke5:39 A rhuem aka o loh misur noe a ngaih moenih. 'A rhuem tah kodam la om,' a ti,” a ti nah." 
Luke6:1 Sabbath a om vaengah Jesuh te canghli longah pah phai. Te vaengah a hnukbang rhoek loh cangvuei te a yun uh tih a kut neh a noi uh phoeiah a caak uh. 
Luke6:2 Te dongah Pharisee rhoek khuikah hlangvang loh, “Sabbath vaengah a ngaih pawt te balae tih na saii uh?” a ti nah." 
Luke6:3 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Amah neh a taengkah rhoek te bungpong la a om vaengah David loh a saii te na tae uh mahnim he." 
Luke6:4 Pathen im ah kun tih a hmai kah vaidam te a loh tih a caak phoeiah a taengkah rhoek khaw a paek ta, te te khosoih rhoek bueng pawt atah u khaw cah ham a paek moenih ta, a ti nah." 
Luke6:5 Te phoeiah amih te, “Hlang Capa tah Sabbath Boeipa ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke6:6 A tloe vaengah khaw Sabbath a om nen tah tunim la cet tih a thuituen. Te vaengah bantang kut aka khaem hlang pakhat om van. 
Luke6:7 Te dongah anih te Sabbath vaengah a hoeih sak atah a paelnaeh thil te hmuh hamla cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek loh a dawn uh. 
Luke6:8 Tedae amih kah poeknah te a ming dongah, kut khaem la aka om hlang te, “Thoo lamtah a laklung ah pai lah,” a ti nah vanbangla thoo pai." 
Luke6:9 Te phoeiah amih te Jesuh loh, “Nangmih te kan dawt lah eh, Sabbath vaengah a then ham neh thae ham, hinglu khang ham neh poci sak ham, melae a ngaih?” a ti nah." 
Luke6:10 Te phoeiah amih te boeih a sawt tih, na kut te yueng,” a ti nah. Tedae anih long khaw a ngai van dongah a kut te a then pah." 
Luke6:11 Amih a anglat neh hah uh sumsoek tih, Jesuh te saii hamla amamih khat neh khat te thui uh thae." 
Luke6:12 A tue a pha vaengah thangthui ham tlang la cet tih, Pathen taengkah thangthuinah neh hak." 
Luke6:13 Khothaih a pha vaengah tah a hnukbang rhoek te a khue. Amih lamkah hlang hlainit te a tuek tih, amih te caeltueih rhoek la a khue bal." 
Luke6:14 Te vaengah Peter la a khue Simon te khaw, a mana Andrew khaw, James neh Johan khaw, Philip neh Bartholomew khaw," 
Luke6:14 Te vaengah Peter la a khue Simon te khaw, a mana Andrew khaw, James neh Johan khaw, Philip neh Bartholomew khaw," 
Luke6:15 Matthai neh Thomas khaw, Alphaeus capa James neh Namlung la a khue Simon khaw," 
Luke6:15 Matthai neh Thomas khaw, Alphaeus capa James neh Namlung la a khue Simon khaw," 
Luke6:16 James capa Judah neh hlangyoi la aka om Judah Iskariot khaw thum van. 
Luke6:16 James capa Judah neh hlangyoi la aka om Judah Iskariot khaw thum van. 
Luke6:17 Te phoeiah amih te a suntlak puei tih hmuen naep ah pai uh. A hnukbang rhoek te muep hlangping uh tih, Judah pum neh Jerusalem, Tyre neh Sidon tuikaeng lamkah pilnam rhaengpuei khaw muep om uh." 
Luke6:18 Amih tah a taengah hnatun ham neh, a tlohtat lamloh hoeih hamla, rhalawt mueihla loh a tulnoi rhoek hoeih ham ha pawk uh." 
Luke6:19 Jesuh lamkah thaomnah a coe vaengah tah boeih a hoeih uh dongah anih aka taek ham hlangping loh boeih a toem uh. 
Luke6:20 Te phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek te Jesuh loh a mik a huel thil, “Khodaeng rhoek tah a yoethen pai, Pathen ram tah nangmih kah ni." 
Luke6:21 A yoe aka then rhoek tah tahae ah na bungpong cakhaw na hah uh ni, yoethen hlang rhoek tah tahae ah na rhap uh cakhaw na nuei uh bitni." 
Luke6:22 Nangmih te hlang loh m'hmuhuet uh vaengah, nangmih te n'hlaang uh tih n'thuithet uh vaengah khaw, hlang capa kongah a thae la na ming a voeih vaengah khaw na yoethen uh." 
Luke6:23 Tekah khohnin ah omngaih uh lamtah soipet uh. Nangmih kah thapang tah vaan ah muep om coeng ke. Amah te tlam ni a napa rhoek loh tonghma rhoek te a saii uh. 
Luke6:24 Tedae anunae nangmih kuirhang rhoek aih, namamih kah thaphohnah ni na bawt uh." 
Luke6:25 Anunae nangmih aka hah coeng rhoek khaw na pong uh ni. Anunae aka nuei coeng rhoek, na nguek neh na rhap uh ni." 
Luke6:26 Anunae hlang tom loh a then la nangmih n'thui uh vaengkah aih. Amah te tlam ni na pa rhoek loh laithae tonghma rhoek te a saii uh. 
Luke6:27 Tedae ka ol aka hnatun nangmih rhoek taengah kan thui, na rhal rhoek te lungnah uh, nangmih aka hmuhuet rhoek ham a then saii pa uh." 
Luke6:28 Nangmih thae aka phoei rhoek te uem uh, nangmih aka hnaep rhoek ham thangthui pa uh." 
Luke6:29 Kamrhuh ah nangmih aka bop tah pakhat te khaw duen pah. Na himbai aka khuen te angki khaw hloh pah boeh. 
Luke6:30 Na taengah aka bih boeih te pae lamtah, na koe a khuen te khaw lat voel boeh." 
Luke6:31 Hlang loh nangmih taengah a saii ham na ngaih uh bangla amih taengah saii uh van. 
Luke6:32 Nangmih aka lungnah rhoek bueng te na lungnah uh koinih nangmih ham mebang lungvatnah lae a om eh? Hlangtholh rhoek long pataeng amamih aka lungnah rhoek a lungnah uh ta. 
Luke6:33 Nangmih ham aka then rhoek taengah dawk na then van koinih nangmih ham mebang lungvatnah lae a om eh? Amah te bang te hlangtholh rhoek long khaw a saii uh ta. 
Luke6:34 A taeng lamkah dang hamla na ngaiuep uh te na puu uh koinih nangmih ham mebang lungvatnah lae a om eh? Te tlam te dang boeiloeih ham ngawn tah hlangtholh rhoek loh hlangtholh roek te a puu uh van ta. 
Luke6:35 Na rhal rhoek taengah pataeng lungnah neh then pa uh lamtah na puu vaengah khaw lamtawn uh voel boeh. Te daengah ni nangmih kah thapang tah muep om vetih Khohni ca rhoek la na om uh eh. Amah tah noihhai neh boethae taengah khaw kodam la om ta. 
Luke6:36 Na pa te sitlohthamla la a om van dongah silohthamlam la om uh. 
Luke6:37 Hlang te lai na thui thil uh pawt daengah ni lai la n'thui uh loengloeng pawt eh. Hlang te boe sak uh boeh nangmih m'boe sak uh loengloeng mahpawh. Tholh te hlah pa uh lamtah nangmih khaw han hlah van ni. 
Luke6:38 Pae uh, lamtah nangmih te m'paek van ni. Cangnoek then dongah a det tih a rhueng tangtae te na rhang ah a baecoih la m'paek bitni. Na loeng nah cangnoek nen te nangmih ham a loeng van ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke6:39 Te phoeiah amih ham nuettahnah pakhat koep a thui. Mikdael loh mikdael long a tueng thai khaming? Rhom la bok cungku mahpawt nim? 
Luke6:40 Hnukbang tah saya soah a om moenih. Boeih aka moeh uh pataeng a saya banglam ni a om eh. 
Luke6:41 Na manuca mik kah mikdaeng te metlam na hmuh uh. Namah mik khuikah thingboeng pataeng na hmat moenih. 
Luke6:42 Metlam lae na manuca te, “Manuca, na mik khuikah mikdaeng kang koeih eh, “na ti nah thai. Na mik khuikah thingboeng te namah loh na hmuh moenih. Hlangthai palat aw namah mik lamkah thingboeng te koeih lamhma dae, te daengah ni na manuca mik khuikah mikdaeng na koeih ham khaw phaeng na hmuh eh." 
Luke6:43 Thaih huk la aka cuen thing then he a om moenih, thaih tak la aka cuen thing thae khaw a om van moenih." 
Luke6:44 Thingkung boeih he a thaih long ni a mingpha sak eh. Hlingkung lamkah loh thaibu thaih a bit uh moenih. Tangpuem dongah misur a yoep uh moenih. 
Luke6:45 Hlang then long tah thinko khui lamkah khohrhang then te hnothen la a thoeng sak tih, hlang thae loh boethae dong lamkah loh hnothae te a thoeng sak. Thinko kah aka baecoih te ni a ka loh a thui." 
Luke6:46 Balae tih kai he BOEIPA BOEIPA tila nang khue uh. Ka thui te na saii uh hae moenih. 
Luke6:47 Kai taengla aka pawk tih ka ol a yaak neh aka saii boeih tah u bangla a om khaw nangmih kan tueng eh. 
Luke6:48 Anih tah im aka sa hlang phek la om. Anih tah a to khaw dung tih lungpang soah khoengim a khueh. Tuili om tih tuiva loh tekah im te a daeng. Tedae a then la a sak dongah a hinghuen thai moenih. 
Luke6:49 A yaak tih aka saii pawt rhoek tah khoengim om kolla diklai sokah im aka sa hlang bangla om tih tuiva loh a daeng vaengah pahoi tim van. Te dongah im kah a po a ci khaw muep om. 
Luke7:1 A ol te pilnam kah a hna ah boeih a baetawt sak phoeiah tah Kapernaum la kun. 
Luke7:2 Te vaengah rhalboei kah sal pakhat te tloh a khueh ti dalh duek. Anih tah a taengah a khoelh la om. 
Luke7:3 A kawng a yaak coeng dongah Judah patong rhoek te Jesuh taengla a tueih tih a sal hoeih sak ham halo dae saeh tila a cael. 
Luke7:4 Te rhoek loh Jesuh te a paan uh phoeiah ngahngah a cael uh tih, “Anih te doedan tueng la om he," 
Luke7:5 mah namtu a lungnah dongah tunim te khaw anih long ni mamih ham a sak,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:6 Te dongah amih te Jesuh loh a caeh puei tih im pha ham pataeng hla voel pawh. Te vaengah rhalboei loh a puei rhoek te a tueih tih, “Boeipa, na tawnba mai pawt nim? Ka imphu ah na kun ham khaw a koihvaih la ka om moenih." 
Luke7:7 Namah te kam paan ham khaw ka tueng moenih. Tedae ol kamat mah thui lamtah ka sal he hoeih bitni. 
Luke7:8 Kai khaw saithainah aka khueh hmuikah aka om hlang pakhat van ni. Kamah hmuiah rhalkap rhoek khaw om van. Te dongah pakhat te “Cet “ ka ti nah tih cet, pakhat te, “ha lo lah, “ka ti nah tih ha lo mai. Te dongah tahae kah bangla na saii pah vetih ka sal te a saii mako,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:9 Te te Jesuh loh a yaak vaengah a ngaihmang. Te dongah anih aka vai hlangping te a mael thil tih, “Nangmih taengah ka thui, Israel khuiah pataeng tangnah heyet ka hmuh moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:10 A tueih rhoek te im la a bal uh vaengah rhalboei kah a sal te sading la a hmuh uh. 
Luke7:11 A vuen a pha neh Nain la a khue kho pakhat la cet. Te vaengah anih te a hnukbang rhoek neh hlangping loh muep a puei uh. 
Luke7:12 Khopuei vongka neh a yoei vaengah manu pakhat tah capa khueh duen te a duek pah tih tarha hang khuen. Anih te nuhmai la om dae, khopuei kah hlangping loh anih taengah muep om uh." 
Luke7:13 Anih te a hmuh vaengah Boeipa loh anih soah a thinphat tih, “Rhap boeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:14 A paan tih rhoep te a taek vaengah aka kawt rhoek loh cawt a pai puei uh. Te phoeiah, “Cadong namah, thoo laeh ka ti,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:15 Te dongah aka duek te ngol tih pahoi cal. Te phoeiah anih te a manu taengla a paek. 
Luke7:16 Te vaengah rhihnah loh boeih a thing uh. Te dongah, “Mamih taengah tonghma puei ha thoeng coeng, Pathen loh a pilnam a hip,” a ti uh tih Pathen a thangpom uh." 
Luke7:17 Te dongah Jesuh kah ol loh Judah pum neh te rhoek pingpang boeih a pha. 
Luke7:18 Te rhoek boeih te a hnukbang rhoek loh Johan taengla a puen pa uh. Te dongah Johan loh a hnukbang rhoek khuikah panit te a khue. 
Luke7:19 Boeipa taengla a tueih tih, “Aka pawk la na om coeng atah a tloe ka lamso pueng aya?” a ti nah." 
Luke7:20 Tekah hlang rhoi loh Jesuh te a paan rhoi tih, “Tuinuem Johan loh nang taengla kaimih rhoi n'tueih tih, 'Aka pawk la na om atah a tloe ka lamso aya?' a ti,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:21 Te vaeng tue ah tlohtat khaw, nganboh khaw, mueihla thae muep a hoeih sak. Mikdael rhoek khaw muep a hmuh sak." 
Luke7:22 Te phoeiah amih te a doo tih, “Cet uh lamtah na hmuh neh na yaak te Johan taengla puen pah. Mikdael loh a hmuh coeng, aka khawn loh pongpa coeng, hmaibae khaw cing tih hnapang loh a yaak, aka duek rhoek khaw thoo uh coeng, khodaeng loh olthangthen a yaak coeng." 
Luke7:23 Tedae kai kongah a khah pawt te tah yoethen la om,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:24 Johan kah puencawn rhoi te a caeh phoeiah Johan kawng neh hlangping te, “Khosoek la na caeh uh vaengah balae na hmuh uh? Khohli kah a hinghuen capu a?" 
Luke7:25 Tedae himbai hnal neh aka phuekhlak uh hlang te hmuh ham nim na caeh uh? Rhuepom pueinak neh pumdomnah dongah kho aka sa rhoek tah manghai-im ah om uh lah ko ke. 
Luke7:26 Tedae na caeh uh te balae na hmuh uh? Tonghma a? Ue ta, nangmih taengah tonghma lakah khaw olpuei ka ti rhoe ta." 
Luke7:27 A kawng la a daek pah te anih ni. Ka puencawn te Nang hmai ah kan tueih. Anih long ni nang hmaikah na longpuei te a rhoekbah eh. 
Luke7:28 Nangmih taengah kan thui, huta kah a cun rhoek khuiah Johan lakah aka tanglue a om moenih. Tedae Pathen ram khuiah a yit koek long pataeng anih lakah tanglue la om,” pahoi a ti nah." 
Luke7:29 Aka ya pilnam boeih neh mangmucoi rhoek long tah Pathen te a tang sak uh tih Johan kah baptistma neh nuem uh. 
Luke7:30 Tedae Pharisee rhoek neh olming rhoek long tah Pathen kah mangtaengnah te amamih ham a aal uh dongah Johan lamloh nuem uh pawh. 
Luke7:31 Te dongah tahae cadil hlang rhoek ba nen nim ka thuidoek lah vetih unim phek a loh uh he? 
Luke7:32 Hnoyoih hmuen ah ngoluh tih khat neh khat aka khue uh thae camoe rhoek phek a loh uh. Amih loh, “Nangmih ham phavi kan tum uh dae na lam uh pawh uh. Kan hlai uh akhaw na rhap uh pawh uh,” a ti uh." 
Luke7:33 Tuinuem Johan ha pawk tih buh ca pawh, misur khaw a ok pawt hatah, 'Rhaithae a khueh,' na ti uh." 
Luke7:34 Hlang capa loh ha pawk tih a caak, a ok hatah, 'hlang khaw carhut neh yumi la he, mangmu aka coi neh hlangtholh rhoek kah a paya ni, ' na ti uh." 
Luke7:35 Tedae cueihnah loh a ca rhoek te boeih a tang sak. 
Luke7:36 Pharisee pakhat loh Jesuh te amah taengah buh ca la a cael. Te dongah Pharisee im la kun tih a vael van. 
Luke7:37 Pharisee im ah buh a vael te kho ah aka om hlangtholh nu loh lawt a ming. 
Luke7:38 Te dongah botui te lungbok um dongah a khuen tih a rhah doela Jesuh kho tang ah pai. Te phoeiah Jesuh kho te mikphi neh koe a sul tih a lu sam neh a huih pah. A kho te a mok pah tih botui neh a hluk pah. 
Luke7:39 Anih aka khue Pharisee loh a hmuh vaengah a khuiah a toel tih, “Anih he tonghma la om koinih amah aka taek huta te, unim?, mebangnim? ti khaw a ming ni ta, hlangtholh dae ni ke,” a ti." 
Luke7:40 Te dongah Jesuh loh anih te a doo tih, “Simon, nang taengah thui ham bet ka khueh,” a ti nah. Anih long khaw, “Thui lah saw saya,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:41 Puhlah pakhat taengah purhong panit om tih, pakhat loh denarii yanga, pakhat loh sawmnga a ba." 
Luke7:42 Tedae a thuung nah a khueh rhoi pawt dongah vik a yoe sak. Te vaengah amih rhoi khuiah ulae puhlah a lungnah ngai eh? “ a ti nah. 
Luke7:43 Simon loh a doo tih, “A yet a yoe sak te ka ti,” a ti nah. Te dongah anih te Jesuh loh, “Buelh na naai het coeng,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:44 Te phoeiah huta taengla mael tih Simon te, “Huta he na hmuh a? Nang im khuila ka kun dae, kai he kho silh tui nan paek moenih. Anih long tah kai kho he mikphi neh a sul tih a sam neh a huih." 
Luke7:45 Kai taengah moknah khaw nang khueh pawh, anih long tah ka kun parhi te kai kho a mok he toeng voel pawh." 
Luke7:46 Ka lu he situi nan hluk pawh, anih long tah ka kho he botui neh a hluk." 
Luke7:47 Te dongah ni namah taengah kan thui, anih tah tholh a yet loh a hlah coeng dongah muep a lungnah. Tedae a yool a hlah pah long te tah a yool ni a lungnah,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:48 Te phoeiah huta te khaw, “Na tholhnah loh n'hlah coeng,” a ti nah." 
Luke7:49 Te vaengah aka vael rhoek loh amamih khuiah, “Tholh aka hlah pah te ulae aka om he,” pahoi a ti uh." 
Luke7:50 Huta te khaw, “Na tangnah loh nang ng'khang coeng, ngaimong la cet laeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:1 Te a poeng phoeiah amah loh khopuei boeih neh vangca patoeng a hil. Te vaengah Pathen ram te a hoe tih a olthangthen a thui. A hnukbang hlainit loh anih te a puei uh. 
Luke8:2 Mueihla thae, vawtthoeknah lamkah aka hoeih tangtae la aka om huta hlangvang rhoek, a khui lamkah rhaithae parhih loh a nong tak Magdala la a khue Mary," 
Luke8:3 Herod buhtaem Chuza yuu Joanna, Susanna neh a tloe rhoek khaw muep lo uh tih amih loh Jesuh khaw a hnukbang rhoek te khaw a khuehtawn neh a bongyong uh." 
Luke8:4 Khopuei takuem kah hlangping te muep capit uh tih a taengla ha pawk uh. 
Luke8:5 Te vaengah nuettahnah neh, “Cangti aka tuh tah a cangtii tuh hamla cet. Tedae a tuh vaengah a ngen tah long taengah tla. Te dongah a taelh uh tih vaan kah vaa loh a kueh." 
Luke8:6 A tloe rhoek tah lungpang soah tla dae, laiyuem a om pawt dongah a poe neh pahoi koh." 
Luke8:7 A tloe rhoek tah hling puem ah tla tih, a rhoeng vaengah hling loh a thing." 
Luke8:8 A tloe te lai then dongah tla tih, a poe vaengah a vuei yakhat lam khaw thoeng,” a ti. Te phoeiah te, “Yaak nah hna aka khueh loh ya saeh,” a ti nah tih a doek." 
Luke8:9 Te dongah nuettahnah loh metla a om te a hnukbang rhoek loh amah a dawt uh. 
Luke8:10 Te dongah, “Pathen ram kah olhuep he ming hamla nangmih m'paek coeng. Te phoeiah a hmuh uh vaengah a hmat uh pawt ham, a yaak uh dae a hmuhming uh pawt ham ni nuettahnah neh ka hlihloeh sak." 
Luke8:11 Nuettahnah tah he tlam ni a om. Cangtii tah Pathen kah olka ni. 
Luke8:12 A yaak uh vaengah amih a khang ham te tangnah boel saeh tila, rhaithae te ha pawk tih a thinko kah olka a rhawt pah rhoek tah, long taengkah rhoek la om uh." 
Luke8:13 Lungpang sokah rhoek te tah olka te a yaak uh vaengah omngaihnah neh a doe uh. Tedae te rhoek te a yung om pawh. Amih loh a tue kolkalh ham a tangnah uh tih noemcainah tue vaengah tah nong uh. 
Luke8:14 Hling puem kah aka tla rhoek, amih khaw aka ya tangtae rhoek ni. Tedae a pongpa vaengah mawntangnah, khuehtawn neh khosaknah omthenbawn loh a thing tih tak pawh." 
Luke8:15 Lai then dongkah rhoek, amih rhoek tah thinko then neh a then la aka om rhoek ni. Te dongah ol a yaak uh te a dueh uh tih uehnah neh thaihtak uh." 
Luke8:16 Hmaiim a tok te hnopai neh aka dah, thingkong hmuiah aka det he a om moenih. Tedae aka kun rhoek te vangnah hmuh sak ham hmaitung soah ni a khueh." 
Luke8:17 A huephael la aka om te mingpha la a om mueh moenih. A huep te khaw mingpha mueh pawt tih mingpha la a pawk mueh moenih. 
Luke8:18 Te dongah metla na yaak uh khaw hmuming uh. Aka khueh te tah a taengah atah anih taengla a paek ni. Tedae aka khueh pawt te tah a taengah a khueh la a ngai te khaw a loh pah ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:19 Jesuh te a manu neh a mana rhoek loh a paan. Tedae hlangping dongah anih te hum uh thai pawh. 
Luke8:20 Te dongah amah, “Na nu neh na mana rhoek loh nang hmuh ham la a ngaih uh tih poeng ah pai uh, “tila a puen pah." 
Luke8:21 Tedae Jesuh loh amih te a doo tih, “Pathen kah olka a yaak tih aka saii rhoek tah ka manu neh ka manuca la om uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:22 Hnin at vaengah Jesuh tah a hnukbang neh lawng khuila kun. Te phoeiah amih te, “Tuili kah rhalvangan la kat uh sih,” a ti nah tih kat uh." 
Luke8:23 A hlaikan uh vaengah Jesuh tah vik ip. Te vaengah hlipuei khohli loh tuili la ha pawk tih dalh a muelh coeng dongah khopo uh. 
Luke8:24 Te dongah Jesuh te a paan uh tih a haeng uh. Te phoeiah, “Boeipa, Boeipa, m'poci uh coeng he,” a ti na uh. Tedae a haeng vaengah khohli neh tui dongkah tuiphu te khaw a toel hatah khohli khaw paa tih suepduem la koep om." 
Luke8:25 Te phoeiah amih te, “Nangmih kah tangnah te ta?” a ti nah. Tedae a rhih uh tih a ngai a hmang uh dongah amamih te, “Unim he, khohli neh tui khaw a voek tih a ngai pah he,” a ti uh." 
Luke8:26 Te phoeiah Galilee imdan ah aka om Gerasenes kho te a pha uh. 
Luke8:27 Lan so a pha vaengah khopuei lamkah rhaithae aka khueh hlang pakhat loh a doe. Kum te yet ah himbai bai voel pawh, im ah pawt tih phuel ah naeh." 
Luke8:28 Jesuh te a hmuh vaengah pang tih a bakop thil. Te phoeiah ol ue la, “Kai taeng neh nang taengah balae aka om?, Khohni Pathen capa Jesuh aw. Kai nan phaep pawt ham ni nang kan hloep,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:29 Te dongah hlang khui lamkah a coe hamla rhalawt mueihla te a toel. Te vaengah anih a paco te a tue khaw yet coeng. Thirhui neh a pael tih hloong nen khaw a khoh uh coeng. Tedae rhaithae loh khosoek la a vai vaengah tah hloong te khaw a dueng. 
Luke8:30 Te phoeiah anih te Jesuh loh, “Na ming ulae? tila a dawt. Anih te rhaithae a yet loh a kun thil dongah, “caempuei caempa,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:31 Te phoeiah amih te tangrhom dung khuiah cungpung saeh tila olpaek pawt ham Jesuh te a hloep uh. 
Luke8:32 Te vaengah tlang ah aka luem ok hui te muep tapkhoeh om. Te dongah amih te ok khuila kun sak ham a bih uh tih a kun sak. 
Luke8:33 Te daengah rhaithae rhoek tah hlang lamloh cet uh tih ok khuila kun uh. Tedae ok hui tah laengpoeng ah tuili khuila cu tih buek uh. 
Luke8:34 Aka thoeng hno te ok vuelh rhoek loh a hmuh uh vaengah rhaelrham uh tih khopuei neh lohma lam khaw puen uh. 
Luke8:35 Te dongah aka om hno te sawt hamla cet uh tih Jesuh te a paan uh. Te vaengah a khui lamkah rhaithae rhoek loh a nong tak hlang khaw ana yol uh tih Jesuh kho kungah samthing la a ngol te a hmuh uh hatah a rhih uh. 
Luke8:36 Te dongah rhaithae aka kaem loh a khang te aka hmuh rhoek loh amih taengah patoeng puen uh. 
Luke8:37 Tedae rhihnah loh mat a nan uh dongah Gerasenes pingpang kah rhaengpuei boeih loh Jesuh te amih taeng lamkah nong sak ham la a hloep uh. Jesuh khaw lawng khuila kun tih mael. 
Luke8:38 A khui lamkah rhaithae loh a nong tak hlang long khaw Jesuh neh amah taengah om hamla a bih. 
Luke8:39 Tedae anih te a tueih tih, “Namah im la bal lamtah, Pathen loh nang ham a saii te thui pah,” a ti nah. Te dongah kho tom la cet tih Jesuh loh anih ham a saii te a hoe." 
Luke8:40 Jesuh aka lamso la boeih a om uh dongah a mael vaengah anih te hlangping loh a doe. 
Luke8:41 Te vaengah Jairus aka ming nah hlang pakhat te pakcak ha pawk. Anih tah tunim kah boei la om dae, Jesuh kho taengah bakop tih a im ah pah sak ham a cael." 
Luke8:42 A canu khueh duen, kum hlainit tluk te duek. Tedae a caeh vaegah Jesuh te hlangping loh a thing." 
Luke8:43 Te phoeiah kum hlainit ah thii buk aka khueh huta om. Anih loh a khosaknah te siboei taengah boeih a hnonah coeng dae coeng thai pawt tih hoeih pawh. 
Luke8:44 A hnuk lamloh a paan tih a himbai dongkah salaw te a taek pah. Te dongah a thii buk te dup a ngol pah. 
Luke8:45 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Ulae kai aka taek te,” a ti nah. Boeih basa uh tih Peter loh, “Boeipa, hlangping loh nang te ng'et tih n'nen te ta,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:46 Te vaengah Jesuh loh, “Khat khat loh kai n'taek, kai lamkah ka thaomnah a caeh te ka ming,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:47 A phah tloel te huta loh a hmuh vaengah a birhih doela a paan tih a taengah a bakuep pah. Anih a taek vaengah a paelnaehnah te khaw, metla a hoeih pahoi te khaw pilnam boeih taengah puen." 
Luke8:48 Te dongah anih te, “Ka canu, na tangnah loh namah ng'khang coeng, ngaimong la cet laeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:49 A thui pueng ah tamtaeng taeng lamkah hlang pakhat ha pawk tih, “Na canu duek coeng, saya te toehoeih boeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:50 Jesuh loh a yaak vaengah, “Rhih boeh, dawk tangnah lamtah daem bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:51 A pha vaengah Peter, Johan neh James, camoe kah manu a napa pawt atah pakhat khaw amah taengah im khuila kun sak pawh." 
Luke8:51 A pha vaengah Peter, Johan neh James, camoe kah manu a napa pawt atah pakhat khaw amah taengah im khuila kun sak pawh." 
Luke8:52 Te vaengah boeih rhap uh tih camoe te a rhaengsae uh. Tedae Jesuh loh, “Rhap uh boeh, a duek moenih, aka ip ni he,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:53 Tedae a duek te a ming uh dongah Jesuh te a nueih thil uh. 
Luke8:54 Tedae Jesuh loh a kut a tuuk pah phoeiah a khue tih, “Camoe thoo laeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke8:55 Te dongah a mueihla ha mael tih pahoi thoo. Te phoeiah anih te a caak a paek ham a uen. 
Luke8:56 Te vaengah a manu napa tah limlum rhoi. Tedae aka om hno te thui pawt amih te a uen. 
Luke9:1 Hnukbang hlainit te a hueh tih rhaithae te boeih khulae tih tlohtat hoeih sak ham amih taengah thaomnah neh saithainah a paek. 
Luke9:2 Te phoeiah Pathen ram hoe ham neh tattloel hoeih sak ham a tueih. 
Luke9:3 Te vaengah amih te, “Longpueng ham cunghol, sungsa, vaidam neh tangka khaw khuen uh boeh. Angki khaw yung nit khuen boeh." 
Luke9:4 Im te na kun thil coeng atah, na naeh uh to vetih na nong uh mako." 
Luke9:5 Tedae nangmih aka doe pawt te tah kho lamkah na nong vaengah na kho dongah tangdik te, amih aka laipai thil ham khoek pa uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:6 Te dongah aka cet rhoek loh kho tom a hil uh tih olthangthen a thui phoeiah khotomrhali ah tloh a hoeih sak uh. 
Luke9:7 Aka om hno boeih te khoboei Herod loh a yaak vaengah sut hit. A ngen loh, “Johan te duek lamkah thoo coeng." 
Luke9:8 A ngen bal loh, “Elijah phoe coeng te, “a tloe rhoek long tah, “Khosuen kah tonghma khat khat ni aka thoo coeng te,” a ti uh." 
Luke9:9 Tedae Herod loh, “Johan te ka rhaih coeng dae ulae aka om tih a thang vawk ka yaak he,” a ti tih amah hmuh ham a toem." 
Luke9:10 Caeltueih rhoek a bal uh vaengah amamih kah a saii uh te boeih Jesuh taengah a thui uh. Te phoeiah amih te a khuen tih Bethsaida a ti uh kho la amah bueng vil vi uh. 
Luke9:11 Tedae anih aka vai hlangping loh a ming coeng dongah, amih te a doe tih Pathen ram kawng te amih ham a thui pah. Te vaengah hoeihnah aka ngoe rhoek khaw a hoeih sak." 
Luke9:12 Khohnin loh a khum thuk vaengah hlainit rhoek loh amah te a paan tih, “Hlangping he tueih pawn sih, te daengah ni a taengvai kah kho neh lohma la cet vetih a pah nah ham neh buham khaw a dang uh eh. Khosoek hmuen ah ni ng'om uh he,” a ti uh." 
Luke9:13 Tedae hnukbang rhoek te, “Amih kah a caak ham te nangmih loh pae uh,” a ti nah. Te vaengah amih loh, “He Pilnam pum ham caak aka lai la ka cet uh pawt koinih, vaidam panga neh nga panit lakah aka yet te kaimih taengah om voel pawh,” a ti uh." 
Luke9:14 Te vaengah hlang thawngnga tluk om uh. Tedae a hnukbang rhoek te, “Amih te a boel pakhat ah hlang sawmnga tluk rhip ngol sak,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:15 Te dongah a saii uh van tih boeih a ngol sak uh. 
Luke9:16 Te phoeiah vaidam panga neh nga panit te a loh. Vaan la oeloe tih a uem phoeiah a aeh tih hlangping te patoeng paek hamla hnukbang rhoek taengah a paek. 
Luke9:17 A caak uh tih boeih a hah uh phoeiah a coih a nueipil te voh hlainit la a phueih uh. 
Luke9:18 A tue loh a pha vaengah thangthui neh amah bueng om tih hnukbang rhoek loh anih te a puei uh. Te vaengah amih te a dawt tih, “Hlangping loh kai he ulae a ti uh?,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:19 A doo uh tih, “Hlangvang loh tuinuem Johan, Elijah, hlangvang bal loh khosuen kah tonghma pakhat khat koep thoo,' a ti uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:20 Te phoeiah amamih te, “Nangmih long tah kai he ulae na ti uh?” a ti nah. Te vaengah Peter loh a doo tih, “Pathen kah Khrih ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:21 Tedae amih te a ho tih te te thui pawt ham a uen. 
Luke9:22 Hlang Capa tah a muep a patang ham a kuek. Te dongah patong rhoek, khosoihham rhoek, neh cadaek rhoek loh a hnawt uh vetih a ngawn uh ni. Tedae a thum hnin ah thoo ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:23 Amih boeih te khaw, “Khat khat long ni ka hnukah lo ham a ngaih atah, amah te hnawt uh saeh lamtah, a thinglam a koh doela hnin takuem ah kai m'vai van saeh." 
Luke9:24 A hinglu te khang ham aka ngaih te tah a hingnah poci ni. Tedae kai kongah hinglu aka poci long tah a hingnah a khang ni. 
Luke9:25 Hlang loh diklai pum a dang dae amah poci uh tih a sungdaeh atah balae a hoeikhang eh? 
Luke9:26 Kai neh ka ol he aka yah puei te tah capa kah, pa kah, a cim puencawn rhoek kah thangpomnah neh ha pawk vaengah hlang capa loh anih te a yah puei ni." 
Luke9:27 Tedae nangmih taengah rhep kan thui. Hekah kah aka pai khuiah hlangvang om. Amih loh Pathen kah ram he a ming uh hlan atah dueknah te ten uh mueh mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:28 He kah olka a poeng phoeikah hnin rhet tluk ah, Peter, Johan neh James te a khuen tih tlang la thangthui ham a caeh puei." 
Luke9:28 He kah olka a poeng phoeikah hnin rhet tluk ah, Peter, Johan neh James te a khuen tih tlang la thangthui ham a caeh puei." 
Luke9:29 A thangthui vaengah a maelhmai kah a mueimae loh a tloe la om tih a pueinak te a bok la khooi. 
Luke9:30 Te vaengah hlang panit loh anih te tarha a voek rhoi. Amih rhoi tah Moses neh Elijah ni. 
Luke9:31 Amih rhoi tah thangpomnah neh phoe rhoi tih a Sunglatnah te a thui rhoi. Te te Jerusalem ah soep sak ham om coeng. 
Luke9:32 Tedae Peter neh a taengkah rhoi tah a ih neh bakba a hap uh tih om uh. A haenghang uh vaengah a thangpomnah te a hmuh uh tih a taengah hlang panit ana pai pah. 
Luke9:33 Amih rhoi te Jesuh taeng lamloh a khoe uh phoeiah Peter loh Jesuh te, “Boeipa, he ah he mamih ng'om uh ham then, dap pathum ah tuk uh sih, namah ham pakhat, Moses ham pakhat, Elijah ham pakhat saeh,” a ti nah tih a thui nawn te khaw ming pawh." 
Luke9:34 Te te a a thui vaengah, muei yal tih amih te a dah. Te dongah muei khuila a kun uh te khaw a rhih uh." 
Luke9:35 Muei khui lamkah ol ha thoeng tih, “Anih tah ka tuek ka ca ni, a ol hnatun pa uh,” a ti." 
Luke9:36 Ol a thui bawt ah Jesuh tah amah bueng te tueng. Amih khaw kam a khuem uh tih te khohnin ah a hmuh uh te puen uh pawh. 
Luke9:37 Hnin at om tih a vuen ah amih te tlang lamloh suntlak uh. Te vaengah Jesuh te hlangping loh muep a doe. 
Luke9:38 Te vaengah hlang pakhat te hlangping khui lamloh tarha pang tih, “Saya, kai ham tah khueh duen la a om dongah, ka capa te nan paelki ham kam bih." 
Luke9:39 Anih te mueihla loh a tuuk tarha vaengah tah buengrhuet pang tih, tolhom neh suvaih. Anih te mat a ngawn a thaeh daengah a mael tak." 
Luke9:40 Mueihla aka haek la na hnukbang rhoek te ka hloep dae coeng thai pawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:41 Te dongah Jesuh loh a doo tih, “Aka tangnahmueh neh pamdah cadil aw, nangmih taengah mevaeng hil nim ka om vetih nangmih te ka yaknaem ve? Na capa te he la han thak,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:42 A taengla ham paan vaengah camoe te rhaithae loh a voeih dongah thuen pueng. Tedae Jesuh loh mueihla thae te a ho daengah, camoe te hoeih tih a napa taengla a mael." 
Luke9:43 Te dongah Pathen kah a lennah soah boeih let uh tih, a hnukbang rhoek taengkah a thui neh a saii boeih soah boeih a ngaihmang uh." 
Luke9:44 Te vaengah, “He camoe he ka ming neh a doe long tah kai ni n'doe. Ka tueih aka doe long tah kai ni n'doe. Nangmih boeih lakli ah a diknoi la kho aka sa tah tanglue la aka om,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:45 Tedae he olthui he a mangvawt uh. Te te a hmuhming pawt ham ni amih ham a phah la om coeng. Te dongah he olthui he amah dawt ham a rhih uh. 
Luke9:46 Tedae amamih khuiah ulae tanglue la aka om eh tila amamih khuiah poeknah a kun pah. 
Luke9:47 Jesuh loh amih thinko poeknah te a hmuh dongah camoe a loh tih amah taengah a pai sak. 
Luke9:48 Te phoeiah amih te, “He kah ol he na hna ah namamih loh dueh uh. Hlang capa tah hlang kut ah voeih ham cai coeng,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:49 Johan loh a doo tih, “Boeipa, nang ming neh rhaithae aka haek hlang pakhat ka hmuh uh. Tedae mamih taengah a bang pawt dongah anih te ka paa sak uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:50 Tedae anih te Jesuh loh, “Paa sak uh boeh, nangmih kah a kingkalh la aka om pawt te tah nangmih ham ni a om,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:51 A lueinah khohnin te a paan tom coeng dongah Jesuh tah Jerusalem la caeh ham a maelhmai a hooi. 
Luke9:52 Te dongah puencawn rhoek te a hmai ah a tueih. Te vaengah cet uh tih Jesuh ham aka rhuengphong la Samaria kho khuila kun uh. 
Luke9:53 Tedae Jerusalem la cet tih a maelhmai tueng ham a om dongah anih te doe uh pawh. 
Luke9:54 A hnukbang James neh Johan loh a hmuh rhoi vaengah, “Boeipa, vaan lamkah hmai suntlak sak ham neh amih hlawp sak ham khue na ngaih a?” a ti nah rhoi." 
Luke9:54 A hnukbang James neh Johan loh a hmuh rhoi vaengah, “Boeipa, vaan lamkah hmai suntlak sak ham neh amih hlawp sak ham khue na ngaih a?” a ti nah rhoi." 
Luke9:55 A mael thil tih amih rhoi te a ho. 
Luke9:56 Te dongah kho tloe la vik cet uh. 
Luke9:57 Long ah a caeh uh vaengah hlang pakhat loh, “Mela na caeh akhaw nang kam vai ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:58 Te vaengah Jesuh loh anih te, “Metang loh a khui, vaan kah vaa long khaw bu a khueh uh. Tedae hlang capa tah lu a tloeng nah khaw khueh pawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:59 Te phoeiah a tloe taengah, “Kai m'vai lah,” a ti nah. Tedae, te long te, “Boeipa, a pa up ham lamhma la kai n'caeh sak mai,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:60 Tedae anih te, “Aka duek rhoek up ham aka duek rhoek te hlah pah. Tedae nang tah cet lamtah Pathen kah ram te doek ngawn,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:61 Te phoeiah pakhat long khaw, “Nang kam vai van ni Boeipa, tedae kai tah ka im kah rhoek te lamhma la m'phih sak dae,” a ti nah." 
Luke9:62 Tedae anih te Jesuh loh, “Laithol cung te kut a tloeng thil tih a hnuk la aka dan pawt ni Pathen kah ram ham aka ting la a om,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:1 Boeipa loh a tloe sawmrhih panit a tuek tih, amih te amah hmai kah pha hamla a cai thil kho neh a hmuen takuem la panit panit ah a tueih." 
Luke10:2 Te vaengah amih taengah, “Cangah hamla yet dae bibikung yool, te dongah cangah Boeipa taengah bih uh lamtah amah kah cangah hmuen ah bibikung han hlah saeh." 
Luke10:3 Cet uh, uithang lakli ah tuca bangla nangmih kan tueih coeng he." 
Luke10:4 Sungkoi, sungsa neh khokhom khaw khuen uh boeh, longpueng ah hlang kuttu uh boeh." 
Luke10:5 Im te na kun thil uh coeng atah lamhma la, 'He im khuiah ngaimongnah om saeh, ' ti na uh." 
Luke10:6 Te ah te ngaimongnah kah a capa a om van atah nangmih kah ngaimongnah loh anih soah om ni. Te pawt koinih nangmih taengla koep ha bal bitni. 
Luke10:7 Te dongah amah tekah im ah naeh uh, amih taengkah te ca uh lamtah o uh. Bibikung tah a thapang a dang hamla tueng pai. Im pakhat lamloh im pakhat la thoeih uh boeh." 
Luke10:8 Khopuei te na kun uh thil tih nangmih te n'doe uh atah na taengah han tawn te ca uh. 
Luke10:9 A khuikah tattloel te hoeih sak uh lamtah amih te, 'Pathen kah ram tah nangmih taengah yoei coeng,' ti nah." 
Luke10:10 Tedae khopuei te na kun thil uh vaengah nangmih te n'doe uh pawt atah toltung ah cet uh. 
Luke10:11 'Na khopuei lamkah loh kaimih kho dongah tangdik aka kap te nangmih kan khoek uh thil coeng, ' ti na uh. Tedae te nen te Pathen kah ram tah yoei coeng tila ming uh." 
Luke10:12 Nangmih taengah ka thui, tekah khohnin ah Sodom te tekah khopuei lakah a phoeng la om ni." 
Luke10:13 Anunae nang Khorazin, anunae nang Bethsaida, nangmih ah thaomnah aka om te Tyre neh Sidon ah om koinih, tlamhni neh hmaiphu dongah ngol uh vetih yut uh dingrhae pawn ni." 
Luke10:14 Tedae laitloeknah khuiah Tyre neh Sidon te nangmih lakah a phoeng la om ni. 
Luke10:15 Kapernaum nang te, vaan la na pomsang pawt nim? Tedae Hell la na cungpung bitni." 
Luke10:16 Nangmih taengah aka hnatun long tah kai ol a hnatun tih, nangmih aka hnawt long tah kai ni n'hnawt. Tedae kai aka hnawt long tah ka tueih hlang te khaw a hnawt,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:17 Sawmrhih panit tah omngaihnah neh mael uh tih, “Boeipa, nang ming nen tah rhaithae pataeng kaimih taengah boe a ngai uh coeng,” a ti uh." 
Luke10:18 Te vaengah amih te, “Satan he vaan lamkah khophaa a tlak banglam ni ka hmuh." 
Luke10:19 Rhul neh saelkhui-ta-ai khaw, rhal kah thaomnah boeih khaw cawt thil hamla nangmih taengah saithainah kam paek he. Te dongah pakhat nen pataeng nangmih te n'thae sak loengloeng boel saeh." 
Luke10:20 Tedae mueihla loh nangmih taengah boe a ngai dongah he omngaih uh boeh, vaan ah na ming a tarhit dongah mah omngaih uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:21 Amah te vaeng tue ah Mueihla Cim loh a hlampan sak tih, “A Pa, vaan neh diklai kah Boeipa namah te kan uem, lungming hlangcueih taengkah na phah tangtae te cahmang rhoek taengah a pumphoe pah. Te pai saeh, a pa, te ni na hmaiah kolonah la aka om." 
Luke10:22 A cungkuem he a Pa loh kai taengah a tloeng. Pa mueh atah capa te unim ti khaw a ming moenih. Capa mueh atah pa te unim ti khaw a ming moenih. Amih taengah khaw capa loh pumphoe hamla a ngaih,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:23 Te phoeiah amah te hnukbang rhoek taengla mael tih, “Na hmuh uh he na mik loh a hmuh dongah he a yoethen." 
Luke10:24 Nangmih ham ni ka thui, nangmih loh na hmuh uh he tonghma rhoek neh manghai rhoek loh hmuh ham muep a ngaih uh dae ana hmu uh pawh, na yaak uh he ana yaak lam khaw ana yaak uh moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:25 Te vaengah olming pakhat tah Jesuh te noemcai ham tarha thoo tih, “Saya, balae ka saii vetih dungyan hingnah ka pang eh?,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:26 Te dongah Jesuh loh anih te, “Olkhueng dongah a daek te metlam na tae te?” a ti nah." 
Luke10:27 Anih long khaw a doo tih, “Boeipa na Pathen te na thinko boeih, na hinglu boeih, na thadueng boeih, na kopoek boeih neh, na imben te khaw namah pum bangla na lungnah ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:28 Te dongah anih te, “Buelh nan doo coeng, te te saii lamtah na hing bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:29 Tedae anih long te amah a tang a ngaih dongah, Jesuh te, “Ka imben te unim,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:30 Jesuh loh doo tih, “Hlang pakhat tah Jerusalem lamkah loh Jerikho la suntlak dae dingca rhoek neh tong uh. Anih te a pit uh phoeiah lucik la a khueh uh. Te daengah a toeng uh tih duekhlong la a caeh tak uh." 
Luke10:31 Tapkhoeh taploeng la khosoih pakhat tah tekah longpuei ah suntla tih anih te a hmuh dae a rhael. 
Luke10:32 Te vanbangla Levi khaw te hmuen kah aka om te a thoeng thil tih a hmuh dae a rhael bal. 
Luke10:33 Tedae Samaria yin pakhat loh anih te a thoeng thil tih a hmuh vaengah a thinphat. 
Luke10:34 Te dongah a paan tih a hma te a ben pah, situi, misurtui neh a toi pah. Te phoeiah anih te amah kah boiva dongah a ngol sak, rhaehim la a khuen tih, a cuncah." 
Luke10:35 A vuen ah tah denarii panit te a loh tih imtawt te a paek. Te phoeiah, 'Anih he cuncah lamtah pakhat khaw na vak yet te tah ka mael vaengah nang te kan thuung bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:36 Te rhoek pathum khuiah dingca kut ah aka cungku kah imben la ulae aka om ni tila na poek?” a ti nah. 
Luke10:37 Te vaengah anih long te, “A soah rhennah aka tueng sak te,” a ti nah. Te phoeiah amah te Jesuh loh, “Cet lamtah namah loh saii van,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:38 A caeh uh vaengah kho pakhat ah pah. Te vaengah huta pakhat, a ming ah Martha loh Jesuh te a doe." 
Luke10:39 Te vaengah a mana Mary la a khue te khaw om. Anih tah Boeipa kah kho taengah ngol van tih a ol te a hnatun. 
Luke10:40 Tedae Martha tah bibi dongah mat tok. Te dongah koe pai tih, “Boeipa, kai mana tah nang hamla a ngaihuet voel pawt tih kamah bueng he thohtat ham n'hnoo coeng. Te dongah anih te thui pah lamtah kai n'bom mai saeh,” a ti nah." 
Luke10:41 Tedae anih te Boeipa loh a doo tih, “Martha, Martha, muep na mawn tih na tom na ta aih mai." 
Luke10:42 Tedae pakhat a ngoe om, Mary loh buham then te a tuek coeng dongah anih kah he rhawt pa uh mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:1 Amah a om vaengah a tue a pha tih hmuen pakhat ah thangthui. A thangthui bawt ah, a hnukbang pakhat loh Jesuh taengah, “Boeipa, kaimih he thangthui ham n'thuituen lah, Johan long khaw a hnukbang rhoek te a thuituen van,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:2 Te dongah amih te, “Na thangthui uh vaengah, 'A pa na ming tah ciim pai saeh, na ram pai saeh." 
Luke11:3 Khohhnin rhamhnin kaimih kah buh he amah khohnin ah kaimih m'pae lah. 
Luke11:4 Kaimih kah tholhnah soah kaimih he n'hlah lah, kaimih khaw kaimih taengah lai aka ba boeih te ka hlah uh van dongah. Cuekhalhnah khuila kaimih n'khuen boeh, ' ti uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:5 Te phoeiah amih te, “Nangmih khuikah pakhat loh paya a khueh tih, ihdulh ah anih taengla cet mai ni. Te vaengah anih te, 'Ka paya, vaidam pa thum ah kai m'pu dae." 
Luke11:6 Ka paya yin lamkah kai taengla ha pawk tih, anih ham ka tawn pah khaw ka khueh pawh,' a ti nah." 
Luke11:7 Te long khaw a khuiah a doo tih, 'Thakthaenah nen khaw kai n'toeh boeh. Thohka a khaih coeng, ka taengkah ka ca rhoek khaw ihnah dongla om uh coeng, nang paek ham ka tho thai mahpawh,' a ti nah ni." 
Luke11:8 Nangmih taengah ka thui, anih te a paya la a om dongah thoo cakhaw pae mai mahpawh. Tedae a paya te a calaak coeng atah thoo vetih a kuek yet te a paek ni." 
Luke11:9 Nangmih taengah ka thui, Bih uh lamtah, nangmih te m'paek bitni, toem uh lamtah na hmuh uh bitni, khoek uh lamtah nangmih ham a ong binit." 
Luke11:10 Aka bih loh boeih a dang tih, aka toem loh a hmuh dongah aka khoek ham khaw a ong pa ni." 
Luke11:11 Nangmih khuikah napa pakhat te a ca loh nga a hoe vaengah, nga yueng la rhul a doe aya?" 
Luke11:12 Aiduei hoe koinih a ca te saelkhui-ta-ai a paek aya? 
Luke11:13 Te dongah nangmih a thae la aka om long pataeng, na ca rhoek te kutdoe then paek ham na ming uh atah, vaan lamkah pa loh muep a ming ngai dongah amah aka dawt rhoek te tah Mueihla Cim a paek ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:14 Rhaithae om tih a haek hatah olmueh la ana poeh pah. Te dongah rhaithae te vawl a caeh daengah olmueh te koep cal tih hlangping khaw a ngaihmang. 
Luke11:15 Tedae amih khuikah hlangvang loh, “Rhaithae boei Beelzebul rhangnen ni rhaithae a haek,” a ti uh." 
Luke11:16 A tloe rhoek loh a noemcai uh tih vaan lamkah miknoek te anih taengah a toem uh. 
Luke11:17 Tedae amah loh amih kah kopoek te a ming dongah amih te, “Ram boeih he amah a paekboe atah poci tih, imkhui loh imkhui a paekboe thil atah cungku." 
Luke11:18 Satan khaw amah neh amah paekboe uh koinih, metlam lae a ram a pai eh? Kai loh Beelzebul rhangneh rhaithae a haek na ti uh." 
Luke11:19 Tedae Beelzebul rhangneh rhaithae te ka haek koinih, na ca rhoek long tah u rhangnen lae a haek uh. Te dongah amih te nangmih soah laitloekkung la om uh ni." 
Luke11:20 Tedae Pathen kah kutdawn neh rhaithae te ka haek koinih, nangmih soah Pathen kah ram ha pai coeng." 
Luke11:21 Khangmai la aka nuet uh long ni a vongup te a hung tih a khuehtawn loh ngaimong la om van. 
Luke11:22 Tedae anih lakah aka tlung ngai ha pawk vaengah tah anih te a noeng. Te vaengah a pangtung thil lungpok haica te a rhawt pah tih, a kutbuem a poelyoe pah." 
Luke11:23 Kai taengah aka om pawt tah kai aka koek ni. Kai taengah aka coi pawt loh a thaek. 
Luke11:24 Mueihla thae tah hlang taeng lamkah a nong vaengah tuihang hmuen te a hil tih duemnah a tlap. Tedae hmuen a hmuh pawt vaengah, “Ka nong tak tangtae kamah im la ka mael ni,' a ti." 
Luke11:25 Ha pawk vaengah, im te nawt tangtae neh a khoem la a hmuh" 
Luke11:26 Te dongah cet tih amah lakah aka thae mueihla tloe parhih te a khuen. Te phoeiah a kun puei tih pahoi a om puei dongah tekah hlang kah a hnukkhueng tah lamhma kah lakah a thae la om,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:27 Te a thui vaengah hlangping khui lamkah huta pakhat loh ol a huel tih Jesuh te, “Nang aka yom bung neh aka cun rhang suk tah a yoethen,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:28 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Pathen ol aka ya tih aka tuem rhoek tah a yoethen ngai,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:29 Hlangping he a khawk vaengah a tong tih, “Tahae kah cadil tah rhaithae cadil ni, Miknoek te a toem uh dae Jonah kah miknoek pawt atah miknoek pae mahpawh." 
Luke11:30 Jonah tah Nineveh ham miknoek la a om vanbangla, hlang capa khaw tahae kah cadil taengah om van ni." 
Luke11:31 Tahae cadil hlang rhoek taengkah laitloeknah ah tuithim manghainu te thoo vetih amih te a boe sak ni. Anih tah Solomon kah cueihnah hnatun ham diklai khobawt lamkah ha pawk. He ah he Solomon lakah aka khuet om ta he. 
Luke11:32 Ninevi hlang rhoek loh tahae cadil kah laitloeknah te a pai uh thil vetih a boe sak ni. Jonah kah olhoe neh a yut uh atah, he ah aka om he Jonah lakah khuet dae ta he." 
Luke11:33 Hmaiim a tok te tanhnaem ah khueh pawt tih voh khuiah khaw a muek moenih. Tedae aka kun rhoek loh vangnah hmu van saeh tila hmaitung soah ni a khueh. 
Luke11:34 Na mik tah na pum kah hmaiim ni. Na mik loh cilrhik la a om vaengah na pum boeih te cilping la om van. Tedae a thae la a om vaengah na pum tah hmuep van. 
Luke11:35 Te dongah ngaithuen, na khuikah vangnah te yinnah la poeh ve." 
Luke11:36 Te dongah na pum te boeih vang tih cungvang ah a hmuep pakhat khaw a om pawt atah, hmaiim loh a aa neh nang n'tue vaengkah bangla phaeng aka vang la om ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:37 A thui vaengah, Pharisee loh a taengah buh ca la anih te a cael dongah kun tih a ngol puei." 
Luke11:38 Buh kungah khut a nuem lamhma pawt te Pharisee loh a hmuh tih a ngaihmang. 
Luke11:39 Tedae Boeipa loh anih te, “Nangmih Pharisee rhoek loh boengloeng neh baelpuei kah a hmanhu tah na cil na poe coeng uh. Tedae na khuiah halhkanah neh halangnah ni aka bae." 
Luke11:40 Hlang ang rhoek! a sohman ah aka saii loh a khui te khaw a saii moenih a? 
Luke11:41 Tedae a khuikah aka om te doedannah la pae uh lamtah, nangmih ham boeih caih ni." 
Luke11:42 Anunae nangmih Pharisee rhoek ! Sungii, sungsing neh toian boeih tah na paek uh dae Pathen kah tiktamnah neh lungnah tah na hnalval uh. Saii hamla a kuek te dalrha uh tak boeh." 
Luke11:43 Anunae nangmih Pharisee rhoek te ! tunim kah ngolhmuen then neh hnoyoih hmuen kah toidalnah ni na lungnah uh. 
Luke11:44 Anunae nangmih aih te, hlan bangla lumrhilumrha la na om uh dongah a sokah aka pongpa hlang loh ming pawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:45 Olming pakhat loh Jesuh te a doo tih, “Saya, na thui te kaimih ni nan neet,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:46 Tedae Jesuh loh, “Nangmih olming rhoek khaw anunae, hlang rhoek te hnophueih neh phueihtloel la na nan uh tih, namamih tah na kutdawn pakhat nen khaw hnophueih te na ben uh pawh." 
Luke11:47 Anunae nangmih aih, tonghma rhoek kah phuel te na sak uh dae na pa rhoek long ni amih te a ngawn." 
Luke11:48 Na pa rhoek kah a khuui la na om uh van dongah a khoboe te na rhoih uh. Tonghma rhoek te amih loh a ngawn tih nangmih loh phuel im na sak pa uh. 
Luke11:49 Te dongah Pathen kah cueihnah long khaw, “Amih taengah tonghma rhoek neh caeltueih rhoek te ka tueih van vaengah, amih te a ngawn uh vetih a hnaemtaek bitni,” a ti." 
Luke11:50 Te dongah diklai a tongnah lamkah tahae cadil rhoek loh a long sak tonghma rhoek kah a thii phu te boeih suk nawn saeh. 
Luke11:51 Abel thii lamloh Zekhariah thii duela hmueihtuk neh im laklo ah ni a poci. Ue ta, nangmih taengah ka thui, tahae kah cadil taengah a suk bitni." 
Luke11:52 Anunae nangmih olming rhoek te, mingnah cabi na pom lalah namamih khaw na kun uh pawt tih aka kun rhoek te na kang uh,” a ti nah." 
Luke11:53 Te lamkah loh Jesuh a vawl nong phoeiah tah cadaek rhoek neh Pharisee rhoek loh mat a hmuhuet uh tih anih kawng te muep a cawh uh. 
Luke11:54 A ka lamkah ol khat khat neh tangkhuep ham amah te a rhongngol uh. 
Luke12:1 Hlangping a thawng a sang te tingtun uh tih khat neh khat taelh uh thae. Lamhma kah a hnukbang rhoek te, “Tolrhu te na ngaithuen uh mako, te tah Pharisee kah thailatnah ni." 
Luke12:2 Te dongah phah la aka om te tah pumphoe mueh pawt tih a huephael te khaw a ming mueh moenih. 
Luke12:3 Te yueng la a hmuep ah na thui uh te vangnah khuiah a yaak ni. Imkhui kah a hna ah na thui uh te khaw imphu ah a hoe ni. 
Luke12:4 Ka paya rhoek nangmih taengah ka thui coeng. Pumsa te a ngawn uh dae, te phoeiah saithainah pakhat khaw aka khueh pawt te rhih uh boeh." 
Luke12:5 Tedae na rhih uh te kan tueng eh. Pum te a ngawn phoeiah hell la voeih ham saithainah aka khueh te rhih uh. Ue ta, nangmih taengah anih la rhih uh ka ti loel." 
Luke12:6 Vahnup phiknga te pe hnih la a yoih uh moenih a? Te rhoek te pakhat khaw Pathen hmaiah a hmaai a om moenih. 
Luke12:7 Na lu kah sam pataeng boeih a tae coeng. Rhih uh boeh, vahnup lakah muep na tiing uh ngai." 
Luke12:8 Nangmih taengah ka thui, kai kawng he hlang hmaiah aka phong boeih te tah hlang capa loh* anih te Pathen kah puencawn rhoek hmaiah a phong van ni." 
Luke12:9 Tedae hlang hmaiah kai aka hnawt tah Pathen puencawn rhoek hmaiah ka huek uh tak ni. 
Luke12:10 Hlang capa te ol aka tha thil boeih te tah tholh a hlah pah pueng ni. Tedae Cim Mueihla taengah aka soehsal te tah tholh hlah pah mahpawh. 
Luke12:11 Nangmih te tunim la, boeilu rhoek neh saithainah aka khueh taengla n'khuen uh ni. Te vaengah metla na huul uh vetih ba na thui uh ham mawn uh boeh." 
Luke12:12 Thui ham a kuek te tah amah tue vaengah Cim Mueihla loh nangmih n'thuituen bitni,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:13 Hlangping khuikah pakhat loh Jesuh te, “Saya, ka manuca te thui pah lamtah kai hamla rho ham paek,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:14 Tedae Jesuh loh anih te, “Ka hlang aw, nangmih rhoi soah laitloekkung ham neh tultaelkung la u long kai n'tuek,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:15 Te phoeiah amih te, “Halhkanah te boeih hmuming uh lamtah cue uh. A khuehtawn om dae a hingnah pakhat khaw a cawt moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:16 Te phoeiah amih taengah nuettahnah a thui tih, “Kuirhang hlang pakhat kah lo te cang a thawt pah." 
Luke12:17 Tedae amah khuiah a poek tih, 'Ka cang thaih he, ka tung nah ka khueh pawt dongah banim ka saii lah ve,' a ti." 
Luke12:18 Te phoeiah, 'He tla ka saii eh, ka khai te ka phae vetih a len la ka saii eh, te ah te ka cang neh ka koe te boeih ka tung eh." 
Luke12:19 Te phoeiah ka hinglu te, 'Ka hinglu nang, kum a sen ham koe muep na khueh coeng dongah duem lamtah, ca lamtah, o lamtah, uum laeh, ' ka ti nah ni,' a ti." 
Luke12:20 Tedae anih te Pathen loh, 'Hlang ang, tu khoyin ah na hinglu te nang taeng lamkah loh a lat pawn ni. Tahae kah na hmoel te uham nim a om ve?' a ti nah." 
Luke12:21 Te dongah anih loh amah ham a tung dae a khuehtawn loh Pathen taengla a pawk puei moenih,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:22 A hnukbang rhoek te khaw, “He dongah ni nangmih taengah ka thui, na caak uh te khaw, pum dongah na bai uh ham te khaw, na hinglu mawn sak uh boeh." 
Luke12:23 hinglu tah buh lakah, pum he khaw himbai lakah olpuei la om." 
Luke12:24 Vangak ke poek uh lah, tuh uh pawt tih at uh pawh, a im khaw, khai khaw khueh uh pawt dae Pathen amih te loh a khut. Nangmih tah vaa lakah muep na olpuei uh." 
Luke12:25 Nangmih khuiah unim aka mawn tih a hinglung te dong at khaw aka cong thil thai ? 
Luke12:26 A yit dongah na coeng uh pawt atah, ba ham lae a tloe dongah na mawn uh." 
Luke12:27 Hmat uh lah, rhaipai ke metlam a rhoeng, thakthae pawt tih cunghmui khaw hnuk pawh. Tedae nangmih taengah ka thui, Solomon loh a thangpomnah boeih neh rhaipai pakhat banglam pataeng a bai sak moenih." 
Luke12:28 Tihnin ah om tih thangvuen ah hmailing khuila a phum lohma kah khopol pataeng Pathen loh a thoeihcam atah nangmih te muep na uepvawt aih mai. 
Luke12:29 Te dongah nangmih loh na caak ham neh na ok te toem uh boeh uepvawt uh boeh. 
Luke12:30 Diklai namtom boeih loh te te a tlap uh. Tedae nangmih kah na kuek te pa loh a ming coeng. 
Luke12:31 A ram te tlap uh dae lamtah tekah te nangmih ham han thap bitni. 
Luke12:32 A ram te nangmih paek ham na pa a lung a tlun coeng dongah, tuping ca aw, birhih boeh." 
Luke12:33 Na khuehtawn te yoi uh lamtah, doedannah la pae uh, aka rhuem pawh sungkoi te namamih ham saii uh. khohrhang he vaan ah tah cueng. Te ah te hlanghuen loh muk pawt tih, keet long khaw phae pawh." 
Luke12:34 Na khohrhang a om nah ah na thinko khaw pahoi om ni. 
Luke12:35 Na pumpu te yen tangtae la om saeh lamtah hmaiim khaw vang saeh. 
Luke12:36 Te phoeiah yuluei kung lamkah aka bal a boeipa aka lamtawn hlang rhoek bangla na om uh mako. Te daengah ni ha lo tih a khoek vaengah anih ham pahoi a ong pa thai eh. 
Luke12:37 Boei ha ha lo vaengah hmuh hamla aka hueltue rhoek tah sal yoethen ni. Nangmih taengah rhep ka thui, amih te cihin a vaep tih a ngolhlung dongah aka pongpa rhoek loh amih te a khut." 
Luke12:38 Pathum, pabae la ha pawk vaengah aka tawt te a hmuh tangloeng dongah amih tah yoethen la om uh." 
Luke12:39 Tedae he he ming uh, hlanghuen ha pawk nah khonoek te imkung loh ming koinih, a im te muk hamla hlah sut pawt sue." 
Luke12:40 Te dongah nangmih loh sikim la om uh, hlang capa tah na poek uh pawt tue ah ni ha pawk eh,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:41 Peter loh, “Boeipa, he nuettahnah he kaimih ham a? hlang boeih ham khaw na thui a?” a ti nah." 
Luke12:42 Boeipa loh, “Unim uepom neh aka cueih hnokhoem la aka om van ? Boeipa loh anih te a imlo soah a tue a tang neh maehham aka tael la a khueh ni." 
Luke12:43 Tekah sal tah a yoethen, a saii te a Boeipa ha pawk vaengah a hmuh pah van ni." 
Luke12:44 Nangmih taengah rhep kan thui, a khuehtawn boeih soah anih ni a ngol sak eh." 
Luke12:45 Tedae tekah sal loh a thinko khuiah, 'Ka boeipa ha pawk ham tah koe pueng ni,” a ti. Te dongah salnu camoe te koe a boh tih a caak, a ok neh rhui." 
Luke12:46 Sal kah a boei tah a lamtawn mueh khohnin neh a ming mueh a tue vaengah ha pawk koinih, anih te a tloek vetih a paihmuen te aka tangnahmuen rhoek taengla a khueh pah ni." 
Luke12:47 Tekah sal loh a Boeipa kah kongaih a ming dae, rhuengphong pawt tih amah kongaih bangla a saii dongah a boh dahlawt ni." 
Luke12:48 Tedae aka ming pawt loh a saii atah nganboh a yook ham tueng te a yool ni a boh eh. A yet a paek hlang boeih te tah a taengah a yet a toem pah vetih, muep a paek hlang taengah khaw muep a hoe pah ni." 
Luke12:49 Diklai dongah hmai pak hamla ka pawk coeng dongah, metla hlae oepsoeh cakhaw ka ngaih mai coeng." 
Luke12:50 Baptistma khaw nuem hamla ka om pueng tih, ka coeng hlan atah metlamnim n'nan ve." 
Luke12:51 Diklai ah rhoepnah paek ham ka pawk tila na poek uh a? Moenih ta, nangmih taengah ka thui, paekboenah ham dae ni he." 
Luke12:52 Tahae lamkah longtah im pakhat ah panga la paek uh thae vetih, panit pathum, panit pathum ah om uh ni." 
Luke12:53 Pa neh capa, capa neh pa, manu neh canu, canu neh manu, mani neh a langa, langa neh mani paekboe uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke12:54 Te phoeiah hlangping te khaw, “Khotlak ah khomai a thoeng te na hmuh uh vaengah, 'Khonal ha pai ni, ' pahoi na ti uh tih pai tangloeng van." 
Luke12:55 Tuithim a hli vaengah, “Kholing ha pai ni, “na ti uh tih pai tangloeng." 
Luke12:56 Hlangthai palat rhoek, diklai neh vaan kah maelhmai ke soepsoei ham na ming uh tih a tue he balae tih soepsoei ham na ming uh pawh." 
Luke12:57 Namamih ham khaw balae tih a dueng la lai na tloek uh pawh. 
Luke12:58 Na kocaelh neh boei taengla na caeh vaengah anih te a paa nah hamla longpueng ah bi saii laeh, laitloekkung taengla namah n'det ve. Laitloekkung loh namah te palik taengla m'voei vetih ' palik loh thongim ah n'hla ve." 
Luke12:59 Na taengah kan thui, mucih ca khaw boeih na thuung hlan atah te lamkah loh na loeih loengloeng mahpawh,” a ti nah." 
Luke13:1 Amah a khoning vaengah Pilat loh hmueih neh Galilee rhoek kah thii a thoek te hlangvang aka om rhoek loh Jesuh taengla puen uh. 
Luke13:2 Te dongah amih te a doo tih, “Te te a yook uh dongah Galilee rhoek tah Galilee rhoek boeih lakah hlangtholh la om tila na poek uh a?" 
Luke13:3 Moenih ta, nangmih taengah kan thui, na yut uh pawt atah boeih na poci uh van ni." 
Luke13:4 Siloam kah imsang loh a bung thil tih aka duek hlairhet rhoek te ta. Amih tah Jerusalem khosa hlang boeih lakah hlangtholh ni tila na poek uh a? 
Luke13:5 Moeinih ta, nangmih taengah ka thui, na yut uh pawt atah boeih na poci uh van ni,” a ti nah." 
Luke13:6 Te phoeiah nuettahnah a thui bal.” Amah dum ah thaibu aka ling hlang pakhat om tih, a thaih hoel hamla ha pawk hatah hah a sawt." 
Luke13:7 Te dongah dumpho taengah, 'Kum thum khuiah ka lo tih hekah thaibu dongah a thaih ka hoel dae hah ka sawt coeng he. Te dongah vung laeh, ba ham lae te nen te diklai a kang eh,' a ti nah." 
Luke13:8 Tedae anih te a doo tih, “Boeipa, te te pin ka to li tih aek ka sang hil tah kum at he khaw hlun mai." 
Luke13:9 Thanghal a pha atah a thaih khaw cuen mai ni ta, a thaih pawt bal atah na vung mai bitni,” a ti nah."
