John17:24 A pa diklai a tong hlanah ni kai nan lungnah coeng dongah te rhoek te kai nan paek coeng. Ka om nah ah amih khaw kamah taengah om saeh ka ngaih. Te daengah ni kamah kah thangpomnah kamah nam paek te a hmuh uh eh. 
John17:25 Aka dueng a pa, diklai loh nang m'ming ngawn pawt cakhaw kai loh nang kan ming tih nang loh kai nan tueih te he rhoek loh a ming uh." 
John17:26 Namah ming te amih taengah ka phoe coeng tih ka phoe pueng ni. Te daengah ni kai nan lungnah dongkah lungnah loh amih ah om vetih kai khaw amih ah ka om eh,” a ti." 
John18:1 Jesuh loh hekah he a thui phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek neh Kidron sok rhalvangan la cet. Teah te dum pakhat om tih a hnukbang rhoek te a khuila a kun puei. 
John18:2 Tekah hmuen ah a hnukbang rhoek neh Jesuh a humtun uh taitu dongah amah aka voei Judas long khaw a hmuen te a ming. 
John18:3 Te dongah Judas loh caem a khuen hatah khosoihham neh Pharisee rhoek kah tueihyoeih rhoek long khaw hmaiim, hmaithoi, pumcumnah neh ha pawk uh." 
John18:4 Jesuh loh amah soah aka lo boeih te a ming dongah amih taengla cet tih, “Ulae na toem uh? “ a ti nah." 
John18:5 Amah te, “Nazareth Jesuh,” a ti na uh. Amih te khaw, “Kai ni he,” a ti nah. Te vaengah amah aka voei Judas khaw amih taengah pai." 
John18:6 Te dongah amih te, “Kai ni,” a ti nah vaengah a hnuk la nong uh tih lai la bung uh." 
John18:7 Te dongah amih te, “Ulae na toem uh, “ tila koep a dawt. Te vaengah, “Nazareth Jesuh,” a ti uh." 
John18:8 Jesuh loh, “Kai ni tila nangmih taengah ka thui coeng. Te dongah kai ni nan toem uh atah hekah rhoek he hlah uh lamtah nong saeh,” a ti nah." 
John18:9 Te daengah ni, 'Amih te kai nan paek coeng dongah amih khuikah pakhat khaw ka hlong moenih,” tila a thui olka te soep eh." 
John18:10 Te vaengah Simon Peter loh a khueh cunghang te a yueh tih khosoihham kah sal te a boeng tih bantang hna te a hlueng pah [Sal te a ming Malkhu ni]. 
John18:11 Tedae Jesuh loh Peter te, “cunghang te capang khuila sang laeh. A pa loh kai m'paek boengloeng te ka o mahpawt nim,” a ti nah. Annas Taengla a Khuen uh" 
John18:12 Te vaengah caem, rhalboeipa neh Judah rhoek kah tueihyoeih rhoek loh Jesuh te a tuuk uh tih a khih uh phoeiah Annas taengah lamhma la a khuen uh." 
John18:13 Anih te te vaeng kum kah khosoihham la aka om Kaiaphas kah a masae la om. 
John18:14 Te vaengah aka om Kaiaphas loh, “Hlang pakhat loh pilnam ham a duek te rhoei ngai, “tila Judah rhoek te a uen." 
John18:15 Te vaengah Jesuh te Simon Peter neh hnukbang pakhat loh a vai. Tekah hnukbang te khaw khosoihham aka hmat la a om dongah Jesuh taengah khosoihham kah vongup la kun. 
John18:16 Tedae Peter tah thohka ah hoei pai. Te dongah khosoihham aka hmat hnukbang pakhat te cet tih imtawt nu te a voek phoeiah Peter te a khuen. 
John18:17 Te dongah imtawt salnu loh Peter te, “Nang khaw hekah hlang kah hnukbang khuiah na om pawt nim?” a ti nah. Anih loh, “Ka om moenih,” a ti nah." 
John18:18 Te vaengkah aka pai sal rhoek neh tueihyoeih rhoek loh khosik la a om dongah hmai a toih tih a om uh. Peter khaw om van tih amih aka pai rhoek taengah hmai a om. 
John18:19 Te vaengah khosoihham loh Jesuh te a hnukbang kawng neh a thuituennah kawng te a dawt. 
John18:20 Jesuh loh, “Kai loh diklai taengah sayalh la ka thui coeng. Judah rhoek boeih a tingtun nah tunim neh bawkim ah ka thuituen taitu tih a huephael la ka thui moenih." 
John18:21 Balae tih kai nan dawt ? Ka thui te aka ya amih taengah dawt. Kai loh ka thui te amih loh a ming uh lahko,” a ti nah." 
John18:22 Tedae hekah he a thui vaengah aka pai tueihyoeih pakhat loh Jesuh te kutcaihnah la a khueh tih, “Khosoihham te na voek van pueng,” a ti nah." 
John18:23 Jesuh loh anih te, A thae la ka cal atah a thae te han thui. Tedae a thuem atah balae tih kai nan boh,” a ti nah." 
John18:24 Te phoeiah Annas loh Jesuh te a khih tih khosoihham Kaiaphas taengla a thak. 
John18:25 Te vaengah aka om Simon Peter khaw pai tih hmai a om. Te dongah anih te, “Nang khaw anih hnukbang rhoek khuikah la na om pawt nim? a ti na uh. Tedae anih te basa tih, “Ka om moenih,” a ti nah." 
John18:26 Khosoihham kah sal rhoek khuikah pakhat [Peter loh a hna a hlueng pah te a huiko la om] loh, “Kai loh anih neh nang te dum ah kan hmuh moenih a?” a ti nah." 
John18:27 Tedae Peter loh koep basa vaengah ai pahoi khong. 
John18:28 Te phoeiah Jesuh te Kaiaphas taeng lamloh khoboeiyung la a khuen uh. Tedae a yue aih pueng dongah amih te khoboeiyung la kun uh pawh. Te daengah ni boi uh pawt vetih yoom te a vael mong eh. 
John18:29 Te dongah Pilat te poengla cet tih amih te, “Hekah hlang soah ba lai lae na pael uh,” a ti nah." 
John18:30 Te vaengah anih a doo uh, “Anih loh a thae la a saii te om pawt koinih nang taengla anih kan thak uh mahpawh,” a ti uh." 
John18:31 Te dongah Pilat loh amih te, “Anih te namamih loh khuen uh lamtah namamih kah olkhueng bangla laitloek uh,” a ti nah. Judah rhoek loh, “Kaimih n'ngawn sak loengloeng moenih,” a ti uh." 
John18:32 Te daengah ni Jesuh kah olka loh, 'Duek ham cai tih dueknah te a phoe,' a ti te soep eh." 
John18:33 Te phoeiah Pilat te khoboeiyung la koep kun tih Jesuh te a khue phoeiah, “Nang he Judah manghai la na om a?” a ti nah." 
John18:34 Jesuh loh, “Hekah he nang loh namah lamkah nim na thui ? A tloe rhoek loh nang taengah kai kawng han thui a? “ a ti nah." 
John18:35 Pilat loh, “Kai he Judah hlang la ka om ngawn pawh. Balae na saii tih na namtu neh khosoihham rhoek loh kai taengla nang n'thak?” a ti nah." 
John18:36 Jesuh loh, “Kai kah ram tah he diklai kah ram la om pawh. Kai kah ram tah he diklai kah ram la om koinih Judah rhoek te kai m'voeih pawt ham ka tueihyoeih rhoek loh a hnueih uh ni. Tedae kai kah ram te heah om pawh,” a ti nah." 
John18:37 Te dongah Pilat loh, “Te koinih nang manghai la na om a?” a ti nah. Jesuh loh, “Manghai la ka om te namah long ni na thui. Oltak phong ham kai ka thaang tih he ham ni diklai la ka pawk. Oltak kah hlang la aka om boeih loh kai ol a hnatun,” a ti nah." 
John18:38 Pilat loh, “Oltak te ba lae?” a ti nah. Hekah he a thui phoeiah Judah rhoek taengla koep cet tih amamih te, “Anih dongah paelnaehnah ka hmuh moenih." 
John18:39 Tedae yoom ah nangmih taengkah pakhat ka hlah ham namamih khosing om. Te dongah Judah manghai te hlah ham nangmih na ngaih uh a?” a ti nah. 
John18:40 Te dongah koep pang uh tih, “Anih moenih Barabbas te,” a ti uh. Te vaengah Barabbas tah dingca la om." 
John19:1 Te vaengah Pilat loh Jesuh te a doek tih a boh sak. 
John19:2 Rhalkap rhoek long khaw hling rhuisam a vaeh uh tih a lu ah a khuem sak uh. Te phoeiah daidi himbai neh a khuk uh. 
John19:3 Te phoeiah amah te a paan uh tih, “Judah rhoek kah manghai te uem uh lah,” a ti uh phoeiah kutcaihnah la a khueh uh." 
John19:4 Te phoeiah Pilat te phawn koep cet tih amih te, “Anih he nangmih taengah phawn kang hal coeng ne. Te daengah ni anih soah paelnaehnah ka hmuh pawt te na ming uh eh,” a ti nah." 
John19:5 Jesuh tah pawh ha thoeng vaengah hling rhuisam neh daidi himbai te a bai. Pilat long khaw amih taengah, “Hlang aih he,” a ti nah." 
John19:6 Te dongah khosoihham rhoek neh tueihyoeih rhoek loh amah te a hmuh uh vaengah a ho uh tih, “Tai laeh, tai laeih,” a ti uh. Pilat loh amih taengah, “Amah he namamih loh khuen uh lamtah tai uh. Kai tah a soah paelnaehnah ka hmuh moenih,” a ti nah." 
John19:7 Judah rhoek loh, “Kaimih loh olkhueng ka khueh uh. Te dongah amah te Pathen capa la a sak uh dongah olkhueng vanbangla a duek ham a kuek,” a ti uh." 
John19:8 Pilat loh hekah olka a yaak vaengah taoe a rhih. 
John19:9 Te dongah khoboeiyung la koep kun tih Jesuh te, “Nang mekah nim?” a ti nah. Tedae Jesuh loh anih te ollannah khaw thuung pawh." 
John19:10 Te dongah Pilat loh, “Kai rhae nan voek pawh. Nang hlah ham saithainah ka khueh tih nang tai ham khaw saithainah ka khueh te na ming moenih a?” a ti nah." 
John19:11 Jesuh loh, “Nang taengah soben lamkah paek la a om pawt atah kai taengah saithainah na khueh loeng loeng moenih. Te dongah nang taengah kai aka voei loh a nah la tholhnah a khueh,” a ti nah." 
John19:12 Te vaeng lamkah Pilat loh Jesuh te hlah ham a dawn. Tedae Judah rhoek te pang uh tih, “Anih he na hlah atah Kaisar kah paya la na om moenih. Amah te manghai la aka saii uh boeih loh Kaisar te a tloelh,” a ti uh." 
John19:13 Hekah olka te a yaak dongah Pilat loh Jesuh te phawn a mawt uh coeng. Te vaengah amah te lungphaih [tedae Hebrew ol la Gabbatha] la a khue hmuen kah ngolkhoel soah ngol. 
John19:14 Te vaengah yoom kah rhuengphongnah om. Khonoek parhuk tluk a lo vaengah Judah rhoek te, “Nangmih kah manghai he,” a ti nah." 
John19:15 Te dongah amih loh, “Khuen laeh, khuen laeh, anih te tai laeh, “tila a ho uh. Pilat loh amih te, Nangmih kah manghai te ka tai aya?” a ti nah. Khosoihham loh, “Kaisar pawt atah manghai ka khueh uh moenih,” a ti uh." 
John19:16 Te dongah Jesuh te tai ham amih taengah a paek tih a khuen uh. 
John19:17 Thinglam te khaw amah loh a koh tih lurhuh a ti nah hmuen la cet. Tekah te Hebrew la Golgotha a ti. 
John19:18 Te ah te amah neh a taengah voeivang kah a tloe rhoi laklo ah Jesuh te a tai uh. 
John19:19 Mingnoek khaw Pilat loh a daek tih thinglam soi ah a tai uh. Te vaengkah a daek te “Judah rhoek kah manghai Nazareth Jesuh “ la om. 
John19:20 Jesuh thinglam ah a tai nah hmuen te kho neh rhep a om dongah tekah mingnoek te Judah rhoek loh muep a tae uh. Te te Hebrew, Latin, Greek la a daek." 
John19:21 Te dongah Judah khosoihham rhoek loh Pilat te, “Judah rhoek kah manghai lam pawt tih amah loh, 'Judah rhoek kah manghai la ka om a ti, ' tila na daek mako,” a ti nah uh." 
John19:22 Pilat loh, “Ka daek tangtae te ka daek coeng,” a ti nah." 
John19:23 Te dongah Jesuh a tai uh vaengah rhalkap rhoek loh a himbai te a loh pah uh. Te phoeiah pali la a vaek uh tih rhalkap pakhat loh khat rhip a loh uh. Angki te khaw om dae angki te a so lamkah rhuih boeih a tah dongah mulh phaai uh. 
John19:24 Te dongah amamih te, “He tah phen uh boel sih. Tedae u ham a om khaw hmulung bangla yo uh sih,” a ti uh. Te daengah ni cacim loh, “Ka himbai te amamih ham a phen uh tih ka pueinak te hmulung a naan uh,” a ti te a soep eh. Rhalkap rhoek long khaw te te a saii uh tangloeng." 
John19:25 Jesuh kah thinglam taengah a manu, a manu kah a mana, Klopa yuu Mary neh Magadala Mary te pai uh." 
John19:26 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a manu neh a lungnah hnukbang a pai te a hmuh vaengah a manu te, “Huta na capa aih he,” a ti nah." 
John19:27 Te phoeiah hnukbang te, “Na nu te ne,” a ti nah. Te vaeng tue lamkah tah hnukbang pakhat loh a manu te amah taengla a khuen." 
John19:28 Te phoeiah Jesuh loh boeih soep coeng tila a ming. Te daengah ni cacim khaw a soep eh. 
John19:29 “ Tui ka hal,” vaengah amrhaeng dongah yuthui a bae la ana om. Caethum te yuthui neh mawk a sul phoeiah pumpiding neh a yen uh tih a ka ah a mop pa uh." 
John19:30 Tedae yuthui te a doe vaengah Jesuh loh, “Ka khah coeng,” a ti. Te phoeiah a lu a thuk tih a mal te pat." 
John19:31 Te vaengah Judah rhoek tah rhingphongnah om coeng. Sabbath te khohnin tanglue a om dongah Sabbath vaengah tah thinglam dongah rhok naeh sak moenih. Te dongah Pilat taengah, “Amih rhoek kah kho te khaem vetih khuen ham a bih uh." 
John19:32 Te dongah rhalkap rhoek loh a paan uh tih lamhma kah kho te a khaem pa uh. Te phoeiah a taengkah a tai hmaih pakhat kah te khaw a khaem pa uh. 
John19:33 Tedae Jesuh taengah a pha uh vaengah a duek tangtae la a hmuh uh dongah a kho te khaem pa uh pawh. 
John19:34 Tedae rhalkap pakhat loh cai neh a vae te a thun hatah thii neh tui pong ha thoeng. 
John19:35 Te vaengkah aka hmuh loh, “A olphong tah oltak la om tih nangmih long khaw na tangnah uh ham a thui te amah tah thuem tila ming,” tila a phong." 
John19:36 He he a om daengah ni cacim loh, “A rhuh tlawt mahpawh,” a ti te a soep eh." 
John19:37 Te phoeiah cacim pakhat loh, “Anih a thun uh te a sawt uh ni, “koep a thui." 
John19:38 Te phoeiah Arimathae lamkah Joseph loh Jesuh kah rhok khuen ham te Pilat te a dawt. Jesuh hnukbang la om dae Judah rhoek a rhihnah dongah a phah. Pilat loh a paek dongah a paan tih a rhok te a khuen. 
John19:39 Te phoeiah Nikodemu khaw ha pawk. Te long te hnuk vaengkah khoyin ah amah te a paan coeng. Anih long te myrrh neh thingul pound yakhat tluk a thoek te a khuen. 
John19:40 Jesuh kah rhok te a loh rhoi phoeiah Judah rhoek kah khosing a om vanbangla up ham himbai te bo-ul neh a yol rhoi. 
John19:41 Te vaengah a tai nah hmuen te dum ah om. Dum khuiah hlan thai om a khuiah ukhaw up hlan. 
John19:42 Judah rhoek kah rhuengphongnah te tapkhoeh a om dongah a yoei kah aka om phuel ah Jesuh te a up rhoi. 
John20:1 Sabbath poeng kah a khohnin lamhma mincang khohmuep pueng ah Magadala nu Mary te hlan la a pawk uh hatah hlan lamkah lungto vik a thoeih a hmuh. 
John20:2 Te dongah yong tih Simon Peter neh Jesuh loh a lungnah a tloe hnukbang taengah te cet. Te phoeiah amih taengah, “Boeipa te hlan lamkah vik a loh uh tih mela a khueh uh khaw ka ming uh pawh,” a ti nah." 
John20:3 Te dongah Peter neh a tloe hnukbang te cet rhoi tih phuel la pawk uh. 
John20:4 Te vaengah panit la hmaih yong rhoi dae a tloe hnukbang loh Peter te a loe la a khal tih hlan te lamhma la a pha. 
John20:5 A sawt thuk vaengah himbai sut a om te a hmuh dae a khuila kun pawh. 
John20:6 Te vaengah anih hnuk aka vai Simon Peter khaw ha pawk tih hlan khuila a kun hatah himbai kak a yalh te khaw," 
John20:7 A lu soah aka om himbaica te khaw himbai aka yalh taengah om pawt tih hmuen pakhat ah khaw hloep a tlim pawt te khaw a hmuh. 
John20:8 Te phoeiah hlan ah lamhma aka pha a tloe hnukbang te khaw kun tih a hmuh daengah a tangnah. 
John20:9 Amah te duek lamkah a thoh ham a kuek ni tila cacim aka om te ming uh hlan. 
John20:10 Te phoeiah hnukbang rhoek te amamih im la koep mael uh. 
John20:11 Tedae Mary tah hlan kaeng ah pai tih rhap. Te tlam te a rhah doela hlan te a sawt thuk. 
John20:12 Te vaengah puencawn rhoi tah phaeng a bok la Jesuh rhok a yalh nah a lu ah pakhat, a kho ah pakhat a ngol rhoi te a hmuh." 
John20:13 Amih rhoi loh Mary te, “Huta balae na rhah,” a ti nah. Amih rhoi taengah, “Ka Boeipa te vik a khuen uh tih anih te mela a khueh uh khaw ka ming pawt,” a ti nah." 
John20:14 Hekah he a thui tih a hnuk la a mael vaengah Jesuh a pai te a hmuh dae Jesuh ni tila ming pawh. 
John20:15 Jesuh loh Mary te, “Huta, balae na rhah, ulae na toem ?,” a ti nah. Mary loh dumtawt coi ni tila a poek dongah, “Boeipa anih te na loh atah mela na khueh khaw kai taengah han thui lamtah, ka khuen pawneh,” a ti nah." 
John20:16 Jesuh loh, “Mary,” a ti nah daengah amah te mael tih Hebrew ol la, “Rhabboni,” a ti nah. [Te tah saya ni a thuingaih]." 
John20:17 Jesuh loh, “Kai n'taek boeh, Pa taengla ka caeh hlan dongah. Ka manuca rhoek taengah cet lamtah amih te, 'A pa neh na pa la aka om tih Kai kah Pathen neh nangmih kah Pathen taengah ka cet ni, ' tila thui pa dae,” a ti nah." 
John20:18 Magadala nu Mary tah cet tih hnukbang rhoek taengah, “Boeipa te ka hmuh coeng, “tila puen. Anih taengkah a thui te khaw a thui." 
John20:19 Te dongah Sabbath poeng kah lamhmacuek khohnin hlaem a pha. Te vaengah hnukbang rhoek tah Judah rhoek a rhihnah kongah a om nah thohka te a khaih uh. Jesuh tah ha pawk tih amih lakli ah pai pah. Te phoeiah amih te, “Nangmih taengah ngaimongnah om saeh,” a ti nah." 
John20:20 Hekah he a thui phoeiah a kut neh a vae te amih a tueng. Hnukbang rhoek loh boeipa te a hmuh uh dongah omngaih uh. 
John20:21 Te dongah Jesuh loh, “Ngaimongnah nangmih taengah om saeh, a pa loh kai n'tueih bangla kai loh nangmih kan tueih,” koep a ti nah." 
John20:22 Te a thui phoeiah a hmuh tih amih te, “Mueihla Cim te doe uh." 
John20:23 Khat khat kah tholhnah te na hlah uh atah amih te a hlah coeng. khat khat kah te na pin uh atah a pin uh coeng,” a ti nah." 
John20:24 Tedae hlainit khuikah pakhat Didymus la a khue Thomas tah Jesuh ha pawk vaengah amih taengah om pawh. 
John20:25 Te dongah hnukbang a tloe rhoek loh amah taengah, “Boeipa ka hmuh uh coeng,” a ti na uh. Tedae amih taengah, “A kut kah thicung ngo te ka hmuh tih thicung ngo ah ka kutdawn ka puei phoeiah a vae te ka kut neh yam pawt atah ka tangnah mahpawh,” a ti." 
John20:26 Hnin rhet phoeiah a hnukbang rhoek tah a khuiah koep om uh tih Thomas khaw amih taengah om. Thohka te a khaih uh dae ta Jesuh te ha pawk tih amih lakliah pai. Te phoeiah, “Ngaimongnah nangmih taengah om saeh,” a ti nah." 
John20:27 Te phoeiah Thomas te, “Na kutdawn te hela hang khuen lamtah ka kut so lah. Na kut te khaw yueng lamtah ka vae te puei lah. Tedae aka tangnahmueh boel lamtah uepom la om lah,” a ti nah." 
John20:28 Thomas loh amah te a doo tih, “Ka Boeipa neh ka Pathen,” a ti nah." 
John20:29 Anih te Jesuh loh, “Kai nan hmuh dongah nan tangnah. Hmuh mueh la aka tangnah rhoek tah a yoethen uh,” a ti nah." 
John20:30 Te dongah a hnukbang rhoek hmaiah Jesuh loh miknoek a tloe muep a saii. Te tah hekah cabu ah daek la aka om moenih. 
John20:31 Tedae Jesuh te Pathen capa Khrih ni tila na tangnah uh ham neh aka tangnah rhoek loh amah ming neh hingnah na dang uh ham ni hekah he a daek. 
John21:1 Hekah phoeiah, hnukbang rhoek ham Tiberias tuili ah Jesuh amah te koep phoe." 
John21:2 A phoe tangloeng vaengah Simon Peter, Didymus la a khue Thomas, Galilee ram Kana lamkah Nathanael, Zebedee ca rhoek neh a hnukbang a tloe panit te tun om uh." 
John21:3 Simon Peter loh amih taengah, “Ngatu la ka cet ni,” a ti nah. Te dongah amah te, “Kaimih khaw nang taengah ka lo uh ni,” a ti na uh. Cet uh tih lawng dongah kun uh ngawn dae tekah khoyin ah a tuuk uh moenih." 
John21:4 Mincang a pha vaengah Jesuh te tuikaeng ah pai dae hnukbang rhoek loh Jesuh ni tila ming uh pawh. 
John21:5 Te dongah Jesuh loh amih taengah, “Camoe rhoek, ngasa khat khaw na khueh uh moenih a? “ a ti nah hatah, “Om pawh,” a ti na uh." 
John21:6 Tedae amih te, “Lawng a kaepvai kah bantang benah lawk te voei lamtah nga na dang uh bitni,” a ti nah. Te dongah lawk te a voeih uh hatah doek thai pawt la nga muep yet." 
John21:7 Te vaengah Jesuh loh a lungnah hnukbang loh Peter taengah, “Boeipa ni, “la a ti nah. Simon Peter tah a tlingyal la a om dongah Boeipa ni tila a yaak vaengah a sokah himbai te a vaep tih tuili ah amah cungpung." 
John21:8 Tedae a tloe hnukbang rhoek tah lawng neh ha lo uh. Lan lamloh dong yahnih tluk pataeng lakhla la a om uh mueh la nga lawk te a mawt uh. 
John21:9 Lan te a pha uh vaengah hmai ulh om tih vaidam neh nga te a tloeng thil a hmuh uh. 
John21:10 Jesuh loh amih te, “Tahae kah na tuuk uh nga te bet han khuen uh,” a ti nah." 
John21:11 Te dongah Simon Peter loh cet tih nga len ya sawmnga pathum a bae la lawk te lan la a doek. Heyet lo dae lawk tah pawn pawh. 
John21:12 Jesuh loh amih te, “Halo uh buh ca uh,” a ti nah. Te vaengah anih te, “U nang nim?” tila dawt ham khaw hnukbang rhoek loh ngaingaih voel pawh. Boeipa ni tila a ming uh coeng." 
John21:13 Jesuh ha pawk tih vaidam te a loh phoeiah amih te a paek, nga khaw te khaw amih a paek." 
John21:14 Tahae ah he duek lamkah a thoh phoeiah Jesuh loh hnukbang rhoek taengah a pathum phoe nah ni. 
John21:15 A caak uh vaengah Jesuh loh Simon Peter te, “Johan capa Simon amih lakah kai nan lungnah a?,” a ti nah. Peter loh, “Ue, Boeipa, Nang kan lungnah te namah loh na ming,” a ti nah. Jesuh loh, “” Kai kah tuca rhoek te cuncah ne,” a ti nah." 
John21:16 A pabae la anih te, “Johan capa Simon kai nan lungnah a?,” a ti nah. Peter loh, “Ue, Boeipa, Nang kah lungnah te namah loh na ming,” a ti nah. Jesuh loh, “Ka tu te dawndah ne,” a ti nah." 
John21:17 A pathum ah Peter te, “Johan capa Simon. kai nan lungnah a? “ a ti nah. Anih te, “Kai nan lungnah a? “ tila voeithum a dawt dongah Peter tah a kothae tih, “Boeipa, namah loh boeih na ming. Nang kan lungnah te namah loh na ming,” a ti nah. Jesuh loh, “Kai kah tu rhoek te cuncah ne." 
John21:18 Nang taengah rhep, rhep ka thui. Tanoe la na om vaengah namah loh khih tih na ngaih la na cet dae na patong vaengah na kut te na phuel vetih hlang tloe loh nang n'khih phoeiah na ngaih mueh hmuen la n'sol ni,” a ti nah." 
John21:19 He vaengah ni dueknah lamloh Pathen a thangpom ham te a thui tih a phoe coeng. Hekah he a thui phoeiah Peter te, “Kai m'vai,” a ti nah." 
John21:20 Peter te a mael vaengah Jesuh loh a lungnah hnukbang ham vai te a hmuh. Anih te khaw hlaembuh vaengah a rhang dongah hangdang tih, “Boeipa nang aka voei te unim?” a ti nah." 
John21:21 Anih te Peter loh a hmuh vaengah Jesuh te, “Boeipa, anih tah metlam lae?” a ti nah." 
John21:22 Jesuh loh, “Anih te ka lo due naeh sak ham ka ngaih cakhaw nang ham balae a ti eh? Nang te kai m'vai ngawn,” a ti nah." 
John21:23 Te dongah, “Tekah hnukbang tah duek mahpawh a ti olka te manuca rhoek taengah yilh cet. Tedae Jesuh loh anih te, “Duek mahpawh,” a ti moenih. “Anih te ka pawk duela naeh sak ka ngaih cakhaw nang ham balae a ti eh?” ti ni a thui." 
John21:24 He tah hnukbang rhoek loh a phong tih a daek rhoek te ni. Te dongah a olphong aka om tah oltak tila m'ming uh. 
John21:25 Jesuh loh a saii te a tloe khaw muep om dae tekah te pakhat pakhat ah daek uh koinih cabu daek tangtae te diklai amah pataeng hoeng mahpawh tila ka poek. 
Acts1:1 Aw Theophilu lamhma kah olka ngawn tah cungkuem la ka khueh coeng. 
Acts1:2 Te tah Jesuh loh a saii ham neh thuituen ham a tong lamloh Mueihla Cim dongah caeltueih rhoek a uen khohnin hil kah ni. Amih ni a tuek tih a loh. 
Acts1:3 A patang phoeiah a hing te mingphanah cungkuem neh amah loh a pai puei bal coeng. Khohnin sawmli khuiah amih taengla phoe tih Pathen ram kawng te a thui. 
Acts1:4 Te vaengah, “Jerusalem lamkah nong kolla tingtun uh tih kai taengkah pa olkhueh na yaak uh te a rhingoel uh." 
Acts1:5 Nangmih te Johan loh tui n'nuem coeng dae khohnin muep a di mueh la Mueihla Cim neh n'nuem uh ni,” tila amih te a uen." 
Acts1:6 Te dongah aka tingtun rhoek loh amah te a dawt uh tih, “Boeipa, tihnin ah Israel ram na thoh koinih ta,” a ti na uh." 
Acts1:7 Tedae amih taengah, “Pa loh amah kah saithainah neh a khueh a tue khohnin he nangmih kah a ming koi la a om moenih." 
Acts1:8 Tedae nangmih soah aka thoeng Cim Mueihla kah saithainah na dang uh bitni. Te vaengah Jerusalem neh Judea pum, Samaria neh diklai khobawt duela kai kah laipai la na om uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Acts1:8 Tedae nangmih soah aka thoeng Cim Mueihla kah saithainah na dang uh bitni. Te vaengah Jerusalem neh Judea pum, Samaria neh diklai khobawt duela kai kah laipai la na om uh ni,” a ti nah." 
Acts1:9 He rhoek he a thui tih a sawt uh vaengah Boeipa te a pom hang. Te phoeiah khomai loh amih mikhmuh lamkah voelh a doe. 
Acts1:10 Amah vaan la a caeh vaengah rhep aka hmaitang la amih te om uh. Te vaengah hlang panit loh himbai bok neh amih taengah pakcak a pai pah. 
Acts1:11 Te rhoi long khaw, “Galilee hlang rhoek, balae na pai uh tih vaan ke na dan uh. Jesuh he nangmih taeng lamkah vaan la a loh dongah vaan la a caeh na hmuh vaengkah a longim bangla ha pawk ni,” a ti nah." 
Acts1:12 Te phoeiah Olive la a khue tlang lamloh Jerusalem la bal uh. Tekah te Sabbath kah yincaeh khoeng Jerusalem taengah om. 
Acts1:13 Cet uh tih imhman la a luei uh vaengah, Peter neh Johan, James neh Andrew, Philip neh Thomas, Bartholomew neh Matthai, Alphaeus capa James, namlung Simon neh James capa Judah khaw ana pah uh tih ana om uh." 
Acts1:13 Cet uh tih imhman la a luei uh vaengah, Peter neh Johan, James neh Andrew, Philip neh Thomas, Bartholomew neh Matthai, Alphaeus capa James, namlung Simon neh James capa Judah khaw ana pah uh tih ana om uh." 
Acts1:14 Amih boeih loh huta rhoek nen khaw, Jesuh kah a manu Mary, a manuca rhoek nen khaw, thikat la om tih thangthuinah te a khuituk uh." 
Acts1:15 Te vaengah hnin ah Peter loh manuca rhoek kah laklung ah pai [Hmuen pakhat ah ming pakhat neh aka om hlangping he ya pakul tluk tah om van] tih," 
Acts1:16 “Ka hlang rhoek, ka manuca rhoek, Jesuh aka tu rhoek kah longtueng la aka om, Judas kawng dongah, David ka dongah Mueihla Cim loh a thui olcim te a soep ham a kuek." 
Acts1:17 Te dongah mamih khuikah aka om he tae sih lamtah tahae kah bibi he hmulung neh yo saeh. 
Acts1:18 Anih loh boethae phu neh khohmuen te kaelh ngawn cakhaw singling singloei lamni a om. Te dongah a laklung ah vawh tih a kotak boeih coe coeng. 
Acts1:19 Te dongah Jerusalem kah khosa boeih loh a hmat om coeng tih khohmuen te amah ol neh Akeldamah a sui. Te tah hlang thii khohmuen ni. 
Acts1:20 Te dongah ni tingtoeng cabu dongah khaw, “A dap te khosoek la poeh saeh lamtah a khuiah khosa loh om boel saeh. Te phoeiah, anih kah hiphoelnah te hlang tloe loh loh pah saeh, “tila a daek." 
Acts1:21 Te dongah Boeipa Jesuh tah mamih taengah a voei a bal tue khui boeih ah hlang rhoek he mamih taengah a tingtun ham a kuek. 
Acts1:22 Johan kah baptisma lamloh a tong tih mamih taeng lamkah a loh hnin duela mamih taengkah aka om longtah a thohkoepnah laipai pakhat la om van saeh,” a ti." 
Acts1:23 Te dongah Barasabbas la a khue Joseph [Anih te Justus lam khaw a khue] neh Matthias hlang panit te a pai sak uh. 
Acts1:24 Te phoeiah thangthui uh tih, “Soeprhaep boeih kah lungming Boeipa nang loh he rhoi khuiah tahae kah bibi neh caeltueih hmuen aka lo ham na tuek pakhat te phoe sak lah." 
Acts1:25 Amah hmuen la aka cet ham koi Judas tah palang coeng,” a ti uh." 
Acts1:26 Te phoeiah amih rhoi ham hmulung a naan uh hatah Matthias te hmulung loh a tlak thil tih a hlaikhat nah caeltueih la a tae thil uh. 
Acts2:1 Pentekos hnin a pha vaengah pakhat la tun boeih om uh. 
Acts2:2 Te vaengah vaan lamkah olhum tah khohli puei aka hli bangla tarha om tih aka ngol rhoek a om nah im te khuk bae. 
Acts2:3 Te vaengah amih taengah hmai bangla thoeng a lai long khaw phik uh tih amih pakhat rhip soah a ngol thil. 
Acts2:4 Te vengah Mueihla Cim neh boeih bae uh tih Mueihla loh amih taengah thui ham a paek vanbangla ol tloe neh koe cal uh. 
Acts2:5 Te vaengah Jerusalem kah khosa Judah rhoek, vaan hmui neh namtom boeih khuikah aka cuep hlang rhoek khaw om uh." 
Acts2:6 Tekah ol a om vaengah amih kah a thui te pakhat rhip loh amah ol la a yaak uh dongah rhaengpuei loh tingtun tih puen uh. 
Acts2:7 limlum uh tih a ngaihmang uh dongah, “Hekah aka om boeih he Galilee ol la aka cal rhoek moenih a he?" 
Acts2:8 Balae tih mamih loh n'thaang nah kah m'mah ol la rhip n'yaak uh. 
Acts2:9 Parthian, Mede neh Elamite khaw, Mesopotamia kah khosa rhoek khaw, Judea neh Kappadokia khaw, Pontus neh Asia khaw," 
Acts2:9 Parthian, Mede neh Elamite khaw, Mesopotamia kah khosa rhoek khaw, Judea neh Kappadokia khaw, Pontus neh Asia khaw," 
Acts2:10 Phrygia neh Pamphylia khaw, Egypt neh Lybia pingpang Kurene ben khaw, Roman laiom khaw," 
Acts2:11 Judah rhoek neh poehlip rhoek long khaw, Krete neh Arab rhoek long kaw a thui te mah ol n'yaak uh tih, Pathen tah lenduet pai,” a ti uh." 
Acts2:12 Hlang boeih loh limlum uh tih hit uh. Pakhat loh pakhat taengah, “Balae a ngaih tih he tlam he a om,” a ti uh." 
Acts2:13 Tedae a tloe rhoek loh a nueih thil uh tih, “Didip tui aka rhuihmil rhoek ni,” a ti uh." 
Acts2:14 Tedae Peter neh hlaikhat loh a pai doeah a ol a huel tih amih te, “Judah hlang rhoek neh Jerusalem kah khosa boeih, he tah nangmih loh na hmat uh hamla om saeh lamtah ka olthui mah hna kaeng uh." 
Acts2:15 Na ngaihoih uh bangla he rhoek tah a rhui uh moenih. Khothaih khonoek pataeng pathum ni a lo pueng. 
Acts2:16 Tedae hekah he tah tonghma Joel lamloh a thui te ni. 
Acts2:17 “Khohnin hnukkhueng dongla a om vaengah, Pathen loh, 'Pumsa boeih te ka Mueihla ka lun thil vetih, na canu na capa rhoek loh ol a phong uh ni. Na cadong rhoek loh mikhlam a hmuh uh ni. Nangmih kah patong rhoek loh mang a man uh ni." 
Acts2:18 Tekah khohnin ah Ka sal rhoek so neh ka salnu rhoek soah khaw ka Mueihla ka lun vetih ol a phong uh ni. 
Acts2:19 Vaan so ah khobae rhambae, diklai hmui ah miknoek te thii, hmai, tuihu hmaikhu neh ka paek ni." 
Acts2:20 Boeipa kah a len neh mingom khohnin ha pawk tomah tah khomik loh yinnah la, hla khaw thii la poeh ni." 
Acts2:21 Te vaengah ana om bitni, Boeipa ming aka phoei boeih te tah daemni." 
Acts2:22 Israel hlang rhoek, ol he hnatun uh. Nazareth Jesuh, nangmih taengah Pathen loh han tai hlang te, na ming uh bangla anih lamkah ni thaomnah, khobae rhambae neh miknoek khaw Pathen loh nangmih lakli ah a saii." 
Acts2:23 Pathen kah mangtaengnah neh mingnah loh a hoep anih te lailak kut loh han tloeng dongah na tai uh tih na ngawn uh. 
Acts2:24 Tedae dueknah loh anih a pin ham tah a coeng koi la a om pawt dongah dueknah bungtloh te a hlam pah tih Pathen loh amah te a thoh. 
Acts2:25 Anih te David long khaw a thui tih, “Boeipa te ka hmaiah vawp vawp ka hmaitang yoeyah tih ka bantang ah a om dongah ka hinghoek mahpawh." 
Acts2:26 Te dongah ka thinko loh a uum tih ka ol loh hlampan. Ka pum long khaw ngaiuepnah dongah kho a tuk bal pueng ni. 
Acts2:27 Ka hinglu he saelkhui ah na phap sut pawt tih na hlangcim te pocinah tong sak ham na paek moenih. 
Acts2:28 Hingnah longpuei te kai nan tueng tih, na mikhmuh ah omngaihnah neh kai nan baetawt sak." 
Acts2:29 Manuca rhoek, ka hlang rhoek aw, patuel David kawng he nangmih taengah sayalh la thui ham m'pae mai. Anih te duek coeng tih a up bal coeng dae a phuel tah tihnin duela mamih taengah om." 
Acts2:30 Te dongah tonghma la aka om long khaw Pathen loh a pumpu kah a thaih khui lamkah a ngolkhoel dongah ngol sak ham a taengah olhlo neh a toemngam te khaw a ming. 
Acts2:31 Anih te saelkhui ah phap sut pawt ham neh a pumsa loh pocinah tong pawt ham khaw Khrih kah thohkoepnah kawng te a hmaitang tih a thui coeng. 
Acts2:32 Pathen loh Jesuh a thoh dongah mamih boeih he laipai la n'om uh. 
Acts2:33 Te vaengah Pathen kah bantang ah a pomsang. Mueihla Cim kah olkhueh, na hmuh uh tih na yaak uh te pa taeng lamloh han lun tih na dang uh." 
Acts2:34 Te dongah David loh vaan la cet hlan dae anih te a voek vaengah," 
Acts2:35 Boeipa loh, “Ka Boeipa aw, na rhal te na kho ham khotloeng la ka khueh hlan atah, kai kah bantang ah ngol dae,” a ti nah." 
Acts2:36 Te dongah Israel imkhui boeih loh Boeipa amah neh Pathen loh a khueh Khrih khaw rhep ming saeh. Jesuh amah he ni na tai uh,” a ti." 
Acts2:37 A yaak uh vaengah thinko a thun pah tih Peter neh a tloe caeltueih rhoek taengah, “Ka manuca rhoek, ka hlang rhoek, balae ka saii uh eh,” a ti uh." 
Acts2:38 Tedae Peter loh amih taengah, “Yut uh lamtah na tholh khodawkngainah ham nangmih khat rhip loh Jesuh Khrih ming dongah nuem uh lah. Te daengah ni Cim Mueihla kah kutdoe te na dang uh eh." 
Acts2:39 Mamih kah Boeipa Pathen loh a khue boeiloeih atah na ca rhoek ham khaw, khohla kah rhoek boeih ham khaw nangmih taengah olkhueh om coeng." 
Acts2:40 Ol tloe nen khaw muep a uen tih amih a hloep vaengah, “Vilvak cadil khui lamkah he daem uh laeh,” a ti nah." 
Acts2:41 A ol aka dueh rhoek ngawn tah a nuem. Te dongah hnin at dongah hinglu thawngthum tluk thap uh thae. 
Acts2:42 A om uh vaengah caeltueih rhoek kah thuituennah neh rhoinaengnah, vaidam aehnah neh thangthuinah te a khuituk uh." 
Acts2:43 Rhihnah loh hinglu boeih taengah cuen tih caeltueih loh khobae rhambae neh miknoek khaw muep a saii uh. 
Acts2:44 Te dongah aka tangnah rhoek boeih loh thikat la om uh tih tun boeih cut uh thae. 
Acts2:45 Hnopai neh khuehtawn a yoih uh vaengah khaw khat rhip loh a ngoe atah rhip a tael uh. 
Acts2:46 Hnin takuem bawkim te huek a khuituk uh. Im lamkah vaidam te khaw a tael uh. Kohoenah neh thinko lunghoih la buh a doe uh. 
Acts2:47 Pathen a thangthen uh long te pilnam boeih taengah lungvatnah a dang uh bal. Khang la aka om rhoek te khaw a taengla hnin takuem Boeipa loh a thap. 
Acts3:1 Pako kah thangthuinah tue ah Peter neh Johan tah bawkim la cet rhoi. 
Acts3:2 Te vaengah a manu bung khui lamloh aka khawn hlang pakhat te a khuen uh te om tih, bawkim khuila aka kun rhoek taengah doedannah bih sak ham sawtthen la a khue bawkim thohka ah hnin takuem a khueh uh." 
Acts3:3 Anih loh doedannah dang hamla a bih te bawkim khuila kun ham a cai rhoi vaengah Peter neh Johan loh a hmuh. 
Acts3:4 Tedae anih te Peter neh Johan loh a hmaitang tih, “Kaimih rhoi he n'so lah,” a ti nah." 
Acts3:5 Te dongah amih taengkah khat khat dang hamla a lamtawn tih amih te a laehdawn. 
Acts3:6 Te vaengah Peter loh, “Tangka neh sui khaw ka khueh moenih. Tedae nang kam paek ham te he ni ka khueh. Nazareth Jesuh Khrih ming neh thoo lamtah cet laeh,” a ti nah." 
Acts3:7 Te phoeiah bantang kut neh a tuuk tih anih te a thoh hatah a kho neh a khocin khaw pahoi caang. 
Acts3:8 Te dongah cangpet tih, pai tih cet. Te phoeiah amih neh bawkim khuila kun tih a caeh doela soi tih Pathen a thangthen." 
Acts3:9 Cet tih Pathen a thangthen te pilnam pum loh a hmuh vaengah," 
Acts3:10 anih te, bawkim kah sawtthen thohka ah doedannah lamtawn ham aka ngol ni tila a ming uh. Te dongah anih soah aka thoeng te ngaihmangnah neh mueimang bangla om uh." 
Acts3:11 Te vaengah anih loh Peter neh Johan te a tuuk. Pilnam boeih loh Solomon impup la a khue kah amih taengah pawk ha capit uh. 
Acts3:12 A hmuh vaengah Peter loh pilnam te, “Israel hlang rhoek, balae tih he dongah na ngai a hmang uh. Anih a caeh thai ham he amah thaomnah neh hingcimnah lamloh a saii bangla balae tih kaimih nan hmaitang uh." 
Acts3:13 Abraham Pathen, Isaak Pathen, Jakob Pathen, a pa rhoek kah Pathen loh, a ca Jesuh te a thangpom coeng. Anih te Pilat mikhmuh ah na voeih uh tih hlah hamla lai a tloek lalah na aal uh." 
Acts3:14 Tedae nangmih loh hlang cim hlang dueng te na hnawt uh tih hlang aka ngawn hlang vik te khodawkngai ham na bih uh. 
Acts3:15 Te dongah hingnah a rhuihnun ni na ngawn uh. Tedae anih te Pathen loh duek khui lamkah a thoh coeng dongah a laipai la ka om uh. 
Acts3:16 A ming neh tangnah dongah aka hoeih te na hmuh uh coeng. Te dongah a ming loh a hoeih sak te miing uh. Amah lamkah tangnah loh anih he nangmih boeih hmaiah hing soepnah a paek. 
Acts3:17 Tedae manuca rhoek, na boei rhoek bangla kotalhnah neh kho na boe bal te ka ming coeng." 
Acts3:18 Tedae Pathen loh tonghma boeih kah ka neh a thui taengtae amah kah Khrih a patang ham te ni aka soep tangloeng coeng. 
Acts3:19 Te dongah yut uh lamtah ha mael uh laeh. Te daengah ni na tholhnah te hang huih eh. 
Acts3:20 Boeipa mikhmuh kah caihnah tue loh ha pai van saeh tila Khrih Jesuh te nangmih ham a coelh tih han tueih coeng. 
Acts3:21 Khosuen lamloh a tonghma rhoek, hlangcim rhoek kah a ka dongah Pathen loh a thui boeih te hlinsainah tue a pha duela vaan loh anih a doe ham a kuek." 
Acts3:22 Moses long khaw, “Kai bang tonghma te Boeipa na Pathen loh na manuca khui lamkah nangmih ham a phoe sak bitni. Anih loh nangmih taengah a thui atah a thui te tah a pum la hnatun uh." 
Acts3:23 Ana om te tonghma ol aka ya pawh hinglu boeih te tah pilnam lamloh a thupni,” a ti." 
Acts3:24 Te dongah Samuel lamloh tonghma rhoek boeih neh a hnukthoi boeih long khaw a thui tih, tihnin ah a doek uh." 
Acts3:25 Nangmih tah tonghma rhoek neh paipi kah a ca rhoek la na om uh. Te te Khohni loh na pa rhoek taengah a hal coeng. Te dongah Abraham te, “Na tiingan dongah, diklai nurhui parhui boeih te a yoethen ni,” a ti nah." 
Acts3:26 Na halangnah te rhip na mael tak tih nangmih yoethen sak ham ni Pathen loh a ca te nangmih taengah lamhma la han tueih tih a thoh sak. 
Acts4:1 Pilnam ham a thui uh vaengah khosoih rhoek, bawkim kah imtawt boei neh Sadducee rhoek loh amih te a paan uh." 
Acts4:2 Pilnam a thuituen tih duek lamloh thohkoepnah te Jesuh rhangneh a doek dongah a yakdam uh. 
Acts4:3 Te dongah amih rhoi te kut a hlah thil uh tih a vuen duela thongim ah a khueh uh. Te vaengah hlaemhmah la om coeng. 
Acts4:4 Tedae ol aka hnatun rhoek a yet ngai long tah a tangnah uh dongah hlang he hlangmi la thawng nga tluk lo uh. 
Acts4:5 A vuen a pha vaengah a boei rhoek, patong rhoek neh cadaek rhoek te Jerusalem ah tingtun uh." 
Acts4:6 Te vaengah khosoihham Annas neh Kaiaphas, Johan, Alexander neh namtom khuikah khosoihpuei khaw boeih om uh." 
Acts4:7 Amih rhoi te a laklung ah a pai sak uh tih, “Mebang thaomnah, u ming nen lae he he na saii rhoi, “tila a cae uh." 
Acts4:8 Peter tah mueihla cim neh a bae dongah amih te, “Pilnam kah boei rhoek neh patong rhoek," 
Acts4:9 Tattloel hlang pakhat sokah bibi then kongah tihnin ah boelh la ka om rhoi atah, ba nen lae anih a hoeih." 
Acts4:10 Nazareth Jesuh Khrih ming nen ni tila nangmih boeih neh Israel pilnam boeih loh hmat la om saeh. Anih te na tai uh dae a Pathen loh duek khui lamkah a thoh coeng. Anih rhangnen ni he hlangtlo loh nangmih hmaiah sading la a pai. 
Acts4:11 Amah tah nangmih imsa rhoek loh a hnaelcoe lungto la om dae imkil kah tlungyun la poeh coeng. 
Acts4:12 Te dongah khangnah long he a tloe mebang dongah khaw a om moenih. Mamih aka khang ham a kuek tih vaan hmuikah hlang lakliah a paek he ming tloe a om moenih,” a ti nah." 
Acts4:13 Te vaengah Peter neh Johan kah a sayalh te a hmuh uh tih caa aka ming mueh hlang neh hlangthawt ni tite a hmuhming uh. Te phoeiah amih rhoi te Jesuh taengah om rhoi ti khaw a ming uh tih a ngai hmang uh. 
Acts4:14 Aka hoeih tih amih rhoi taengah aka pai hlang te khaw a hmuh uh dongah oelh ham khaw om voel pawh. 
Acts4:15 Te dongah amih rhoi te khoboei im kah poengla caeh ham ol a paek uh. 
Acts4:16 Khat neh khat a nuemnai uh tih, “Hekah hlang rhoi he metlam n'saii uh eh. Amih rhoi pum dongah miknoek loh a poekhloep la tueng coeng tih Jerusalem kah khosa rhoek boeih ham khaw rhep a mingpha coeng dongah hnawt ham a coeng moenih." 
Acts4:17 Tedae pilnam taengla yilh a caeh voel pawt ham, a ming neh hlang pakhat taengah khaw thui pawt ham mah amih he hihham uh sih,” a ti uh." 
Acts4:18 Te dongah amih rhoi te a khue uh tih Jesuh ming dongah thuituen pawt ham neh thui loengloeng pawt ham a uen uh. 
Acts4:19 Tedae amih te Peter neh Johan loh a doo tih, “Pathen ol lakah nangmih ol hnatun lat ham Pathen hmaiah a thuem atah namamih loh laitloek uh nawn." 
Acts4:20 Ka hmuh neh ka yaak uh te ka thui pawt koinih a coeng moenih,” a ti nah." 
Acts4:21 Amih te metla a cawh ham khaw a hmuh uh pawt dongah a hihham uh tih a tueih uh. Tekah aka thoeng hno kongah pilnam pum loh Pathen te a thangpom uh. 
Acts4:22 Hoeihnah miknoek loh a thoeng thil hlang te tah a kum sawmli hlai a lo coeng dongah ni. 
Acts4:23 A loeih phoeiah amah rhoek taengla pawk rhoi tih khosoihham rhoek neh patong rhoek loh a thui boeih te amih taengah puen rhoi. 
Acts4:24 A yaak uh vaengah Pathen taengah ol huek a huel uh tih, “Boeikung, namah loh vaan neh diklai, tuitunli neh a khuikah boeih na saii." 
Acts4:25 A pa rhoek kah Pathen loh na tueihyoeih David kah a ka dongah Mueihla Cim neh, 'Balae tih namtom rhoek loh a sundaep uh tih pilnam loh a tlongtlaih la a mangtuk uh." 
Acts4:26 Diklai manghai rhoek neh boei rhoek tah amamih te tingtun uh tih BOEIPA neh a Khrih te a pai thil uh,” a ti." 
Acts4:27 Te dongah ni na koelh tangtae Jesuh, na taengom cim te Herod neh Pontius Pilat, namtom neh Israel pilnam loh, oltak la khopuei khuiah a tingtun thil uh." 
Acts4:28 Na kut loh a saii tih aka thoeng ham koi boeih te na mangtaengnah loh a nuen coeng. 
Acts4:29 Te dongah aw Boeipa, amih te hihhamnah he so lamtah na ol aka thui ham na sal rhoek te sayalh la boeih khueh laeh." 
Acts4:30 Hoeihnah ham na kut na yueng li vaengah na tueihyoeih cim Jesuh ming dongah miknoek neh khobae rhambae khaw thoeng coeng,” a ti uh." 
Acts4:31 A thangthui uh dongah tun a om nah hmuen khaw hinghoek uh tih Cim Mueihla neh boeih baetawt uh. Te dongah sayalh la Pathen kah ol khaw a thui uh. 
Acts4:32 Te dongah aka tangnah rhoek khuikah rhaengpuei tah thinko hinglu pakhat la a khueh uh. A khuehtawn te amah bueng ham ni aka ti u pakhat khaw om pawh. Tedae a cungkuem te amih ham tun om coeng. 
Acts4:33 Boeipa Jesuh thohkoepnah caeltueih rhoek loh a laipai neh thaomnah a len la a thuung uh vaengah amih boeih soah khaw lungvatnah muep om. 
Acts4:34 Im kung lo kung la aka om boeih loh a im a lo a yoih uh. 
Acts4:35 a yoih phu te caeltueih rhoek kah kho kung la a khuen uh tih a tloeng uh. Te phoeiah hlang boeih loh a ngoe tarhing ah rhip a tael uh dongah amih khuikah aka om boeih loh daeng voel pawh. 
Acts4:36 Te vaengah caeltueih rhoek loh Barnabas [Te tah thaphohnah capa ni a thuingaih] la a khue, Kuporos kah Levi hoel Joseph loh," 
Acts4:37 a lo khueh te a yoih vaengah tangka a khuen tih caeltueih rhoek kah kho kung ah a tloeng. 
Acts5:1 Tedae Hlang pakhat a ming ah Aninias neh a yuu Sapphira loh hnopai a yoih. 
Acts5:2 Tedae a phu te a uep. A yuu khaw a yaak sak phoeiah a ngen te a khuen tih caeltueih rhoek kah kho kungah cukdek a tloeng. 
Acts5:3 Te dongah Peter loh, “Ananias, balae tih Satan loh na thinko a hah sak, Mueihla Cim te na laithae thil. Te dongah ni khohmuen phu te na uep coeng." 
Acts5:4 Aka om tangtae tah namah taengah om tih na yoih vaengah namah ah saithainah a om moenih a? Balae tih na thinko khuiah te bang hno te na khueh. Hlang taeng bueng mueh la Pathen taengah khaw na laithae coeng,” a ti nah." 
Acts5:5 Te ol te Ananias loh a yaak vaengah cungku tih duek. Te dongah aka ya rhoek boeih te rhihnah loh muep a kun thil. 
Acts5:6 Te dongah cadong rhoek loh thoo uh tih anih te a cun uh phoeiah a khuen uh tih a up uh. 
Acts5:7 Khonoek pathum tluk di tih a om phoeiah olka aka om te a yuu loh a ming mueh la kun van. 
Acts5:8 Te vaengah anih te Peter loh, “Kai taengah thui laeh, khohmuen na thuung te heyet bueng nim,” a ti nah hatah, “Ue heyet ni,” a ti nah." 
Acts5:9 Tedae anih te Peter loh, “Balae tih Boeipa Mueihla noemcai ham na rhoih uh rhoi. Thohka kah na va aka up rhoek kah a kho loh nang khaw n'thak bal ni he,” a ti nah." 
Acts5:10 Te vaengah pahoi cungku tih a kho kungah duek bal. Te dongah cadong rhoek aka kun rhoek loh anih te a duek la a hmuh uh vaengah a khuen uh tih a va taengah a up uh. 
Acts5:11 Te dongah hlangboel boeih neh te te aka ya rhoek boeih te rhihnah loh muep a kun thil. 
Acts5:12 Caeltueih rhoek kah a kut loh pilnam taengah miknoek neh khobae rhambae muep a saii dongah Solomon impup ah thikat la boeih om uh. 
Acts5:13 Amih te a tloe loh ben ham ngaingaih pawt cakhaw amih te pilnam loh a oep. 
Acts5:14 Boeipa aka tangnah huta tongpa rhaengpuei loh taoe thap uh thae. 
Acts5:15 Te dongah Peter ha pawk atah a mueihlip rhung long khaw bet dah saeh tila tattloel te thingkong neh phakdoeng soah a ngol sak uh tih toltung la a khuen uh. 
Acts5:16 Jerusalem khopuei kaepvai kah rhaengpuei long khaw ha tingtun uh. Tattloel khaw, rhalawt mueihla loh a ven rhoek te khaw a khuen uh tih boeih hoeih uh." 
Acts5:17 Khosoihham a thoh nen tah a taengkah rhoek boeih, Sadducee kah buhlaelh la aka om rhoek loh kohlopnah neh khuk hah uh." 
Acts5:18 Te phoeiah caeltueih rhoek te kut a hlah thil uh tih thongim ah langya la a hlak uh. 
Acts5:19 Tedae khoyin ah Boeipa kah puencawn loh thongim thohka te a ong tih a mawt. 
Acts5:20 Te phoeiah amih rhoi te, “Cet rhoi, bawkim kah pilnam taengah pai rhoi lamtah hingnah ol he boeih thui rhoi,” a ti nah." 
Acts5:21 Mincang ah bawkim la kun rhoi tih a thuituen rhoi te a yaak uh. Te dongah khosoihham aka pawk rhoek neh a taengkah rhoek loh khoboei neh Israel ca khuikah paham rhoek te boeih a hueh uh tih amih rhoi aka lo ham thongim la a tueih uh. 
Acts5:22 Tedae tueihyoeih rhoek loh a pha uh vaengah amih rhoi te thongim khuiah a hmu uh pawt dongah bal uh tih puen uh. 
Acts5:23 Te vaengah, “Thongim te cakrhuet la boeih a khaih tih thohka ah aka tawtkung rhoek a pai uh khaw ka hmuh uh dae a ong vaengah a khuiah u khaw ka hmuh uh pawh,” a ti uh." 
Acts5:24 Bawkim kah imtawt boei neh khosoihham loh he ol a yaak vaengah amih ham te metlam a om co tila khobing uh. 
Acts5:25 Te vaengah pakhat ha pawk tih, “Thongim ah na khueh uh hlang rhoi loh bawkim ah pai rhoi tih pilnam a thuituen rhoi he, “tila amih taengah a puen pah." 
Acts5:26 Te dongah imtawt boei neh a tueihyoeih rhoek te cet uh tih amih rhoi te a mawt uh. Tedae pilnam kah a dae te a rhih uh dongah vikvueknah neh saii uh pawh. 
Acts5:27 A khuen uh neh amih rhoi te khoboei hmaiah a pai rhoi vaengah khosoihham loh a dawt tih," 
Acts5:28 “Te ming neh thuituen pawt ham nangmih rhoi taengah oluen khaw kang uen uh moenih a? Tedae nangmih kah thuituennah neh Jerusalem ah bae coeng he. Hlang thii he kaimih soah tla saeh na ti rhoi a?” a ti nah. 
Acts5:29 Peter neh caeltueih rhoek loh a doo uh, “Hlang ol lakah Pathen ol ngai lat ham a kuek." 
Acts5:30 A pa rhoek kah Pathen loh Jesuh a thoh coeng. Anih na ngawn uh tih thing dongah na hoei uh. 
Acts5:31 Israel te yutnah neh tholh khodawkngainah paek ham Pathen loh a bantang ah rhuihnun neh khangkung la a pomsang coeng. 
Acts5:32 Te dongah kaimih loh te olthang kah laipai la ka om uh tih, anih ol aka ngai rhoek te Pathen loh Mueihla Cim a paek coeng,” a ti rhoi." 
Acts5:33 Tedae aka ya rhoek loh phuk a paeng uh dongah amih te thup hamla cai uh. 
Acts5:34 Te vaengah Pharisee pakhat, a ming ah Gamaliel, pilnam boeih loh saya la a hinyah te, khoboei lakli ah thoo tih hlang rhoek te poeng la rhaih khueh ham ol a paek." 
Acts5:35 Te phoeiah amih te, “Israel hlang rhoek, he hlang rhoek taengah metla saii ham na cai uh khaw namamih ngaithuen uh." 
Acts5:36 Amih hlankah Theudas a cungpoeh hnin ah khaw amah te khat khat la om ham a thui dongah hlang he hlangmi yali tluk loh anih taengla bop uh. Tedae anih a thup uh vaengah anih aka ngaitang boeih loh boeih milh uh tih a honghi la poeh. 
Acts5:37 Hlangmi soepnah tue vaengah khaw Galilee kah Judah te phoe bal tih a hnukah pilnam te a yoek bal. Tedae anih khaw poci tih anih aka ngaitang boeih tah muep paltham uh. 
Acts5:38 Te dongah nangmih ham ka thui coeng he. Hekah hlang rhoek he nong tak uh lamtah hlah uh mai. He he hlang kah mangtaengnah neh a khoboe la a om atah a phae pah bitni. 
Acts5:39 Tedae Pathen lamkah la a om atah amih te na palet thai mahpawh, nangmih te boekoek la m'hmuh uh boel saeh,” a ti nah vaengah anih ol te a rhooi uh." 
Acts5:40 Te dongah caeltueih rhoek te a khue uh tih a tam uh. Jesuh ming neh thui pawt ham khaw a uen uh tih a hlah uh. 
Acts5:41 Te vaengah, “A ming ham yahbai nen khaw n'tiing uh pai,” a ti uh dongah khoboei hmai lamloh omngaih la mael uh." 
Acts5:42 Tedae bawkim khui neh im lamkah hnin takuem ah toeng mueh la a thuituen uh tih Khrih Jesuh te a phong uh. 
Acts6:1 Te vaeng tue ah hnukbang rhoek te ping uh tih, amih khuikah nuhmai te vuenhlaem kah bomnah loh a hlavawt hatah Hellenist rhoek loh Hebrew rhoek soah kohuetnah a khueh uh." 
Acts6:2 Te dongah caeltueih hlainit rhoek loh a hnukbang rhoek te rhaengpuei la a khue uh tih, “Caboei bulbo ham khaw Pathen kah olka te n'hnoo koinih mamih ham a rhoep koila om pawh." 
Acts6:3 Te dongah, manuca rhoek, nangmih khuikah mueihla, cueihnah neh aka baetawt tih a oep hlang parih ah tlap uh lamtah a ngoe dongkah ham he amih te hmoel uh sih." 
Acts6:4 Tedae kaimih tah thangthuinah neh olthangthen kah bibi te ka khuituk uh eh,” a ti uh." 
Acts6:5 Olka tah rhaengpuei loh boeih a yakngaih coeng dongah tangnah neh Mueihla Cim aka baetawt hlang, Stephen, Philip, Prokhoru, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas neh Antiok kah poehlip Nikolas te a tuek uh." 
Acts6:6 Amih te caeltueih rhoek hmaiah a pai sak uh tih thangthui neh kut a tloeng thil uh. 
Acts6:7 Te dongah Pathen kah olka loh rhoeng tih hnukbang rhoek kah a hlangmi tah Jerusalem ah muep ping uh. Hlangping long khaw tangnah dongah khosoih rhoek kah ol bahoeng a ngai uh. 
Acts6:8 Stephen khaw lungvatnah neh thaomnah a bae dongah pilnam taengah khobae rhambae neh miknoek muep a saii. 
Acts6:9 Tedae hoengpoek la a khue Kurena, Alexandria, Kilikia, Asia neh tunim lamkah hlangvang rhoek loh pai uh tih Stephen a oelh uh." 
Acts6:10 Tedae cueihnah neh, mueihla neh a thui te oelh uh thai pawh." 
Acts6:11 Te dongah hlang a caemtuh uh tih, “Moses neh Pathen soah a soehsal ol a thui te ka yaak uh,” a ti uh." 
Acts6:12 Pilnam neh patong rhoek khaw, cadaek rhoek khaw a huek uh. Ha pai uh vaengah anih te a paco tih khoboei taengla a thak uh." 
Acts6:13 Te phoeiah laithae laipai te a pai sak uh tih, “Hekah hlang long he pat mueh la hmuen cim neh olkhueng he ol a tha thil." 
Acts6:14 Nazareth Jesuh loh he hmuen he a palet vetih Moses loh mamih m'paek khosing te a thovael ni,' a ti te ka yaak uh,” a ti uh." 
Acts6:15 Khoboei im kah aka ngol rhoek boeih loh Stephen te a hmaitang uh vaengah a maelhmai te puencawn kah maelhmai bangla a hmuh uh. 
Acts7:1 Te dongah khosoihham loh, “Te tlam te om tang nim?” a ti nah." 
Acts7:2 Te vaengah Setephen loh, “Ka manuca rhoek neh a pa rhoek, ka hlang rhoek loh hnatun uh lah. Kharrhan kah a om hlan ah Mesopotamia ah a om vaengah ni thangpomnah Pathen loh a pa Abraham taengah a phoe pah coeng." 
Acts7:3 Te vaengah anih te, “Na khohmuen neh na cako taeng lamloh cet lamtah na paan ham khohmuen te tah nang kan tueng eh,” a ti nah." 
Acts7:4 Te dongah Khalden khohmuen lamloh nong tih Kharrhan ah kho a sak. Te lamloh a napa a duek phoeiah he khohmuen la amah puen uh tih te ah nangmih loh kho na sak uh coeng. 
Acts7:5 Te ah te rho a paek pawt dongah khotloeng pataeng khueh pawh. Te vaengah anih te camoe om hlan dae anih neh anih hnukah a tiingan taengah khohmuen te khoyo la paek ham ol a caeng. 
Acts7:6 Te dongah a tiingan loh hlanglang kho ah yinlai la a om ham khaw, amih te sal a bi sak uh vetih kum yali a phaep uh ham khaw Pathen loh a thui coeng." 
Acts7:7 Tedae Pathen loh, “Amih sal aka bi sak namtom te lai ka tloek ni. Te phoeiah cet uh vetih he hmuen ah kai m'bawk uh ni,” a ti." 
Acts7:8 Te phoeiah anih te yahvinrhetnah ham paipi a paek. Te dongah ni Isaak a cun vaengah khaw a hnin rhet dongah a rhet pah. Te phoeiah Isaak loh Jakob, Jakob loh patuel hlainit te a rhet pah." 
Acts7:9 Patuel rhoek tah Joseph taengah thatlai uh tih Egypt la a thuung uh. Tedae anih te Pathen loh a om puei. 
Acts7:10 Te dongah ni a phacip phabaem soeprhaep khui lamloh anih a hlawt tih Egypt manghai Pharaoh hmaiah anih te lungvatnah neh cueihnah a paek. Te phoeiah Egypt neh a imkhui pum aka kholcui ham a tuek. 
Acts7:11 Tedae khokha neh phacip phabaem loh Egypt neh Kanaan pum te a pai thil khungdaeng vaengah, a pa rhoek tah cakthae khaw dang uh pawh." 
Acts7:12 Egypt ah cang a om te Jakob loh a yaak vaengah lamhma la a pa rhoek te a tueih. 
Acts7:13 Tedae a pabae daengah Joseph loh a manuca rhoek taengah a phoe pah tih, Joseph kah namtu khaw Pharaoh taengah mingpha la coeng." 
Acts7:14 Te phoeiah Joseph loh a napa Jakob neh a cako hinglu sawmrhih panga te a tah tih boeih a khue. 
Acts7:15 Jakob tah Egypt la suntla dae amah khaw a pa rhoek khaw duek. 
Acts7:16 Te dongah Shekhem la a khuen uh tih, Shekhem kah Harmor koca rhoek taengah tangka phu neh Abraham loh a lai phuel ah a up uh." 
Acts7:17 Pathen loh Abraham taengkah a phong tangtae olkhueh tue loh a yoei coeng bangla, pilnam loh Egypt ah rhoeng uh tih ping uh." 
Acts7:18 Te vaengah Joseph aka ming mueh manghai pakhat te Egypt ah phoe. 
Acts7:19 Anih loh mamih namtu he a hoilae tih a pa rhoek a phaep. Cahni rhoek te hing boel saeh tila a saii tih a voeih sak. 
Acts7:20 Te vaeng tue ah Moses thaang tih Pathen taengah khaw sakthen la om. Anih te a napa im ah hla thum a cun. 
Acts7:21 Anih te a phap vaengah Pharaoh canu loh a rhuh tih ca a la a cun. 
Acts7:22 Te dongah Moses tah Egypt kah cueihnah cungkuem neh a toel tih a olka neh bitat dongah a yoeikoek la om. 
Acts7:23 Tedae kum sawmli a cup vaengah, a manuca, Israel ca rhoek te hip hamla a thinko ah a cuen pah." 
Acts7:24 Te vaengah hlang pakhat a hnueih te a hmuh tih a rhun. Te dongah a vueinan te kutthungnah a saii pah tih Egypt te a boh. 
Acts7:25 Pathen loh amih ham khangnah te anih kut dongah a paek te a manuca rhoek loh a hmuhming tila a poek dae a hmuhkming uh pawh. 
Acts7:26 Tedae a vuen khohnin ah amamih a hnueih uh thae te a hmuh. Te dongah, “Ka hlang rhoek, manuca la na om uh ta, balae khat neh khat thae na saii uh,” a ti nah tih rhoepnah ham amih te a sim." 
Acts7:27 Tedae imben a hnueih loh a tueihno tih, “Kaimih soah boei neh laitloek la nang u long n'tuek." 
Acts7:28 Hlaem kah Egypt na ngawn vaengkah a longim bangla kai he ngawn ham na ngaih pawt nim?” a ti nah. 
Acts7:29 Tekah ol dongah Moses khaw rhaelrham tih Midian kho ah yinlai la poeh. Te ah te capa panit a sak. 
Acts7:30 Kum sawmli a cup vaengah puencawn te Sinai tlang kah khosoek ah anih ham tangpuem hmai hmaitak khuiah a phoe pah. 
Acts7:31 A mangthui te a hmuh vaengah Moses loh a ngaihmang. Te dongah hmat hamla a paan hatah," 
Acts7:32 Kai tah na pa rhoek kah Pathen, Abraham, Isaak, Jakob kah Pathen ni,” tila Boeipa ol thoeng. Te dongah Moses tah a thuen neh om tih a hmat ham ngaingaih pawh." 
Acts7:33 Tedae anih te Boeipa loh, “Na kho dongkah khokhom te duul laeh. Na pai nah hmuen he diklai cim ni." 
Acts7:34 Egypt ah ka pilnam kah thakkhoeihnah te ka sawt ka sawt tih a hueinah te ka yaak coeng. Amih hlawt ham ka rhum coeng dongah halo laeh Egypt la nang kan tueih pawn eh,” a ti nah." 
Acts7:35 Moses te, 'Boei neh laitloek la nang u long n'tuek,' a ti uh tih hnawt uh cakhaw, tangpuem khuiah anih taengla aka phoe puencawn kut dongah anih te boei neh tlankung la Pathen loh a tueih." 
Acts7:36 Anih loh amih te a mawt vaengah khobae rhambae neh miknoek te Egypt kho neh Tuipuei Sen ah khaw, khosoek kah kum sawmli khuiah khaw a saii." 
Acts7:37 Israel ca rhoek taengah, “Na ming manuca khui lamloh kai bang tonghma pakhat te Pathen loh nangmih ham a phoe sak ni, “aka ti khaw Moses amah ni." 
Acts7:38 khosoek kah hlangboel taengah, Sinai tlang ah anih aka voek puencawn neh a pa rhoek taengah aka om khaw amah ni. Mamih taengah paek ham aka hing olrhuh khaw anih long ni a doe." 
Acts7:39 A pa rhoek loh anih taengah olngai la om ham ngaih uh pawt tih a tueihno uh. Te dongah a thinko khuiah Egypt la mael uh. 
Acts7:40 Aaron te khaw, “Mamih ham pathen saii lamtah anih te mamih hmaiah lamhma saeh. Moses loh Egypt kho lamkah mamih m'mawt sut amah te metla a om khaw m'ming uh moenih,” a ti uh." 
Acts7:41 Amah tekah khohnin vaengah vaito muei a hlawn uh tih mueirhol taengah hmueih a nawn uh. Tedae amamih kah kutsai nen ni a hmae uh. 
Acts7:42 Te dongah Pathen loh a mael tak tih vaan caempuei bawk sak ham amih te a voeih. Tonghma rhoek kah cabu dongah a daek bangla, Israel imkhui loh khosoek kah kum sawmli te kai taengah saha neh hmueih nang khuen moenih." 
Acts7:43 Molokh kah dap neh na pathen Rhemphan aisi ni na puen uh. Amih te bawk ham a muei na saii uh. Te dongah nangmih Babylon rhalvangan kan thak ni. 
Acts7:44 Laipai kah dap tah khosoek kah a pa rhoek taengah khaw om coeng. A uen bangla a mueimae a hmuh tarhing ah saii ham ni Moses taengah a thui. 
Acts7:45 Te te a khuen uh tih David tue duela a pa rhoek kah mikhmuh ah Pathen loh a khawkkhek namtom rhoek kah khoyo khuila a pa rhoek neh Joshua loh a pak. 
Acts7:46 David tah Pathen hmaiah lungvatnah a dang dongah Jakob imkhui te rhaehim hmuh sak ham a bih. 
Acts7:47 Te dongah ni a im khaw Solomon loh a sak. 
Acts7:48 Tedae tonghma loh a thui bangla Khohni tah kutsai dongah kho a sak moenih. 
Acts7:49 Vaan ke ka ngolkhoel ni, diklai khaw ka kho ham khotloeng ni. Mebang im nim kai ham na sak uh, Boeipa loh, “melae ka duemnah hmuen,” a ti." 
Acts7:50 A cungkuem he ka kut loh a saii moenih a? 
Acts7:51 Na thinko neh na hna te a maltalh neh a dul la om. Nangmih loh Mueihla Cim te na tloelh ninoe tih nangmih khaw na pa rhoek bangla na om uh. 
Acts7:52 Tonghma rhoek te na pa rhoek loh a hnaemtaek uh moenih a? Hlang dueng aka lo kawng aka thui rhoek te khaw a ngawn uh. Tahae ah nangmih khaw hlangyoi neh hlang aka ngawn la na om uh. 
Acts7:53 Anih loh puencawn kah hoihaengnah neh olkhueng a dang dae na tuem uh pawh,” a ti nah." 
Acts7:54 Te te a yaak uh vaengah a thinko ah paeng uh tih a no a rhueng uh. 
Acts7:55 Tedae Mueihla Cim neh a bae la a om dongah vaan la a hmaitang vaenghah Pathen kah thangpomnah neh Pathen bantang ah aka pai Jesuh te a hmuh. 
Acts7:56 Te dongah, “Vaan ke ong uh tih hlang capa loh Pathen bantang ah a pai te ka hmuh ke,” a ti." 
Acts7:57 Te vaengah ol ue la pang uh tih a hna te a buem uh. Te phoeiah anih soah huek cu uh. 
Acts7:58 Te phoeiah khopuei kah a voel la a sol uh tih a dae uh. Laipai rhoek long khaw a himbai te Saul la a khue cadong kah kho ah a pit uh. 
Acts7:59 A dae uh vaengah Stephen loh Pathen a khue tih, “Boeipa Jesuh, ka mueihla he doe lah,” a ti." 
Acts7:60 Te phoeiah khuklu cungkueng tih ol ue la pang. Boeipa, tholhnah he amih taengah pai sak boeh,” a ti tih mawt ip." 
Acts8:1 Anih a ngawnnah te aka rhoih la Sual khaw om. Te vaeng tue ah a nah la hlangboel hnaemtaeknah te Jerusalem ah om. Te dongah caeltueih rhoek bueng pawt atah hlang boeih loh Judea neh Samaria paeng tom la palang uh. 
Acts8:1 Anih a ngawnnah te aka rhoih la Sual khaw om. Te vaeng tue ah a nah la hlangboel hnaemtaeknah te Jerusalem ah om. Te dongah caeltueih rhoek bueng pawt atah hlang boeih loh Judea neh Samaria paeng tom la palang uh. 
Acts8:2 Stephen te aka cuep hlang rhoek loh a up uh tih anih te rhangsaenah a saii uh. 
Acts8:3 Tedae Saul tah im takuem la kun hlangboel te a phae. Huta tongpa te a mawt tih thongim ah a thak. 
Acts8:4 Te dongah aka palang rhoek long khaw caeh lam ah olthangthen a thui uh. 
Acts8:5 Te vaengah Philip tah Samaria kho la cet tih amih taengah Khrih te a hoe. 
Acts8:6 Philip loh a thui te hlangping loh a hnatung tih huek a yaak uh vaengah miknoek a saii te a hmuh uh. 
Acts8:7 Rhalawt mueihla aka kaem rhoek te khaw ol ue la pang uh tih muep nong uh. Aka khawn neh aka khaem rhoek khaw muep hoeih uh. 
Acts8:8 Te dongah khopuei khuiah omngaihnah te muep om. 
Acts8:9 Te vaengah kho khuikah aka om noek hlang pakhat, a ming ah Simon loh hlang a bi tih khat khat taengah amah te a len la om ham a ti dongah Samaria namtu te a limlum sak." 
Acts8:10 Anih te a yit a len hlang boeih loh a hnatung uh tih, “A khuet la a khue Pathen kah a thaomnah ni he,” a ti uh." 
Acts8:11 Amih te kum te yet khuiah hlangbi neh a limlum sak dongah ni anih te a hnatung uh. 
Acts8:12 Tedae Philip loh a phong Pathen ram kawng neh Jesuh Khrih ming te a tangnah uh dongah huta tongpa a nuem. 
Acts8:13 Simon amah long khaw a tangnah dongah a nuem tih Philip taengah aka khuituk la coeng. Miknoek neh thaomnah tanglue a saii te a hmuh vaengah limlum. 
Acts8:14 Samaria loh Pathen kah olka a doe te Jerusalem kah caeltueih rhoek loh a yaak uh vaengah amih taengla Peter neh Johan te a tueih uh. 
Acts8:15 A suntlak rhoi vaengah Mueihla Cim dang uh van saeh tila amih ham thangthui rhoi. 
Acts8:16 Boeipa Jesuh ming neh nuem tangtae la om uh coeng dae, amih te Mueihla Cim loh pakhat khaw tlak thil la om hlan." 
Acts8:17 Te dongah amih te kut a tloeng thil rhoi tih Mueihla Cim a dang uh. 
Acts8:18 Caeltueih rhoek kah kut a tloengnah lamloh Mueihla a paek te Simon loh a hmuh vaengah amih taengla tangka a khuen tih," 
Acts8:19 “Tahae kah saithainah he kai khaw m'pae uh lamtah kut ka tloeng thil sarhui loh Mueihla Cim dang van saeh,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:20 Tedae Peter loh anih te, “Pathen kah kutdoe he tangka la kaelh ham na poek dongah, na tangka te namah taengah pocinah la om saeh." 
Acts8:21 He olka dongah na hmulung neh khoyo a om moenih. Na thinko te Pathen hmaiah thaeng a om moenih. 
Acts8:22 Na phayoenah he yut lamtah Boeipa taengah thangthui. Na thinko kah mangtaengnah loh nang n'hlah vuek khaming. 
Acts8:23 Olkhaa hmuet neh boethae kah pinyennah khuiah na om te ka hmuh,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:24 Te dongah Simon loh a doo tih, “Boeipa taengah kai hamla nangmih loh thangtui uh lamtah na thui te kai soah ha thoeng boel saeh,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:25 Te rhoek long te a uen uh tih Boeipa kah olka a thui pa uh phoeiah, Jerusalem la bal uh. Samaria kah kho te yet te khaw a olthangthen phong pa uh." 
Acts8:26 Te vaengah Boeipa kah puencawn loh Philip te a voek tih, “Thoo, tuithim long ben la cet lamtah, Jerusalem lamloh Gaza la suntla thuk. Te ah te khosoek om lah ko,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:27 Te dongah thoo tih a caeh vaengah Ethiopia manghai nu Kandaki kah hlueikhu mangpa Ethiopia hlang pakhat lawt hum uh. Anih loh manghai nu kah khohrhang boeih a om thil. Te vaengah anih khaw bawk hamla Jerusalem ah ha lo. 
Acts8:28 Te tlam te om tih a bal vaengah amah kah leng khuiah ngol tih tonghma Isaiah te a tae. 
Acts8:29 Te vaengah Philip te Mueihla loh, “Leng ke paan lamtah ben lah,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:30 Puk a cuk vaengah tonghma Isaiah a tae te Philip loh a yaak tih, “Na tae te na yakming van nim te,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:31 Anih van long khaw, “Pakhat loh kai he long n'tueng pawt atah metlam ka coeng thai van eh,” a ti nah. Te phoeiah amah taengla luei tih ngol hamla Philip te a cael." 
Acts8:32 Te dongah a tae olcim kah a hmuet a hma tah he tlam he om. Tu bangla maeh la a mawt tih, tuca bangla a mul aka rhuep hmaiah olmueh la om. Te dongah a ka khaw ang pawh." 
Acts8:33 Amah kah laitloeknah loh amah te mathoe khuila a khuen. A hingnah te diklai lamkah a loh pah coeng dongah a rhuirhong te u long a thui eh? 
Acts8:34 Te vaengah hlueikhu boei loh Philip te a doo tih, “Nang kan dawt lah eh, tahae kah a thui tonghma he u nim ca? Amah kawng a? A tloe khat khat kah a kawng a?” a ti nah." 
Acts8:35 Te dongah Philip loh a ka a ong tih cacim lamloh a tong phoeiah Jesuh te anih taengah a phong. 
Acts8:36 Long te a caeh phai rhoi vaengah tui pakhat te a pha rhoi. Te vaengah hlueikhu boei loh, “Tui ke, nuem ham ba long lae kai n'kang,” a ti nah." 
Acts8:37 [Te dongah Philip loh, “Na thinko boeih neh na tangnah nim ca?,” a ti nah hatah, “Jesuh Khrih tah Pathen capa ni tila ka tangnah,” a ti nah.]" 
Acts8:38 Te dongah leng te pai sak ham ol a paek. Te phoeiah Philip khaw, hlueikhu boei khaw, tui khuila bok suntla rhoi tih anih te a nuem." 
Acts8:39 Tedae tui lamkah loh ha yoeng hang vaengah Philip te Boeipa kah Mueihla vik a khuen. Te vaengah hlueikhu boei loh anih te hmu voel pawh. Tedae a caehlong ah omngaih la cet. 
Acts8:40 Te phoeiah Philip tah Azotus ah phoe tih, aka cet te Kaisarea a pha hlan khuiah khopuei takuem la olthangthen a phong." 
Acts9:1 Te vaengah Saul tah Boeipa kah hnukbang rhoek te hihhamnah neh ngawnnah dongah phit pueng. 
Acts9:2 Te dongah khosoihham te a paan tih Damasku la, tunim la, longpuei kah a hmuh sarhui, huta khaw tongpa khaw a om atah khih pahoi tih, Jerusalem la thak ham te capat a bih," 
Acts9:3 Te phoeiah cet tih Damasku a pha tom vaengah Vaan lamkah vangnah loh anih te buengrhuet a tue," 
Acts9:4 Te vaengah diklai dongla bung tih ol pakhat a yaak tah, “Saul, Saul, balae tih kai nan hnaemtaek." 
Acts9:5 Te dongah, “Nang te ulae Boeipa,” a ti nah hatah, “Kai tah nang loh na hnaemtaek Jesuh ni," 
Acts9:6 Tedae thoo lamtah kho khuila kun laeh. Na saii hamla a kuek te namah taengah han thui bitni,” a ti." 
Acts9:7 Te vaengah anih neh aka yiin hmaih hlang rhoek loh tangawk la pai uh. Ol tah a yaak uh dae a muei tah hmu uh pawh," 
Acts9:8 Saul loh diklai lamkah a thoh hang vaengah a mik a dai hatah ba khaw hmu pawh," 
Acts9:9 Te dongah anih te a mawt uh tih Damasku la a khuen uh. Te vaengah hmu voel pawt tih a caak a ok mueh la hnin thum om. 
Acts9:10 Te vaengah hnukbang pakhat, a ming ah Ananias te Damasku ah om, Anih te Boeipa loh mangthui neh, “Ananias,” a ti nah. Te dongah, “Boeipa ka om he,” a ti nah." 
Acts9:11 Te phoeiah Boeipa loh anih te, “Thoo, imhlai laklo ah a dueng la a khue te paan lamtah, Tarsus hoel, a ming ah Sual te Judas im ah tlap, Anih te thangthui la ko te,”." 
Acts9:12 A mangthui dongah hlang pakhat, a ming ah Ananias te ha kun tih anih te kut a tloeng thil daengah ni a mik tueng rhoe a tueng eh,” a ti nah." 
Acts9:13 Te dongah Ananias loh, “Boeipa, tekah hlang kawng te hlang taeng lamloh boeih ka yaak coeng. Jerusalem ah na hlangcim taengah a saii te khaw bahoeng thae aih coeng." 
Acts9:14 He ah khaw na ming aka khue rhoek boeih te khih hamla khosoihham rhoek taengkah saithainah a khueh,” a ti nah." 
Acts9:15 Tedae Boeipa loh anih te, “Cet ngawn, anih tah Israel ca rhoek kah manghai rhoek neh namtom rhoek hmaiah ka ming aka phuei la kamah ham a tuek conghol paitaeh la om coeng." 
Acts9:16 Ka ming kongah aka patang ham anih bahoeng a kuek te amah taengah kamah loh ka tueng bitni,” a ti nah." 
Acts9:17 Te daengah Ananias loh cet tih im khuila kun, Te phoeiah anih te kut a tloeng thil tih, “Ka manuca Saul, na lo phai vaengkah longpuei ah nang taengla aka phoe Boeipa Jesuh loh kho na hmuh tih mueihla cim baetawt sak ham kai n'tueih coeng,” a ti nah." 
Acts9:18 Te vaengah a mik lamkah te a lip bangla hel khaek, Kho khaw a hmuh dongah thoo tih anih te a nuem." 
Acts9:19 Te phoeiah cak ok a doe tih a thaa koep sai, Te vaengah Damasku kah hnukbang rhoek taengah khohnin a yol a om," 
Acts9:20 Te phoeiah Jesuh tah Pathen capa ni tila tunim ah pahoi a hoe," 
Acts9:21 Aka hnatun rhoek boeih loh limlum uh tih, “Jerusalem ah Boeipa ming aka phoei rhoek aka thup te anih nim, anih pawt nim. Amih te pin vetih khosoihham rhoek taengah aka thak ham ni he la ha pawk dae,” a ti uh." 
Acts9:22 Tedae Saul tah lat thaphoh uh tih Damasku kah Judah khosa rhoek te a huek, Te tah Khrih ni tila a cui sak." 
Acts9:23 Tedae khohnin muep a di vaengah tah anih te ngawn ham Judah rhoek loh a taeng uh. 
Acts9:24 Amih kah mangtaengnah te Saul loh a ming. Te vaengah anih ngawn hamla khoyin neh khothaih ah khaw vongka te a tawt uh. 
Acts9:25 Tedae a hnukbang rhoek loh khoyin ah a khuen uh tih voh khuiah a sang uh phoeiah pangbueng longah a colh uh. 
Acts9:26 Jerusalem la a pawk vaengah hnukbang rhoek taengah kap ham a noemcai hatah anih te boeih a rhih uh. Hnukbang ni tila tangnah uh pawh," 
Acts9:27 Tedae Barnabas long tah anih te a sambai tih caeltueih rhoek taengla a khuen, Te phoeiah longpuei ah Boeipa a hmuh tih anih a voek te khaw, Damasku ah Jesuh ming dongah a sayalh te khaw, “amih taengah a thui pah." 
Acts9:28 Te dongah Jerusalem kah a voei a bal rhuet ah amih tengah om tih Boeipa ming neh sayalh la a thui. 
Acts9:29 Tedae a thui vaengah Hellenist rhoek neh oelh uh thae tih anih te ngawn ham cai uh. 
Acts9:30 A manuca rhoek loh a ming dongah anih te Kaiserea la a khuen uh tih Tarsus la a tueih uh. 
Acts9:31 Te vaengah Judea, Galilee neh Samaria pum boeih kah hlangboel long khaw ngaimongnah a dang, Boeipa rhihnah neh hlinsai uh tih pongpa uh. Te dongah Cim Mueihla kah thaphohnah neh pinguh uh." 
Acts9:31 Te vaengah Judea, Galilee neh Samaria pum boeih kah hlangboel long khaw ngaimongnah a dang, Boeipa rhihnah neh hlinsai uh tih pongpa uh. Te dongah Cim Mueihla kah thaphohnah neh pinguh uh." 
Acts9:32 Peter khaw khotom rhali aka hil la om tih Lydda kah khosa hlangcim rhoek taeng khaw a pha," 
Acts9:33 Te vaengah aka khawn tih, phakdoeng dongah kum rhet aka yalh, hlang pakhat, a ming ah Aeneas te a hmuh," 
Acts9:34 Peter loh, “Aeneas, Jesuh Khrih loh nang n'hoeih sak coeng. Thoo lamtah namah te khoem uh laeh,” a ti nah vaengah hlat thoo," 
Acts9:35 Lydda neh Sharon kah khosa rhoek boeih loh anih te a hmuh uh vaengah Boeipa taengla bal uh. 
Acts9:36 Joppa ah khaw hnukbang pakhat, a ming ah Tabitha te om van. Te te Dorkas a ti tih a thuicaih, Anih tah khoboe then neh a soep la om tih doedannah khaw a saii," 
Acts9:37 Tedae a khohnin a pha vaengah tah anih te tlo tih duek, Te dongah anih te tui a hluk uh tih imhman ah a khueh uh." 
Acts9:38 Lydda neh Joppa he tah rhep a om dongah hnukbang rhoek loh Peter a om te a yaak uh. Te dongah hlang panit te a tueih uh tih, “Uelh mueh la kaimih taengah hang hil dae, “tila a tah uh." 
Acts9:39 Te dongah Peter te thoo tih amih te a puei, Anih a pha vaengah imhman la ana khuen uh. Anih a pai vanneh nuhmai rhoek loh boeih rhap uh tih Dorkas loh amih taengkah om vaengkah a saii angki neh himbai boeih te a tueng uh." 
Acts9:40 Tedae Peter loh poengla boeih a tueih tih khuklu cungkueng doela thangthui, Te phoeiah rhok taengla mael tih, “Tabitha, thoo,” a ti nah. Anih long khaw a mik te a daii hatah Peter te a hmuh tih koe ngol," 
Acts9:41 Te phoeiah anih te kut a doe tih a thoh, Hlangcim rhoek neh nuhmai rhoek te a khue tih Dorcas a hing te a tueng," 
Acts9:42 Joppa kah tom boeih loh a ming la om coeng dongah hlang te yet loh Boeipa te a tangnah uh. 
Acts9:43 Te vaengkah khohnin te yet a om khuiah Joppa kah hlang pakhat maehpho Simon taengah puet naeh," 
Acts10:1 Te vaengah Kaiserea kah hlang pakhat, a ming ah Kornelius, Italian caem la a khue khuikah rhalboei te om." 
Acts10:2 Anih te cuep tih a imko boeih loh Pathen a rhih. Pilnam taengah doedannah muep a saii tih Pathen taengah a yoeyah la thangthui. 
Acts10:3 Hnin at tah khonoek pako tluk vaengah a mangthui ah a hmuh. Te vaengah Pathen kah puencawn te anih taengla kun tih, “Kornelius,” a ti nah." 
Acts10:4 Anih te a hmaitang vaengah lakueng ngaiha la om tih, “Balae aka om Boeipa,” a ti nah. Te dongah anih te, “Na thangthuinah neh na doedannah loh Pathen hmaiah kutmuei la cet coeng." 
Acts10:5 Te dongah Joppa la hlang pahoi tueih lamtah Simon Peter la a khue hlang pakhat te tah laeh. 
Acts10:6 Anih te tuipuei kaengkah im aka om maehpho Simon taengah pah lah ko,” a ti nah." 
Acts10:7 Anih aka voek puencawn te a caeh van phoeiah tah imkhut rhoi neh amah aka khuituk rhoek khuikah aka cuep rhalkap te a khue. 
Acts10:8 Amih te a soep la a uen phoeiah Joppa la a tueih. 
Acts10:9 A vuen ah amih te cet uh tih kho a yoei thuem kah khonoek parhuk tluk vaengah Peter tah thangthui ham imphu la yoeng. 
Acts10:10 Te vaengah a pongnaeng la om tih caak ten ham khaw a ngaih. Tedae a tawn uh vaengah anih te amih taengah mueimang a om pah. 
Acts10:11 Te vaengah vaan ke ong uh tih hno pakhat loh a kil pali neh himbai len bangla ha suntla diklai la a colh te a hmuh. 
Acts10:12 A khuiah diklai kah rhamsa boeih neh rhulcai khaw, vaan kah vaa khaw om." 
Acts10:13 Te vaengah, “Peter thoo, ngawn lamtah ca,” tila anih taengla ol halo pah." 
Acts10:14 Tedae Peter loh, “Moenih, Boeipa, tanghnong tangaih neh rhalawt la aka om boeih he ka caak moenih,” a ti nah." 
Acts10:15 Tedae anih te a pabae kah ol bal loh, “Pathen loh a cim sak tangtae te nang loh poeih boeh,” a ti nah." 
Acts10:16 Te tlam te voei thum a om phoeiah tah hno te vaan la vil a loh. 
Acts10:17 Te dongah mangthui a hmuh te metlam a om poek eh tila Peter loh a khuiah khobing. Te vaengah Kornelius loh a tueih tih Simon im aka toem hlang rhoek khaw vongka ah pakcak ha pai uh. 
Acts10:18 Te vaengah pang uh tih, “Peter la a khue Simon te pah mai a he,” a ti uh." 
Acts10:19 Peter khaw mangthui dongkah te a poek li vaengah Mueihla loh, “Hlang pathum loh nang n'toem uh ke." 
Acts10:20 Thoo, suntla lamtah boelhkhoeh kolla amih taengah cet laeh. Kai long ni amih kan tueih,” a ti nah." 
Acts10:21 A suntlak phoeiah hlang rhoek te Peter loh, “Na toem uh te kai ni he. Mebang paelnaehnah nen nim na pai uh te,” a ti nah." 
Acts10:22 Te dongah amih loh, “Rhalboei Kornelius he hlang dueng la om tih Pathen a rhih dongah Judah namtu boeih long khaw a oep. Nang te amah im la tah tih nang lamkah olka hnatun sak ham hlangcim kah puencawn loh a mangthui coeng,” a ti uh." 
Acts10:23 Te dongah amih te a khue tih a pah sak. A vuen ah tah thoo tih amih taengla cet. Te vaengah Joppa lamkah manuca hlangvang rhoek loh anih te a puei uh. 
Acts10:24 A vuen patoeng bal vaengah Kaiserea la kun. Amih te Kornelius loh a lamso tih ana om coeng dongah a huiko neh paya tangkik te a hueh thil. 
Acts10:25 Peter ham pha tih a kun vaengah amah te Kornelius loh a doe, a kho kungah a bakop thil tih a bawk." 
Acts10:26 Tedae Peter loh anih te a thoh tih, “Thoo, kai kamah khaw hlang van ni,” a ti nah."

Acts10:34 Te dongah Peter loh a ka a ong tih, “Pathen loh tangyahnah a khueh pawt te oltak la ka pom coeng."

Acts10:39 Te dongah kaimih tah a cungkuem kah laipai rhoek ni. Te te Judah kho neh Jerusalem ah khaw a saii. Tedae amah te a ngawn uh tih thing dongah a hoei uh.

Acts10:41 Pilnam boeih taengah pawt tih Pathen kah a hmoel laipai rhoek taengah phoe coeng. Duek lamkah a thoh phoeiah anih loh mamih m'vael puei tih mamih loh anih n'ok puei uh. 
Acts10:42 Hlang duek hlang hing kah laitloekkung la Pathen loh anih a hmoel te pilnam taengah hoe tih uen ham mamih ng'uen.

Acts10:46 Amih kah ol a thui uh te a yaak uh vaengah Pathen te a oep uh.

Acts11:1 Namtom rhoek loh Pathen kah olka a doe uh te Judea ah aka om caeltueih rhoek neh manuca rhoek loh a yaak uh.

Acts11:4 Te dongah Peter loh amih taengah tuek tuek a saep pahoi tih,"

Acts11:20 Te vaengah amih khuiah khaw Kuporos neh Kurena hlang rhoek khaw bet om van. Amih tah Antiok la cet uh tih Hellenist rhoek taengah khaw a thui uh vaengah Boeipa Jesuh ni a thui uh.

Acts12:4 Amah te khaw a tuuk uh tih thongim ah a parhaeng uh. Anih aka tawt ham rhalkap rhoi li a khueh uh tih yoom phoeiah pilnam taengah phoe puei ham cai uh. 
Acts12:5 Peter tah thongim ah parhaeng ngawn cakhaw hlangboel te anih ham Pathen taengah thangthuinah nguen nguen aka khueh pah la om.

Acts12:7 Te vaengah Boeipa kah puencawn pakcak ha pai tih thong imkhui ah vangnah neh a tue. Te phoeiah Peter kah a vae te duem a bael pah phoeiah a haeng tih, “Thamaa la thoo lah,” a ti nah. Te vaengah a kut lamkah thirhui tah pahoi a tling pah." 
Acts12:8 Puencawn loh anih te, “Cihin khit lamtah na khokhom te buen laeh,” a ti nah tih a saii van tangloeng. Te phoeiah na himbai te bai lamtah kai m'vai lah,” a ti nah." 
Acts12:9 Cet tih a vai ngawn dae puencawn lamloh aka om hno he om taktak tila ming pawt tih mangthui a hmuh bangla a poek. 
Acts12:10 Thongim a cuek neh a pabae la ham poe uh tih khopuei la aka pawk thi vongka te a pha uh. Amih ham tah thohka khaw amah a ong uh coeng dongah imhlai laklo pakhat ah cet uh tih lamhma uh. Te vaengah puencawn tah anih taeng lamloh vil nong. 
Acts12:11 Te daengah Peter amah te a cueih ha om, “Boeipa loh a puencawn te han tueih tih Herod kut, Judah pilnam kah lamsonnah boeih lamloh kai n'hlawt te rhep ka ming coeng,” a ti." 
Acts12:12 A sap uh phoeiah tah Marku la a khue Johan kah a manu Mary im la cet. Tekah aka om rhoek khaw muep tingtun uh tih thangthui uh.
